## File: src/app/features/ait/pages/ait-credit-ledger/ait-credit-ledger.component.css
```css
/* ait-credit-ledger.component.css */
⋮----
/* ── KPI row ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.kpi-row {
.kpi-card {
.kpi-icon {
.kpi-green  { background: #f0fdf4; color: #16a34a; }
.kpi-blue   { background: #eff6ff; color: #2563eb; }
.kpi-purple { background: #f5f3ff; color: #7c3aed; }
.kpi-amber  { background: #fffbeb; color: #d97706; }
.kpi-label  { font-size: 11px; color: #6b7280; font-weight: 500; }
.kpi-value  { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 800; color: #111827; margin-top: 2px; }
.kpi-value.available { color: #16a34a; }
⋮----
/* ── Amount cells ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.used      { color: #6b7280; }
.remaining { color: #16a34a; font-weight: 700; }
⋮----
/* ── Credit avatar ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.credit-avatar { background: #f0fdf4; color: #16a34a; }
⋮----
/* ── Source/status/year badges — same as ait-list ──────────────────────── */
.return-code    { font-size:12px; font-weight:700; color:#1a3f8f; background:#e8eef9; padding:3px 8px; border-radius:5px; font-family:monospace; white-space:nowrap; }
.year-badge     { font-size:11px; font-weight:700; background:#e8eef9; color:#1a3f8f; padding:2px 7px; border-radius:4px; display:inline-block; }
.cat-badge      { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:4px; font-size:11px; font-weight:600; padding:3px 9px; border-radius:5px; }
.cat-import     { background:#e0f2f9; color:#0891b2; }
.cat-supplier   { background:#e8eef9; color:#1a3f8f; }
.cat-salary     { background:#e6f7f3; color:#1faa8b; }
.cat-contractor { background:#fef3e2; color:#f59e0b; }
.cat-rent       { background:#fce7f3; color:#be185d; }
.status-badge     { font-size:11px; font-weight:700; padding:4px 10px; border-radius:20px; }
.status-approved  { background:#dcfce7; color:#166534; }
.status-pending   { background:#fef3c7; color:#92400e; }
.status-credited  { background:#d1fae5; color:#065f46; }
.status-cancelled { background:#f3f4f6; color:#9ca3af; }
.status-rejected  { background:#fee2e2; color:#991b1b; }
⋮----
/* ── Detail modal ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.modal-overlay {
.detail-modal {
.detail-modal-header {
.detail-modal-title { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; color: #111827; }
.detail-modal-sub   { font-size: 12px; color: #6b7280; margin-top: 2px; font-family: monospace; }
.close-btn { background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; color: #6b7280; font-size: 16px; padding: 4px; }
.close-btn:hover { color: #111827; }
.detail-modal-body { padding: 20px; }
⋮----
/* ── Credit amounts grid ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.credit-amounts-grid {
.credit-amount-box {
.credit-amount-box.credited  { background: #eff6ff; border-color: #bfdbfe; }
.credit-amount-box.used      { background: #f9fafb; }
.credit-amount-box.remaining { background: #f0fdf4; border-color: #bbf7d0; }
.ca-label { font-size: 11px; color: #6b7280; font-weight: 500; }
.ca-val   { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 800; color: #111827; margin-top: 4px; }
.credit-amount-box.credited  .ca-val { color: #1d4ed8; }
.credit-amount-box.remaining .ca-val { color: #16a34a; }
⋮----
/* ── Detail sections ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.detail-section { margin-bottom: 20px; }
.detail-section-title {
.empty-state-sm {
⋮----
/* ── Application list ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.application-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; }
.app-item {
.app-header {
.app-detail {
.app-reversal { font-size: 11px; color: #dc2626; margin-top: 4px; font-style: italic; }
⋮----
/* ── Meta grid ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.detail-meta-grid { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; }
.meta-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; }
.meta-label { font-size: 12px; color: #6b7280; }
.meta-val   { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #111827; }
⋮----
.data-table { min-width: 1000px; }
```

## File: src/app/features/ait/pages/ait-credit-ledger/ait-credit-ledger.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>AIT Credit Ledger</h4>
    <p>View your advance income tax credits available for ITR adjustment.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" routerLink="/ait">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to AIT
  </button>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <!-- Summary KPI cards -->
  <div class="kpi-row">
    <div class="kpi-card">
      <div class="kpi-icon kpi-green"><i class="bi bi-cash-coin"></i></div>
      <div class="kpi-body">
        <div class="kpi-label">Total Credited</div>
        <div class="kpi-value">{{ formatCurrency(totalCredited) }}</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi-card">
      <div class="kpi-icon kpi-blue"><i class="bi bi-check2-circle"></i></div>
      <div class="kpi-body">
        <div class="kpi-label">Available Credit</div>
        <div class="kpi-value available">{{ formatCurrency(totalAvailable) }}</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi-card">
      <div class="kpi-icon kpi-purple"><i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i></div>
      <div class="kpi-body">
        <div class="kpi-label">Used Against ITR</div>
        <div class="kpi-value">{{ formatCurrency(totalUsed) }}</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi-card">
      <div class="kpi-icon kpi-amber"><i class="bi bi-layers"></i></div>
      <div class="kpi-body">
        <div class="kpi-label">Total Entries</div>
        <div class="kpi-value">{{ credits.length }}</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Status Filter Tabs -->
  <div class="status-tabs">
    <button class="stab" [class.active]="filterStatus === ''" (click)="filterStatus = ''; applyFilter()">
      All <span class="stab-count">{{ credits.length }}</span>
    </button>
    <button class="stab approved" [class.active]="filterStatus === 'AVAILABLE'" (click)="filterStatus = 'AVAILABLE'; applyFilter()">
      Available <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('AVAILABLE') }}</span>
    </button>
    <button class="stab pending" [class.active]="filterStatus === 'PARTIALLY_USED'" (click)="filterStatus = 'PARTIALLY_USED'; applyFilter()">
      Partial <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('PARTIALLY_USED') }}</span>
    </button>
    <button class="stab credited" [class.active]="filterStatus === 'FULLY_USED'" (click)="filterStatus = 'FULLY_USED'; applyFilter()">
      Fully Used <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('FULLY_USED') }}</span>
    </button>
  </div>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm" style="color:#7c3aed"></div>
    <span>Loading credit ledger...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Desktop Table -->
  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>AIT Reference</th>
          <th>Source Type</th>
          <th>Fiscal Year</th>
          <th>Credited Amount</th>
          <th>Used</th>
          <th>Remaining</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Credited On</th>
          <th>Actions</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let c of filtered; let i = index">
          <td>{{ i + 1 }}</td>

          <td><span class="return-code">{{ c.aitReferenceNo }}</span></td>

          <td>
            <span class="cat-badge" [ngClass]="getSourceClass(c.sourceType)">
              <i class="bi" [ngClass]="getSourceIcon(c.sourceType)"></i>
              {{ getSourceLabel(c.sourceType) }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td><span class="year-badge">{{ c.fiscalYearName || '—' }}</span></td>

          <td class="amt-cell">{{ formatCurrency(c.creditedAmount) }}</td>
          <td class="amt-cell used">{{ formatCurrency(c.usedAmount) }}</td>
          <td class="amt-cell remaining">{{ formatCurrency(c.remainingAmount) }}</td>

          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(c.status)">
              {{ getStatusLabel(c.status) }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>{{ c.creditedAt | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}</td>

          <td>
            <div class="action-btns">
              <button class="btn-view" (click)="viewDetail(c.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> Detail
              </button>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>

        <tr *ngIf="filtered.length === 0">
          <td colspan="10">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-cash-coin"></i>
              <p>No AIT credits found.</p>
              <small>Credits appear here after your AIT records are approved and credited by an officer.</small>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Cards -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" style="padding:12px;" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let c of filtered">
      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar credit-avatar">
            <i class="bi bi-cash-coin"></i>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ c.aitReferenceNo }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ c.fiscalYearName }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(c.status)">
          {{ getStatusLabel(c.status) }}
        </span>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Source</label>
          <span class="cat-badge" [ngClass]="getSourceClass(c.sourceType)">
            {{ getSourceLabel(c.sourceType) }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Credited Amount</label>
          <span>{{ formatCurrency(c.creditedAmount) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Remaining</label>
          <span class="remaining">{{ formatCurrency(c.remainingAmount) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Credited On</label>
          <span>{{ c.creditedAt | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-actions">
        <button class="btn-view" (click)="viewDetail(c.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> Detail
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filtered.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-cash-coin"></i>
      <p>No AIT credits found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<!-- Detail Drawer / Modal -->
<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="selectedCredit" (click)="closeDetail()">
  <div class="detail-modal" (click)="$event.stopPropagation()">
    <div class="detail-modal-header">
      <div>
        <div class="detail-modal-title">Credit Detail</div>
        <div class="detail-modal-sub">{{ selectedCredit.aitReferenceNo }}</div>
      </div>
      <button class="close-btn" (click)="closeDetail()">
        <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
      </button>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-modal-body">
      <!-- Amounts summary -->
      <div class="credit-amounts-grid">
        <div class="credit-amount-box credited">
          <div class="ca-label">Total Credited</div>
          <div class="ca-val">{{ formatCurrency(selectedCredit.creditedAmount) }}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="credit-amount-box used">
          <div class="ca-label">Used</div>
          <div class="ca-val">{{ formatCurrency(selectedCredit.usedAmount) }}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="credit-amount-box remaining">
          <div class="ca-label">Remaining</div>
          <div class="ca-val">{{ formatCurrency(selectedCredit.remainingAmount) }}</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Applications history -->
      <div class="detail-section">
        <div class="detail-section-title">
          <i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i> Applied Against ITRs
        </div>
        <div *ngIf="!selectedCredit.applications?.length" class="empty-state-sm">
          <i class="bi bi-inbox"></i> Not yet applied to any ITR.
        </div>
        <div class="application-list" *ngIf="selectedCredit.applications?.length">
          <div class="app-item" *ngFor="let app of selectedCredit.applications">
            <div class="app-header">
              <span class="return-code">{{ app.itrReturnNo }}</span>
              <span class="status-badge"
                [ngClass]="app.status === 'APPLIED' ? 'status-approved' : 'status-rejected'">
                {{ app.status }}
              </span>
            </div>
            <div class="app-detail">
              <span>Applied: <strong>{{ formatCurrency(app.appliedAmount) }}</strong></span>
              <span>·</span>
              <span>{{ app.appliedAt | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}</span>
              <span>·</span>
              <span>{{ app.appliedBy }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="app-reversal" *ngIf="app.reversalReason">
              Reversal: {{ app.reversalReason }}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Meta -->
      <div class="detail-section">
        <div class="detail-section-title">
          <i class="bi bi-info-circle"></i> Credit Info
        </div>
        <div class="detail-meta-grid">
          <div class="meta-row">
            <span class="meta-label">Credited By</span>
            <span class="meta-val">{{ selectedCredit.creditedBy }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="meta-row">
            <span class="meta-label">Credited At</span>
            <span class="meta-val">{{ selectedCredit.creditedAt | date:'dd MMM yyyy, HH:mm' }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="meta-row" *ngIf="selectedCredit.notes">
            <span class="meta-label">Notes</span>
            <span class="meta-val">{{ selectedCredit.notes }}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/audit-management/pages/assessment-review/assessment-review.component.html
```html
<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     assessment-review.component.html
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Propose Assessment</h4>
    <p>Calculate and record the assessment order for this audit case.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="breadcrumb-nav">
    <span routerLink="/audits" class="bc-link">Audits</span>
    <i class="bi bi-chevron-right bc-sep"></i>
    <span class="bc-link" [routerLink]="['/audits', caseId]">Case #{{ caseNo }}</span>
    <i class="bi bi-chevron-right bc-sep"></i>
    <span class="bc-current">Assessment</span>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper" *ngIf="auditCase">

  <!-- Case info header strip -->
  <div class="case-info-strip">
    <div class="cis-item">
      <i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i>
      <div><label>Taxpayer</label><span>{{ auditCase.taxpayerName }}</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="cis-item">
      <i class="bi bi-card-text"></i>
      <div><label>TIN</label><span class="code-val">{{ auditCase.tinNumber }}</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="cis-item">
      <i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i>
      <div><label>Fiscal Year</label><span>{{ auditCase.fiscalYear || '—' }}</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="cis-item">
      <i class="bi bi-receipt"></i>
      <div><label>Tax Type</label><span>{{ auditCase.taxType }}</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="cis-item">
      <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
      <div><label>Findings</label><span>{{ auditCase.findingCount }}</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <form [formGroup]="assessForm" (ngSubmit)="onSubmit()" novalidate>
    <div class="row g-3">

      <!-- LEFT: Income & Tax Comparison -->
      <div class="col-lg-7">

        <div class="form-section-card">
          <div class="form-section-header">
            <div class="fsh-icon"><i class="bi bi-bar-chart-fill"></i></div>
            <div><h6>Income &amp; Tax Comparison</h6><p>Declared vs assessed amounts.</p></div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-section-body">
            <div class="comparison-grid">
              <div class="cg-header">
                <span>Category</span><span>Declared (BDT)</span><span>Assessed (BDT)</span>
              </div>
              <div class="cg-row">
                <label>Total Income</label>
                <input type="number" class="form-control form-control-sm"
                  formControlName="declaredIncome" min="0" (input)="recalculate()" />
                <input type="number" class="form-control form-control-sm assessed-input"
                  formControlName="assessedIncome" min="0" (input)="recalculate()" />
              </div>
              <div class="cg-row">
                <label>Total Tax</label>
                <input type="number" class="form-control form-control-sm"
                  formControlName="declaredTax" min="0" (input)="recalculate()" />
                <input type="number" class="form-control form-control-sm assessed-input"
                  formControlName="assessedTax" min="0" (input)="recalculate()" />
              </div>
              <div class="cg-row cg-variance">
                <label>Additional Tax</label>
                <span></span>
                <div class="variance-display">
                  <input type="number" class="form-control form-control-sm text-danger fw-bold"
                    formControlName="additionalTax" min="0" (input)="recalculate()" />
                  <span class="auto-hint">auto-calc</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="form-section-card">
          <div class="form-section-header">
            <div class="fsh-icon warning"><i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i></div>
            <div><h6>Penalty</h6><p>Applicable penalty on additional tax.</p></div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-section-body">
            <div class="row g-3">
              <div class="col-md-4">
                <div class="form-group">
                  <label class="form-label">Penalty Rate (%)</label>
                  <input type="number" class="form-control" formControlName="penaltyRate"
                    min="0" max="100" step="0.01" (input)="calcPenalty()" />
                </div>
              </div>
              <div class="col-md-8">
                <div class="form-group">
                  <label class="form-label">Penalty Amount (BDT)</label>
                  <input type="number" class="form-control text-warning fw-bold"
                    formControlName="penaltyAmount" min="0" (input)="recalculate()" />
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="form-section-card">
          <div class="form-section-header">
            <div class="fsh-icon danger"><i class="bi bi-percent"></i></div>
            <div><h6>Interest</h6><p>Interest on unpaid tax (monthly).</p></div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-section-body">
            <div class="row g-3">
              <div class="col-md-4">
                <div class="form-group">
                  <label class="form-label">Monthly Rate (%)</label>
                  <input type="number" class="form-control" formControlName="interestRate"
                    min="0" max="5" step="0.01" (input)="calcInterest()" />
                </div>
              </div>
              <div class="col-md-4">
                <div class="form-group">
                  <label class="form-label">Months</label>
                  <input type="number" class="form-control" formControlName="interestMonths"
                    min="0" (input)="calcInterest()" />
                </div>
              </div>
              <div class="col-md-4">
                <div class="form-group">
                  <label class="form-label">Interest Amount (BDT)</label>
                  <input type="number" class="form-control text-danger"
                    formControlName="interestAmount" min="0" (input)="recalculate()" />
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="form-section-card">
          <div class="form-section-header">
            <div class="fsh-icon"><i class="bi bi-file-text-fill"></i></div>
            <div><h6>Order Details</h6><p>Findings summary, legal basis and appeal rights.</p></div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-section-body">
            <div class="form-group mb-3">
              <label class="form-label">Findings Summary</label>
              <textarea class="form-control" rows="4" formControlName="findingsSummary"
                placeholder="Summarize the key findings that led to this assessment..."></textarea>
            </div>
            <div class="form-group mb-3">
              <label class="form-label">Legal Basis</label>
              <textarea class="form-control" rows="3" formControlName="legalBasis"
                placeholder="Applicable sections, rules, and statutory provisions..."></textarea>
            </div>
            <div class="form-group mb-3">
              <label class="form-label">Appeal Rights</label>
              <textarea class="form-control" rows="2" formControlName="appealRights"></textarea>
            </div>
            <div class="form-group">
              <label class="form-label">Payment Deadline</label>
              <input type="date" class="form-control" formControlName="paymentDeadline" />
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>

      <!-- RIGHT: Live Demand Summary -->
      <div class="col-lg-5">
        <div class="demand-summary-card sticky-top" style="top: 80px;">
          <div class="dsc-header">
            <i class="bi bi-calculator-fill"></i>
            <h6>Total Demand Calculation</h6>
          </div>
          <div class="dsc-body">
            <div class="dsc-row">
              <label>Additional Tax</label>
              <span>{{ live.additionalTax | number:'1.2-2' }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="dsc-row">
              <label>Penalty</label>
              <span class="text-warning">{{ live.penaltyAmount | number:'1.2-2' }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="dsc-row">
              <label>Interest</label>
              <span class="text-danger">{{ live.interestAmount | number:'1.2-2' }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="dsc-divider"></div>
            <div class="dsc-row total">
              <label>Total Demand (BDT)</label>
              <span>{{ live.totalDemand | number:'1.2-2' }}</span>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Threshold warning -->
          <div class="dsc-threshold-warn" *ngIf="live.totalDemand >= 500000">
            <i class="bi bi-shield-exclamation"></i>
            High-value assessment (&gt; 5 lakh). Supervisor approval will be required.
          </div>

          <!-- Income comparison mini chart -->
          <div class="dsc-income-compare" *ngIf="live.assessedIncome > 0">
            <div class="dic-bar">
              <div class="dic-label">Declared Income</div>
              <div class="dic-track">
                <div class="dic-fill declared"
                  [style.width.%]="getBarWidth(live.declaredIncome, live.assessedIncome)">
                </div>
              </div>
              <div class="dic-amount">{{ live.declaredIncome | number:'1.0-0' }}</div>
            </div>
            <div class="dic-bar">
              <div class="dic-label">Assessed Income</div>
              <div class="dic-track">
                <div class="dic-fill assessed" style="width:100%"></div>
              </div>
              <div class="dic-amount">{{ live.assessedIncome | number:'1.0-0' }}</div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="dsc-actions">
            <button type="button" class="btn-cancel w-100 mb-2"
              [routerLink]="['/audits', caseId]">Cancel</button>
            <button type="submit" class="btn-submit w-100"
              [disabled]="assessForm.invalid || isSubmitting">
              <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-1" *ngIf="isSubmitting"></span>
              <i class="bi bi-calculator-fill me-1" *ngIf="!isSubmitting"></i>
              Propose Assessment
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </form>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/auth/pages/forgot-password/forgot-password.component.html
```html
<div class="auth-shell">
  <div class="auth-card">

    <!-- Header -->
    <div class="auth-header">
      <div class="auth-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-envelope-lock-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <h2>Forgot Password</h2>
      <p>Enter your registered email address and we'll send you a reset link.</p>
    </div>

    <!-- Success State -->
    <div class="success-box" *ngIf="sent">
      <div class="success-icon-wrap">
        <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <h3>Reset Link Sent!</h3>
      <p>
        If an account exists for <strong>{{ email }}</strong>, a password reset
        link has been sent. Please check your inbox and spam folder.
      </p>
      <p class="expiry-note">The link will expire in <strong>30 minutes</strong>.</p>
      <button class="btn-primary" (click)="goToLogin()">
        <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to Login
      </button>
    </div>

    <!-- Form -->
    <ng-container *ngIf="!sent">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>Email Address</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input
            type="email"
            class="form-input"
            placeholder="Enter your registered email"
            [(ngModel)]="email"
            (keyup.enter)="onSubmit()"
          />
        </div>
      </div>

      <button class="btn-primary" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isLoading">
        <span *ngIf="!isLoading">
          <i class="bi bi-send-fill"></i> Send Reset Link
        </span>
        <span *ngIf="isLoading">
          <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>
          Sending...
        </span>
      </button>

      <div class="auth-footer">
        <a (click)="goToLogin()" class="back-link">
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to Login
        </a>
      </div>
    </ng-container>

  </div>

  <div class="auth-brand">
    <i class="bi bi-bank2"></i>
    <span>NBR Portal — Government of Bangladesh</span>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/auth/pages/reset-password/reset-password.component.html
```html
<div class="auth-shell">
  <div class="auth-card">

    <div class="auth-header">
      <div class="auth-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-lock-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <h2>Reset Password</h2>
      <p>Enter your new password below.</p>
    </div>

    <!-- Success -->
    <div class="success-box" *ngIf="success">
      <div class="success-icon-wrap">
        <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <h3>Password Reset!</h3>
      <p>Your password has been updated successfully. Redirecting to login...</p>
    </div>

    <!-- Form -->
    <ng-container *ngIf="!success">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>New Password</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input
            type="password"
            class="form-input"
            placeholder="At least 8 characters"
            [(ngModel)]="password"
          />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label>Confirm Password</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input
            type="password"
            class="form-input"
            placeholder="Re-enter new password"
            [(ngModel)]="confirmPassword"
            (keyup.enter)="onSubmit()"
          />
        </div>
        <div class="password-match-hint"
             *ngIf="confirmPassword && password !== confirmPassword">
          <i class="bi bi-exclamation-circle-fill"></i> Passwords do not match
        </div>
      </div>

      <button class="btn-primary" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isLoading">
        <span *ngIf="!isLoading">
          <i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Reset Password
        </span>
        <span *ngIf="isLoading">
          <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>
          Resetting...
        </span>
      </button>
    </ng-container>

  </div>

  <div class="auth-brand">
    <i class="bi bi-bank2"></i>
    <span>NBR Portal — Government of Bangladesh</span>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/auth/pages/unauthorized/unauthorized.component.html
```html
<div class="unauth-container">
  <div class="unauth-card">

    <div class="unauth-icon-wrap">
      <div class="unauth-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-shield-lock-fill"></i>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="unauth-badge">403 Forbidden</div>

    <h2 class="unauth-title">Access Denied</h2>
    <p class="unauth-desc">
      You do not have permission to view this page.
      This section requires a higher access level than your current role allows.
    </p>
    <p class="unauth-hint">
      <i class="bi bi-info-circle me-1"></i>
      If you believe this is a mistake, please contact your system administrator.
    </p>

    <div class="unauth-actions">
      <button class="btn-back-hist" (click)="goBack()">
        <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Go Back
      </button>
      <button class="btn-dashboard" (click)="goToDashboard()">
        <i class="bi bi-house-fill"></i> Dashboard
      </button>
      <button class="btn-logout" (click)="logout()">
        <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-right"></i> Logout
      </button>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/auth/pages/verify-email/verify-email.component.html
```html
<div class="verify-shell">
  <div class="verify-card">
    <div *ngIf="isLoading" class="spinner"></div>

    <ng-container *ngIf="!isLoading">
      <div *ngIf="success" class="success-icon">✓</div>
      <div *ngIf="!success" class="error-icon">✗</div>

      <h2>{{ success ? 'Email Verified!' : 'Verification Failed' }}</h2>
      <p>{{ message }}</p>

      <button *ngIf="success" (click)="goToLogin()">
        Proceed to Login
      </button>
      <button *ngIf="!success" (click)="goToLogin()">
        Back to Login
      </button>
    </ng-container>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/auth/pages/verify-otp/verify-otp.component.html
```html
<div class="auth-shell">
  <div class="auth-card">

    <div class="auth-header">
      <div class="auth-icon otp-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-shield-lock-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <h2>Verify Your Email</h2>
      <p>
        We've sent a 6-digit verification code to<br>
        <strong>{{ email }}</strong>
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="otp-input-wrap">
      <input
        type="text"
        class="otp-input"
        maxlength="6"
        placeholder="Enter 6-digit OTP"
        [(ngModel)]="otp"
        (keyup.enter)="onVerify()"
        autocomplete="one-time-code"
      />
    </div>

    <button class="btn-primary" (click)="onVerify()" [disabled]="isLoading || otp.length !== 6">
      <span *ngIf="!isLoading">
        <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Verify Email
      </span>
      <span *ngIf="isLoading">
        <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>
        Verifying...
      </span>
    </button>

    <div class="resend-section">
      <span *ngIf="!canResend" class="countdown-text">
        Resend OTP in <strong>{{ countdown }}s</strong>
      </span>
      <button
        *ngIf="canResend"
        class="btn-resend"
        (click)="onResend()"
        [disabled]="isResending"
      >
        <i class="bi bi-arrow-repeat"></i>
        {{ isResending ? 'Sending...' : 'Resend OTP' }}
      </button>
    </div>

    <div class="auth-footer">
      <a (click)="goToLogin()" class="back-link">
        <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to Login
      </a>
    </div>

  </div>

  <div class="auth-brand">
    <i class="bi bi-bank2"></i>
    <span>NBR Portal — Government of Bangladesh</span>
  </div>
</div>
```

```typescript
import { NgModule } from '@angular/core';
import { CommonModule } from '@angular/common';
import { FormsModule } from '@angular/forms';
import { SharedModule } from 'src/app/shared/shared.module';
import { BusinessRoutingModule } from './business-routing.module';

import { BusinessListComponent } from '../pages/business-list/business-list.component';
```

## File: src/app/features/certificate-management/models/certificate.model.ts
```typescript
export type CertificateType = 'TIN' | 'BIN' | 'TAX_CLEARANCE' | 'RETURN_ACK';
⋮----
export interface Certificate {
  id:              number;
  certificateNo:   string;
  type:            CertificateType;
  holderName:      string;
  referenceNo:     string;
  issuedDate:      string;
  expiryDate?:     string;
  status:          string;
  taxZone?:        string;
  taxCircle?:      string;
  assessmentYear?: string;
  sourceId:        number;
}
⋮----
export interface TaxClearanceCreateRequest {
  taxpayerId:     number;
  assessmentYear: string;
  issuedDate?:    string;
  validUntil?:    string;
  remarks?:       string;
}
⋮----
export interface PublicVerifyResult {
  valid:           boolean;
  certificateNo?:  string;
  taxpayerName?:   string;
  tinNumber?:      string;
  assessmentYear?: string;
  issuedDate?:     string;
  validUntil?:     string;
  status?:         string;
  message?:        string;
}
```

## File: src/app/features/certificate-management/pages/certificate-list/certificate-list.component.html
```html
<!-- certificate-list.component.html — REPLACE করো Phase 1&2 এরটা -->
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Certificate Management</h4>
    <p>View and download TIN, BIN, Tax Clearance &amp; Return Acknowledgment certificates.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="header-actions">
    <button class="btn-verify" (click)="goToVerify()">
      <i class="bi bi-patch-check"></i> Public Verify
    </button>
    <button *ngIf="isOfficer" class="btn-create" (click)="openCreateModal()">
      <i class="bi bi-plus-circle-fill"></i> Issue Tax Clearance
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Loading -->
<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
  <p>Loading certificates...</p>
</div>

<ng-container *ngIf="!isLoading">

  <!-- KPI Cards -->
  <div class="kpi-row">
    <div class="kpi-card">
      <div class="kpi-icon kpi-total"><i class="bi bi-patch-check-fill"></i></div>
      <div class="kpi-body">
        <div class="kpi-value">{{ certificates.length }}</div>
        <div class="kpi-label">Total</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi-card">
      <div class="kpi-icon kpi-tin"><i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i></div>
      <div class="kpi-body">
        <div class="kpi-value">{{ countByType('TIN') }}</div>
        <div class="kpi-label">TIN Certificates</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi-card">
      <div class="kpi-icon kpi-bin"><i class="bi bi-building-fill"></i></div>
      <div class="kpi-body">
        <div class="kpi-value">{{ countByType('BIN') }}</div>
        <div class="kpi-label">BIN Certificates</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi-card">
      <div class="kpi-icon kpi-tc"><i class="bi bi-shield-check-fill"></i></div>
      <div class="kpi-body">
        <div class="kpi-value">{{ countByType('TAX_CLEARANCE') }}</div>
        <div class="kpi-label">Tax Clearance</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi-card">
      <div class="kpi-icon kpi-ack"><i class="bi bi-receipt"></i></div>
      <div class="kpi-body">
        <div class="kpi-value">{{ countByType('RETURN_ACK') }}</div>
        <div class="kpi-label">Return Ack.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Filter Bar -->
  <div class="filter-bar">
    <div class="tab-group">
      <button class="tab-btn" [class.active]="activeTab === 'ALL'" (click)="setTab('ALL')">
        All <span class="tab-count">{{ certificates.length }}</span>
      </button>
      <button class="tab-btn" [class.active]="activeTab === 'TIN'" (click)="setTab('TIN')">
        TIN <span class="tab-count">{{ countByType('TIN') }}</span>
      </button>
      <button class="tab-btn" [class.active]="activeTab === 'BIN'" (click)="setTab('BIN')">
        BIN <span class="tab-count">{{ countByType('BIN') }}</span>
      </button>
      <button class="tab-btn" [class.active]="activeTab === 'TAX_CLEARANCE'" (click)="setTab('TAX_CLEARANCE')">
        Tax Clearance <span class="tab-count">{{ countByType('TAX_CLEARANCE') }}</span>
      </button>
      <button class="tab-btn" [class.active]="activeTab === 'RETURN_ACK'" (click)="setTab('RETURN_ACK')">
        Return Ack. <span class="tab-count">{{ countByType('RETURN_ACK') }}</span>
      </button>
    </div>
    <div class="search-wrap">
      <i class="bi bi-search search-icon"></i>
      <input class="search-input" type="text"
        placeholder="Search by name, TIN, BIN, certificate no..."
        [(ngModel)]="searchTerm" />
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Table -->
  <div class="data-table-wrap">
    <table class="data-table" *ngIf="filtered.length > 0; else emptyState">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>Certificate No.</th>
          <th>Type</th>
          <th>Holder / Business</th>
          <th>Reference No.</th>
          <th>Assessment Year</th>
          <th>Issued Date</th>
          <th>Expiry / Valid Until</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Download</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let cert of filtered" (click)="onView(cert)" class="clickable-row">
          <td><span class="cert-no">{{ cert.certificateNo }}</span></td>
          <td><span class="type-badge" [ngClass]="getTypeClass(cert.type)">{{ getTypeLabel(cert.type) }}</span></td>
          <td>{{ cert.holderName }}</td>
          <td><code>{{ cert.referenceNo }}</code></td>
          <td>{{ cert.assessmentYear || '—' }}</td>
          <td>{{ cert.issuedDate | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}</td>
          <td>{{ cert.expiryDate ? (cert.expiryDate | date:'dd MMM yyyy') : '—' }}</td>
          <td><span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(cert.status)">{{ cert.status }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <button class="btn-download" [disabled]="isDownloading(cert)" (click)="onDownload(cert, $event)">
              <span *ngIf="!isDownloading(cert)"><i class="bi bi-download"></i></span>
              <span *ngIf="isDownloading(cert)"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span></span>
            </button>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
    <ng-template #emptyState>
      <div class="empty-state">
        <i class="bi bi-patch-exclamation"></i>
        <p>No certificates found.</p>
      </div>
    </ng-template>
  </div>

</ng-container>

<!-- ── Tax Clearance Create Modal (officer only) ────────────────── -->
<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showCreateModal" (click)="closeCreateModal()">
  <div class="modal-box" (click)="$event.stopPropagation()">
    <div class="modal-header">
      <h5><i class="bi bi-shield-check-fill"></i> Issue Tax Clearance Certificate</h5>
      <button class="modal-close" (click)="closeCreateModal()"><i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i></button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Taxpayer ID</label>
        <input class="form-input" type="number" [(ngModel)]="tcForm.taxpayerId"
          placeholder="e.g. 12" />
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Assessment Year</label>
        <input class="form-input" type="text" [(ngModel)]="tcForm.assessmentYear"
          placeholder="e.g. 2024-25" />
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks</label>
        <textarea class="form-input" rows="3" [(ngModel)]="tcForm.remarks"
          placeholder="Optional remarks..."></textarea>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-footer">
      <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="closeCreateModal()">Cancel</button>
      <button class="btn-confirm" (click)="onCreateTaxClearance()" [disabled]="createLoading">
        <span *ngIf="!createLoading"><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Issue Certificate</span>
        <span *ngIf="createLoading"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span> Issuing...</span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/certificate-management/pages/certificate-view/certificate-view.component.css
```css
/* certificate-view.component.css */
⋮----
.header-actions { display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: center; }
⋮----
.btn-back {
.btn-back:hover { background: #f8fafd; border-color: #c7d3ef; }
⋮----
.btn-download {
.btn-download:hover:not(:disabled) { background: #163578; }
.btn-download:disabled { background: #9ca3af; cursor: not-allowed; }
⋮----
/* ── Header Card ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
.view-header-card {
.cert-icon {
.tin-icon { background: #e8faf0; color: #0e7847; }
.bin-icon { background: #fef3e8; color: #a05c00; }
⋮----
.cert-no-label { font-family: monospace; font-size: 13px; color: #6b7280; margin-bottom: 2px; }
.cert-holder   { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a1a2e; margin-bottom: 8px; }
.cert-meta     { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
⋮----
.ref-pill {
.type-badge {
.type-tin { background: #e8faf0; color: #0e7847; }
.type-bin { background: #fef3e8; color: #a05c00; }
⋮----
.status-badge { padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; }
.status-active  { background: #ecfdf5; color: #065f46; }
.status-expired { background: #fef9c3; color: #92400e; }
.status-revoked { background: #fee2e2; color: #991b1b; }
.status-pending { background: #eff6ff; color: #1e40af; }
⋮----
/* ── Detail Card ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
.detail-card {
.detail-section-header {
.detail-grid {
.field-label { font-size: 11px; color: #6b7280; margin-bottom: 4px; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .4px; }
.field-value { font-size: 14px; color: #1a1a2e; font-weight: 500; }
.field-value.mono { font-family: monospace; }
```

## File: src/app/features/certificate-management/pages/certificate-view/certificate-view.component.html
```html
<!-- certificate-view.component.html -->
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Certificate Details</h4>
    <p>{{ certType === 'tin' ? 'TIN Certificate' : 'BIN Certificate' }}</p>
  </div>
  <div class="header-actions">
    <button class="btn-back" (click)="onBack()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back
    </button>
    <button class="btn-download" (click)="onDownload()" [disabled]="isDownloading || isLoading">
      <span *ngIf="!isDownloading"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> Download PDF</span>
      <span *ngIf="isDownloading">
        <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span> Downloading...
      </span>
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Loading -->
<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
  <p>Loading certificate details...</p>
</div>

<ng-container *ngIf="!isLoading && record">

  <!-- Header Card -->
  <div class="view-header-card">
    <div class="cert-icon" [class.tin-icon]="certType === 'tin'" [class.bin-icon]="certType === 'bin'">
      <i class="bi" [class.bi-person-badge-fill]="certType === 'tin'" [class.bi-building-fill]="certType === 'bin'"></i>
    </div>
    <div class="cert-header-info">
      <div class="cert-no-label">{{ certNo }}</div>
      <div class="cert-holder">{{ holderName }}</div>
      <div class="cert-meta">
        <span class="ref-pill">{{ referenceNo }}</span>
        <span class="type-badge" [class.type-tin]="certType === 'tin'" [class.type-bin]="certType === 'bin'">
          {{ certType === 'tin' ? 'TIN' : 'BIN' }}
        </span>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(status)">{{ status }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Detail Sections -->
  <div class="detail-card">
    <div class="detail-section-header">
      <i class="bi bi-info-circle-fill"></i>
      <span>Certificate Information</span>
    </div>
    <div class="detail-grid">
      <div class="detail-field">
        <div class="field-label">Certificate No.</div>
        <div class="field-value mono">{{ certNo }}</div>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-field">
        <div class="field-label">{{ certType === 'tin' ? 'TIN Number' : 'BIN Number' }}</div>
        <div class="field-value mono">{{ referenceNo }}</div>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-field">
        <div class="field-label">Issued Date</div>
        <div class="field-value">{{ issuedDate | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}</div>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-field">
        <div class="field-label">Expiry Date</div>
        <div class="field-value">{{ expiryDate ? (expiryDate | date:'dd MMM yyyy') : '—' }}</div>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-field" *ngIf="record.taxZone || record.vatZone">
        <div class="field-label">Tax Zone</div>
        <div class="field-value">{{ record.taxZone || record.vatZone }}</div>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-field" *ngIf="record.taxCircle || record.vatCircle">
        <div class="field-label">Tax Circle</div>
        <div class="field-value">{{ record.taxCircle || record.vatCircle }}</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- TIN-specific fields -->
  <div class="detail-card" *ngIf="certType === 'tin'">
    <div class="detail-section-header">
      <i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i>
      <span>Taxpayer Information</span>
    </div>
    <div class="detail-grid">
      <div class="detail-field">
        <div class="field-label">Name</div>
        <div class="field-value">{{ record.taxpayerName }}</div>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-field">
        <div class="field-label">Category</div>
        <div class="field-value">{{ record.tinCategory }}</div>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-field">
        <div class="field-label">NID</div>
        <div class="field-value mono">{{ record.nid || '—' }}</div>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-field">
        <div class="field-label">Email</div>
        <div class="field-value">{{ record.email || '—' }}</div>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-field">
        <div class="field-label">Phone</div>
        <div class="field-value">{{ record.phone || '—' }}</div>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-field">
        <div class="field-label">District</div>
        <div class="field-value">{{ record.district || '—' }}</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- BIN-specific fields -->
  <div class="detail-card" *ngIf="certType === 'bin'">
    <div class="detail-section-header">
      <i class="bi bi-building-fill"></i>
      <span>Business Information</span>
    </div>
    <div class="detail-grid">
      <div class="detail-field">
        <div class="field-label">Business Name</div>
        <div class="field-value">{{ record.businessName }}</div>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-field">
        <div class="field-label">Owner Name</div>
        <div class="field-value">{{ record.ownerName || '—' }}</div>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-field">
        <div class="field-label">TIN Number</div>
        <div class="field-value mono">{{ record.tinNumber || '—' }}</div>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-field">
        <div class="field-label">VAT Category</div>
        <div class="field-value">{{ record.vatCategory || '—' }}</div>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-field">
        <div class="field-label">Trade License No.</div>
        <div class="field-value mono">{{ record.tradeLicenseNo || '—' }}</div>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-field">
        <div class="field-label">District</div>
        <div class="field-value">{{ record.district || '—' }}</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</ng-container>
```

## File: src/app/features/certificate-management/pages/certificate-view/certificate-view.component.ts
```typescript
// certificate-view.component.ts
import { Component, OnInit, OnDestroy } from '@angular/core';
import { ActivatedRoute, Router } from '@angular/router';
import { Subject } from 'rxjs';
import { finalize, takeUntil } from 'rxjs/operators';
import { HttpClient } from '@angular/common/http';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from 'src/app/core/constants/api.constants';
import { CertificateService } from '../../services/certificate.service';
import { ToastService } from 'src/app/shared/toast/toast.service';
⋮----
export class CertificateViewComponent implements OnInit, OnDestroy
⋮----
// ── State ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
⋮----
constructor(
```

## File: src/app/features/fiscal-years/pages/fiscal-year-create/fiscal-year-create.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Add Fiscal Year</h4>
    <p>Define a new fiscal year with tax deadlines.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to List
  </button>
</div>

<div class="alert-success" *ngIf="successMsg">
  <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> {{ successMsg }}
</div>
<div class="alert-error" *ngIf="errorMsg">
  <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ errorMsg }}
</div>

<div class="form-card">

  <!-- Section 1: Year Info -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-calendar-range-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Fiscal Year Information</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Year name — dates auto-fill from name</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Year Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="e.g. 2025-26"
            [(ngModel)]="form.yearName"
            (ngModelChange)="onYearNameChange()" />
        </div>
        <span class="field-hint">Format: YYYY-YY (e.g. 2025-26) — dates auto-fill</span>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.status" (ngModelChange)="onStatusChange()">
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Start Date <span class="auto-label">Auto</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.startDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">End Date <span class="auto-label">Auto</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-x input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.endDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Year Preview Card -->
    <div class="year-preview" *ngIf="form.yearName">
      <div class="yp-year">FY {{ form.yearName }}</div>
      <div class="yp-range" *ngIf="form.startDate && form.endDate">
        {{ form.startDate }} → {{ form.endDate }}
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: Tax Deadlines -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon teal">
        <i class="bi bi-alarm-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Tax Deadlines</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">VAT and income tax due dates</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">VAT Due Day (Monthly)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.vatDueDay">
            <option *ngFor="let d of vatDueDays" [ngValue]="d">{{ d }}th of each month</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Income Tax Due Date <span class="auto-label">Auto</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-event input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.incomeTaxDueDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Deadline Preview -->
    <div class="deadline-preview" *ngIf="form.vatDueDay || form.incomeTaxDueDate">
      <div class="dp-item" *ngIf="form.vatDueDay">
        <div class="dp-icon vat"><i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i></div>
        <div>
          <div class="dp-label">VAT Returns Due</div>
          <div class="dp-value">{{ form.vatDueDay }}th of each month</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="dp-item" *ngIf="form.incomeTaxDueDate">
        <div class="dp-icon it"><i class="bi bi-calendar-event-fill"></i></div>
        <div>
          <div class="dp-label">Income Tax Return Due</div>
          <div class="dp-value">{{ form.incomeTaxDueDate }}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 3: Current Year Toggle -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon orange">
        <i class="bi bi-star-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Current Year Setting</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Set as the active fiscal year for the system</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="toggle-section">
      <div class="toggle-info">
        <div class="ti-title">Set as Current Year</div>
        <div class="ti-desc">Enabling this will mark this as the active fiscal year. The previous current year will be automatically closed.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="toggle-wrap">
        <label class="toggle-switch">
          <input type="checkbox" [(ngModel)]="form.isCurrentYear" (ngModelChange)="onCurrentYearChange()" />
          <span class="toggle-slider"></span>
        </label>
        <span class="toggle-label" [class.on]="form.isCurrentYear">
          {{ form.isCurrentYear ? 'Yes — Current Year' : 'No' }}
        </span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-reset" (click)="onReset()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise"></i> Reset
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()"
      [disabled]="isLoading || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isLoading"><i class="bi bi-calendar-range-fill"></i> Create Fiscal Year</span>
      <span *ngIf="isLoading"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Creating...</span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/fiscal-years/pages/fiscal-year-edit/fiscal-year-edit.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Edit Fiscal Year</h4>
    <p>Update fiscal year configuration and tax deadlines.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to List
  </button>
</div>

<div class="alert-success" *ngIf="successMsg"><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> {{ successMsg }}</div>
<div class="alert-error"   *ngIf="errorMsg"><i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ errorMsg }}</div>
<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading"><div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div></div>

<div class="form-card" *ngIf="!isLoading">

  <div class="edit-banner">
    <i class="bi bi-pencil-square"></i>
    Editing Fiscal Year: <strong>FY {{ form.yearName }}</strong>
  </div>

  <!-- Section 1: Year Info -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon"><i class="bi bi-calendar-range-fill"></i></div>
      <div><h6 class="section-title">Fiscal Year Period</h6><span class="section-sub">Year name and start/end dates</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Year Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-calendar input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.yearName" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.status" (ngModelChange)="onStatusChange()">
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Start Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.startDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">End Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-calendar-x input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.endDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: Tax Deadlines -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon teal"><i class="bi bi-alarm-fill"></i></div>
      <div><h6 class="section-title">Tax Deadlines</h6><span class="section-sub">VAT and income tax due dates</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">VAT Due Day</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.vatDueDay">
            <option *ngFor="let d of vatDueDays" [ngValue]="d">{{ d }}th of each month</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Income Tax Due Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-calendar-event input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.incomeTaxDueDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 3: Current Year -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon orange"><i class="bi bi-star-fill"></i></div>
      <div><h6 class="section-title">Current Year Setting</h6><span class="section-sub">Set as the active fiscal year</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="toggle-section">
      <div class="toggle-info">
        <div class="ti-title">Set as Current Year</div>
        <div class="ti-desc">Previous current year will be automatically closed.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="toggle-wrap">
        <label class="toggle-switch">
          <input type="checkbox" [(ngModel)]="form.isCurrentYear" (ngModelChange)="onCurrentYearChange()" />
          <span class="toggle-slider"></span>
        </label>
        <span class="toggle-label" [class.on]="form.isCurrentYear">
          {{ form.isCurrentYear ? 'Yes — Current Year' : 'No' }}
        </span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isSaving"><i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel</button>
    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isSaving || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isSaving"><i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Update Fiscal Year</span>
      <span *ngIf="isSaving"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Updating...</span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/fiscal-years/pages/fiscal-year-list/fiscal-year-list.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Fiscal Years</h4>
    <p>Manage fiscal years and tax deadline configurations.</p>
  </div>
  <a *canDo="'create'" routerLink="/fiscal-years/create"
     class="btn-add-primary desktop-add-btn">
    <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i> Add Fiscal Year
  </a>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading fiscal years...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Fiscal Year Cards -->
  <div class="fy-grid" *ngIf="!isLoading">

    <div class="fy-card"
      *ngFor="let y of years"
      [class.current]="y.isCurrentYear"
      [class.upcoming]="y.status === 'Upcoming'"
      [class.closed]="y.status === 'Closed'">

      <!-- Current Year Badge -->
      <div class="current-badge" *ngIf="y.isCurrentYear">
        <i class="bi bi-star-fill"></i> Current Year
      </div>
      <div class="upcoming-badge" *ngIf="y.status === 'Upcoming'">
        <i class="bi bi-clock-fill"></i> Upcoming
      </div>

      <!-- Year Name -->
      <div class="fy-year-name">{{ y.yearName }}</div>

      <!-- Dates -->
      <div class="fy-dates">
        <div class="fy-date-item">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check"></i>
          <div>
            <span class="fyd-label">Start</span>
            <span class="fyd-value">{{ y.startDate }}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="fy-date-arrow"><i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i></div>
        <div class="fy-date-item">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-x"></i>
          <div>
            <span class="fyd-label">End</span>
            <span class="fyd-value">{{ y.endDate }}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Tax Deadlines -->
      <div class="fy-deadlines">
        <div class="fy-deadline-item">
          <div class="fdl-icon vat"><i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i></div>
          <div>
            <span class="fdl-label">VAT Due Day</span>
            <span class="fdl-value">{{ y.vatDueDay }}th of each month</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="fy-deadline-item">
          <div class="fdl-icon it"><i class="bi bi-calendar-event-fill"></i></div>
          <div>
            <span class="fdl-label">Income Tax Due</span>
            <span class="fdl-value">{{ y.incomeTaxDueDate }}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Status & Actions -->
      <div class="fy-footer">
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(y.status)">{{ y.status }}</span>
        <div class="fy-actions">
          <button
            *ngIf="!y.isCurrentYear && y.status !== 'Closed'"
            class="btn-set-current"
            [disabled]="settingCurrentId !== null"
            (click)="setCurrent(y.id)">
            <span *ngIf="settingCurrentId !== y.id">
              <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Set as Current
            </span>
            <span *ngIf="settingCurrentId === y.id">
              <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-1"></span>Saving...
            </span>
          </button>
        </div>
          <button class="btn-fy-edit" (click)="edit(y.id)">
              <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
         </button>
      </div>

    </div>

    <!-- Add New Card -->
    <div class="fy-add-card" routerLink="/fiscal-years/create">
      <i class="bi bi-plus-circle-fill"></i>
      <span>Add Fiscal Year</span>
    </div>

  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/import-duty/pages/import-duty-list/import-duty-list.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Import Duty</h4>
    <p>Manage all import duty assessments and clearances.</p>
  </div>
  <a *canDo="'create'" routerLink="/import-duty/create"
     class="btn-add-primary desktop-add-btn">
    <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i> New Import
  </a>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input type="text" placeholder="Search by ref, taxpayer, product, country, port..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm" />
      </div>
      <button *canDo="'export'" class="btn-export">
        <i class="bi bi-download"></i><span>Export</span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading import records...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Desktop Table -->
  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>Duty Ref</th>
          <th>Taxpayer / Business</th>
          <th>Goods</th>
          <th>Origin</th>
          <th>CIF Value</th>
          <th>CD Rate</th>
          <th>Customs Duty</th>
          <th>Total Payable</th>
          <th>Port</th>
          <th>Import Date</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Actions</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let r of filtered; let i = index">
          <td>{{ i + 1 }}</td>
          <td><span class="duty-ref">{{ r.dutyRef }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar imp-avatar"><i class="bi bi-truck-front-fill"></i></div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ r.taxpayerName }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ r.businessName }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>
          <td>
            <div>
              <span class="goods-name">{{ r.productName }}</span>
              <span class="hs-badge">{{ r.hsCode }}</span>
            </div>
          </td>
          <td><span class="country-badge">🌐 {{ r.originCountry }}</span></td>
          <td class="amt-cell">{{ formatCurrency(r.cifValue) }}</td>
          <td><span class="rate-pill">{{ r.cdRate || 0 }}%</span></td>
          <td class="amt-cell duty">{{ formatCurrency(r.customsDuty) }}</td>
          <td class="amt-cell total">{{ formatCurrency(r.totalPayable) }}</td>
          <td><span class="port-badge">{{ r.portOfEntry }}</span></td>
          <td>{{ r.importDate }}</td>
          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">{{ r.status }}</span>
          </td>
          <td>
            <div class="action-btns">
              <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_COMMISSIONER']"
                class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(r.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i>
              </button>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
        <tr *ngIf="filtered.length === 0">
          <td colspan="13">
            <div class="empty-state"><i class="bi bi-truck-front"></i><p>No import records found.</p></div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Cards -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" style="padding:12px;" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let r of filtered">
      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar imp-avatar"><i class="bi bi-truck-front-fill"></i></div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ r.businessName }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ r.dutyRef }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">{{ r.status }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Product</label><span>{{ r.productName }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>HS Code</label><span>{{ r.hsCode }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Origin</label><span>{{ r.originCountry }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>CIF Value</label><span>{{ formatCurrency(r.cifValue) }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>CD Rate</label><span>{{ r.cdRate || 0 }}%</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Customs Duty</label><span class="duty">{{ formatCurrency(r.customsDuty) }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Total Payable</label><span class="total">{{ formatCurrency(r.totalPayable) }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Port</label><span>{{ r.portOfEntry }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Import Date</label><span>{{ r.importDate }}</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-actions">
        <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_COMMISSIONER']" class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(r.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filtered.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-truck-front"></i><p>No import records found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<button *canDo="'create'" class="fab-btn" routerLink="/import-duty/create">
  <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i>
</button>

<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showDeleteModal">
  <div class="modal-card">
    <div class="modal-accent error"></div>
    <div class="modal-icon-wrap error">
      <i class="bi bi-trash-fill" style="color:#A32D2D; font-size:22px;"></i>
    </div>
    <p class="modal-title">Delete Import Duty Record?</p>
    <p class="modal-msg">
      This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this import duty record?
    </p>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn-modal-cancel" (click)="cancelDelete()">Cancel</button>
      <button class="btn-modal-confirm error" (click)="confirmDeleteExecute()">
        <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
