## File: src/app/features/import-duty/pages/import-duty-view/import-duty-view.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Import Duty Details</h4>
    <p>Full import duty assessment information.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="header-actions">
    <button class="btn-back" (click)="onBack()"><i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back</button>
    <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit-top" (click)="onEdit()"><i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit</button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading"><div class="spinner-border text-danger"></div></div>

<ng-container *ngIf="!isLoading && record">

  <!-- Header -->
  <div class="imp-header-card">
    <div class="ihc-left">
      <div class="ihc-icon"><i class="bi bi-truck-front-fill"></i></div>
      <div>
        <div class="ihc-ref">{{ record.dutyRef }}</div>
        <div class="ihc-business">{{ record.businessName }}</div>
        <div class="ihc-meta">
          <span class="ihc-product">{{ record.productName }}</span>
          <span class="ihc-hs">{{ record.hsCode }}</span>
          <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(record.status)">{{ record.status }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ihc-right">
      <div class="ihc-stat">
        <span class="ihs-label">Total Payable</span>
        <span class="ihs-value">{{ fmt(record.totalPayable) }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="ihc-stat">
        <span class="ihs-label">CD Rate</span>
        <span class="ihs-rate">{{ record.cdRate || 0 }}%</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Amount Summary -->
  <div class="imp-amount-row">
    <div class="ia-card">
      <div class="iac-icon cif"><i class="bi bi-currency-dollar"></i></div>
      <div><span class="iac-label">CIF Value</span><span class="iac-value">{{ fmt(record.cifValue) }}</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ia-card">
      <div class="iac-icon duty"><i class="bi bi-percent"></i></div>
      <div><span class="iac-label">Customs Duty (CD)</span><span class="iac-value duty">{{ fmt(record.customsDuty) }}</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ia-card">
      <div class="iac-icon vat"><i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i></div>
      <div><span class="iac-label">Supplementary Duty (SD)</span><span class="iac-value vat">{{ fmt(record.supplementaryDuty) }}</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ia-card">
      <div class="iac-icon vat"><i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i></div>
      <div><span class="iac-label">VAT</span><span class="iac-value vat">{{ fmt(record.vat) }}</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ia-card">
      <div class="iac-icon duty"><i class="bi bi-percent"></i></div>
      <div><span class="iac-label">AIT</span><span class="iac-value duty">{{ fmt(record.advanceIncomeTax) }}</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ia-card">
      <div class="iac-icon vat"><i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i></div>
      <div><span class="iac-label">AT</span><span class="iac-value vat">{{ fmt(record.advanceTax) }}</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ia-card highlight">
      <div class="iac-icon total"><i class="bi bi-calculator-fill"></i></div>
      <div><span class="iac-label">Total Payable</span><span class="iac-value total">{{ fmt(record.totalPayable) }}</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ia-card">
      <div class="iac-icon paid"><i class="bi bi-cash-coin"></i></div>
      <div><span class="iac-label">Paid</span><span class="iac-value paid">{{ record.paidAmount > 0 ? fmt(record.paidAmount) : '—' }}</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Details -->
  <div class="details-grid">

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header"><i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i><span>Importer Information</span></div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">TIN</span><span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ record.tinNumber }}</span></span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Taxpayer</span><span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ record.taxpayerName }}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Business</span><span class="detail-value">{{ record.businessName }}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header"><i class="bi bi-box-seam-fill"></i><span>Goods Information</span></div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Product</span><span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ record.productName }}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">HS Code</span><span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ record.hsCode }}</span></span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Description</span><span class="detail-value">{{ record.goodsDescription }}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Origin Country</span><span class="detail-value">🌐 {{ record.originCountry }}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill"></i><span>Shipping & Port</span></div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Port of Entry</span><span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ record.portOfEntry }}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Bill of Entry Number</span><span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ record.boeNumber }}</span></span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Bill of Entry Date</span><span class="detail-value">{{ record.boeDate }}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Bill of Lading</span><span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ record.billOfLading }}</span></span></div>
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Import Date</span><span class="detail-value">{{ record.importDate }}</span></div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="record.assessmentDate"><span class="detail-label">Assessment Date</span><span class="detail-value">{{ record.assessmentDate }}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header"><i class="bi bi-shield-fill-check"></i><span>Status & Remarks</span></div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Status</span><span class="detail-value"><span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(record.status)">{{ record.status }}</span></span></div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="record.remarks"><span class="detail-label">Remarks</span><span class="detail-value">{{ record.remarks }}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

</ng-container>
```

## File: src/app/features/income-tax-returns/pages/IT10B/it10b.component.css
```css
/* ── Page Header ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.btn-back {
.btn-back:hover { background: #f3eeff; }
⋮----
/* ── Loading State ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.loading-state {
.text-purple { color: #7c3aed !important; }
⋮----
/* ── Sticky Net Wealth Panel ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.net-wealth-panel {
.net-wealth-panel.positive {
.net-wealth-panel.negative {
.nw-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; }
.nw-icon {
.nw-label { font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a2340; margin: 0; }
.nw-formula { font-size: 11.5px; color: #888; margin: 2px 0 0; }
.nw-right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.nw-breakdown { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 13px; }
.nw-assets { font-weight: 600; color: #16a34a; }
.nw-liab  { font-weight: 600; color: #dc2626; }
.nw-sep   { font-weight: 700; color: #888; font-size: 16px; }
.nw-amount { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.5px; }
.nw-amount.amount-positive { color: #16a34a; }
.nw-amount.amount-negative { color: #dc2626; }
⋮----
/* ── Form Card & Sections ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.form-card {
.form-section { padding: 24px 28px; }
.section-header {
.section-icon {
.assets-icon { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #16a34a, #22c55e); }
.liab-icon   { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #dc2626, #f87171); }
.section-title { margin: 0; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a2340; }
.section-sub   { font-size: 12px; color: #999; }
.section-divider { height: 1px; background: #f0f4f8; margin: 0 28px; }
⋮----
.section-total-badge {
⋮----
/* ── Form Grid ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.form-grid {
.form-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; }
.form-group.full-width { grid-column: 1 / -1; }
⋮----
.form-label {
.form-label.required::after { content: " *"; color: #e74c3c; }
.field-icon  { color: #7c3aed; font-size: 13px; }
.red-icon    { color: #dc2626 !important; }
.field-hint  { font-size: 11.5px; color: #aaa; margin: 0 0 4px; }
⋮----
.input-wrap { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; }
.input-icon {
.form-input {
.form-input:focus {
.input-wrap.field-error .form-input {
.liab-input .form-input:focus {
.validation-msg { font-size: 11.5px; color: #e74c3c; font-weight: 600; margin-top: 2px; }
⋮----
/* ── Subtotal Bars ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.subtotal-bar {
.assets-bar { background: #f0fdf4; color: #16a34a; border: 1px solid #bbf7d0; }
.liab-bar   { background: #fff5f5; color: #dc2626; border: 1px solid #fecaca; }
⋮----
/* ── Wealth Summary Table ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.wealth-summary-table {
.ws-row {
.ws-label { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #666; }
.ws-label.bold { font-weight: 700; color: #1a2340; }
.ws-value { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a2340; }
.ws-value.assets-val { color: #16a34a; }
.ws-value.liab-val   { color: #dc2626; }
.ws-value.net-positive { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 800; color: #16a34a; }
.ws-value.net-negative { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 800; color: #dc2626; }
.ws-divider { height: 1px; background: #e0d5f5; }
.ws-total-row { background: #f3eeff; padding: 14px 20px; }
.ws-note {
⋮----
/* ── Form Actions ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.form-actions {
.btn-cancel {
.btn-cancel:hover { background: #f5f7fb; }
.btn-reset {
.btn-reset:hover { background: #fde8c0; }
.btn-submit {
.btn-submit:hover:not(:disabled) {
.btn-cancel:disabled, .btn-reset:disabled, .btn-submit:disabled {
⋮----
/* ── Responsive ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.net-wealth-panel { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; }
.nw-right { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 8px; }
.form-section { padding: 18px 16px; }
.section-divider { margin: 0 16px; }
.form-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
.section-header { flex-wrap: wrap; }
.section-total-badge { margin-left: 0; }
.form-actions { padding: 16px; justify-content: stretch; }
.btn-cancel, .btn-reset, .btn-submit { flex: 1; justify-content: center; }
⋮----
.form-actions { flex-direction: column; }
.btn-cancel, .btn-reset, .btn-submit { width: 100%; }
.nw-breakdown { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 4px; }
```

## File: src/app/features/income-tax-returns/pages/IT10B/it10b.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>IT-10B &mdash; Statement of Assets &amp; Liabilities</h4>
    <p *ngIf="returnNo">Linked to Return: <strong>{{ returnNo }}</strong></p>
    <p *ngIf="!returnNo">Return ID: <strong>#{{ returnId }}</strong></p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="goBack()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to Return
  </button>
</div>

<!-- Loading State -->
<div class="loading-state" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-purple" role="status"></div>
  <p>Loading statement&hellip;</p>
</div>

<ng-container *ngIf="!isLoading">

  <!-- ── Sticky Net Wealth Summary Panel ─────────────────────────────────── -->
  <div class="net-wealth-panel" [class.positive]="netWealth >= 0" [class.negative]="netWealth < 0">
    <div class="nw-left">
      <div class="nw-icon"><i class="bi bi-graph-up-arrow"></i></div>
      <div>
        <p class="nw-label">Real-Time Net Wealth</p>
        <p class="nw-formula">Total Assets − Total Liabilities</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="nw-right">
      <div class="nw-breakdown">
        <span class="nw-assets">Assets: {{ fmt(totalAssets) }}</span>
        <span class="nw-sep">−</span>
        <span class="nw-liab">Liabilities: {{ fmt(form.value.personalLiabilities || 0) }}</span>
        <span class="nw-sep">=</span>
      </div>
      <div class="nw-amount" [class.amount-positive]="netWealth >= 0" [class.amount-negative]="netWealth < 0">
        <span *ngIf="netWealth >= 0"><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill me-1"></i>{{ fmt(netWealth) }}</span>
        <span *ngIf="netWealth < 0"><i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill me-1"></i>{{ fmt(netWealth) }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <form [formGroup]="form" (ngSubmit)="onSubmit()" novalidate>
  <div class="form-card">

    <!-- ── Section 1: Assets ──────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="form-section">
      <div class="section-header">
        <div class="section-icon assets-icon">
          <i class="bi bi-bank2"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h6 class="section-title">Assets</h6>
          <span class="section-sub">All properties, investments and balances owned by the taxpayer</span>
        </div>
        <div class="section-total-badge">
          Total: {{ fmt(totalAssets) }}
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-grid">

        <!-- Non-Agricultural Property -->
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">
            <i class="bi bi-house-fill field-icon"></i>
            Non-Agricultural Property
          </label>
          <p class="field-hint">Land, house, apartment, commercial property</p>
          <div class="input-wrap" [class.field-error]="ctrl('nonAgriculturalProperty')?.invalid && ctrl('nonAgriculturalProperty')?.touched">
            <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
            <input type="number" class="form-input"
              formControlName="nonAgriculturalProperty"
              placeholder="0.00" min="0" step="0.01" />
          </div>
          <span class="validation-msg" *ngIf="ctrl('nonAgriculturalProperty')?.errors?.['min'] && ctrl('nonAgriculturalProperty')?.touched">
            Value cannot be negative.
          </span>
        </div>

        <!-- Agricultural Property -->
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">
            <i class="bi bi-tree-fill field-icon"></i>
            Agricultural Property 
          </label>
          <p class="field-hint">Farmland, orchards, agricultural plots</p>
          <div class="input-wrap" [class.field-error]="ctrl('agriculturalProperty')?.invalid && ctrl('agriculturalProperty')?.touched">
            <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
            <input type="number" class="form-input"
              formControlName="agriculturalProperty"
              placeholder="0.00" min="0" step="0.01" />
          </div>
          <span class="validation-msg" *ngIf="ctrl('agriculturalProperty')?.errors?.['min'] && ctrl('agriculturalProperty')?.touched">
            Value cannot be negative.
          </span>
        </div>

        <!-- Investments -->
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">
            <i class="bi bi-graph-up field-icon"></i>
            Investments
          </label>
          <p class="field-hint">Shares, savings certificates, FD, bonds</p>
          <div class="input-wrap" [class.field-error]="ctrl('investments')?.invalid && ctrl('investments')?.touched">
            <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
            <input type="number" class="form-input"
              formControlName="investments"
              placeholder="0.00" min="0" step="0.01" />
          </div>
          <span class="validation-msg" *ngIf="ctrl('investments')?.errors?.['min'] && ctrl('investments')?.touched">
            Value cannot be negative.
          </span>
        </div>

        <!-- Motor Vehicles -->
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">
            <i class="bi bi-car-front-fill field-icon"></i>
            Motor Vehicles 
          </label>
          <p class="field-hint">Cars, trucks, motorcycles, boats</p>
          <div class="input-wrap" [class.field-error]="ctrl('motorVehicles')?.invalid && ctrl('motorVehicles')?.touched">
            <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
            <input type="number" class="form-input"
              formControlName="motorVehicles"
              placeholder="0.00" min="0" step="0.01" />
          </div>
          <span class="validation-msg" *ngIf="ctrl('motorVehicles')?.errors?.['min'] && ctrl('motorVehicles')?.touched">
            Value cannot be negative.
          </span>
        </div>

        <!-- Bank Balances & Cash -->
        <div class="form-group full-width">
          <label class="form-label required">
            <i class="bi bi-piggy-bank-fill field-icon"></i>
            Bank Balances &amp; Cash in Hand 
          </label>
          <p class="field-hint">All bank accounts, savings, FDR balances and physical cash</p>
          <div class="input-wrap" [class.field-error]="ctrl('bankBalances')?.invalid && ctrl('bankBalances')?.touched">
            <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
            <input type="number" class="form-input"
              formControlName="bankBalances"
              placeholder="0.00" min="0" step="0.01" />
          </div>
          <span class="validation-msg" *ngIf="ctrl('bankBalances')?.errors?.['min'] && ctrl('bankBalances')?.touched">
            Value cannot be negative.
          </span>
        </div>

      </div>

      <!-- Assets subtotal bar -->
      <div class="subtotal-bar assets-bar">
        <i class="bi bi-calculator me-2"></i>
        Total Assets : <strong>{{ fmt(totalAssets) }}</strong>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="section-divider"></div>

    <!-- ── Section 2: Liabilities  ───────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="form-section">
      <div class="section-header">
        <div class="section-icon liab-icon">
          <i class="bi bi-credit-card-2-back-fill"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h6 class="section-title">Liabilities </h6>
          <span class="section-sub">Outstanding loans, mortgages and other financial obligations</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-grid">

        <!-- Personal Liabilities -->
        <div class="form-group full-width">
          <label class="form-label required">
            <i class="bi bi-bank field-icon red-icon"></i>
            Personal Liabilities 
          </label>
          <p class="field-hint">Bank loans, home mortgage, car loan, personal debt</p>
          <div class="input-wrap liab-input" [class.field-error]="ctrl('personalLiabilities')?.invalid && ctrl('personalLiabilities')?.touched">
            <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
            <input type="number" class="form-input"
              formControlName="personalLiabilities"
              placeholder="0.00" min="0" step="0.01" />
          </div>
          <span class="validation-msg" *ngIf="ctrl('personalLiabilities')?.errors?.['min'] && ctrl('personalLiabilities')?.touched">
            Value cannot be negative.
          </span>
        </div>

      </div>

      <!-- Liabilities subtotal bar -->
      <div class="subtotal-bar liab-bar">
        <i class="bi bi-dash-circle me-2"></i>
        Total Liabilities : <strong>{{ fmt(form.value.personalLiabilities || 0) }}</strong>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="section-divider"></div>

    <!-- ── Net Wealth Footer Summary ───────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="form-section">
      <div class="wealth-summary-table">
        <div class="ws-row">
          <span class="ws-label">Total Assets</span>
          <span class="ws-value assets-val">{{ fmt(totalAssets) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="ws-row">
          <span class="ws-label">Less: Total Liabilities</span>
          <span class="ws-value liab-val">{{ fmt(form.value.personalLiabilities || 0) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="ws-divider"></div>
        <div class="ws-row ws-total-row">
          <span class="ws-label bold">Net Wealth </span>
          <span class="ws-value" [class.net-positive]="netWealth >= 0" [class.net-negative]="netWealth < 0">
            {{ fmt(netWealth) }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="ws-note" *ngIf="netWealth < 0">
          <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i>
          Net wealth is negative — liabilities exceed total assets. Please review the figures.
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── Actions ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="form-actions">
      <button type="button" class="btn-cancel" (click)="goBack()" [disabled]="isSaving">
        <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
      </button>
      <button type="button" class="btn-reset"  (click)="onReset()" [disabled]="isSaving">
        <i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise"></i> Reset
      </button>
      <button type="submit" class="btn-submit" [disabled]="isSaving || form.invalid">
        <span *ngIf="!isSaving">
          <i class="bi bi-send-fill"></i>
          {{ isEditMode ? 'Update Statement' : 'Submit Statement' }}
        </span>
        <span *ngIf="isSaving">
          <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>
          {{ isEditMode ? 'Updating...' : 'Submitting...' }}
        </span>
      </button>
    </div>

  </div><!-- .form-card -->
  </form>

</ng-container>
```

## File: src/app/features/notices-notifications/pages/notice-create/notice-create.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Send Notice</h4>
    <p>Create and send a new notice or notification.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to List
  </button>
</div>

<div class="alert-success" *ngIf="successMsg">
  <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> {{ successMsg }}
</div>
<div class="alert-error" *ngIf="errorMsg">
  <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ errorMsg }}
</div>

<div class="form-card">

  <!-- Section 1: Notice Info -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-bell-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Notice Information</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Type, priority and target audience</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Notice Type</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.noticeType">
            <option value="">Select Type</option>
            <option *ngFor="let t of noticeTypes" [value]="t">{{ t }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Priority</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-speedometer2 input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.priority">
            <option *ngFor="let p of priorities" [value]="p">{{ p }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Target Audience</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-people-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.targetType">
            <option *ngFor="let t of targetTypes" [value]="t">{{ t }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Issued By</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-badge input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.issuedBy">
            <option value="">Select Officer</option>
            <option *ngFor="let o of officers" [value]="o">{{ o }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Issue Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.issuedDate" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Due Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-x input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.dueDate" />
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: Taxpayer (conditional on Specific Taxpayer) -->
  <ng-container *ngIf="showTaxpayerFields">
  <!-- Taxpayer Search (replaces raw tinNumber/taxpayerName inputs) -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon"><i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i></div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Taxpayer</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Search and select the taxpayer</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label required">Find Taxpayer</label>
        <div class="search-row">
          <div class="input-wrap search-input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-search input-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="form-input"
              placeholder="Enter NID, name or TIN..."
              [(ngModel)]="searchQuery"
              [disabled]="selectedTaxpayer !== null"
              (keyup.enter)="searchTaxpayer()" />
            <button *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer" class="clear-btn" (click)="clearTaxpayer()">
              <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
            </button>
          </div>
          <button class="btn-search" (click)="searchTaxpayer()"
            [disabled]="isSearching || selectedTaxpayer !== null">
            <span *ngIf="!isSearching"><i class="bi bi-search"></i> Search</span>
            <span *ngIf="isSearching"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span></span>
          </button>
        </div>
        <!-- Results -->
        <div class="search-results" *ngIf="showResults && searchResults.length > 0">
          <div class="result-item" *ngFor="let t of searchResults" (click)="selectTaxpayer(t)">
            <div class="result-avatar"><i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i></div>
            <div class="result-info">
              <span class="result-name">{{ getDisplayName(t) }}</span>
              <span class="result-meta">
                <span *ngIf="t.nid">NID: {{ t.nid }}</span>
                <span *ngIf="t.phone"> · {{ t.phone }}</span>
              </span>
            </div>
            <span class="result-badge">Select</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Selected -->
        <div class="selected-card" *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer">
          <div class="selected-card-left">
            <div class="selected-avatar"><i class="bi bi-person-check-fill"></i></div>
            <div>
              <p class="selected-name">{{ getDisplayName(selectedTaxpayer) }}</p>
              <p class="selected-meta">
                <span *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer.nid">NID: {{ selectedTaxpayer.nid }}</span>
                <span *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer.tinNumber"> · TIN: {{ selectedTaxpayer.tinNumber }}</span>
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="autofill-tag"><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Selected</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>


    <div class="section-divider"></div>
  </ng-container>

  <!-- Section 3: Message -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon orange">
        <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Notice Message</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Subject and full message body</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label required">Subject</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-chat-left-text input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="Enter notice subject"
            [(ngModel)]="form.subject" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label required">Message Body</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-text-paragraph input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea"
            placeholder="Enter the full notice message..."
            [(ngModel)]="form.body" rows="6"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Attachment Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-paperclip input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="e.g. notice_document.pdf"
            [(ngModel)]="form.attachmentName" />
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Form Actions -->
  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-reset" (click)="onReset()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise"></i> Reset
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()"
      [disabled]="isLoading || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isLoading">
        <i class="bi bi-send-fill"></i> Send Notice
      </span>
      <span *ngIf="isLoading">
        <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>
        Sending...
      </span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/notices-notifications/pages/notice-list/notice-list.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>
      Notices & Notifications
      <span class="unread-badge" *ngIf="unreadCount > 0">
        {{ unreadCount }} Unread
      </span>
    </h4>
    <p>Manage all notices, alerts and notifications.</p>
  </div>
  
  <a  *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN', 'TAX_COMMISSIONER', 'TAX_OFFICER']"
    routerLink="/notices/create"
    class="btn-add-primary desktop-add-btn"
  >
    <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i> Send Notice
  </a>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <!-- Filter Tabs -->
  <div class="filter-tabs">
    <button
      *ngFor="let f of filters"
      class="filter-tab"
      [class.active]="activeFilter === f"
      (click)="activeFilter = f"
    >
      {{ f }}
      <span class="tab-count" *ngIf="f === 'Unread' && unreadCount > 0">
        {{ unreadCount }}
      </span>
    </button>
  </div>

  <!-- Search -->
  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input
          type="text"
          placeholder="Search by notice no, subject, taxpayer, type..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm"
        />
      </div>
      <button
        *canDo="'export'"
        class="btn-export"
      >
        <i class="bi bi-download"></i>
        <span>Export</span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading notices...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Notice Cards — Desktop & Mobile same design -->
  <div class="notice-list" *ngIf="!isLoading">

    <div
      class="notice-card"
      *ngFor="let n of filteredNotices"
      [class.unread]="n.status === 'Unread'"
      (click)="viewNotice(n.id)"
    >
      <!-- Left Icon -->
      <div class="notice-icon" [ngClass]="getTypeColor(n.noticeType)">
        <i [class]="getTypeIcon(n.noticeType)"></i>
      </div>

      <!-- Content -->
      <div class="notice-content">
        <div class="notice-header-row">
          <div class="notice-title-group">
            <span class="notice-no">{{ n.noticeNo }}</span>
            <span class="notice-subject"
              [class.fw-bold]="n.status === 'Unread'">
              {{ n.subject }}
            </span>
          </div>
          <div class="notice-badges">
            <span class="pri-badge" [ngClass]="getPriorityClass(n.priority)">
              {{ n.priority }}
            </span>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(n.status)">
              {{ n.status }}
            </span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <p class="notice-body">{{ n.body }}</p>

        <div class="notice-footer-row">
          <div class="notice-meta">
            <span class="meta-item">
              <i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i> {{ n.issuedBy }}
            </span>
            <span class="meta-item">
              <i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> {{ n.issuedDate }}
            </span>
            <span class="meta-item" *ngIf="n.dueDate">
              <i class="bi bi-calendar-x"></i> Due: {{ n.dueDate }}
            </span>
            <span class="meta-item" *ngIf="n.attachmentName">
              <i class="bi bi-paperclip"></i> {{ n.attachmentName }}
            </span>
            <span class="meta-item target">
              <i class="bi bi-people-fill"></i> {{ n.targetType }}
            </span>
          </div>

          <div class="notice-actions" (click)="$event.stopPropagation()">
            <button class="btn-view-sm" (click)="viewNotice(n.id)">
              <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
            </button>
            <button
              *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN', 'TAX_COMMISSIONER']"
              class="btn-delete-sm"
              (click)="confirmDelete(n.id)"
            >
              <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i>
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Unread Dot -->
      <div class="unread-dot" *ngIf="n.status === 'Unread'"></div>
    </div>

    <!-- Empty State -->
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filteredNotices.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-bell-slash"></i>
      <p>No notices found.</p>
    </div>

  </div>

</div>

<!-- FAB -->
<button
  *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN', 'TAX_COMMISSIONER', 'TAX_OFFICER']"
  class="fab-btn"
  routerLink="/notices/create"
  title="Send Notice"
>
  <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i>
</button>

<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showDeleteModal">
  <div class="modal-card">
    <div class="modal-accent error"></div>
    <div class="modal-icon-wrap error">
      <i class="bi bi-trash-fill" style="color:#A32D2D; font-size:22px;"></i>
    </div>
    <p class="modal-title">Delete Notice?</p>
    <p class="modal-msg">
      This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this notice?
    </p>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn-modal-cancel" (click)="cancelDelete()">Cancel</button>
      <button class="btn-modal-confirm error" (click)="confirmDeleteExecute()">
        <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/public-registration/register/register.component.css
```css
/* ── Page Layout (mirrors login-page) ─────────────────────────────────────── */
.reg-page { min-height: 100vh; display: flex; }
⋮----
/* ── Left Panel ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.reg-left {
.reg-left::before {
.reg-left::after {
⋮----
.reg-logo {
.reg-sys-title { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 800; line-height: 1.3; margin: 0 0 6px; }
.reg-sys-sub   { font-size: 12px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); margin: 0; }
⋮----
/* ── Stepper ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.stepper { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0; position: relative; z-index: 1; }
.step-track { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px; position: relative; }
.step-line {
.step-track.completed .step-line { background: #1faa8b; }
⋮----
.step-dot {
.step-track.completed .step-dot { background: #1faa8b; border-color: #1faa8b; color: #fff; }
.step-track.active    .step-dot { background: #fff; border-color: #fff; color: #1a3f8f; }
⋮----
.step-label   { display: flex; flex-direction: column; padding-top: 6px; }
.step-num     { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; }
.step-name    { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65); }
.step-track.active .step-name    { color: #fff; }
.step-track.completed .step-name { color: #1faa8b; }
⋮----
/* ── Left features ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.reg-left-features { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 14px; margin-top: auto; }
.rf-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; font-size: 13px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); }
.rf-item i { font-size: 15px; color: #1faa8b; }
⋮----
/* ── Right Panel ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.reg-right {
.reg-card {
⋮----
/* ── Progress bar ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.progress-bar-wrap { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 28px; }
.progress-bar-track { flex: 1; height: 5px; background: #e8eef9; border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; }
.progress-bar-fill  { height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #1a3f8f, #1faa8b); border-radius: 10px; transition: width 0.4s ease; }
.progress-label { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #888; white-space: nowrap; }
⋮----
/* ── Step shared styles ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.step-body { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 22px; }
.step-heading { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 800; color: #1a2340; margin: 0 0 6px; }
.step-sub     { font-size: 13px; color: #777; margin: 0; line-height: 1.5; }
⋮----
/* ── Form elements ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.form-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 18px; }
.form-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; }
.form-group.full-width { grid-column: 1 / -1; }
⋮----
.form-label { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #444; }
.form-label.required::after { content: ' *'; color: #e74c3c; }
.optional-label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 400; color: #aaa; }
⋮----
.input-wrap {
.input-wrap:focus-within {
.input-wrap.input-error { border-color: #e74c3c; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(231,76,60,0.08); }
⋮----
.input-icon { position: absolute; left: 12px; color: #bbb; font-size: 14px; pointer-events: none; z-index: 1; }
⋮----
.form-input {
.form-select { appearance: none; cursor: pointer; }
.form-select:focus { outline: none; }
⋮----
.toggle-pass {
.toggle-pass:hover { color: #1a3f8f; }
⋮----
.field-error {
⋮----
/* ── Password hints ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.pw-hints { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; }
.pw-hint {
.pw-hint.met { color: #1faa8b; background: #e6f7f3; }
.pw-hint i   { font-size: 11px; }
⋮----
/* ── Account type cards ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.account-type-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; }
⋮----
.account-card {
.account-card:hover { border-color: #1a3f8f; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(26,63,143,0.1); }
.account-card.selected { border-color: #1a3f8f; background: #f0f4ff; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(26,63,143,0.15); }
⋮----
.ac-icon {
.ac-icon.individual { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e8eef9, #d0daf5); color: #1a3f8f; }
.ac-icon.company    { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e6f7f3, #c8f0e8); color: #1faa8b; }
⋮----
.ac-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 800; color: #1a2340; }
.ac-desc  { font-size: 12px; color: #777; line-height: 1.5; display: block; margin: 4px 0 8px; }
.ac-points { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; }
.ac-points li { font-size: 12px; color: #555; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; }
.ac-points li i { color: #1faa8b; font-size: 11px; }
⋮----
.ac-select-badge {
⋮----
/* ── NID info banner ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.nid-info-banner {
.nid-info-banner i { font-size: 15px; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 1px; }
.nid-info-banner.company { background: #e6f7f3; border-color: #b8e8d8; color: #0d7055; }
⋮----
/* ── Review cards ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.review-grid { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 14px; }
.review-card { border: 1.5px solid #e8eef9; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; }
.review-card-header {
.review-card-header i { color: #1a3f8f; }
.review-row {
.review-label { color: #888; font-weight: 500; }
.review-value { color: #1a2340; font-weight: 500; text-align: right; }
.review-value.fw-bold { font-weight: 700; }
.pass-mask { letter-spacing: 2px; color: #aaa; }
.code-badge {
.type-pill {
.type-pill.individual { background: #e8eef9; color: #1a3f8f; }
.type-pill.company    { background: #e6f7f3; color: #0d7055; }
⋮----
/* ── Submit info box ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.submit-info-box {
.sib-icon { font-size: 22px; color: #1a3f8f; flex-shrink: 0; }
.sib-title { font-weight: 700; color: #1a2340; margin: 0 0 8px; }
.sib-list { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; }
.sib-list li { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }
.sib-list i { color: #1faa8b; }
⋮----
/* ── Step action buttons ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.step-actions { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 12px; margin-top: 4px; }
⋮----
.btn-next, .btn-submit {
.btn-next:hover:not(:disabled), .btn-submit:hover:not(:disabled) {
.btn-next:disabled, .btn-submit:disabled { opacity: 0.6; cursor: not-allowed; }
⋮----
.btn-back {
.btn-back:hover { background: #f0f4ff; border-color: #1a3f8f; }
⋮----
/* ── Success screen ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.success-body { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 24px; text-align: center; }
⋮----
.success-icon-ring {
.success-icon {
⋮----
.success-title { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 800; color: #1a2340; margin: 0; }
.success-sub   { font-size: 14px; color: #666; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; max-width: 400px; }
⋮----
.tin-card {
.tin-card-header {
.tin-card-body { padding: 20px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; }
.tin-label  { font-size: 11px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; }
.tin-number { font-size: 28px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 4px; color: #1faa8b; }
.tin-meta   { display: flex; gap: 16px; font-size: 12px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); }
.tin-meta i { margin-right: 4px; }
.tin-card-footer {
⋮----
.next-steps { text-align: left; width: 100%; }
.ns-title { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a2340; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin: 0 0 14px; }
.ns-grid { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; }
.ns-item { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 14px; }
.ns-num  {
.ns-item strong { display: block; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a2340; }
.ns-item p      { font-size: 12px; color: #777; margin: 2px 0 0; }
⋮----
.btn-go-login {
.btn-go-login:hover { box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(26,63,143,0.35); transform: translateY(-1px); }
⋮----
/* ── Login link ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.reg-login-link {
.reg-login-link a { color: #1a3f8f; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; }
.reg-login-link a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
⋮----
/* ── Responsive ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.reg-page  { flex-direction: column; }
.reg-left  { width: 100%; padding: 28px 24px; min-height: auto; }
.stepper, .reg-left-features { display: none; }
.reg-card  { padding: 24px 20px; }
.account-type-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
.form-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
```

## File: src/app/features/public-registration/register/register.component.html
```html
<div class="reg-page">

  <!-- ── Left Panel ── -->
  <div class="reg-left">
    <div class="reg-brand">
      <div class="reg-logo"><i class="bi bi-bank2"></i></div>
      <h1 class="reg-sys-title">National VAT & Tax<br>Management System</h1>
      <p class="reg-sys-sub">Government of Bangladesh — NBR Portal</p>
    </div>

    <!-- Progress stepper (hidden on success screen) -->
    <div class="stepper" *ngIf="currentStep < 5">
      <div class="step-track"
        *ngFor="let s of steps; let last = last"
        [class.completed]="currentStep > s.num"
        [class.active]="currentStep === s.num">
        <div class="step-dot">
          <i *ngIf="currentStep > s.num" class="bi bi-check-lg"></i>
          <i *ngIf="currentStep <= s.num" [class]="'bi ' + s.icon"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="step-label">
          <span class="step-num">Step {{ s.num }}</span>
          <span class="step-name">{{ s.label }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="step-line" *ngIf="!last"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="reg-left-features" *ngIf="currentStep < 5">
      <div class="rf-item"><i class="bi bi-shield-lock-fill"></i><span>Your data is encrypted and secure</span></div>
      <div class="rf-item"><i class="bi bi-lightning-charge-fill"></i><span>TIN issued instantly upon registration</span></div>
      <div class="rf-item"><i class="bi bi-phone-fill"></i><span>Manage taxes from anywhere</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ── Right Panel ── -->
  <div class="reg-right">
    <div class="reg-card">

      <!-- Step progress bar -->
      <div class="progress-bar-wrap" *ngIf="currentStep < 5">
        <div class="progress-bar-track">
          <div class="progress-bar-fill" [style.width.%]="((currentStep - 1) / 4) * 100"></div>
        </div>
        <span class="progress-label">Step {{ currentStep }} of 4</span>
      </div>

      <!-- ── Step 1: Account Type ── -->
      <app-reg-step-account-type
        *ngIf="currentStep === 1"
        [state]="state"
        (next)="onStep1Next($event)">
      </app-reg-step-account-type>

      <!-- ── Step 2: Credentials ── -->
      <app-reg-step-credentials
        *ngIf="currentStep === 2"
        [state]="state"
        (next)="onStep2Next($event)"
        (back)="onBack(1)">
      </app-reg-step-credentials>

      <!-- ── Step 3: Identity ── -->
      <app-reg-step-identity
        *ngIf="currentStep === 3"
        [state]="state"
        (next)="onStep3Next($event)"
        (back)="onBack(2)">
      </app-reg-step-identity>

      <!-- ── Step 4: Review ── -->
      <app-reg-step-review
        *ngIf="currentStep === 4"
        [state]="state"
        [isSubmitting]="isSubmitting"
        (submit)="onSubmit()"
        (back)="onBack(3)">
      </app-reg-step-review>

      <!-- ── Step 5: Success ── -->
      <app-reg-step-success
        *ngIf="currentStep === 5 && registrationResponse"
        [response]="registrationResponse">
      </app-reg-step-success>

      <!-- Login link -->
      <p class="reg-login-link" *ngIf="currentStep < 5">
        Already have an account?
        <a routerLink="/auth/login">Sign In</a>
      </p>

    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/public-registration/steps/step2-credentials/reg-step-credentials/reg-step-credentials.component.html
```html
<div class="step-body">

  <div class="step-intro">
    <h3 class="step-heading">Create your portal account</h3>
    <p class="step-sub">These credentials will be used to log in to the Nirapod Tax Portal.</p>
  </div>

  <form [formGroup]="form" novalidate>
    <div class="form-grid">

      <!-- Full Name -->
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label required">Full Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap" [class.input-error]="ctrl('fullName')?.invalid && ctrl('fullName')?.touched">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="As it appears on your NID / company documents"
            formControlName="fullName" />
        </div>
        <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('fullName')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('fullName')?.touched">
          Full name is required.
        </span>
        <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('fullName')?.errors?.['minlength'] && ctrl('fullName')?.touched">
          Name must be at least 3 characters.
        </span>
      </div>

      <!-- Email -->
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Email Address</label>
        <div class="input-wrap" [class.input-error]="ctrl('email')?.invalid && ctrl('email')?.touched">
          <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="email" class="form-input" placeholder="your@email.com"
            formControlName="email" />
        </div>
        <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('email')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('email')?.touched">
          Email is required.
        </span>
        <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('email')?.errors?.['email'] && ctrl('email')?.touched">
          Enter a valid email address.
        </span>
      </div>

      <!-- Phone -->
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Mobile Number</label>
        <div class="input-wrap" [class.input-error]="ctrl('phone')?.invalid && ctrl('phone')?.touched">
          <i class="bi bi-phone-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="tel" class="form-input" placeholder="01XXXXXXXXX"
            formControlName="phone" maxlength="11" />
        </div>
        <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('phone')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('phone')?.touched">
          Phone number is required.
        </span>
        <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('phone')?.errors?.['pattern'] && ctrl('phone')?.touched">
          Enter a valid Bangladeshi number (e.g. 01712345678).
        </span>
      </div>

      <!-- Password -->
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Password</label>
        <div class="input-wrap" [class.input-error]="ctrl('password')?.invalid && ctrl('password')?.touched">
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input [type]="showPassword ? 'text' : 'password'" class="form-input"
            placeholder="Create a strong password" formControlName="password" />
          <button type="button" class="toggle-pass" (click)="showPassword = !showPassword">
            <i [class]="showPassword ? 'bi bi-eye-slash-fill' : 'bi bi-eye-fill'"></i>
          </button>
        </div>
        <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('password')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('password')?.touched">
          Password is required.
        </span>
        <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('password')?.errors?.['pattern'] && ctrl('password')?.touched">
          Min 8 characters, one uppercase letter, one number, one special character.
        </span>
      </div>

      <!-- Confirm Password -->
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Confirm Password</label>
        <div class="input-wrap" [class.input-error]="(ctrl('confirmPassword')?.invalid && ctrl('confirmPassword')?.touched) || passwordMismatch">
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input [type]="showConfirmPassword ? 'text' : 'password'" class="form-input"
            placeholder="Repeat your password" formControlName="confirmPassword" />
          <button type="button" class="toggle-pass" (click)="showConfirmPassword = !showConfirmPassword">
            <i [class]="showConfirmPassword ? 'bi bi-eye-slash-fill' : 'bi bi-eye-fill'"></i>
          </button>
        </div>
        <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('confirmPassword')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('confirmPassword')?.touched">
          Please confirm your password.
        </span>
        <span class="field-error" *ngIf="passwordMismatch">
          Passwords do not match.
        </span>
      </div>

    </div>

    <!-- Password strength hints -->
      <div class="pw-hints">
        <span class="pw-hint" [class.met]="hasMinLength">
          <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> 8+ characters
        </span>
        <span class="pw-hint" [class.met]="hasUpperCase">
          <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Uppercase letter
        </span>
        <span class="pw-hint" [class.met]="hasNumber">
          <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Number
        </span>
        <span class="pw-hint" [class.met]="hasSpecialChar">
          <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Special character
        </span>
      </div>

  </form>

  <div class="step-actions">
    <button type="button" class="btn-back" (click)="back.emit()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back
    </button>
    <button type="button" class="btn-next" (click)="onNext()">
      Continue <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

/* reg-step-success.component.css
   Shared success screen styles (.success-body, .success-icon-ring,
   .success-icon, .tin-card, .next-steps, .btn-go-login) all live in
   register.component.css. Only success-step-specific rules here. */

/* Give the success screen a little extra breathing room at the top
   since there is no progress bar shown on step 5 */
:host {
⋮----
/* TIN number uses monospace for clarity — reinforce it here in case
   the parent stylesheet's font-stack overrides it */
.tin-number {
⋮----

.ns-item {
.ns-item:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0.15s; }
.ns-item:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.25s; }
.ns-item:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.35s; }

## File: src/app/features/public-verify/pages/verify-page/verify-page.component.html
```html
<!-- verify-page.component.html -->
<div class="verify-wrapper">

  <!-- Header -->
  <div class="verify-header">
    <div class="gov-badge">
      <i class="bi bi-shield-fill-check"></i>
      <span>National Board of Revenue</span>
    </div>
    <h1>Certificate Verification Portal</h1>
    <p>Enter a Tax Clearance Certificate number to verify its authenticity.</p>
  </div>

  <!-- Search Box -->
  <div class="verify-card">
    <div class="search-group">
      <label class="search-label">Certificate Number</label>
      <div class="search-row">
        <input
          class="search-input"
          type="text"
          [(ngModel)]="certNo"
          placeholder="e.g. CERT-TC-2025-00001"
          (keyup.enter)="onVerify()"
        />
        <button class="btn-verify" (click)="onVerify()" [disabled]="isLoading || !certNo.trim()">
          <span *ngIf="!isLoading"><i class="bi bi-search"></i> Verify</span>
          <span *ngIf="isLoading"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span> Verifying...</span>
        </button>
        <button class="btn-clear" *ngIf="certNo" (click)="onClear()">
          <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
        </button>
      </div>
      <p class="search-hint">Only Tax Clearance Certificates can be verified publicly.</p>
    </div>

    <!-- ── Valid Result ─────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="result-box result-valid" *ngIf="result?.valid">
      <div class="result-icon valid-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-patch-check-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div class="result-content">
        <div class="result-title">Certificate Verified</div>
        <div class="result-sub">This is a genuine NBR-issued Tax Clearance Certificate.</div>

        <div class="result-grid">
          <div class="result-field">
            <div class="field-label">Certificate No.</div>
            <div class="field-value mono">{{ result?.certificateNo }}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="result-field">
            <div class="field-label">Taxpayer Name</div>
            <div class="field-value">{{ result?.taxpayerName }}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="result-field">
            <div class="field-label">TIN Number</div>
            <div class="field-value mono">{{ result?.tinNumber }}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="result-field">
            <div class="field-label">Assessment Year</div>
            <div class="field-value">{{ result?.assessmentYear }}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="result-field">
            <div class="field-label">Issued Date</div>
            <div class="field-value">{{ result?.issuedDate | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="result-field">
            <div class="field-label">Valid Until</div>
            <div class="field-value">{{ result?.validUntil | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="result-field">
            <div class="field-label">Status</div>
            <div class="field-value">
              <span class="status-badge status-approved">{{ result?.status }}</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── Invalid Result ──────────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="result-box result-invalid" *ngIf="searched && result && !result.valid">
      <div class="result-icon invalid-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-x-circle-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div class="result-content">
        <div class="result-title">Not Found</div>
        <div class="result-sub">{{ result?.message || 'No valid certificate found for this number.' }}</div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- Footer -->
  <div class="verify-footer">
    <p>For queries, contact NBR at <strong>nbr@nbr.gov.bd</strong></p>
  </div>

</div>
```

```css
.refund-badge {
⋮----
/* Sizes */
.refund-badge--sm  { font-size: 0.72rem; padding: 2px 8px; }
.refund-badge--md  { font-size: 0.78rem; padding: 4px 11px; }
.refund-badge--lg  { font-size: 0.85rem; padding: 5px 14px; }
⋮----
/* Status colours */
.badge-draft       { background: #f1efe8; color: #444441; border-color: #dcdbd5; }
.badge-submitted   { background: #e6f1fb; color: #0c447c; border-color: #b6d4f5; }
.badge-verify      { background: #eeedfe; color: #3c3489; border-color: #c4c0f8; }
.badge-info-req    { background: #faeeda; color: #633806; border-color: #f5d898; }
.badge-response    { background: #fef9ec; color: #8a6200; border-color: #f5d898; }
.badge-recommended { background: #e1f5ee; color: #085041; border-color: #8fd4bf; }
.badge-supervisor  { background: #ede9fe; color: #4c1d95; border-color: #c4b5fd; }
.badge-approved    { background: #eaf3de; color: #27500a; border-color: #a3c97a; }
.badge-rejected    { background: #fcebeb; color: #791f1f; border-color: #f09595; }
.badge-pay-pending { background: #e1f5ee; color: #085041; border-color: #8fd4bf; }
.badge-processing  { background: #e6f1fb; color: #0c447c; border-color: #b6d4f5; }
.badge-paid        { background: #eaf3de; color: #27500a; border-color: #3b6d11; }
.badge-failed      { background: #fcebeb; color: #791f1f; border-color: #a32d2d; }
.badge-cancelled   { background: #f1efe8; color: #5f5e5a; border-color: #dcdbd5; }
.badge-closed      { background: #e8f5e9; color: #1b5e20; border-color: #66bb6a; }
```

## File: src/app/features/refund-management/components/refund-status-timeline/refund-status-timeline.component.html
```html
<div class="timeline" role="list" aria-label="Refund status history">

  <div *ngIf="!history || history.length === 0" class="text-center text-muted py-3">
    <i class="bi bi-clock-history fs-4 d-block mb-2"></i>
    <small>No status history yet.</small>
  </div>

  <div
    *ngFor="let item of history; let last = last; trackBy: trackByHistoryId"
    class="timeline-item"
    [class.timeline-item--last]="last"
    role="listitem"
  >
    <!-- Dot + line -->
    <div class="timeline-left">
      <div class="timeline-dot" [ngClass]="getColor(item.toStatus)">
        <i [class]="getIcon(item.toStatus)" aria-hidden="true"></i>
      </div>
      <div class="timeline-line" *ngIf="!last"></div>
    </div>

    <!-- Content -->
    <div class="timeline-content" [class.mb-0]="last">
      <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2 flex-wrap">
        <span class="timeline-status" [ngClass]="getColor(item.toStatus)">
          {{ item.toStatus | titlecase }}
        </span>
        <span class="timeline-role badge bg-light text-secondary border">
          {{ item.changedByRole | titlecase }}
        </span>
      </div>
      <div class="timeline-actor mt-1">
        <i class="bi bi-person me-1" aria-hidden="true"></i>
        {{ item.changedByName }}
      </div>
      <div class="timeline-time">
        <i class="bi bi-clock me-1" aria-hidden="true"></i>
        {{ item.changedAt | date: 'dd MMM yyyy, hh:mm a' }}
      </div>
      <div class="timeline-reason" *ngIf="item.changeReason">
        <i class="bi bi-chat-left-text me-1" aria-hidden="true"></i>
        {{ item.changeReason }}
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/refund-management/pages/refund-respond/refund-respond.component.html
```html
<div class="container-fluid py-4 px-4">

  <!-- Header -->
  <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
    <div>
      <button class="btn btn-link btn-sm text-muted ps-0 mb-1" (click)="cancel()">
        <i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i> Back to Details
      </button>
      <h4 class="page-title mb-1">
        <i class="bi bi-reply-fill me-2 text-warning"></i>
        Respond to Information Request
      </h4>
      <p class="text-muted mb-0 small">
        Ref: <strong>{{ refund?.refundReferenceNo }}</strong>
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div *ngIf="loading" class="text-center py-5">
    <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- Error -->
  <div *ngIf="errorMsg" class="alert alert-danger">
    <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill me-2"></i>{{ errorMsg }}
  </div>

  <div *ngIf="!loading && refund" class="row justify-content-center">
    <div class="col-lg-8">

      <!-- Officer's Request Box -->
      <div class="request-box mb-4">
        <div class="request-box-header">
          <i class="bi bi-question-circle-fill text-warning me-2"></i>
          Officer's Information Request
        </div>
        <div class="request-box-body">

          <div *ngFor="let note of refund.statusHistory">
            <div *ngIf="note.toStatus === 'INFO_REQUESTED'" class="request-content">
              <p class="mb-2 small">{{ note.changeReason || 'Please provide additional information or documents as required.' }}</p>
              <div class="d-flex gap-3 text-muted" style="font-size:.72rem">
                <span><i class="bi bi-person me-1"></i>{{ note.changedByName }}</span>
                <span><i class="bi bi-clock me-1"></i>{{ note.changedAt | date:'dd MMM yyyy, hh:mm a' }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="alert alert-warning py-2 small mt-2 mb-0">
            <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle me-1"></i>
            Please respond promptly. Failure to respond may result in rejection of your application.
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Response Form -->
      <div class="wizard-card">
        <div class="wizard-card-header">
          <i class="bi bi-chat-text me-2"></i> Your Response
        </div>
        <div class="wizard-card-body">

          <!-- Text response -->
          <div class="mb-4">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold small">
              Response / Explanation <span class="text-danger">*</span>
            </label>
            <textarea
              class="form-control"
              rows="5"
              [(ngModel)]="responseText"
              placeholder="Provide a detailed explanation addressing the officer's request. Minimum 10 characters."
              [class.is-invalid]="responseText.length > 0 && responseText.trim().length < 10"
              aria-label="Response text"
            ></textarea>
            <div class="d-flex justify-content-between mt-1">
              <div *ngIf="responseText.length > 0 && responseText.trim().length < 10"
                class="invalid-feedback d-block small">
                Minimum 10 characters required.
              </div>
              <div class="text-muted ms-auto" style="font-size:.72rem">
                {{ responseText.length }} characters
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Additional document upload -->
          <div class="mb-3">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold small">
              Additional Supporting Documents <em class="text-muted fw-normal">(optional)</em>
            </label>
            <div class="row g-2 align-items-end mb-2">
              <div class="col-md-5">
                <label class="form-label small">Document Type</label>
                <select class="form-select form-select-sm" [(ngModel)]="selectedDocType">
                  <option *ngFor="let d of documentTypes" [value]="d.value">{{ d.label }}</option>
                </select>
              </div>
              <div class="col-md-5">
                <label class="form-label small">Choose File</label>
                <input
                  type="file"
                  class="form-control form-control-sm"
                  (change)="onFileSelect($event)"
                  accept=".pdf,.jpg,.jpeg,.png"
                  aria-label="Upload additional document"
                >
              </div>
            </div>

            <div *ngIf="uploadError" class="alert alert-danger py-2 small">
              <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle me-1"></i> {{ uploadError }}
            </div>

            <!-- Uploaded list -->
            <div *ngFor="let f of uploadedFiles; let i = index" class="uploaded-file-item">
              <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf text-danger fs-5 flex-shrink-0" aria-hidden="true"></i>
              <div class="flex-grow-1">
                <div class="small fw-semibold">{{ f.name }}</div>
                <div class="text-muted" style="font-size:.72rem">{{ getDocTypeLabel(f.type) }} · {{ f.size }}</div>
              </div>
              <button class="btn btn-outline-danger btn-sm py-0 px-2"
                (click)="removeFile(i)" [attr.aria-label]="'Remove ' + f.name">
                <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Declaration -->
          <div class="declaration-box">
            <i class="bi bi-info-circle text-primary me-2"></i>
            <span class="small">
              By submitting this response, you confirm that all information and documents provided are true
              and accurate. Your response will be reviewed by the assigned officer.
            </span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="wizard-card-footer">
          <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" (click)="cancel()">
            <i class="bi bi-x-lg me-1"></i> Cancel
          </button>
          <button
            class="btn btn-success btn-sm"
            (click)="submit()"
            [disabled]="!canSubmit || submitting"
          >
            <span *ngIf="submitting" class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-1"></span>
            <i *ngIf="!submitting" class="bi bi-send me-1"></i>
            {{ submitting ? 'Submitting Response…' : 'Submit Response' }}
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/refund-management/pages/refund-success/refund-success.component.html
```html
<div class="container py-5 px-4">
  <div class="row justify-content-center">
    <div class="col-lg-6 col-md-8">

      <!-- Loading -->
      <div *ngIf="loading" class="text-center py-5">
        <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
      </div>

      <!-- Success card -->
      <div *ngIf="!loading" class="success-card text-center">

        <!-- Icon -->
        <div class="success-icon-wrap mb-3">
          <div class="success-icon">
            <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill" aria-hidden="true"></i>
          </div>
        </div>

        <h4 class="success-title">Application Submitted!</h4>
        <p class="text-muted mb-4">
          Your refund application has been successfully submitted and is now under verification.
          You will be notified at each step of the process.
        </p>

        <!-- Reference info -->
        <div class="ref-box mb-4" *ngIf="refund">
          <div class="ref-box-row">
            <span class="ref-label">Reference No.</span>
            <span class="ref-value fw-bold text-primary">{{ refund.refundReferenceNo }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="ref-box-row">
            <span class="ref-label">Refund Type</span>
            <span class="ref-value">{{ refund.refundType }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="ref-box-row">
            <span class="ref-label">Claimed Amount</span>
            <span class="ref-value fw-semibold text-success">{{ formatCurrency(refund.claimedRefundAmount) }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="ref-box-row">
            <span class="ref-label">Status</span>
            <span class="ref-value">
              <app-refund-status-badge [status]="refund.status" size="sm"></app-refund-status-badge>
            </span>
          </div>
          <div class="ref-box-row">
            <span class="ref-label">Submitted On</span>
            <span class="ref-value">
              {{ refund.submittedAt ? (refund.submittedAt | date:'dd MMMM yyyy, hh:mm a') : (refund.updatedAt | date:'dd MMMM yyyy') }}
            </span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- What happens next -->
        <div class="next-steps mb-4">
          <div class="next-steps-title">What happens next?</div>
          <div class="next-step-item">
            <div class="next-step-num">1</div>
            <div class="next-step-text">A Verification Officer will review your application and attached documents.</div>
          </div>
          <div class="next-step-item">
            <div class="next-step-num">2</div>
            <div class="next-step-text">You may be asked to provide additional information if required.</div>
          </div>
          <div class="next-step-item">
            <div class="next-step-num">3</div>
            <div class="next-step-text">Once approved, your refund will be transferred to your registered bank account.</div>
          </div>
          <div class="next-step-item">
            <div class="next-step-num">4</div>
            <div class="next-step-text">You will receive SMS and email notifications at every stage.</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Action buttons -->
        <div class="d-flex justify-content-center gap-3 flex-wrap">
          <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" (click)="goToView()">
            <i class="bi bi-eye me-1"></i> View Application
          </button>
          <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" (click)="goToList()">
            <i class="bi bi-list-ul me-1"></i> My Refunds
          </button>
          <button class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" (click)="goToCreate()">
            <i class="bi bi-plus-lg me-1"></i> New Application
          </button>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/reports-analytics/pages/ait-report/ait-report.component.html
```html
<!-- ─── Page Header ─────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <span class="report-back-link" (click)="goBack()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Reports & Analytics
    </span>
    <h4>AIT Deduction Report</h4>
    <p>Advance income tax deductions by source type — FY {{ fiscalYear }}</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <!-- Summary Strip -->
  <div class="report-summary-strip">
    <div class="rss-item">
      <span class="rss-label">Total Records</span>
      <span class="rss-value">{{ totalElements | number }}</span>
    </div>
    <div class="rss-item">
      <span class="rss-label">Fiscal Year</span>
      <span class="rss-value">{{ fiscalYear }}</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Search -->
  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input type="text"
          placeholder="Search by AIT ref, taxpayer, source type..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm" />
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Status Filter Pills -->
  <div class="status-filter-row">
    <button *ngFor="let f of statusFilters" class="filter-pill"
      [class.active]="activeStatus === f.value"
      (click)="filterByStatus(f.value)">{{ f.label }}</button>
  </div>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading AIT data...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Desktop Table -->
  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>AIT Reference No</th>
          <th>Taxpayer</th>
          <th>Source Type</th>
          <th class="text-end">Calculated Amount</th>
          <th class="text-end">Approved Amount</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Created At</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let r of filteredRows; let i = index">
          <td>{{ page * size + i + 1 }}</td>
          <td><span class="ref-code">{{ r.aitReferenceNo }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar">
                {{ (r.taxpayerName || r.taxpayer?.fullName || 'T').charAt(0) }}
              </div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ r.taxpayerName || r.taxpayer?.fullName || '—' }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ r.tinNumber || r.taxpayer?.tinNumber || '—' }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>
          <td><span class="type-badge">{{ r.sourceType }}</span></td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-neutral">
            {{ formatAmount(r.calculatedAitAmount) }}
          </td>
          <td class="amount-cell tax-paid-cell">
            {{ formatAmount(r.approvedAitAmount || r.calculatedAitAmount) }}
          </td>
          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">
              {{ r.status }}
            </span>
          </td>
          <td>{{ r.createdAt | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}</td>
        </tr>

        <tr *ngIf="filteredRows.length === 0">
          <td colspan="8">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-percent"></i>
              <p>No AIT records found.</p>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Pagination -->
  <div class="pagination-row" *ngIf="!isLoading && totalElements > 0">
    <span class="pagination-info">
      Showing {{ pageRange[0] }}–{{ pageRange[1] }} of {{ totalElements | number }} records
    </span>
    <div class="pagination-btns">
      <button class="btn-page" (click)="prevPage()" [disabled]="page === 0">
        <i class="bi bi-chevron-left"></i> Prev
      </button>
      <button class="btn-page active">{{ page + 1 }}</button>
      <button class="btn-page" (click)="nextPage()" [disabled]="page >= totalPages - 1">
        Next <i class="bi bi-chevron-right"></i>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Cards -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let r of filteredRows">
      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar">
            {{ (r.taxpayerName || r.taxpayer?.fullName || 'T').charAt(0) }}
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ r.taxpayerName || r.taxpayer?.fullName || '—' }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ r.aitReferenceNo }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">{{ r.status }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Source</label>
          <span class="type-badge">{{ r.sourceType }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Calculated</label>
          <span class="amount-cell amount-neutral">{{ formatAmount(r.calculatedAitAmount) }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Approved</label>
          <span class="amount-cell tax-paid-cell">
            {{ formatAmount(r.approvedAitAmount || r.calculatedAitAmount) }}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filteredRows.length === 0 && !isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-percent"></i><p>No records found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```
