## File: src/app/features/reports-analytics/pages/import-duty-report/import-duty-report.component.html
```html
<!-- ─── Page Header ─────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <span class="report-back-link" (click)="goBack()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Reports & Analytics
    </span>
    <h4>Import Duty Report</h4>
    <p>Import duty assessments and clearances — FY {{ fiscalYear }}</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <!-- Summary Strip -->
  <div class="report-summary-strip">
    <div class="rss-item">
      <span class="rss-label">Total Records</span>
      <span class="rss-value">{{ totalElements | number }}</span>
    </div>
    <div class="rss-item">
      <span class="rss-label">Fiscal Year</span>
      <span class="rss-value">{{ fiscalYear }}</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Search -->
  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input type="text"
          placeholder="Search by ref no, importer, port..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm" />
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Status Filter Pills -->
  <div class="status-filter-row">
    <button *ngFor="let f of statusFilters" class="filter-pill"
      [class.active]="activeStatus === f.value"
      (click)="filterByStatus(f.value)">{{ f.label }}</button>
  </div>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading import duty data...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Desktop Table -->
  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>Reference No</th>
          <th>Importer</th>
          <th>Port of Entry</th>
          <th>Commodity</th>
          <th class="text-end">Declared Value</th>
          <th class="text-end">Duty Amount</th>
          <th class="text-end">VAT Amount</th>
          <th class="text-end">Total Payable</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Import Date</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let r of filteredRows; let i = index">
          <td>{{ page * size + i + 1 }}</td>
          <td><span class="ref-code">{{ r.referenceNo || r.id }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar">
                {{ (r.importerName || 'I').charAt(0) }}
              </div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ r.importerName || '—' }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ r.importerTin || r.tinNumber || '—' }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>
          <td>{{ r.portOfEntry || r.port || '—' }}</td>
          <td style="max-width:160px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap"
            [title]="r.commodityDescription || r.description || ''">
            {{ r.commodityDescription || r.description || '—' }}
          </td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-neutral">
            {{ formatAmount(r.declaredValue || r.cif) }}
          </td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-negative">
            {{ formatAmount(r.dutyAmount || r.customsDuty) }}
          </td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-negative">
            {{ formatAmount(r.vatAmount || r.importVat) }}
          </td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-negative" style="font-weight:800">
            {{ formatAmount(r.totalPayable || r.totalTax) }}
          </td>
          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">
              {{ r.status }}
            </span>
          </td>
          <td>{{ (r.importDate || r.createdAt) | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}</td>
        </tr>

        <tr *ngIf="filteredRows.length === 0">
          <td colspan="11">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-truck-front"></i>
              <p>No import duty records found.</p>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Pagination -->
  <div class="pagination-row" *ngIf="!isLoading && totalElements > 0">
    <span class="pagination-info">
      Showing {{ pageRange[0] }}–{{ pageRange[1] }} of {{ totalElements | number }} records
    </span>
    <div class="pagination-btns">
      <button class="btn-page" (click)="prevPage()" [disabled]="page === 0">
        <i class="bi bi-chevron-left"></i> Prev
      </button>
      <button class="btn-page active">{{ page + 1 }}</button>
      <button class="btn-page" (click)="nextPage()" [disabled]="page >= totalPages - 1">
        Next <i class="bi bi-chevron-right"></i>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Cards -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let r of filteredRows">
      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar">{{ (r.importerName || 'I').charAt(0) }}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ r.importerName || '—' }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ r.referenceNo || r.id }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">{{ r.status }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Port</label><span>{{ r.portOfEntry || '—' }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Duty</label>
          <span class="amount-cell amount-negative">
            {{ formatAmount(r.dutyAmount || r.customsDuty) }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Total</label>
          <span class="amount-cell amount-negative" style="font-weight:800">
            {{ formatAmount(r.totalPayable || r.totalTax) }}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filteredRows.length === 0 && !isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-truck-front"></i><p>No records found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/reports-analytics/pages/income-tax-report/income-tax-report.component.html
```html
<!-- ─── Page Header ─────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <span class="report-back-link" (click)="goBack()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Reports & Analytics
    </span>
    <h4>Income Tax Returns Report</h4>
    <p>ITR filing status and tax collection analysis — FY {{ fiscalYear }}</p>
  </div>
  <div class="page-header-right">
    <button class="btn-export-csv" (click)="exportCsv()">
      <i class="bi bi-filetype-csv"></i> Export CSV
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <!-- Summary Strip -->
  <div class="report-summary-strip">
    <div class="rss-item">
      <span class="rss-label">Total Returns</span>
      <span class="rss-value">{{ totalElements | number }}</span>
    </div>
    <div class="rss-item">
      <span class="rss-label">Fiscal Year</span>
      <span class="rss-value">{{ fiscalYear }}</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Search -->
  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input type="text" placeholder="Search by TIN, taxpayer name..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm" />
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Status Filter Pills -->
  <div class="status-filter-row">
    <button *ngFor="let f of statusFilters" class="filter-pill"
      [class.active]="activeStatus === f.value" (click)="filterByStatus(f.value)">
      {{ f.label }}
    </button>
    <span style="width:1px;background:#e0e8f0;margin:0 6px"></span>
    <button *ngFor="let t of typeFilters" class="filter-pill"
      [class.active]="activeTaxpayerType === t.value" (click)="filterByType(t.value)">
      {{ t.label }}
    </button>
  </div>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading income tax data...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Desktop Table -->
  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>TIN Number</th>
          <th>Taxpayer</th>
          <th>Category</th>
          <th>Assessment Year</th>
          <th class="text-end">Gross Income</th>
          <th class="text-end">Taxable Income</th>
          <th class="text-end">Tax Payable</th>
          <th class="text-end">Tax Paid</th>
          <th class="text-end">Tax Due</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Filed At</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let r of filteredRows; let i = index">
          <td>{{ page * size + i + 1 }}</td>
          <td><span class="ref-code">{{ r.tinNumber }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar">{{ r.taxpayerName.charAt(0) || 'T' }}</div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ r.taxpayerName }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ r.taxpayerType }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>
          <td><span class="type-badge">{{ r.taxpayerType }}</span></td>
          <td>{{ r.assessmentYear }}</td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-neutral">{{ formatAmount(r.grossIncome) }}</td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-neutral">{{ formatAmount(r.taxableIncome) }}</td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-negative">{{ formatAmount(r.taxPayable) }}</td>
          <td class="amount-cell tax-paid-cell">{{ formatAmount(r.taxPaid) }}</td>
          <td class="amount-cell" [ngClass]="r.taxDue > 0 ? 'tax-due-cell' : 'tax-paid-cell'">
            {{ formatAmount(r.taxDue) }}
          </td>
          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">{{ r.status }}</span>
          </td>
          <td>{{ r.filedAt || '—' }}</td>
        </tr>

        <tr *ngIf="filteredRows.length === 0">
          <td colspan="12">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i>
              <p>No income tax returns found.</p>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Pagination -->
  <div class="pagination-row" *ngIf="!isLoading && totalElements > 0">
    <span class="pagination-info">
      Showing {{ pageRange[0] }}–{{ pageRange[1] }} of {{ totalElements | number }} records
    </span>
    <div class="pagination-btns">
      <button class="btn-page" (click)="prevPage()" [disabled]="page === 0">
        <i class="bi bi-chevron-left"></i> Prev
      </button>
      <button class="btn-page active">{{ page + 1 }}</button>
      <button class="btn-page" (click)="nextPage()" [disabled]="page >= totalPages - 1">
        Next <i class="bi bi-chevron-right"></i>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Cards -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let r of filteredRows">
      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar">{{ r.taxpayerName.charAt(0) || 'T' }}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ r.taxpayerName }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ r.tinNumber }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">{{ r.status }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Assessment Year</label><span>{{ r.assessmentYear }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Tax Payable</label>
          <span class="amount-cell amount-negative">{{ formatAmount(r.taxPayable) }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Tax Due</label>
          <span class="amount-cell" [ngClass]="r.taxDue > 0 ? 'tax-due-cell' : 'tax-paid-cell'">
            {{ formatAmount(r.taxDue) }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Filed At</label><span>{{ r.filedAt || '—' }}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filteredRows.length === 0 && !isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i><p>No records found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/reports-analytics/pages/penalty-report/penalty-report.component.html
```html
<!-- ─── Page Header ─────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <span class="report-back-link" (click)="goBack()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Reports & Analytics
    </span>
    <h4>Penalty Collection Report</h4>
    <p>Penalty and fine collections — FY {{ fiscalYear }}</p>
  </div>
  <div class="page-header-right">
    <button class="btn-export-csv" (click)="exportCsv()">
      <i class="bi bi-filetype-csv"></i> Export CSV
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <!-- Summary Strip -->
  <div class="report-summary-strip">
    <div class="rss-item">
      <span class="rss-label">Total Penalties</span>
      <span class="rss-value">{{ totalElements | number }}</span>
    </div>
    <div class="rss-item">
      <span class="rss-label">Fiscal Year</span>
      <span class="rss-value">{{ fiscalYear }}</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Search -->
  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input type="text"
          placeholder="Search by penalty no, taxpayer, TIN..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm" />
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Status + Severity Filter Pills -->
  <div class="status-filter-row">
    <button *ngFor="let f of statusFilters" class="filter-pill"
      [class.active]="activeStatus === f.value"
      (click)="filterByStatus(f.value)">{{ f.label }}</button>
    <span style="width:1px;background:#e0e8f0;margin:0 6px"></span>
    <button *ngFor="let s of severityFilters" class="filter-pill"
      [class.active]="activeSeverity === s.value"
      (click)="filterBySeverity(s.value)">{{ s.label }}</button>
  </div>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading penalty data...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Desktop Table -->
  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>Penalty No</th>
          <th>Taxpayer</th>
          <th>Type</th>
          <th>Severity</th>
          <th class="text-end">Base Amount</th>
          <th class="text-end">Interest</th>
          <th class="text-end">Total</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Issued At</th>
          <th>Paid At</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let r of filteredRows; let i = index">
          <td>{{ page * size + i + 1 }}</td>
          <td><span class="ref-code">{{ r.penaltyRefNo }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar">{{ r.taxpayerName.charAt(0) || 'T' }}</div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ r.taxpayerName }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ r.tinNumber }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>
          <td><span class="type-badge">{{ r.penaltyType }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <span class="sev-badge" [ngClass]="getSeverityClass(r.severity)">
              <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ r.severity }}
            </span>
          </td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-neutral">{{ formatAmount(r.baseAmount) }}</td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-negative">{{ formatAmount(r.penaltyAmount) }}</td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-negative" style="font-weight:800">
            {{ formatAmount(r.totalAmount) }}
          </td>
          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">
              {{ r.status }}
            </span>
          </td>
          <td>{{ r.issuedAt || '—' }}</td>
          <td>{{ r.paidAt || '—' }}</td>
        </tr>

        <tr *ngIf="filteredRows.length === 0">
          <td colspan="11">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle"></i>
              <p>No penalty records found.</p>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Pagination -->
  <div class="pagination-row" *ngIf="!isLoading && totalElements > 0">
    <span class="pagination-info">
      Showing {{ pageRange[0] }}–{{ pageRange[1] }} of {{ totalElements | number }} records
    </span>
    <div class="pagination-btns">
      <button class="btn-page" (click)="prevPage()" [disabled]="page === 0">
        <i class="bi bi-chevron-left"></i> Prev
      </button>
      <button class="btn-page active">{{ page + 1 }}</button>
      <button class="btn-page" (click)="nextPage()" [disabled]="page >= totalPages - 1">
        Next <i class="bi bi-chevron-right"></i>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Cards -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let r of filteredRows">
      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar">{{ r.taxpayerName.charAt(0) || 'T' }}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ r.taxpayerName }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ r.penaltyRefNo }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">{{ r.status }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>TIN</label><span>{{ r.tinNumber }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Type</label>
          <span class="type-badge">{{ r.penaltyType }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Severity</label>
          <span class="sev-badge" [ngClass]="getSeverityClass(r.severity)">{{ r.severity }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Total</label>
          <span class="amount-cell amount-negative">{{ formatAmount(r.totalAmount) }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Issued</label><span>{{ r.issuedAt || '—' }}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filteredRows.length === 0 && !isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle"></i><p>No records found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/reports-analytics/pages/refund-report/refund-report.component.html
```html
<!-- ─── Page Header ─────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <span class="report-back-link" (click)="goBack()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Reports & Analytics
    </span>
    <h4>Refund Status Report</h4>
    <p>Pending and completed refund claims analysis — FY {{ fiscalYear }}</p>
  </div>
  <div class="page-header-right">
    <button class="btn-export-csv" (click)="exportCsv()">
      <i class="bi bi-filetype-csv"></i> Export CSV
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <!-- Summary Strip -->
  <div class="report-summary-strip">
    <div class="rss-item">
      <span class="rss-label">Total Claims</span>
      <span class="rss-value">{{ totalElements | number }}</span>
    </div>
    <div class="rss-item">
      <span class="rss-label">Fiscal Year</span>
      <span class="rss-value">{{ fiscalYear }}</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Search -->
  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input type="text"
          placeholder="Search by ref no, taxpayer, TIN..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm" />
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Status Filter Pills -->
  <div class="status-filter-row">
    <button *ngFor="let f of statusFilters" class="filter-pill"
      [class.active]="activeStatus === f.value"
      (click)="filterByStatus(f.value)">{{ f.label }}</button>
  </div>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading refund data...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Desktop Table -->
  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>Reference No</th>
          <th>Taxpayer</th>
          <th>Type</th>
          <th class="text-end">Claimed</th>
          <th class="text-end">Approved</th>
          <th class="text-end">Paid</th>
          <th>Risk Level</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Submitted</th>
          <th>Processed</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let r of filteredRows; let i = index">
          <td>{{ page * size + i + 1 }}</td>
          <td><span class="ref-code">{{ r.refundRefNo }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar">{{ r.taxpayerName.charAt(0) || 'T' }}</div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ r.taxpayerName }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ r.tinNumber }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>
          <td><span class="type-badge">{{ r.refundType }}</span></td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-neutral">{{ formatAmount(r.claimedAmount) }}</td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-positive">{{ formatAmount(r.approvedAmount) }}</td>
          <td class="amount-cell tax-paid-cell">{{ formatAmount(r.paidAmount) }}</td>
          <td>
            <span class="sev-badge"
              [ngClass]="r.riskLevel === 'HIGH' ? 'sev-high' :
                         r.riskLevel === 'MEDIUM' ? 'sev-medium' : 'sev-low'">
              {{ r.riskLevel || 'LOW' }}
            </span>
          </td>
          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">
              {{ r.status }}
            </span>
          </td>
          <td>{{ r.submittedAt || '—' }}</td>
          <td>{{ r.processedAt || '—' }}</td>
        </tr>

        <tr *ngIf="filteredRows.length === 0">
          <td colspan="11">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-arrow-return-left"></i>
              <p>No refund records found.</p>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Pagination -->
  <div class="pagination-row" *ngIf="!isLoading && totalElements > 0">
    <span class="pagination-info">
      Showing {{ pageRange[0] }}–{{ pageRange[1] }} of {{ totalElements | number }} records
    </span>
    <div class="pagination-btns">
      <button class="btn-page" (click)="prevPage()" [disabled]="page === 0">
        <i class="bi bi-chevron-left"></i> Prev
      </button>
      <button class="btn-page active">{{ page + 1 }}</button>
      <button class="btn-page" (click)="nextPage()" [disabled]="page >= totalPages - 1">
        Next <i class="bi bi-chevron-right"></i>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Cards -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let r of filteredRows">
      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar">{{ r.taxpayerName.charAt(0) || 'T' }}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ r.taxpayerName }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ r.refundRefNo }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">{{ r.status }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>TIN</label><span>{{ r.tinNumber }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Claimed</label>
          <span class="amount-cell amount-neutral">{{ formatAmount(r.claimedAmount) }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Approved</label>
          <span class="amount-cell amount-positive">{{ formatAmount(r.approvedAmount) }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Submitted</label><span>{{ r.submittedAt || '—' }}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filteredRows.length === 0 && !isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-return-left"></i><p>No records found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   Reports & Analytics — Dashboard Component Styles
   Strictly follows Nirapod design system.
   Tokens used: #1a3f8f (blue), #1faa8b (green), #7c3aed (purple),
                #e74c3c (red), #f59e0b (orange), #0891b2 (teal)
   ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
/* ─── Filter Bar ──────────────────────────────────────── */

.kpi-change.neutral  { color: #888; }

.section-header-row {

.rc-icon.red    { background: #fff0f0; color: #e74c3c; }

## File: src/app/features/reports-analytics/pages/vat-collection-report/vat-collection-report.component.html
```html
<!-- ─── Page Header ─────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <span class="report-back-link" (click)="goBack()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Reports & Analytics
    </span>
    <h4>VAT Collection Report</h4>
    <p>Monthly VAT collection summary — FY {{ fiscalYear }}
      <span *ngIf="zone"> · Zone: {{ zone }}</span>
    </p>
  </div>
  <div class="page-header-right">
    <button class="btn-export-csv" (click)="exportCsv()">
      <i class="bi bi-filetype-csv"></i> Export CSV
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <!-- Summary Strip -->
  <div class="report-summary-strip">
    <div class="rss-item">
      <span class="rss-label">Total Records</span>
      <span class="rss-value">{{ totalElements | number }}</span>
    </div>
    <div class="rss-item">
      <span class="rss-label">Fiscal Year</span>
      <span class="rss-value">{{ fiscalYear }}</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Search & Status Filter -->
  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input type="text" placeholder="Search by BIN, business name, status..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm" />
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="status-filter-row">
    <button *ngFor="let f of statusFilters" class="filter-pill"
      [class.active]="activeStatus === f.value" (click)="filterByStatus(f.value)">
      {{ f.label }}
    </button>
  </div>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading VAT collection data...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Desktop Table -->
  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>BIN No</th>
          <th>Business Name</th>
          <th>Zone</th>
          <th>Circle</th>
          <th>Period</th>
          <th class="text-end">Gross Supplies</th>
          <th class="text-end">Output Tax</th>
          <th class="text-end">Input Tax</th>
          <th class="text-end">Net VAT</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Submitted</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let r of filteredRows; let i = index">
          <td>{{ page * size + i + 1 }}</td>
          <td><span class="ref-code">{{ r.binNo }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar">{{ r.businessName.charAt(0) || 'B' }}</div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ r.businessName }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ r.taxpayerName }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>
          <td>{{ r.zone || '—' }}</td>
          <td>{{ r.circle || '—' }}</td>
          <td>{{ r.period }}</td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-neutral">{{ formatAmount(r.grossSales) }}</td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-neutral">{{ formatAmount(r.outputVat) }}</td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-positive">{{ formatAmount(r.inputVatCredit) }}</td>
          <td class="amount-cell amount-negative">{{ formatAmount(r.netVat) }}</td>
          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">
              {{ r.status }}
            </span>
          </td>
          <td>{{ r.submittedAt || '—' }}</td>
        </tr>

        <tr *ngIf="filteredRows.length === 0">
          <td colspan="12">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i>
              <p>No VAT collection records found.</p>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Pagination -->
  <div class="pagination-row" *ngIf="!isLoading && totalElements > 0">
    <span class="pagination-info">
      Showing {{ pageRange[0] }}–{{ pageRange[1] }} of {{ totalElements | number }} records
    </span>
    <div class="pagination-btns">
      <button class="btn-page" (click)="prevPage()" [disabled]="page === 0">
        <i class="bi bi-chevron-left"></i> Prev
      </button>
      <button class="btn-page active">{{ page + 1 }}</button>
      <button class="btn-page" (click)="nextPage()" [disabled]="page >= totalPages - 1">
        Next <i class="bi bi-chevron-right"></i>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Cards -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let r of filteredRows">
      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar">{{ r.businessName.charAt(0) || 'B' }}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ r.businessName }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ r.binNo }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">{{ r.status }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Period</label><span>{{ r.period }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Zone</label><span>{{ r.zone || '—' }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Net VAT</label>
          <span class="amount-cell amount-negative">{{ formatAmount(r.netVat) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Submitted</label><span>{{ r.submittedAt || '—' }}</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filteredRows.length === 0 && !isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i>
      <p>No records found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/roles/pages/roles-list/roles-list.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Roles & Permissions</h4>
    <p>View access levels and permissions for each system role.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Role Selector Cards -->
<div class="role-selector">
  <div class="role-card"
    *ngFor="let r of roles"
    [class.selected]="selectedRole === r.role"
    (click)="selectRole(r.role)">
    <div class="rc-avatar" [ngClass]="getRoleColorClass(r.color)">
      <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
    </div>
    <div class="rc-info">
      <div class="rc-label">{{ r.label }}</div>
      <div class="rc-count">{{ r.userCount }} user{{ r.userCount > 1 ? 's' : '' }}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="rc-perms">{{ countPermissions(r) }}<span>perms</span></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Permission Matrix -->
<div class="perm-section">
  <div class="perm-header">
    <div class="ph-left">
      <div class="ph-avatar" [ngClass]="getRoleColorClass(selectedRoleConfig.color)">
        <i class="bi bi-shield-fill-check"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="ph-title">{{ selectedRoleConfig.label }}</div>
        <div class="ph-desc">{{ selectedRoleConfig.description }}</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ph-stats">
      <span class="ph-stat">{{ countPermissions(selectedRoleConfig) }} permissions</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="perm-table-wrap">
    <table class="perm-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th class="module-col">Module</th>
          <th class="perm-col"><i class="bi bi-plus-circle-fill"></i><span>Create</span></th>
          <th class="perm-col"><i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i><span>Read</span></th>
          <th class="perm-col"><i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i><span>Update</span></th>
          <th class="perm-col"><i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i><span>Delete</span></th>
          <th class="perm-col"><i class="bi bi-download"></i><span>Export</span></th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let p of selectedRoleConfig.permissions; let odd = odd"
          [class.odd-row]="odd">
          <td class="module-name">{{ p.module }}</td>
          <td><span class="perm-chip" [class.yes]="p.create" [class.no]="!p.create">
            <i [class]="p.create ? 'bi bi-check-circle-fill' : 'bi bi-x-circle-fill'"></i>
          </span></td>
          <td><span class="perm-chip" [class.yes]="p.read" [class.no]="!p.read">
            <i [class]="p.read ? 'bi bi-check-circle-fill' : 'bi bi-x-circle-fill'"></i>
          </span></td>
          <td><span class="perm-chip" [class.yes]="p.update" [class.no]="!p.update">
            <i [class]="p.update ? 'bi bi-check-circle-fill' : 'bi bi-x-circle-fill'"></i>
          </span></td>
          <td><span class="perm-chip" [class.yes]="p.delete" [class.no]="!p.delete">
            <i [class]="p.delete ? 'bi bi-check-circle-fill' : 'bi bi-x-circle-fill'"></i>
          </span></td>
          <td><span class="perm-chip" [class.yes]="p.export" [class.no]="!p.export">
            <i [class]="p.export ? 'bi bi-check-circle-fill' : 'bi bi-x-circle-fill'"></i>
          </span></td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/tax-structure/pages/tax-structure-create/tax-structure-create.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Add Tax Structure</h4>
    <p>Define a new tax type, rate and applicability.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to List
  </button>
</div>

<div class="alert-success" *ngIf="successMsg">
  <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> {{ successMsg }}
</div>
<div class="alert-error" *ngIf="errorMsg">
  <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ errorMsg }}
</div>

<!-- Loading master data spinner -->
<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isMasterLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-warning"></div>
  <p>Loading form data…</p>
</div>

<div class="form-card" *ngIf="!isMasterLoading">

  <!-- ── Section 1: Tax Identity ── -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon"><i class="bi bi-sliders"></i></div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Tax Identity</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Code, name, type and rate method</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group required">
        <label class="form-label required">Tax Code</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="e.g. VAT-STD-001"
            [(ngModel)]="form.taxCode" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group required">
        <label class="form-label required">Tax Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="e.g. Standard VAT, AIT on Salary"
            [(ngModel)]="form.taxName" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Tax Type</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-grid-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.taxType">
            <option value="">Select Type</option>
            <option *ngFor="let t of taxTypes" [value]="t">{{ t }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Rate Method</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-diagram-3-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select"
            [(ngModel)]="form.rateType"
            (change)="onRateTypeChange()">
            <option *ngFor="let r of rateTypes" [value]="r.value">{{ r.label }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <small class="form-hint" *ngIf="form.rateType === 'SLAB'">
          <i class="bi bi-info-circle"></i> Progressive slabs — define income brackets below.
        </small>
      </div>

      <!-- Flat Rate input (only for FLAT) -->
      <div class="form-group" *ngIf="form.rateType === 'FLAT'">
        <label class="form-label required">Rate (%)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap rate-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-percent input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input"
            placeholder="0" min="0" max="100" step="0.5"
            [(ngModel)]="form.rate"
            (ngModelChange)="triggerPreview()" />
          <span class="rate-suffix">%</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Applicable To</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-people-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.applicableTo">
            <option *ngFor="let a of applicables" [value]="a">{{ a }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div><!-- /form-grid -->
  </div><!-- /section 1 -->

  <!-- ── Section 2: Slabs (only when SLAB) ── -->
  <div class="form-section" *ngIf="form.rateType === 'SLAB'">
    <div class="section-divider"></div>
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon orange"><i class="bi bi-table"></i></div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Tax Slabs</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Define progressive income brackets (sorted ascending)</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="slabs-table-wrap">
      <table class="slabs-table">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th>#</th>
            <th>Min Amount (৳)</th>
            <th>Max Amount (৳) <small class="optional">blank = unlimited</small></th>
            <th>Rate (%)</th>
            <th>Label <small class="optional">(optional)</small></th>
            <th></th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          <tr *ngFor="let slab of form.slabs; let i = index; trackBy: trackByIndex">
            <td class="slab-num">{{ i + 1 }}</td>
            <td>
              <input type="number" class="slab-input" min="0"
                [(ngModel)]="slab.minAmount"
                (ngModelChange)="triggerPreview()" />
            </td>
            <td>
              <input type="number" class="slab-input" min="0"
                [placeholder]="'unlimited'"
                [(ngModel)]="slab.maxAmount"
                (ngModelChange)="triggerPreview()" />
            </td>
            <td>
              <input type="number" class="slab-input slab-rate" min="0" max="100" step="0.5"
                [(ngModel)]="slab.rate"
                (ngModelChange)="triggerPreview()" />
              <span class="slab-pct">%</span>
            </td>
            <td>
              <input type="text" class="slab-input slab-label"
                placeholder="e.g. Up to ৳3,50,000"
                [(ngModel)]="slab.label" />
            </td>
            <td>
              <button class="btn-slab-remove" (click)="removeSlab(i)" title="Remove slab">
                <i class="bi bi-trash3"></i>
              </button>
            </td>
          </tr>
        </tbody>
      </table>
      <button class="btn-add-slab" (click)="addSlab()">
        <i class="bi bi-plus-circle"></i> Add Slab
      </button>
    </div>
  </div><!-- /slabs section -->

  <!-- ── Section 3: Preview (backend) ── -->
  <div class="section-divider"></div>
  <div class="form-section preview-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon teal"><i class="bi bi-calculator-fill"></i></div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Tax Preview</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Calculated by the server</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="preview-controls">
      <label class="form-label">Preview Amount (৳)</label>
      <div class="input-wrap preview-amount-wrap">
        <i class="bi bi-currency-exchange input-icon"></i>
        <input type="number" class="form-input preview-input" min="1"
          [(ngModel)]="previewAmount"
          (ngModelChange)="triggerPreview()" />
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="preview-result" *ngIf="!isPreviewLoading && previewResult">
      <!-- FLAT result -->
      <div class="pr-flat" *ngIf="previewResult.rateType === 'FLAT'">
        <span class="pr-label">For ৳{{ previewAmount | number }}</span>
        <span class="pr-arrow">→</span>
        <span class="pr-tax">Tax = ৳{{ previewResult.taxAmount | number:'1.0-2' }}</span>
        <span class="pr-rate">({{ previewResult.effectiveRate }}%)</span>
      </div>

      <!-- SLAB result -->
      <div class="pr-slab" *ngIf="previewResult.rateType === 'SLAB'">
        <div class="pr-slab-summary">
          <span>Total Tax on ৳{{ previewAmount | number }}</span>
          <strong>= ৳{{ previewResult.taxAmount | number:'1.0-2' }}</strong>
          <span class="pr-rate">Effective rate: {{ previewResult.effectiveRate | number:'1.1-2' }}%</span>
        </div>
        <table class="pr-slab-table" *ngIf="previewResult.breakdown.length">
          <thead>
            <tr><th>Slab</th><th>Rate</th><th>Taxable</th><th>Tax</th></tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            <tr *ngFor="let b of previewResult.breakdown">
              <td>{{ b.label || (b.slabMin | number) + ' – ' + (b.slabMax ? (b.slabMax | number) : '∞') }}</td>
              <td>{{ b.slabRate }}%</td>
              <td>৳{{ b.taxableInSlab | number:'1.0-0' }}</td>
              <td>৳{{ b.taxInSlab    | number:'1.0-0' }}</td>
            </tr>
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="preview-loading" *ngIf="isPreviewLoading">
      <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span> Calculating…
    </div>
  </div><!-- /preview section -->

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- ── Section 4: Validity ── -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon teal"><i class="bi bi-calendar-range-fill"></i></div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Validity Period & Status</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Effective and expiry dates</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Effective Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.effectiveDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Expiry Date <span class="optional">(optional)</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-x input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.expiryDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.status">
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- ── Section 5: Description ── -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon purple"><i class="bi bi-chat-text-fill"></i></div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Description</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Additional details about this tax</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Description</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-text-paragraph input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea"
            placeholder="Describe this tax structure…"
            [(ngModel)]="form.description" rows="3"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ── Actions ── -->
  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-reset" (click)="onReset()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise"></i> Reset
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()"
      [disabled]="isLoading || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isLoading"><i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Create Tax Structure</span>
      <span *ngIf="isLoading"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Creating…</span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div><!-- /form-card -->
```

## File: src/app/features/tax-structure/pages/tax-structure-edit/tax-structure-edit.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Edit Tax Structure</h4>
    <p>Update tax rate and configuration.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to View
  </button>
</div>

<div class="alert-success" *ngIf="successMsg">
  <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> {{ successMsg }}
</div>
<div class="alert-error" *ngIf="errorMsg">
  <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ errorMsg }}
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading || isMasterLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-warning"></div>
</div>

<div class="form-card" *ngIf="!isLoading && !isMasterLoading">

  <div class="edit-banner">
    <i class="bi bi-pencil-square"></i>
    Editing: <strong>{{ form.taxName }}</strong>
    <span class="banner-code">{{ form.taxCode }}</span>
    <span class="banner-rate-type" [class.slab]="form.rateType === 'SLAB'">
      {{ form.rateType }}
    </span>
  </div>

  <!-- ── Section 1: Tax Identity ── -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon"><i class="bi bi-sliders"></i></div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Tax Identity</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Name, type, rate method and applicability</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label required">Tax Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.taxName" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Tax Type</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-grid-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.taxType">
            <option *ngFor="let t of taxTypes" [value]="t">{{ t }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Rate Method</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-diagram-3-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select"
            [(ngModel)]="form.rateType"
            (change)="onRateTypeChange()">
            <option *ngFor="let r of rateTypes" [value]="r.value">{{ r.label }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Flat Rate -->
      <div class="form-group" *ngIf="form.rateType === 'FLAT'">
        <label class="form-label required">Rate (%)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap rate-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-percent input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" min="0" max="100" step="0.5"
            [(ngModel)]="form.rate"
            (ngModelChange)="triggerPreview()" />
          <span class="rate-suffix">%</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Applicable To</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-people-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.applicableTo">
            <option *ngFor="let a of applicables" [value]="a">{{ a }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.status">
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ── Section 2: Slabs ── -->
  <div class="form-section" *ngIf="form.rateType === 'SLAB'">
    <div class="section-divider"></div>
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon orange"><i class="bi bi-table"></i></div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Tax Slabs</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Progressive income brackets (sorted ascending)</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="slabs-table-wrap">
      <table class="slabs-table">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th>#</th>
            <th>Min Amount (৳)</th>
            <th>Max Amount (৳) <small class="optional">blank = unlimited</small></th>
            <th>Rate (%)</th>
            <th>Label <small class="optional">(optional)</small></th>
            <th></th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          <tr *ngFor="let slab of form.slabs; let i = index; trackBy: trackByIndex">
            <td class="slab-num">{{ i + 1 }}</td>
            <td>
              <input type="number" class="slab-input" min="0"
                [(ngModel)]="slab.minAmount" (ngModelChange)="triggerPreview()" />
            </td>
            <td>
              <input type="number" class="slab-input" min="0" placeholder="unlimited"
                [(ngModel)]="slab.maxAmount" (ngModelChange)="triggerPreview()" />
            </td>
            <td>
              <input type="number" class="slab-input slab-rate" min="0" max="100" step="0.5"
                [(ngModel)]="slab.rate" (ngModelChange)="triggerPreview()" />
              <span class="slab-pct">%</span>
            </td>
            <td>
              <input type="text" class="slab-input slab-label" placeholder="e.g. Up to ৳3,50,000"
                [(ngModel)]="slab.label" />
            </td>
            <td>
              <button class="btn-slab-remove" (click)="removeSlab(i)" title="Remove">
                <i class="bi bi-trash3"></i>
              </button>
            </td>
          </tr>
        </tbody>
      </table>
      <button class="btn-add-slab" (click)="addSlab()">
        <i class="bi bi-plus-circle"></i> Add Slab
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ── Section 3: Preview ── -->
  <div class="section-divider"></div>
  <div class="form-section preview-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon teal"><i class="bi bi-calculator-fill"></i></div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Tax Preview</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Calculated by the server</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="preview-controls">
      <label class="form-label">Preview Amount (৳)</label>
      <div class="input-wrap preview-amount-wrap">
        <i class="bi bi-currency-exchange input-icon"></i>
        <input type="number" class="form-input preview-input" min="1"
          [(ngModel)]="previewAmount" (ngModelChange)="triggerPreview()" />
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="preview-result" *ngIf="!isPreviewLoading && previewResult">
      <div class="pr-flat" *ngIf="previewResult.rateType === 'FLAT'">
        <span class="pr-label">For ৳{{ previewAmount | number }}</span>
        <span class="pr-arrow">→</span>
        <span class="pr-tax">Tax = ৳{{ previewResult.taxAmount | number:'1.0-2' }}</span>
        <span class="pr-rate">({{ previewResult.effectiveRate }}%)</span>
      </div>
      <div class="pr-slab" *ngIf="previewResult.rateType === 'SLAB'">
        <div class="pr-slab-summary">
          <span>Total Tax on ৳{{ previewAmount | number }}</span>
          <strong>= ৳{{ previewResult.taxAmount | number:'1.0-2' }}</strong>
          <span class="pr-rate">Effective: {{ previewResult.effectiveRate | number:'1.1-2' }}%</span>
        </div>
        <table class="pr-slab-table" *ngIf="previewResult.breakdown.length">
          <thead><tr><th>Slab</th><th>Rate</th><th>Taxable</th><th>Tax</th></tr></thead>
          <tbody>
            <tr *ngFor="let b of previewResult.breakdown">
              <td>{{ b.label || (b.slabMin | number) + ' – ' + (b.slabMax ? (b.slabMax | number) : '∞') }}</td>
              <td>{{ b.slabRate }}%</td>
              <td>৳{{ b.taxableInSlab | number:'1.0-0' }}</td>
              <td>৳{{ b.taxInSlab    | number:'1.0-0' }}</td>
            </tr>
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="preview-loading" *ngIf="isPreviewLoading">
      <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span> Calculating…
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- ── Section 4: Validity ── -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon teal"><i class="bi bi-calendar-range-fill"></i></div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Validity Period</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Effective and expiry dates</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Effective Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.effectiveDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Expiry Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-x input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.expiryDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- ── Section 5: Description ── -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon purple"><i class="bi bi-chat-text-fill"></i></div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Description</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Additional details</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Description</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-text-paragraph input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea"
            [(ngModel)]="form.description" rows="3"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isSaving">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()"
      [disabled]="isSaving || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isSaving"><i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Update Tax Structure</span>
      <span *ngIf="isSaving"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Updating…</span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div><!-- /form-card -->
```

## File: src/app/features/tax-structure/pages/tax-structure-list/tax-structure-list.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Tax Structure</h4>
    <p>Manage all tax types, rates and applicability rules.</p>
  </div>
  <a *canDo="'create'" routerLink="/tax-structure/create"
     class="btn-add-primary desktop-add-btn">
    <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i> Add Tax Structure
  </a>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input type="text" placeholder="Search by code, name, type..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm" />
      </div>
      <button *canDo="'export'" class="btn-export">
        <i class="bi bi-download"></i><span>Export</span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading tax structures...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Desktop Table -->
  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>Tax Code</th>
          <th>Tax Name</th>
          <th>Tax Type</th>
          <th>Rate (%)</th>
          <th>Applicable To</th>
          <th>Effective Date</th>
          <th>Expiry Date</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Actions</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let t of filtered; let i = index">
          <td>{{ i + 1 }}</td>
          <td><span class="tax-code">{{ t.taxCode }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar tax-avatar">
                <i class="bi bi-percent"></i>
              </div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ t.taxName }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ t.description | slice:0:40 }}...</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>
          <td><span class="type-badge" [ngClass]="getTypeClass(t.taxType)">{{ t.taxType }}</span></td>
          <td><span class="rate-badge">{{ t.rate }}%</span></td>
          <td><span class="applicable-badge">{{ t.applicableTo }}</span></td>
          <td>{{ t.effectiveDate }}</td>
          <td>
            <span [class]="isExpired(t.expiryDate) ? 'expiry-red' : 'expiry-normal'">
              {{ t.expiryDate || '—' }}
            </span>
          </td>
          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(t.status)">{{ t.status }}</span>
          </td>
          <td>
            <div class="action-btns">
              <button class="btn-view" (click)="view(t.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
              </button>
              <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit" (click)="edit(t.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
              </button>
              <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_COMMISSIONER']"
                class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(t.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i>
              </button>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
        <tr *ngIf="filtered.length === 0">
          <td colspan="10">
            <div class="empty-state"><i class="bi bi-sliders"></i><p>No tax structures found.</p></div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Cards -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" style="padding:12px;" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let t of filtered">
      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar tax-avatar"><i class="bi bi-percent"></i></div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ t.taxName }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ t.taxCode }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(t.status)">{{ t.status }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Type</label>
          <span class="type-badge" [ngClass]="getTypeClass(t.taxType)">{{ t.taxType }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Rate</label><span class="rate-badge">{{ t.rate }}%</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Applicable To</label><span>{{ t.applicableTo }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Effective</label><span>{{ t.effectiveDate }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field" *ngIf="t.expiryDate"><label>Expiry</label>
          <span [class]="isExpired(t.expiryDate) ? 'expiry-red' : ''">{{ t.expiryDate }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-actions">
        <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_COMMISSIONER']"
          class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(t.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filtered.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-sliders"></i><p>No tax structures found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<button *canDo="'create'" class="fab-btn" routerLink="/tax-structure/create">
  <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i>
</button>

<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showDeleteModal">
  <div class="modal-card">
    <div class="modal-accent error"></div>
    <div class="modal-icon-wrap error">
      <i class="bi bi-trash-fill" style="color:#A32D2D; font-size:22px;"></i>
    </div>
    <p class="modal-title">Delete Tax Structure?</p>
    <p class="modal-msg">
      This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this tax structure?
    </p>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn-modal-cancel" (click)="cancelDelete()">Cancel</button>
      <button class="btn-modal-confirm error" (click)="confirmDeleteExecute()">
        <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/taxpayer-portal/pages/portal-application-status/portal-application-status.component.html
```html
<div class="status-shell">

  <!-- Nav -->
  <header class="status-nav">
    <div class="nav-brand">
      <svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 28 28" fill="none">
        <rect width="28" height="28" rx="8" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.15)"/>
        <path d="M14 4L24 9V14C24 19.5 19.5 24 14 24C8.5 24 4 19.5 4 14V9L14 4Z"
              fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.9)"/>
        <path d="M10 14L13 17L18 11" stroke="#1a7a4a" stroke-width="2"
              stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
      </svg>
      <div>
        <div class="brand-name">NBR Portal</div>
        <div class="brand-sub">Government of Bangladesh</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <button class="btn-logout" (click)="logout()">
      <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none">
        <path d="M6 2H3a1 1 0 00-1 1v10a1 1 0 001 1h3M10 11l3-3-3-3M13 8H6"
              stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      </svg>
      Sign out
    </button>
  </header>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div class="loading-wrap" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner"></div>
    <p>Loading your application...</p>
  </div>

  <div class="status-body" *ngIf="!isLoading">

    <!-- PENDING_REVIEW -->
    <ng-container *ngIf="isPending">
      <div class="status-card">
        <div class="status-icon pending">
          <svg width="48" height="48" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none">
            <circle cx="24" cy="24" r="22" stroke="#e67e22" stroke-width="2.5"/>
            <path d="M24 14v12l7 4" stroke="#e67e22" stroke-width="2.5"
                  stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
        <h1 class="status-title">Application Under Review</h1>
        <p class="status-sub">
          Your registration has been submitted and is currently being reviewed
          by our officers. This typically takes <strong>2–5 working days</strong>.
        </p>

        <div class="info-grid">
          <div class="info-card">
            <div class="info-label">Applicant</div>
            <div class="info-value">{{ displayName }}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="info-card">
            <div class="info-label">Status</div>
            <div class="info-value">
              <span class="badge pending-badge">Pending Review</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="info-card">
            <div class="info-label">Type</div>
            <div class="info-value">{{ taxpayer?.taxpayerType?.typeName || '—' }}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="info-card">
            <div class="info-label">Application Ref</div>
            <div class="info-value mono">#{{ taxpayer?.id || '—' }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="timeline">
          <div class="tl-item done">
            <div class="tl-dot done-dot">✓</div>
            <div class="tl-body">
              <div class="tl-title">Application Submitted</div>
              <div class="tl-sub">Your registration form has been received</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="tl-item active">
            <div class="tl-dot active-dot"></div>
            <div class="tl-body">
              <div class="tl-title">Under Officer Review</div>
              <div class="tl-sub">An NBR officer is reviewing your documents</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="tl-item todo">
            <div class="tl-dot todo-dot"></div>
            <div class="tl-body">
              <div class="tl-title">TIN Issuance</div>
              <div class="tl-sub">Your TIN will be issued upon approval</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="tl-item todo">
            <div class="tl-dot todo-dot"></div>
            <div class="tl-body">
              <div class="tl-title">Portal Access Granted</div>
              <div class="tl-sub">Full portal access will be activated</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="help-box">
          <div class="help-icon">💡</div>
          <div>
            <strong>Need help?</strong> Contact your nearest NBR office or
            call the helpdesk at <strong>16579</strong> with your application
            reference number.
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </ng-container>

    <!-- REJECTED -->
    <ng-container *ngIf="isRejected">
      <div class="status-card">
        <div class="status-icon rejected">
          <svg width="48" height="48" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none">
            <circle cx="24" cy="24" r="22" stroke="#c0392b" stroke-width="2.5"/>
            <path d="M16 16l16 16M32 16L16 32" stroke="#c0392b" stroke-width="2.5"
                  stroke-linecap="round"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
        <h1 class="status-title">Application Rejected</h1>
        <p class="status-sub">
          Unfortunately, your registration application could not be approved
          at this time. Please review the reason below and reapply.
        </p>

        <div class="reject-reason" *ngIf="reviewNotes">
          <div class="rr-label">Reason for rejection</div>
          <div class="rr-text">{{ reviewNotes }}</div>
        </div>

        <div class="info-grid">
          <div class="info-card">
            <div class="info-label">Applicant</div>
            <div class="info-value">{{ displayName }}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="info-card">
            <div class="info-label">Status</div>
            <div class="info-value">
              <span class="badge rejected-badge">Rejected</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="help-box error">
          <div class="help-icon">📞</div>
          <div>
            To appeal this decision or reapply, contact your nearest NBR
            office with your application reference <strong>#{{ taxpayer?.id }}</strong>.
            Helpdesk: <strong>16579</strong>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </ng-container>

  </div>

  <footer class="status-footer">
    <span>© {{ currentYear }} National Board of Revenue, Bangladesh</span>
    <span>·</span>
    <span>Secure Government Portal</span>
  </footer>
</div>
```
