## File: src/app/features/document-verification/pages/document-create/document-create.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Add Document</h4>
    <p>Submit a new document for verification.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to List
  </button>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-success"></div>
  <p>Loading document data...</p>
</div>

<div class="form-card">

  <!-- Taxpayer Search (replaces raw tinNumber/taxpayerName inputs) -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon"><i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i></div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Taxpayer</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Search and select the taxpayer</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label required">Find Taxpayer</label>
        <div class="search-row">
          <div class="input-wrap search-input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-search input-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="form-input"
              placeholder="Enter NID, name or TIN..."
              [(ngModel)]="searchQuery"
              [disabled]="selectedTaxpayer !== null"
              (keyup.enter)="searchTaxpayer()" />
            <button *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer" class="clear-btn" (click)="clearTaxpayer()">
              <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
            </button>
          </div>
          <button class="btn-search" (click)="searchTaxpayer()"
            [disabled]="isSearching || selectedTaxpayer !== null">
            <span *ngIf="!isSearching"><i class="bi bi-search"></i> Search</span>
            <span *ngIf="isSearching"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span></span>
          </button>
        </div>
        <!-- Results -->
        <div class="search-results" *ngIf="showResults && searchResults.length > 0">
          <div class="result-item" *ngFor="let t of searchResults" (click)="selectTaxpayer(t)">
            <div class="result-avatar"><i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i></div>
            <div class="result-info">
              <span class="result-name">{{ getDisplayName(t) }}</span>
              <span class="result-meta">
                <span *ngIf="t.nid">NID: {{ t.nid }}</span>
                <span *ngIf="t.phone"> · {{ t.phone }}</span>
              </span>
            </div>
            <span class="result-badge">Select</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Selected -->
        <div class="selected-card" *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer">
          <div class="selected-card-left">
            <div class="selected-avatar"><i class="bi bi-person-check-fill"></i></div>
            <div>
              <p class="selected-name">{{ getDisplayName(selectedTaxpayer) }}</p>
              <p class="selected-meta">
                <span *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer.nid">NID: {{ selectedTaxpayer.nid }}</span>
                <span *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer.tinNumber"> · TIN: {{ selectedTaxpayer.tinNumber }}</span>
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="autofill-tag"><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Selected</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: Document Details -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon teal">
        <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Document Details</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Type, category and document information</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Document Type</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.documentType">
            <option value="">Select Type</option>
            <option *ngFor="let t of documentTypes" [value]="t">{{ t }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Category</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-folder-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.documentCategory">
            <option value="">Select Category</option>
            <option *ngFor="let c of documentCategories" [value]="c">{{ c }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label required">Document Title</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-file-earmark input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="e.g. Trade License 2024" [(ngModel)]="form.documentTitle" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Reference No.</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-hash input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="e.g. TL-44821" [(ngModel)]="form.referenceNo" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Submission Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input"
            [(ngModel)]="form.submissionDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 3: Validity -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon orange">
        <i class="bi bi-calendar-range-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Document Validity</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Issue date and expiry information</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Issue Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.issueDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Expiry Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-x input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.expiryDate" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Validity Preview -->
      <div class="form-group full-width" *ngIf="form.issueDate || form.expiryDate">
        <div class="validity-preview">
          <div class="validity-item" *ngIf="form.issueDate">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar-check"></i>
            <span>Issued: {{ form.issueDate }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="validity-arrow" *ngIf="form.issueDate && form.expiryDate">
            <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i>
          </div>
          <div class="validity-item" *ngIf="form.expiryDate">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar-x"></i>
            <span>Expires: {{ form.expiryDate }}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 4: Remarks -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon purple">
        <i class="bi bi-chat-text-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Remarks</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Optional notes or observations</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks / Notes</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea"
            placeholder="Enter any additional remarks..."
            [(ngModel)]="form.remarks" rows="3"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Form Actions -->
  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-reset" (click)="onReset()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise"></i> Reset
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()"
      [disabled]="isLoading || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isLoading">
        <i class="bi bi-patch-check-fill"></i> Submit Document
      </span>
      <span *ngIf="isLoading">
        <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>
        Submitting...
      </span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/document-verification/pages/document-list/document-list.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Document Verification</h4>
    <p>Manage and verify all taxpayer submitted documents.</p>
  </div>
  <a *canDo="'create'" routerLink="/documents/create"
     class="btn-add-primary desktop-add-btn">
    <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i> Add Document
  </a>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <!-- Search -->
  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input
          type="text"
          placeholder="Search by doc no, TIN, taxpayer, type, title..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm"
        />
      </div>
      <button *canDo="'export'" class="btn-export">
        <i class="bi bi-download"></i>
        <span>Export</span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading documents...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Desktop Table -->
  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>Doc No</th>
          <th>Taxpayer</th>
          <th>Document</th>
          <th>Category</th>
          <th>Reference No</th>
          <th>Issue Date</th>
          <th>Expiry Date</th>
          <th>Submitted</th>
          <th>File Size</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Actions</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let d of filteredDocuments; let i = index">
          <td>{{ i + 1 }}</td>

          <td><span class="doc-code">{{ d.documentNo }}</span></td>

          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar">{{ d.taxpayerName.charAt(0) }}</div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ d.taxpayerName }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ d.tinNumber }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>

          <td>
            <div class="doc-type-cell">
              <div class="doc-type-icon">
                <i [class]="getTypeIcon(d.documentType)"></i>
              </div>
              <div>
                <span class="doc-title">{{ d.documentTitle }}</span>
                <span class="type-badge" [ngClass]="getTypeClass(d.documentType)">
                  {{ d.documentType }}
                </span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>

          <td><span class="category-badge">{{ d.documentCategory }}</span></td>

          <td><span class="ref-code">{{ d.referenceNo }}</span></td>

          <td>{{ d.issueDate }}</td>

          <td>
            <span [class]="isExpired(d.expiryDate) ? 'expiry-expired' : 'expiry-normal'">
              {{ d.expiryDate || '—' }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>{{ d.submissionDate }}</td>

          <td><span class="file-size">{{ d.fileSize }}</span></td>

          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(d.status)">
              {{ d.status }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>
            <div class="action-btns">
              <button class="btn-view" (click)="viewDocument(d.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
              </button>
              <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit"
                (click)="editDocument(d.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
              </button>
              <button
                *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN', 'TAX_COMMISSIONER']"
                class="btn-delete"
                (click)="confirmDelete(d.id)"
              >
                <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
              </button>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>

        <tr *ngIf="filteredDocuments.length === 0">
          <td colspan="12">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i>
              <p>No documents found.</p>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Cards -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" style="padding: 12px;" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let d of filteredDocuments">

      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar doc-avatar">
            <i [class]="getTypeIcon(d.documentType)"></i>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ d.documentTitle }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ d.documentNo }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(d.status)">
          {{ d.status }}
        </span>
      </div>

      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Taxpayer</label>
          <span>{{ d.taxpayerName }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>TIN</label>
          <span>{{ d.tinNumber }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Type</label>
          <span class="type-badge" [ngClass]="getTypeClass(d.documentType)">
            {{ d.documentType }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Reference</label>
          <span>{{ d.referenceNo }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Submitted</label>
          <span>{{ d.submissionDate }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field" *ngIf="d.expiryDate">
          <label>Expiry</label>
          <span [class]="isExpired(d.expiryDate) ? 'expiry-expired' : ''">
            {{ d.expiryDate }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>File Size</label>
          <span>{{ d.fileSize }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field" *ngIf="d.remarks">
          <label>Remarks</label>
          <span>{{ d.remarks }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="mobile-card-actions">
        <button class="btn-view" (click)="viewDocument(d.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
        </button>
        <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit" (click)="editDocument(d.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
        </button>
        <button
          *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN', 'TAX_COMMISSIONER']"
          class="btn-delete"
          (click)="confirmDelete(d.id)"
        >
          <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
        </button>
      </div>

    </div>

    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filteredDocuments.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i>
      <p>No documents found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<!-- FAB -->
<button *canDo="'create'" class="fab-btn"
  routerLink="/documents/create" title="Add Document">
  <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i>
</button>

<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showDeleteModal">
  <div class="modal-card">
    <div class="modal-accent error"></div>
    <div class="modal-icon-wrap error">
      <i class="bi bi-trash-fill" style="color:#A32D2D; font-size:22px;"></i>
    </div>
    <p class="modal-title">Delete Business?</p>
    <p class="modal-msg">
      This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this business record?
    </p>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn-modal-cancel" (click)="cancelDelete()">Cancel</button>
      <button class="btn-modal-confirm error" (click)="confirmDeleteExecute()">
        <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/document-verification/pages/document-view/document-view.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Document Details</h4>
    <p>Full document verification information.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="header-actions">
    <button class="btn-back" (click)="onBack()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back
    </button>
    <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit-top" (click)="onEdit()">
      <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-success"></div>
</div>

<ng-container *ngIf="!isLoading && document">

  <!-- Document Header Card -->
  <div class="view-header-card">
    <div class="doc-header-left">
      <div class="doc-icon">
        <i [class]="getTypeIcon(document.documentType)"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="doc-no">{{ document.documentNo }}</div>
        <div class="doc-title-text">{{ document.documentTitle }}</div>
        <div class="doc-meta">
          <span class="doc-type-label">{{ document.documentType }}</span>
          <span class="doc-category">
            <i class="bi bi-folder-fill"></i> {{ document.documentCategory }}
          </span>
          <span class="doc-size">
            <i class="bi bi-file-earmark"></i> {{ document.fileSize }}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="doc-header-right">
      <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(document.status)">
        {{ document.status }}
      </span>
      <div class="doc-submitted">
        Submitted: {{ document.submissionDate }}
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Details Grid -->
  <div class="details-grid">

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
        <span>Taxpayer Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">TIN Number</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ document.tinNumber }}</span></span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Taxpayer Name</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ document.taxpayerName }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text-fill"></i>
        <span>Document Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Document Type</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ document.documentType }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Category</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ document.documentCategory }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="document.referenceNo">
          <span class="detail-label">Reference No.</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ document.referenceNo }}</span></span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">File Size</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ document.fileSize }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-calendar-range-fill"></i>
        <span>Validity Period</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Issue Date</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ document.issueDate || '—' }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Expiry Date</span>
          <span class="detail-value" [class]="isExpired(document.expiryDate) ? 'expiry-expired' : ''">
            {{ document.expiryDate || '—' }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Submission Date</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ document.submissionDate }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-patch-check-fill"></i>
        <span>Verification Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Status</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(document.status)">
              {{ document.status }}
            </span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="document.verificationDate">
          <span class="detail-label">Verified On</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ document.verificationDate }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="document.verifiedBy">
          <span class="detail-label">Verified By</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ document.verifiedBy }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="document.remarks">
          <span class="detail-label">Remarks</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ document.remarks }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

</ng-container>
```

## File: src/app/features/import-duty/pages/import-duty-create/import-duty-create.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>New Import Record</h4>
    <p>Create a new import duty assessment.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to List
  </button>
</div>

<div class="alert-success" *ngIf="successMsg">
  <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> {{ successMsg }}
</div>
<div class="alert-error" *ngIf="errorMsg">
  <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ errorMsg }}
</div>

<div class="form-card">
  <div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isMasterDataLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border text-danger"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- Section 1: Importer -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Importer Information</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Select taxpayer and business</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Taxpayer</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.tinNumber" (ngModelChange)="onTaxpayerChange()">
            <option value="">Select Taxpayer</option>
            <option *ngFor="let tp of taxpayers" [value]="getTin(tp)">
              {{ getTaxpayerName(tp) }} - {{ getTin(tp) }}
            </option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Business <span class="auto-label">Auto</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-building input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input auto-field" [value]="form.businessName || 'Auto from taxpayer'" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: Product -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon teal">
        <i class="bi bi-box-seam-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Goods Information</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Select product and origin details</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Taxable Product</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-box-seam input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.productId" (ngModelChange)="onProductChange()">
            <option [value]="0">Select Product</option>
            <option *ngFor="let p of products" [value]="p.id">
              {{ p.productName }} ({{ p.hsCode }})
            </option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">HS Code <span class="auto-label">Auto</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-upc input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input auto-field" [value]="selectedProduct?.hsCode || 'Auto from product'" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Goods Description</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-file-text input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" placeholder="Describe the goods being imported..."
            [(ngModel)]="form.goodsDescription" rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Origin Country</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-globe input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.originCountry">
            <option value="">Select Country</option>
            <option *ngFor="let c of countries" [value]="c">{{ c }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 3: Valuation -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon red">
        <i class="bi bi-calculator-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Duty Calculation</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">CIF value and official tax preview</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">CIF Value (BDT)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" placeholder="0" [(ngModel)]="form.cifValue"
            (ngModelChange)="onCifValueChange()" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Tax Source <span class="auto-label">Server</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-shield-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input auto-field" value="Backend preview" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Calculation Summary -->
    <div class="calc-summary" *ngIf="form.cifValue > 0">
      <div class="cs-row" *ngIf="isPreviewLoading">
        <span class="cs-label">Tax Preview</span>
        <span class="cs-value">Loading...</span>
      </div>
      <div class="cs-row">
        <span class="cs-label">CIF Value</span>
        <span class="cs-value">{{ fmt(form.cifValue) }}</span>
      </div>
      <ng-container *ngIf="taxPreview">
        <div class="cs-row">
          <span class="cs-label">Customs Duty (CD<span *ngIf="taxPreview.cdRate !== undefined"> {{ taxPreview.cdRate }}%</span>)</span>
          <span class="cs-value duty">{{ fmt(taxPreview.customsDuty) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cs-row">
          <span class="cs-label">Supplementary Duty (SD<span *ngIf="taxPreview.sdRate !== undefined"> {{ taxPreview.sdRate }}%</span>)</span>
          <span class="cs-value duty">{{ fmt(taxPreview.supplementaryDuty) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cs-row">
          <span class="cs-label">VAT<span *ngIf="taxPreview.vatRate !== undefined"> {{ taxPreview.vatRate }}%</span></span>
          <span class="cs-value vat">{{ fmt(taxPreview.vat) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cs-row">
          <span class="cs-label">Advance Income Tax (AIT<span *ngIf="taxPreview.aitRate !== undefined"> {{ taxPreview.aitRate }}%</span>)</span>
          <span class="cs-value vat">{{ fmt(taxPreview.advanceIncomeTax) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cs-row">
          <span class="cs-label">Advance Tax (AT<span *ngIf="taxPreview.atRate !== undefined"> {{ taxPreview.atRate }}%</span>)</span>
          <span class="cs-value vat">{{ fmt(taxPreview.advanceTax) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cs-divider"></div>
        <div class="cs-row total-row">
          <span class="cs-label bold">Total Payable</span>
          <span class="cs-value total">{{ fmt(taxPreview.totalPayable) }}</span>
        </div>
      </ng-container>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 4: Port & Shipping -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon purple">
        <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Port & Shipping Details</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Entry port, Bill of Entry, bill of lading and dates</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Port of Entry</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.portOfEntry">
            <option value="">Select Port</option>
            <option *ngFor="let p of ports" [value]="p">{{ p }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Bill of Entry Number</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="e.g. BOE-2024-000345" [(ngModel)]="form.boeNumber" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Bill of Entry Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.boeDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Bill of Lading / AWB</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="e.g. BL-2024-44821" [(ngModel)]="form.billOfLading" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Import Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.importDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.status">
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" placeholder="Optional remarks..." [(ngModel)]="form.remarks"
            rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-reset" (click)="onReset()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise"></i> Reset
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit danger" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isLoading || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isLoading"><i class="bi bi-truck-front-fill"></i> Create Import Record</span>
      <span *ngIf="isLoading"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Creating...</span>
    </button>
  </div>
</div>
```

```typescript
import { IncomeTaxReturnsRoutingModule } from './income-tax-returns-routing.module';

import { IncomeTaxReturnViewComponent } from '../pages/income-tax-return-view/income-tax-return-view.component';
import { IncomeTaxReturnEditComponent } from '../pages/income-tax-return-edit/income-tax-return-edit.component';
```

## File: src/app/features/income-tax-returns/pages/income-tax-return-edit/income-tax-return-edit.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Edit Income Tax Return</h4>
    <p>Update income and payment details. Tax is recalculated by the server.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to View
  </button>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border" style="color:#7c3aed"></div>
</div>

<div class="form-card" *ngIf="!isLoading">

  <div class="edit-banner">
    <i class="bi bi-pencil-square"></i>
    Editing: <strong>{{ form.returnNo }}</strong>
    <span class="banner-sub">{{ form.taxpayerName }}</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Section 1: Taxpayer -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Taxpayer & Period</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Identity, category and filing period</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">TIN Number</label>
        <div class="input-wrap locked">
          <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.tinNumber" readonly />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon"></i>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Taxpayer Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap locked">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.taxpayerName" readonly />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon"></i>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Category</label>
        <div class="input-wrap locked">
          <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="form.itrCategory" readonly />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon"></i>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group" *ngIf="showCompanySubType">
        <label class="form-label required">Company Type</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-buildings-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.companySubType" (change)="calculatePreview()">
            <option value="">Select company type...</option>
            <option *ngFor="let s of companySubTypes" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap locked">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="form.status" readonly />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon"></i>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Assessment Year</label>
        <div class="input-wrap locked">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="form.assessmentYear" readonly />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon"></i>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Income Year</label>
        <div class="input-wrap locked">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="form.incomeYear" readonly />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon"></i>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Return Period</label>
        <div class="input-wrap locked">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="form.returnPeriod" readonly />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon"></i>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Due Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap locked">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-x input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.dueDate" readonly />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon"></i>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Submission Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap locked">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.submissionDate" readonly />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon"></i>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: Income & Tax -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon purple">
        <i class="bi bi-cash-stack"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Income & Tax Figures</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Editable income fields with backend tax preview</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Gross Income (BDT)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.grossIncome" min="0" (change)="calculatePreview()" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Exempt Income (BDT)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-shield-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.exemptIncome" min="0" (change)="calculatePreview()" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Tax Rate (%) <span class="auto-label">Server</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap locked">
          <i class="bi bi-percent input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input calc-field" [value]="taxRatePreview" readonly />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon"></i>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Gross Tax (BDT) <span class="auto-label">Server</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap locked">
          <i class="bi bi-calculator input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input calc-field" [value]="grossTaxPreview" readonly />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon"></i>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Tax Rebate (BDT)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-down-circle input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.taxRebate" min="0" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="net-display-row">
      <div class="nd-item">
        <span class="nd-label">Taxable Income</span>
        <span class="nd-value taxable">{{ fmt(taxableIncome) }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="nd-arrow"><i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i></div>
      <div class="nd-item highlight">
        <span class="nd-label">Net Tax Payable</span>
        <span class="nd-value net">{{ fmt(netTaxPayable) }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="field-hint" *ngIf="isPreviewLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-hourglass-split"></i> Refreshing server tax preview...
    </div>
    <div class="field-error" *ngIf="previewError">
      Server preview unavailable. Final tax will be recalculated during update.
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 3: Payment -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon teal">
        <i class="bi bi-cash-coin"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Tax Payments</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Advance tax, withholding and payments</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Advance Tax Paid (BDT)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.advanceTaxPaid" min="0" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Withholding Tax (BDT)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-left-circle input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.withholdingTax" min="0" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Tax Paid at Filing (BDT)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-cash-coin input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.taxPaid" min="0" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Balance Due (BDT)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap locked">
          <i class="bi bi-exclamation-circle input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input calc-field" [value]="fmt(balanceDue)" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Refundable Amount (BDT)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap locked">
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-return-left input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input calc-field" [value]="fmt(refundable)" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 4: Submission -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon orange">
        <i class="bi bi-person-gear"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Remarks</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Optional update notes for the record</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" [(ngModel)]="form.remarks" rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isSaving">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isSaving || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isSaving"><i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Update Return</span>
      <span *ngIf="isSaving"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Updating...</span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/notices-notifications/pages/notice-view/notice-view.component.css

```css
/* notice-view.component.css — পুরোটা replace করো */
⋮----
.btn-back {
.btn-back:hover { background: #f0f4ff; }
⋮----

⋮----
```

## File: src/app/features/payments/pages/payment-create/payment-create.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Record Payment</h4>
    <p>Record a new tax payment transaction.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to List
  </button>
</div>

<div class="form-card">

  <!-- Section 0: Find Taxpayer -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon search-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Find Taxpayer</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Search by TIN number, NID or name — details will auto-fill</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="search-row">
      <div class="input-wrap search-input-wrap">
        <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
        <input type="text" class="form-input"
          placeholder="Enter TIN number, NID or taxpayer name..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchQuery"
          (ngModelChange)="onSearchInput()"
          (keyup.enter)="searchTaxpayer()"
          [disabled]="isAutoFilled" />
        <button *ngIf="isAutoFilled" class="clear-btn" (click)="clearTaxpayer()">
          <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
        </button>
      </div>
      <button class="btn-search" (click)="searchTaxpayer()" [disabled]="isSearching || isAutoFilled">
        <span *ngIf="!isSearching"><i class="bi bi-search"></i> Search</span>
        <span *ngIf="isSearching"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span> Searching...</span>
      </button>
    </div>

    <!-- Search Results -->
    <div class="search-results" *ngIf="showResults && searchResults.length > 0">
      <div class="result-item" *ngFor="let t of searchResults" (click)="selectTaxpayer(t)">
        <div class="result-avatar"><i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i></div>
        <div class="result-info">
          <span class="result-name">{{ getDisplayName(t) }}</span>
          <span class="result-meta">
            <span *ngIf="t.tinNumber" class="me-2 fw-bold text-primary">TIN: {{ t.tinNumber }}</span>
            <span *ngIf="!t.tinNumber" class="text-danger me-2">No TIN</span>
            <span *ngIf="t.nid">NID: {{ t.nid }}</span>
            <span *ngIf="t.phone"> · {{ t.phone }}</span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <span class="result-badge">Select</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- No Results -->
    <div class="no-result-note" *ngIf="hasSearched && searchResults.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-info-circle"></i> No taxpayer found. Check TIN, NID or name and try again.
    </div>

    <!-- Selected Card -->
    <div class="selected-card" *ngIf="isAutoFilled && selectedTaxpayer">
      <div class="selected-card-left">
        <div class="selected-avatar"><i class="bi bi-person-check-fill"></i></div>
        <div>
          <p class="selected-name">{{ getDisplayName(selectedTaxpayer) }}</p>
          <p class="selected-meta">
            <span *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer.tinNumber">TIN: {{ selectedTaxpayer.tinNumber }}</span>
            <span *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer.phone"> · {{ selectedTaxpayer.phone }}</span>
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="autofill-tag"><i class="bi bi-lightning-charge-fill"></i> Auto-filled</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 1: Taxpayer Info -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Taxpayer Information</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">TIN, name and payment type</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">TIN Number</label>
        <div class="input-wrap" [class.locked]="isAutoFilled">
          <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="e.g. TIN-000000001"
            [(ngModel)]="form.tinNumber"
            [disabled]="isAutoFilled" />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon" *ngIf="isAutoFilled"></i>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Taxpayer Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap" [class.locked]="isAutoFilled">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="Enter taxpayer name"
            [(ngModel)]="form.taxpayerName"
            [disabled]="isAutoFilled" />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon" *ngIf="isAutoFilled"></i>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Payment Type</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.paymentType">
            <option value="">Select Type</option>
            <option *ngFor="let t of paymentTypes" [value]="t">{{ t }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Return / Reference No.</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="e.g. ITR-2025-26-XXXXXXXX"
            [(ngModel)]="form.returnNo" />
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: Payment Details -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon teal">
        <i class="bi bi-credit-card-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Payment Details</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Amount, method and transaction info</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Amount (৳)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input"
            placeholder="0"
            [(ngModel)]="form.amount" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Payment Method</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-wallet2 input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.paymentMethod">
            <option value="">Select Method</option>
            <option *ngFor="let m of paymentMethods" [value]="m">{{ m }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Reference No.</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-hash input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="e.g. REF-2024-001"
            [(ngModel)]="form.referenceNo" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group" *ngIf="showChequeField">
        <label class="form-label required">Cheque No.</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-journal-text input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="e.g. CHQ-889921"
            [(ngModel)]="form.chequeNo" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Payment Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.paymentDate" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Value Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.valueDate" />
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 3: Bank Details -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon orange">
        <i class="bi bi-bank2"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Bank Details</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Bank, branch and account information</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Bank Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-bank input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.bankName">
            <option value="">Select Bank</option>
            <option *ngFor="let b of banks" [value]="b">{{ b }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Branch</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="Enter branch name"
            [(ngModel)]="form.bankBranch" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Account No.</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-credit-card input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="Enter account number"
            [(ngModel)]="form.accountNo" />
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 4: Remarks -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon purple">
        <i class="bi bi-chat-text-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Remarks</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Optional notes</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks / Notes</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea"
            placeholder="Enter any additional remarks..."
            [(ngModel)]="form.remarks"
            rows="3"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Form Actions -->
  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-reset" (click)="onReset()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise"></i> Reset
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()"
      [disabled]="isLoading || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isLoading">
        <i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Record Payment
      </span>
      <span *ngIf="isLoading">
        <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>
        Saving...
      </span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/penalty-fines/pages/penalty-edit/penalty-edit.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Edit Penalty</h4>
    <p>Update penalty details and status.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to View
  </button>
</div>

<div class="alert-success" *ngIf="successMsg">
  <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> {{ successMsg }}
</div>
<div class="alert-error" *ngIf="errorMsg">
  <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ errorMsg }}
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-danger"></div>
  <p>Loading penalty data...</p>
</div>

<div class="form-card" *ngIf="!isLoading">

  <div class="edit-banner">
    <i class="bi bi-pencil-square"></i>
    Editing: <strong>{{ form.penaltyNo }}</strong>
  </div>

  <!-- Section 1: Taxpayer -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Taxpayer Information</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">TIN and taxpayer details</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">TIN Number</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.tinNumber" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Taxpayer Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.taxpayerName" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Return No.</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.returnNo" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Assessment Year</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.assessmentYear">
            <option *ngFor="let y of assessmentYears" [value]="y">{{ y }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: Penalty Details -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon red">
        <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Penalty Details</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Type, severity, amounts and status</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Penalty Type</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.penaltyType">
            <option *ngFor="let t of penaltyTypes" [value]="t">{{ t }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Severity</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-speedometer2 input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.severity">
            <option *ngFor="let s of severities" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Penalty Amount (৳)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.penaltyAmount"
            (ngModelChange)="onPenaltyChange()" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Interest Amount (৳)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-percent input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.interestAmount"
            (ngModelChange)="form.totalAmount = form.penaltyAmount + form.interestAmount" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Paid Amount (৳)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-cash-coin input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.paidAmount" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.status">
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Issue Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.issueDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Due Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-x input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.dueDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Payment Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.paymentDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Issued By</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-badge input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.issuedBy">
            <option *ngFor="let o of officers" [value]="o">{{ o }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Approved By</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.approvedBy" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 3: Description -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon purple">
        <i class="bi bi-chat-text-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Description & Remarks</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Penalty reason and notes</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Description</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-file-text input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" [(ngModel)]="form.description" rows="3"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" [(ngModel)]="form.remarks" rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Form Actions -->
  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isSaving">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit danger" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isSaving || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isSaving">
        <i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Update Penalty
      </span>
      <span *ngIf="isSaving">
        <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>
        Updating...
      </span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/penalty-fines/pages/penalty-list/penalty-list.component.css
```css
.penalty-code {
⋮----
/* Penalty Type */
.type-badge {
.type-late {
.type-noncompliance {
.type-fraud {
.type-under {
.type-other {
⋮----
/* Due Date */
.due-normal {
.due-overdue {
⋮----
/* Amounts */
```

## File: src/app/features/penalty-fines/pages/penalty-view/penalty-view.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Penalty Details</h4>
    <p>Full penalty and fine information.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="header-actions">
    <button class="btn-back" (click)="onBack()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back
    </button>
    <button *ngIf="canEdit()" class="btn-edit-top" (click)="onEdit()">
      <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-danger"></div>
</div>

<ng-container *ngIf="!isLoading && penalty">

  <!-- Header Card -->
  <div class="view-header-card red">
    <div class="penalty-header-left">
      <div class="penalty-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="penalty-no">{{ penalty.penaltyNo }}</div>
        <div class="penalty-meta">
          <span class="sev-badge" [ngClass]="getSeverityClass(penalty.severity)">
            <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ penalty.severity }}
          </span>
          <span class="penalty-type-label">{{ penalty.penaltyType }}</span>
          <span class="penalty-date">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> {{ penalty.issueDate | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="penalty-header-right">
      <div class="penalty-label">Total Due</div>
      <div class="penalty-total">{{ fmt(penalty.totalAmount) }}</div>
      <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(penalty.status)">
        {{ penalty.status }}
      </span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Action Buttons -->
  <div class="action-bar" *ngIf="canSubmit() || canApprove() || canReject() || canIssue() || canCancel()">
    <button *ngIf="canSubmit()" class="btn-action submit" (click)="openAction('submit')">
      <i class="bi bi-send-fill"></i> Submit for Approval
    </button>
    <button *ngIf="canApprove()" class="btn-action approve" (click)="openAction('approve')">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Approve
    </button>
    <button *ngIf="canReject()" class="btn-action reject" (click)="openAction('reject')">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise"></i> Return to Draft
    </button>
    <button *ngIf="canIssue()" class="btn-action issue" (click)="openAction('issue')">
      <i class="bi bi-send-check-fill"></i> Issue Officially
    </button>
    <button *ngIf="canCancel()" class="btn-action cancel" (click)="openAction('cancel')">
      <i class="bi bi-x-circle-fill"></i> Cancel
    </button>
  </div>

  <!-- Amount Summary -->
  <div class="amount-summary-row">
    <div class="amount-card">
      <div class="ac-icon penalty"><i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i></div>
      <div class="ac-body">
        <span class="ac-label">Penalty</span>
        <span class="ac-value penalty">{{ fmt(penalty.penaltyAmount) }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="amount-card">
      <div class="ac-icon interest"><i class="bi bi-percent"></i></div>
      <div class="ac-body">
        <span class="ac-label">Interest ({{ penalty.interestRate }}%)</span>
        <span class="ac-value interest">{{ fmt(penalty.interestAmount) }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="amount-card">
      <div class="ac-icon total"><i class="bi bi-calculator-fill"></i></div>
      <div class="ac-body">
        <span class="ac-label">Total Due</span>
        <span class="ac-value total">{{ fmt(penalty.totalAmount) }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="amount-card">
      <div class="ac-icon paid"><i class="bi bi-cash-coin"></i></div>
      <div class="ac-body">
        <span class="ac-label">Paid</span>
        <span class="ac-value paid">
          {{ penalty.paidAmount > 0 ? fmt(penalty.paidAmount) : '—' }}
        </span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Details Grid -->
  <div class="details-grid">
    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i><span>Taxpayer Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">TIN Number</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ penalty.tinNumber }}</span></span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Taxpayer Name</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ penalty.taxpayerName }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Assessment Year</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ penalty.assessmentYear }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="penalty.returnNo">
          <span class="detail-label">Return No.</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ penalty.returnNo }}</span></span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i><span>Penalty Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Penalty Type</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ penalty.penaltyType }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Severity</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="sev-badge" [ngClass]="getSeverityClass(penalty.severity)">
              {{ penalty.severity }}
            </span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Issue Date</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ penalty.issueDate | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Due Date</span>
          <span class="detail-value"
            [class]="penalty.status === 'Overdue' ? 'due-overdue' : ''">
            {{ penalty.dueDate | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="penalty.paymentDate">
          <span class="detail-label">Payment Date</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ penalty.paymentDate | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-person-gear"></i><span>Processing Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Status</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(penalty.status)">
              {{ penalty.status }}
            </span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Issued By</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ penalty.issuedBy }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="penalty.approvedBy">
          <span class="detail-label">Approved By</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ penalty.approvedBy }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card" *ngIf="penalty.description || penalty.remarks">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-chat-text-fill"></i><span>Description & Remarks</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="penalty.description">
          <span class="detail-label">Description</span>
          <span class="detail-value"
            style="text-align:left;max-width:300px;word-break:break-word;white-space:normal;">
            {{ penalty.description }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="penalty.remarks">
          <span class="detail-label">Remarks</span>
          <span class="detail-value"
            style="text-align:left;max-width:300px;word-break:break-word;white-space:normal;">
            {{ penalty.remarks }}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Audit Timeline -->
  <div class="detail-card mt-3" *ngIf="penalty.auditLogs && penalty.auditLogs.length > 0">
    <div class="detail-card-header">
      <i class="bi bi-clock-history"></i><span>Activity Timeline</span>
    </div>
    <div class="timeline-body">
      <div class="timeline-item" *ngFor="let log of penalty.auditLogs">
        <div class="tl-dot" [class]="'tl-' + log.action.toLowerCase()"></div>
        <div class="tl-content">
          <div class="tl-action">{{ formatAction(log.action) }}</div>
          <div class="tl-meta">
            <span *ngIf="log.fromStatus && log.toStatus" class="tl-transition">
              {{ log.fromStatus }} → {{ log.toStatus }}
            </span>
            <span class="tl-who">{{ log.performedBy }}</span>
            <span class="tl-role">({{ log.performedByRole }})</span>
          </div>
          <div class="tl-remarks" *ngIf="log.remarks">{{ log.remarks }}</div>
          <div class="tl-date">{{ log.createdAt | date:'dd MMM yyyy, hh:mm a' }}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</ng-container>

<!-- Action Modal -->
<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showActionModal">
  <div class="modal-card">
    <div class="modal-accent"></div>
    <div class="modal-icon-wrap">
      <i class="bi bi-shield-check" style="font-size:22px;"></i>
    </div>
    <p class="modal-title">{{ getActionLabel(pendingAction) }}</p>
    <p class="modal-msg">Add remarks (optional)</p>
    <div class="input-wrap" style="margin:0 16px 16px;">
      <textarea class="form-input form-textarea"
        [(ngModel)]="actionRemarks"
        placeholder="Remarks..." rows="3">
      </textarea>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn-modal-cancel" (click)="closeAction()" [disabled]="isActing">
        Cancel
      </button>
      <button [class]="getActionClass(pendingAction)"
        (click)="confirmAction()" [disabled]="isActing">
        <span *ngIf="!isActing">{{ getActionLabel(pendingAction) }}</span>
        <span *ngIf="isActing">
          <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span> Processing...
        </span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```css
.category-label {
.category-label.mt { margin-top: 20px; }
⋮----
.category-grid { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; }
⋮----
.category-card {
.category-card:hover    { border-color: #1a3f8f; background: #f8f9ff; }
.category-card.selected { border-color: #1a3f8f; background: #f0f4ff; }

.cat-icon {
.cat-icon.blue   { background: #e8eef9; color: #1a3f8f; }
.cat-icon.green  { background: #e6f7f3; color: #0d7055; }
.cat-icon.purple { background: #f0ebff; color: #6d28d9; }
⋮----
.cat-body { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; flex: 1; }
.cat-title { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a2340; }
.cat-desc  { font-size: 12px; color: #777; }
⋮----
.cat-check { position: absolute; right: 14px; color: #1a3f8f; font-size: 18px; }
⋮----
/* Type pills */
.type-grid { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px; }
⋮----
.type-card {
.type-card:hover    { border-color: #1a3f8f; color: #1a3f8f; background: #f8f9ff; }
.type-card.selected { border-color: #1a3f8f; color: #1a3f8f; background: #f0f4ff; }
.type-check { font-size: 13px; color: #1a3f8f; }
```

## File: src/app/features/public-registration/steps/step1-account-type/reg-step-account-type/reg-step-account-type.component.html
```html
<div class="step-body">

  <div class="step-intro">
    <h3 class="step-heading">What type of taxpayer are you?</h3>
    <p class="step-sub">First select a category, then your specific taxpayer type.</p>
  </div>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div class="type-loading" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span> Loading taxpayer types...
  </div>

  <ng-container *ngIf="!isLoading">

    <!-- Step 1A: Category Selection -->
    <div class="category-label">Step 1 — Select Category</div>
    <div class="category-grid">
      <button type="button" class="category-card"
        *ngFor="let cat of categories"
        [class.selected]="selectedCategory === cat"
        (click)="selectCategory(cat)">
        <div class="cat-icon" [ngClass]="categoryMeta[cat].color">
          <i [class]="'bi ' + categoryMeta[cat].icon"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="cat-body">
          <span class="cat-title">{{ cat }}</span>
          <span class="cat-desc">{{ categoryMeta[cat].desc }}</span>
        </div>
        <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill cat-check" *ngIf="selectedCategory === cat"></i>
      </button>
    </div>

    <!-- Step 1B: Type Selection — only shows after category selected -->
    <ng-container *ngIf="selectedCategory && filteredTypes.length > 0">
      <div class="category-label mt">Step 2 — Select Taxpayer Type</div>
      <div class="type-grid">
        <button type="button" class="type-card"
          *ngFor="let t of filteredTypes"
          [class.selected]="selectedTypeId === t.id"
          (click)="selectType(t)">
          <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill type-check" *ngIf="selectedTypeId === t.id"></i>
          <span class="type-name">{{ t.typeName }}</span>
        </button>
      </div>
    </ng-container>

  </ng-container>

  <div class="step-actions">
    <button type="button" class="btn-next"
      [disabled]="!canProceed"
      (click)="onNext()">
      Continue <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```
