## File: src/app/features/ait/pages/ait-create-wizard/ait-create-wizard.component.css
```css
/* ait-create.component.css
   Design tokens identical to income-tax-return-create.component.css
   No Tabler icons, no inline SVG — Bootstrap Icons only.
*/
⋮----
:host {
⋮----
/* ── Topbar (identical to ITR) ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
.itr-topbar {
.topbar-title { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--tp); }
.topbar-meta  { font-size: 12px; color: var(--ts); margin-top: 2px; }
.topbar-right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }
⋮----
/* ── Step Rail (identical to ITR) ───────────────────────────────────────── */
.step-rail {
.step-item {
.step-circle {
.s-active .step-circle { background: #4f46e5; color: #fff; border-color: #4f46e5; }
.s-done   .step-circle { background: #16a34a; color: #fff; border-color: #16a34a; }
.step-label { font-size: 11px; color: var(--ts); text-align: center; line-height: 1.3; }
.s-active .step-label { color: #4f46e5; font-weight: 600; }
.s-done   .step-label { color: #16a34a; }
.step-line {
.step-line.done { background: #16a34a; }
⋮----
/* ── Card ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.card {
.card-hdr {
.card-hdr-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; }
.hdr-icon {
.ic-blue   { background: var(--blue-bg);   }
.ic-green  { background: var(--green-bg);  }
.ic-amber  { background: var(--amber-bg);  }
.ic-purple { background: var(--purple-bg); }
.card-title { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--tp); }
.card-sub   { font-size: 11px; color: var(--ts); }
.card-p { padding: 20px; }
⋮----
/* ── Search (same pattern as ITR) ───────────────────────────────────────── */
.search-row { display: flex; gap: 10px; }
.search-field-wrap {
.search-icon { position: absolute; left: 12px; color: var(--ts); font-size: 14px; }
.search-input {
.search-input:focus { border-color: #4f46e5; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(79,70,229,.1); }
.clear-btn {
.search-results {
.search-result-item {
.search-result-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.search-result-item:hover { background: var(--blue-bg); }
.result-icon { font-size: 20px; color: #4f46e5; }
.result-name { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--tp); }
.result-meta { font-size: 11px; color: var(--ts); }
⋮----
/* ── Form grid ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.form-grid-2 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; }
@media (max-width: 640px) { .form-grid-2 { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
.field-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; }
.field-label { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--ts); }
.field-label.required::after { content: ' *'; color: var(--red-text); }
.field-input {
.field-input:focus { border-color: #4f46e5; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(79,70,229,.1); }
.field-input[readonly] { background: var(--cs); color: var(--ts); cursor: not-allowed; }
.field-error { font-size: 11px; color: var(--red-text); margin-top: 2px; }
⋮----
/* ── Source type grid ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.source-type-grid {
.source-type-btn {
.source-type-btn i { font-size: 20px; }
.source-type-btn:hover { border-color: #4f46e5; background: var(--purple-bg); color: #4f46e5; }
.source-type-btn.selected { border-color: #4f46e5; background: var(--purple-bg); color: #4f46e5; }
⋮----
/* ── Calculation panel ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.ait-calc-panel {
.calc-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 6px; }
.calc-label { font-size: 12px; color: var(--ts); }
.calc-val   { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--tp); }
.calc-divider { height: 1px; background: var(--bs); margin: 8px 0; }
.calc-row.total .calc-label { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--tp); }
.calc-total { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 800; color: #4f46e5; }
⋮----
/* ── Document upload ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.review-section       { margin-bottom: 20px; }
.review-section-title {
.review-grid   { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; }
.review-row {
.review-row.highlight { background: var(--purple-bg); padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: var(--rmd); }
.rv-label { font-size: 12px; color: var(--ts); }
.rv-val   { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--tp); }
.rv-mono  { font-family: monospace; }
.rv-total { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 800; color: #4f46e5; }
⋮----
.doc-upload-area {
.doc-upload-area:hover, .doc-upload-area.has-files {
.doc-hint { font-size: 11px; color: var(--tt); margin-top: 4px; }
⋮----
.file-list { margin-top: 10px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; }
.file-item {
.file-size { color: var(--tt); font-size: 11px; }
.remove-file-btn {
⋮----
/* ── Source badges in review ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.cat-badge      { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:4px; font-size:11px; font-weight:600; padding:3px 9px; border-radius:5px; }
.cat-import     { background:#e0f2f9; color:#0891b2; }
.cat-supplier   { background:#e8eef9; color:#1a3f8f; }
.cat-salary     { background:#e6f7f3; color:#1faa8b; }
.cat-contractor { background:#fef3e2; color:#f59e0b; }
.cat-rent       { background:#fce7f3; color:#be185d; }
⋮----
/* ── Step nav ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.step-nav {
⋮----
/* ── Badges ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.badge       { font-size:11px; font-weight:700; padding:4px 10px; border-radius:20px; }
.b-draft     { background:#f3f4f6; color:#6b7280; }
.b-info      { background:var(--blue-bg); color:var(--blue-text); }
.b-warning   { background:var(--amber-bg); color:var(--amber-text); }
```

```css
/* ait-list.component.css
   Extends the shared project design system.
   AIT-specific overrides only — all base styles come from global.css / shared.css
*/

/* ── Reference number ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.return-code {
⋮----
/* ── Avatars ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.ait-avatar {
⋮----

/* Uses Bootstrap Icons — no inline SVG, no Tabler icons */
.cat-badge {
.cat-import     { background: #e0f2f9; color: #0891b2; }
.cat-supplier   { background: #e8eef9; color: #1a3f8f; }
.cat-salary     { background: #e6f7f3; color: #1faa8b; }
.cat-contractor { background: #fef3e2; color: #f59e0b; }
.cat-rent       { background: #fce7f3; color: #be185d; }
⋮----
/* ── Fiscal year badge ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.year-badge {
⋮----
/* ── Challan status ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.challan-verified {
.challan-pending {
⋮----
/* ── Amount cells ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.amt-cell { font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
.net      { color: #1a3f8f; font-weight: 700; }
⋮----
/* ── Status badges — consistent with project design system ──────────────────── */
/* These class names match the shared .status-badge variants */
.status-draft        { background: #f3f4f6; color: #6b7280; }
.status-submitted    { background: #dbeafe; color: #1d4ed8; }
.status-pending      { background: #fef3c7; color: #92400e; }
.status-review       { background: #ede9fe; color: #5b21b6; }
.status-approved     { background: #dcfce7; color: #166534; }
.status-rejected     { background: #fee2e2; color: #991b1b; }
.status-credited     { background: #d1fae5; color: #065f46; }
.status-cancelled    { background: #f3f4f6; color: #9ca3af; }
⋮----
/* ── Amend/Correct button ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.btn-amend {

⋮----
/* ── Table min-width ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.data-table { min-width: 1400px; }
.btn-cert {
.btn-cert:hover { background: #dcfce7; }
```

```css
/* ── KPI Summary Row ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.kpi-summary-row {
⋮----
.kpi-summary-card {
.kpi-summary-card:hover {
⋮----
.kpi-summary-icon {
.kpi-purple { background: #f5f3ff; color: #7c3aed; }
.kpi-blue   { background: #eff6ff; color: #2563eb; }
.kpi-green  { background: #f0fdf4; color: #16a34a; }
.kpi-amber  { background: #fffbeb; color: #d97706; }
.kpi-red    { background: #fef2f2; color: #dc2626; }
.kpi-teal   { background: #f0fdfa; color: #0d9488; }
⋮----
.kpi-summary-label { font-size: 11px; color: #6b7280; font-weight: 500; }
.kpi-summary-value { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 800; color: #111827; line-height: 1.2; margin-top: 2px; }
.kpi-summary-sub   { font-size: 11px; color: #9ca3af; margin-top: 1px; }
⋮----
/* ── Header actions ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.header-actions {
⋮----
/* ── Search bar additions ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.filter-date,
.filter-date:focus,
⋮----
/* ── Bulk action bar ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.bulk-action-bar {
.bulk-count   { font-weight: 700; color: #1a3f8f; }
.bulk-divider { width: 1px; height: 18px; background: #bfdbfe; }
⋮----
/* ── Alert error row ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.alert-error-row {
⋮----
/* ── Table additions ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.data-table { min-width: 1100px; }
⋮----
/* Row state highlights */
.row-selected td { background: rgba(26,63,143,.04) !important; }
.row-overdue  td { background: rgba(254,226,226,.3) !important; }
.row-atrisk   td { background: rgba(254,243,199,.3) !important; }
⋮----
/* AIT avatar */
.ait-avatar { background: #ede9fe; color: #7c3aed; }
⋮----
/* Source badges */
.cat-badge      { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:4px; font-size:11px; font-weight:600; padding:3px 8px; border-radius:5px; white-space:nowrap; }
.cat-import     { background:#e0f2f9; color:#0891b2; }
.cat-supplier   { background:#e8eef9; color:#1a3f8f; }
.cat-salary     { background:#e6f7f3; color:#1faa8b; }
.cat-contractor { background:#fef3e2; color:#f59e0b; }
.cat-rent       { background:#fce7f3; color:#be185d; }
⋮----
/* Status badges */
.status-badge        { font-size:11px; font-weight:700; padding:4px 10px; border-radius:20px; white-space:nowrap; }
.status-draft        { background:#f3f4f6; color:#6b7280; }
.status-submitted    { background:#dbeafe; color:#1d4ed8; }
.status-pending      { background:#fef3c7; color:#92400e; }
.status-review       { background:#ede9fe; color:#5b21b6; }
.status-approved     { background:#dcfce7; color:#166534; }
.status-rejected     { background:#fee2e2; color:#991b1b; }
.status-credited     { background:#d1fae5; color:#065f46; }
.status-cancelled    { background:#f3f4f6; color:#9ca3af; }
⋮----
/* Reference number */
.return-code {
.return-code:hover { background: #c7d7f5; }
⋮----
/* Code text (HS code) */
.code-text {
⋮----
/* Amount / date */
.amt-cell  { font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
.net       { color: #1a3f8f; font-weight: 700; }
.date-cell { font-size: 12px; color: #6b7280; }
⋮----
/* ── SLA badge ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.sla-badge {
.sla-ok   { background: #f0fdf4; color: #16a34a; }
.sla-warn { background: #fffbeb; color: #d97706; }
.sla-over { background: #fef2f2; color: #dc2626; }
⋮----
/* ── Pagination ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.pagination-row {
.pagination-info { color: #6b7280; }
.pagination-controls {
.btn-page {
.btn-page:hover:not(:disabled) { background: #f9fafb; border-color: #1a3f8f; color: #1a3f8f; }
.btn-page:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }
.page-num {
.page-num:hover { background: #e8eef9; color: #1a3f8f; }
.page-num.active { background: #1a3f8f; color: #fff; }
⋮----
/* ── Responsive ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.kpi-summary-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
.header-actions  { flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; }
.bulk-action-bar { flex-wrap: wrap; }
.pagination-row  { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; }
⋮----
.kpi-summary-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
```

## File: src/app/features/ait/pages/officer-dashboard/officer-dashboard.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>AIT Officer Dashboard</h4>
    <p>Officer: {{ officerName }} &nbsp;·&nbsp; FY 2024–2025</p>
  </div>
  <div class="header-actions">
    <button class="btn-back" (click)="refreshQueue()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-clockwise"></i> Refresh
    </button>
    <button class="btn-add-primary desktop-add-btn" (click)="onExport()">
      <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-arrow-down"></i> Export
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <!-- ── KPI Summary Row ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <div class="kpi-summary-row">
    <div class="kpi-summary-card">
      <div class="kpi-summary-icon kpi-purple">
        <i class="bi bi-inbox-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div class="kpi-summary-body">
        <div class="kpi-summary-label">My Queue</div>
        <div class="kpi-summary-value">{{ kpis.myQueue }}</div>
        <div class="kpi-summary-sub">Awaiting review</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi-summary-card">
      <div class="kpi-summary-icon kpi-blue">
        <i class="bi bi-check2-all"></i>
      </div>
      <div class="kpi-summary-body">
        <div class="kpi-summary-label">Reviewed Today</div>
        <div class="kpi-summary-value">{{ kpis.reviewedToday }}</div>
        <div class="kpi-summary-sub">Records processed</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi-summary-card">
      <div class="kpi-summary-icon kpi-green">
        <i class="bi bi-patch-check-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div class="kpi-summary-body">
        <div class="kpi-summary-label">Approved (Week)</div>
        <div class="kpi-summary-value">{{ kpis.approvedWeek }}</div>
        <div class="kpi-summary-sub">Last 7 days</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi-summary-card">
      <div class="kpi-summary-icon" [ngClass]="kpis.slaRiskPercent > 30 ? 'kpi-red' : 'kpi-amber'">
        <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div class="kpi-summary-body">
        <div class="kpi-summary-label">SLA Risk</div>
        <div class="kpi-summary-value"
          [style.color]="kpis.slaRiskPercent > 30 ? '#991b1b' : '#92400e'">
          {{ kpis.slaRiskPercent }}%
        </div>
        <div class="kpi-summary-sub">Overdue / at risk</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi-summary-card">
      <div class="kpi-summary-icon kpi-teal">
        <i class="bi bi-graph-up-arrow"></i>
      </div>
      <div class="kpi-summary-body">
        <div class="kpi-summary-label">Approval Rate</div>
        <div class="kpi-summary-value">{{ approvalRate }}%</div>
        <div class="kpi-summary-sub">This month</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ── Status Filter Tabs ───────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <div class="status-tabs">
    <button class="stab"
      [class.active]="activeTab === 'ALL'"
      (click)="setActiveTab('ALL')">
      All <span class="stab-count">{{ filteredRecords.length }}</span>
    </button>
    <button class="stab pending"
      [class.active]="activeTab === 'PENDING'"
      (click)="setActiveTab('PENDING')">
      Pending <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('PENDING') }}</span>
    </button>
    <button class="stab review"
      [class.active]="activeTab === 'UNDER_REVIEW'"
      (click)="setActiveTab('UNDER_REVIEW')">
      Under Review <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('UNDER_REVIEW') }}</span>
    </button>
    <button class="stab approved"
      [class.active]="activeTab === 'APPROVED'"
      (click)="setActiveTab('APPROVED')">
      Approved <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('APPROVED') }}</span>
    </button>
    <button class="stab rejected"
      [class.active]="activeTab === 'REJECTED'"
      (click)="setActiveTab('REJECTED')">
      Rejected <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('REJECTED') }}</span>
    </button>
  </div>

  <!-- ── Search & Filters ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input type="text"
          placeholder="Search by TIN, taxpayer name, or reference no..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchQuery"
          (input)="onSearchChange()" />
      </div>
      <input type="date" class="filter-date"
        [(ngModel)]="dateFilterFrom"
        (change)="onDateChange()"
        title="Filter from date" />
      <select class="filter-select" (change)="onSlaFilterChange($any($event.target).value)">
        <option value="">All SLA</option>
        <option value="at_risk">At Risk (&lt;12hrs)</option>
        <option value="overdue">Overdue</option>
      </select>
      <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary"
        (click)="searchQuery=''; dateFilterFrom=''; slaFilter=''; applyFilters()">
        <i class="bi bi-x-circle"></i> Clear
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ── Bulk Action Bar ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <div class="bulk-action-bar" *ngIf="selectedIds.size > 0">
    <i class="bi bi-check-square-fill" style="color:#1a3f8f"></i>
    <span class="bulk-count">{{ selectedIds.size }} record(s) selected</span>
    <div class="bulk-divider"></div>
    <button class="btn-view" (click)="bulkAssign()">
      <i class="bi bi-person-check"></i> Assign to Me
    </button>
    <button class="btn-view ms-auto" (click)="selectedIds.clear()">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Clear
    </button>
  </div>

  <!-- ── Loading ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm" style="color:#7c3aed"></div>
    <span>Loading queue data…</span>
  </div>

  <!-- ── Error ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <div class="alert-error-row" *ngIf="loadError && !isLoading">
    <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i>
    <span>{{ loadError }}</span>
    <button class="btn-view" (click)="refreshQueue()">Retry</button>
  </div>

  <!-- ── Desktop Table ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th style="width:36px">
            <input type="checkbox"
              [checked]="isAllSelected()"
              (change)="toggleSelectAll()"
              class="form-check-input" />
          </th>
          <th>Ref. No.</th>
          <th>Taxpayer</th>
          <th>Source</th>
          <th>HS Code</th>
          <th class="text-end">AIT Amount</th>
          <th>Date</th>
          <th>SLA</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Actions</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let r of getPaginatedRecords()"
          [class.row-selected]="selectedIds.has(r.id || 0)"
          [class.row-overdue]="getSlaHours(r) < 0"
          [class.row-atrisk]="getSlaHours(r) >= 0 && getSlaHours(r) < 12">

          <td>
            <input type="checkbox"
              [checked]="selectedIds.has(r.id || 0)"
              (change)="toggleSelect(r.id || 0)"
              class="form-check-input" />
          </td>

          <td>
            <span class="return-code" (click)="reviewRecord(r.id || 0)" style="cursor:pointer">
              {{ r.aitReferenceNo }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar ait-avatar">
                <i class="bi bi-receipt"></i>
              </div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ r.taxpayerName }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ r.taxpayerTin }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>

          <td>
            <span class="cat-badge" [ngClass]="getSourceClass(r.sourceType)">
              <i class="bi" [ngClass]="getSourceIcon(r.sourceType)"></i>
              {{ getSourceLabel(r.sourceType) }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>
            <span class="code-text">{{ r.hsCode || '—' }}</span>
          </td>

          <td class="amt-cell net">
            ৳ {{ r.calculatedAitAmount | number:'1.0-0' }}
          </td>

          <td class="date-cell">
            {{ r.createdAt | date:'dd MMM' }}
          </td>

          <td>
            <span class="sla-badge"
              [class.sla-ok]="getSlaHours(r) >= 12"
              [class.sla-warn]="getSlaHours(r) >= 0 && getSlaHours(r) < 12"
              [class.sla-over]="getSlaHours(r) < 0">
              <i class="bi"
                [ngClass]="getSlaHours(r) < 0 ? 'bi-exclamation-triangle-fill' :
                           getSlaHours(r) < 12 ? 'bi-clock-fill' : 'bi-check-circle'">
              </i>
              {{ getSlaDisplay(r) }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">
              {{ getStatusLabel(r.status) }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>
            <div class="action-btns">
              <button class="btn-view" (click)="reviewRecord(r.id || 0)">
                <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> Review
              </button>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>

        <tr *ngIf="getPaginatedRecords().length === 0">
          <td colspan="10">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-inbox"></i>
              <p>No records in queue.</p>
              <small>Try adjusting filters or check back later.</small>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- ── Mobile Cards ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" style="padding:12px;" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card"
      *ngFor="let r of getPaginatedRecords()"
      [class.row-overdue]="getSlaHours(r) < 0">
      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar ait-avatar">
            <i class="bi bi-receipt"></i>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ r.taxpayerName }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ r.aitReferenceNo }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">
          {{ getStatusLabel(r.status) }}
        </span>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>TIN</label>
          <span>{{ r.taxpayerTin }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Source</label>
          <span class="cat-badge" [ngClass]="getSourceClass(r.sourceType)">
            {{ getSourceLabel(r.sourceType) }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>AIT Amount</label>
          <span class="net">৳ {{ r.calculatedAitAmount | number:'1.0-0' }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>SLA</label>
          <span class="sla-badge"
            [class.sla-ok]="getSlaHours(r) >= 12"
            [class.sla-warn]="getSlaHours(r) >= 0 && getSlaHours(r) < 12"
            [class.sla-over]="getSlaHours(r) < 0">
            {{ getSlaDisplay(r) }}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-actions">
        <button class="btn-view" (click)="reviewRecord(r.id || 0)">
          <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> Review
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="getPaginatedRecords().length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-inbox"></i>
      <p>No records in queue.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ── Pagination ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <div class="pagination-row" *ngIf="!isLoading && filteredRecords.length > 0">
    <span class="pagination-info">
      Showing {{ ((currentPage-1)*itemsPerPage)+1 }} to
      {{ min(currentPage*itemsPerPage, filteredRecords.length) }}
      of {{ filteredRecords.length }} records
    </span>
    <div class="pagination-controls">
      <button class="btn-page" [disabled]="currentPage === 1" (click)="prevPage()">
        <i class="bi bi-chevron-left"></i> Prev
      </button>
      <span *ngFor="let p of getPageNumbers()"
        class="page-num"
        [class.active]="p === currentPage"
        (click)="goToPage(p)">
        {{ p }}
      </span>
      <button class="btn-page" [disabled]="currentPage >= getTotalPages()" (click)="nextPage()">
        Next <i class="bi bi-chevron-right"></i>
      </button>
    </div>
    <select class="filter-select"
      (change)="itemsPerPage = +$any($event.target).value; applyFilters()">
      <option value="10">10 per page</option>
      <option value="20">20 per page</option>
      <option value="50">50 per page</option>
    </select>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/ait/pages/officer-review/officer-review.component.css
```css
/* officer-review.component.css
   FIXED: Removed all Tabler icon references.
   Uses Bootstrap Icons only, consistent with project design system.
*/
⋮----
/* ── Workflow tracker ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.workflow-tracker {
.wf-step {
.wf-dot {
.wf-label { font-size: 11px; color: #9ca3af; text-align: center; line-height: 1.3; }
.wf-step.done   .wf-dot  { background: #16a34a; color: #fff; border-color: #16a34a; }
.wf-step.done   .wf-label { color: #16a34a; font-weight: 600; }
.wf-step.active .wf-dot  { background: #4f46e5; color: #fff; border-color: #4f46e5; }
.wf-step.active .wf-label { color: #4f46e5; font-weight: 700; }
.wf-step.rejected .wf-dot  { background: #dc2626; color: #fff; border-color: #dc2626; }
.wf-line {
.wf-line.done { background: #16a34a; }
⋮----
/* ── Two-column layout ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.review-layout {
⋮----
.review-layout { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
⋮----
/* ── Form card (consistent with project) ────────────────────────────────── */
.form-card {
.section-header {
.section-icon {
.section-title { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: #111827; }
.section-sub   { font-size: 11px; color: #6b7280; }
.card-p { padding: 16px 20px; }
⋮----
/* ── Detail grid ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.detail-grid  { display:flex; flex-direction:column; padding:0 20px 16px; }
.detail-row {
.detail-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.detail-row.highlight { background: #f5f3ff; padding: 9px 12px; margin: 0 -0px; border-radius: 8px; }
.detail-label  { font-size: 12px; color: #6b7280; }
.detail-val    { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #111827; }
.detail-mono   { font-family: monospace; font-size: 12px; }
.detail-amount { color: #4f46e5; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 800; }
.detail-amount.approved { color: #16a34a; }
⋮----
/* ── Source badges ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.cat-badge      { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:4px; font-size:11px; font-weight:600; padding:3px 9px; border-radius:5px; }
.cat-import     { background:#e0f2f9; color:#0891b2; }
.cat-supplier   { background:#e8eef9; color:#1a3f8f; }
.cat-salary     { background:#e6f7f3; color:#1faa8b; }
.cat-contractor { background:#fef3e2; color:#f59e0b; }
.cat-rent       { background:#fce7f3; color:#be185d; }
⋮----
/* ── Status badges ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.status-badge     { font-size:11px; font-weight:700; padding:4px 10px; border-radius:20px; }
.status-draft     { background:#f3f4f6; color:#6b7280; }
.status-submitted { background:#dbeafe; color:#1d4ed8; }
.status-pending   { background:#fef3c7; color:#92400e; }
.status-review    { background:#ede9fe; color:#5b21b6; }
.status-approved  { background:#dcfce7; color:#166534; }
.status-rejected  { background:#fee2e2; color:#991b1b; }
.status-credited  { background:#d1fae5; color:#065f46; }
⋮----
/* ── Challan verified badge ──────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.challan-verified {
⋮----
/* ── Documents ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.doc-list  { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; }
.doc-item {
.doc-item:hover { background: #eff6ff; color: #1d4ed8; }
.doc-name { flex: 1; font-weight: 600; }
.doc-size { color: #9ca3af; font-size: 11px; }
⋮----
/* ── Officer action forms ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.action-btn-group {
.action-btn-group .btn { flex: 1; }
⋮----
.reject-panel {
⋮----
.credit-summary {
.credit-amount { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 800; color: #16a34a; }
.credit-label  { font-size: 12px; color: #6b7280; margin-top: 2px; }
⋮----
/* ── Rejection card ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.rejection-card { border-color: #fecaca; }
.rejection-icon { background: #fee2e2; color: #dc2626; }
.rejection-text { font-size: 13px; color: #374151; line-height: 1.6; }
⋮----
/* ── Audit timeline ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.audit-timeline { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 14px; }
.audit-event    { display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: flex-start; }
.audit-event.event-rejected .audit-dot { color: #dc2626; }
.audit-dot { font-size: 8px; color: #4f46e5; margin-top: 4px; flex-shrink: 0; }
.audit-body { flex: 1; }
.audit-transition {
.audit-from { color: #6b7280; }
.audit-to   { color: #4f46e5; }
.audit-meta { font-size: 11px; color: #9ca3af; display: flex; gap: 6px; }
.audit-reason { font-size: 11px; color: #6b7280; margin-top: 2px; font-style: italic; }
⋮----
/* ── Form fields ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.field-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; }
.field-label { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #6b7280; }
.field-label.required::after { content: ' *'; color: #dc2626; }
.field-input {
.field-input:focus { border-color: #4f46e5; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(79,70,229,.1); }
.field-error { font-size: 11px; color: #dc2626; }
.field-hint  { font-size: 11px; color: #9ca3af; }
.form-grid-2 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 12px; }
.form-action-row { margin-top: 12px; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; }
⋮----
/* ── Button styles ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.btn { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; padding:9px 16px; border-radius:8px; font-size:13px; font-weight:600; cursor:pointer; border:none; transition:all 0.2s; }
.btn-primary { background:#4f46e5; color:#fff; }
.btn-primary:hover:not(:disabled) { background:#4338ca; }
.btn-success { background:#16a34a; color:#fff; }
.btn-success:hover:not(:disabled) { background:#15803d; }
.btn-danger  { background:#dc2626; color:#fff; }
.btn-danger:hover:not(:disabled) { background:#b91c1c; }
.btn-outline { background:#fff; color:#374151; border:1px solid #e5e7eb; }
.btn-outline:hover:not(:disabled) { background:#f9fafb; }
.btn:disabled { opacity:.55; cursor:not-allowed; }
.w-full { width: 100%; justify-content: center; }
⋮----
.mb-12 { margin-bottom: 12px; }
.mt-10 { margin-top: 10px; }
.ms-auto { margin-left: auto; }
.ms-2  { margin-left: 8px; }
```

## File: src/app/features/audit-management/pages/audit-list/audit-list.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Audit Cases</h4>
    <p>Manage all tax audit cases and assessments.</p>
  </div>
  <a *canDo="'create'" routerLink="/audits/create" class="btn-add-primary desktop-add-btn">
    <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i> New Audit Case
  </a>
</div>

<!-- KPI Stats Row -->
<div class="audit-kpi-row" *ngIf="kpis">
  <div class="akpi-card">
    <div class="akpi-icon blue"><i class="bi bi-folder2-open"></i></div>
    <div class="akpi-text">
      <span class="akpi-label">Open Audits</span>
      <span class="akpi-value">{{ kpis['openAudits'] }}</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="akpi-card">
    <div class="akpi-icon green"><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i></div>
    <div class="akpi-text">
      <span class="akpi-label">Approved</span>
      <span class="akpi-value">{{ kpis['assessmentApproved']  }}</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="akpi-card">
    <div class="akpi-icon orange"><i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i></div>
    <div class="akpi-text">
      <span class="akpi-label">Demand Issued</span>
      <span class="akpi-value">{{ kpis['demandIssued']  }}</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="akpi-card">
    <div class="akpi-icon teal"><i class="bi bi-cash-coin"></i></div>
    <div class="akpi-text">
      <span class="akpi-label">Paid</span>
      <span class="akpi-value">{{ kpis['paid']  }}</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="akpi-card">
    <div class="akpi-icon red"><i class="bi bi-shield-exclamation"></i></div>
    <div class="akpi-text">
      <span class="akpi-label">Appealed</span>
      <span class="akpi-value">{{ kpis['appealed'] }}</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input type="text" placeholder="Search case no, TIN, taxpayer, officer..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm" (input)="onSearch()" />
      </div>
      <button class="btn btn-export" (click)="exportCsv()">
        <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-excel"></i> Export
      </button>
    </div>
    <div class="filter-row">
      <select class="filter-select" [(ngModel)]="filters.status" (change)="loadCases()">
        <option value="">All Statuses</option>
        <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s.value">{{ s.label }}</option>
      </select>
      <select class="filter-select" [(ngModel)]="filters.auditType" (change)="loadCases()">
        <option value="">All Types</option>
        <option *ngFor="let t of auditTypes" [value]="t.value">{{ t.label }}</option>
      </select>
      <select class="filter-select" [(ngModel)]="filters.fiscalYear" (change)="loadCases()">
        <option value="">All Years</option>
        <option *ngFor="let y of fiscalYears" [value]="y">{{ y }}</option>
      </select>
      <select class="filter-select" [(ngModel)]="filters.priority" (change)="loadCases()">
        <option value="">All Priorities</option>
        <option value="LOW">Low</option>
        <option value="NORMAL">Normal</option>
        <option value="HIGH">High</option>
        <option value="CRITICAL">Critical</option>
      </select>
      <button class="btn-clear-filter" (click)="clearFilters()">
        <i class="bi bi-x-circle"></i> Clear
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading audit cases...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Desktop Table -->
  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>Case No</th>
          <th>Taxpayer</th>
          <th>Type</th>
          <th>Tax Type</th>
          <th>Fiscal Year</th>
          <th>Priority</th>
          <th>Officer</th>
          <th>Due Date</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Actions</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let c of cases; let i = index">
          <td>{{ (currentPage * pageSize) + i + 1 }}</td>
          <td><span class="code-badge">{{ c.caseNo }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar">{{ c.taxpayerName.charAt(0) }}</div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ c.taxpayerName }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ c.tinNumber }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>
          <td><span class="cat-badge" [ngClass]="getTypeClass(c.auditType)">{{ getTypeLabel(c.auditType) }}</span></td>
          <td>{{ getTaxTypeLabel(c.taxType) }}</td>
          <td>{{ c.fiscalYear || '—' }}</td>
          <td><span class="priority-pill" [ngClass]="getPriorityClass(c.priority)">{{ c.priority }}</span></td>
          <td>{{ c.assignedOfficerName || '—' }}</td>
          <td>
            <span [class]="isDue(c.dueDate) ? 'due-overdue' : ''">
              {{ c.dueDate || '—' }}
            </span>
          </td>
          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(c.status)">
              {{ getStatusLabel(c.status) }}
            </span>
          </td>
          <td>
            <div class="action-btns">
              <button class="btn-view" (click)="view(c.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
              </button>
              <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit" (click)="edit(c.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
              </button>
              <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_COMMISSIONER']"
                class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(c.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i>
              </button>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
        <tr *ngIf="cases.length === 0">
          <td colspan="11">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-folder2-open"></i>
              <p>No audit cases found.</p>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Cards -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" style="padding:12px;" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let c of cases">
      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar">{{ c.taxpayerName.charAt(0) }}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ c.taxpayerName }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ c.caseNo }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(c.status)">{{ getStatusLabel(c.status) }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>TIN</label><span>{{ c.tinNumber }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Type</label>
          <span class="cat-badge" [ngClass]="getTypeClass(c.auditType)">{{ getTypeLabel(c.auditType) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Tax Type</label><span>{{ getTaxTypeLabel(c.taxType) }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Priority</label>
          <span class="priority-pill" [ngClass]="getPriorityClass(c.priority)">{{ c.priority }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Fiscal Year</label><span>{{ c.fiscalYear || '—' }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Due Date</label>
          <span [class]="isDue(c.dueDate) ? 'due-overdue' : ''">{{ c.dueDate || '—' }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Officer</label><span>{{ c.assignedOfficerName || '—' }}</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-actions">
        <button class="btn-view" (click)="view(c.id)"><i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View</button>
        <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit" (click)="edit(c.id)"><i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit</button>
        <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_COMMISSIONER']" class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(c.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="cases.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-folder2-open"></i>
      <p>No audit cases found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Pagination -->
  <div class="pagination-row" *ngIf="totalElements > 0">
    <span class="pagination-info">
      Showing {{ currentPage * pageSize + 1 }}–{{ Math.min((currentPage+1)*pageSize, totalElements) }}
      of {{ totalElements }}
    </span>
    <div class="pagination-controls">
      <button class="btn-page" [disabled]="currentPage === 0" (click)="prevPage()">← Prev</button>
      <span *ngFor="let p of pageNumbers" class="page-num"
        [class.active]="p === currentPage" (click)="goToPage(p)">{{ p + 1 }}</span>
      <button class="btn-page" [disabled]="currentPage >= totalPages-1" (click)="nextPage()">Next →</button>
    </div>
    <select class="page-size-select" (change)="pageSize = +$any($event.target).value; loadCases()">
      <option value="10">10 / page</option>
      <option value="20" selected>20 / page</option>
      <option value="50">50 / page</option>
    </select>
  </div>

</div>

<button *canDo="'create'" class="fab-btn" routerLink="/audits/create">
  <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i>
</button>

<!-- Delete Modal -->
<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showDeleteModal">
  <div class="modal-card">
    <div class="modal-accent error"></div>
    <div class="modal-icon-wrap error">
      <i class="bi bi-trash-fill" style="color:#A32D2D;font-size:22px;"></i>
    </div>
    <p class="modal-title">Delete Audit Case?</p>
    <p class="modal-msg">This action cannot be undone. Cases in approved or demand-issued status cannot be deleted.</p>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn-modal-cancel" (click)="cancelDelete()">Cancel</button>
      <button class="btn-modal-confirm error" (click)="executeDelete()">
        <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```css
/* Matches tin-view.component.css pattern exactly */

.header-actions { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }

⋮----
.loading-overlay {
⋮----
/* ── Audit Header Card ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.audit-header-card {
⋮----
.ahc-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; }
⋮----
.ahc-icon {
⋮----
.ahc-case-no {
⋮----
.ahc-taxpayer { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 8px; }
⋮----
.ahc-meta { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
⋮----
.ahc-pill {
.ahc-pill.dim {
⋮----
.ahc-right { display: flex; gap: 24px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
⋮----
.ahc-stat { text-align: right; }
.ahcs-label { display: block; font-size: 11px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65); }
.ahcs-value { display: block; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 3px; }
⋮----
/* ── Action Row ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.audit-action-row {
⋮----
.audit-action-btn {
.audit-action-btn:hover { background: #d0daf5; }
.audit-action-btn.success { background: #e6f7ee; color: #1a7a45; border-color: #b2dfdb; }
.audit-action-btn.success:hover { background: #b2dfdb; }
.audit-action-btn.warning { background: #fef3e2; color: #e65100; border-color: #fde8c0; }
.audit-action-btn.warning:hover { background: #fde8c0; }
.audit-action-btn.danger  { background: #fce4ec; color: #c62828; border-color: #f48fb1; }
.audit-action-btn.danger:hover  { background: #f48fb1; }
⋮----
/* ── Tabs ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.audit-tabs-wrapper {
⋮----
.audit-tabs {
.audit-tabs::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
⋮----
.atab {
.atab i { font-size: 13px; }
.atab.active { color: #1a3f8f; border-bottom-color: #1a3f8f; background: #f0f4ff; }
.atab:hover:not(.active) { background: #f8fafc; color: #444; }
⋮----
.atab-badge {
.atab-badge.warn { background: #e65100; }
⋮----
.atab-content { padding: 20px; }
⋮----
/* ── Detail Cards (reuse tin-view pattern) ───────────────────────────────── */
.details-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; }
⋮----
.detail-card {
⋮----
.detail-card.mt-3 { margin-top: 12px; }
⋮----
.detail-card-header {
.detail-card-header i { font-size: 15px; color: #0891b2; }
⋮----
.detail-body { padding: 4px 0; }
⋮----
.detail-row {
.detail-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
⋮----
.detail-label { font-size: 13px; color: #888; font-weight: 500; flex-shrink: 0; margin-right: 12px; }
.detail-value { font-size: 13px; color: #333; font-weight: 500; text-align: right; }
.detail-value.fw-bold { font-weight: 700; color: #1a2340; }
⋮----
/* ── Code Badge ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.code-badge {
⋮----
/* ── Priority Pill ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.priority-pill {

.priority-pill.pri-normal   { background: #e8eef9; color: #1a3f8f; }
.priority-pill.pri-high     { background: #fff3e0; color: #e65100; }

⋮----
/* ── Risk Num ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.risk-num { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; }
.risk-num.risk-num-low      { color: #22c55e; }
.risk-num.risk-num-med      { color: #eab308; }
.risk-num.risk-num-high     { color: #f97316; }
.risk-num.risk-num-critical { color: #ef4444; }
⋮----
.due-overdue { color: #c62828; font-weight: 700; }
⋮----
/* ── Tab Section Title ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.tab-action-bar {
.tab-section-title { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a2340; }
⋮----
.findings-total-tag {
⋮----
/* ── Audit Item Cards (queries, docs) ────────────────────────────────────── */
.audit-item-card {
.audit-item-card.finding { display: flex; gap: 12px; }
⋮----
.aic-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.aic-title  { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a2340; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.aic-body   { font-size: 13px; color: #444; line-height: 1.5; margin-bottom: 8px; }
.aic-meta   { display: flex; gap: 12px; font-size: 11px; color: #888; flex-wrap: wrap; }
⋮----
.aic-response {
.air-label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: #1a7a45; margin-bottom: 4px; display: block; }
.air-text  { font-size: 13px; color: #1a2340; }
.air-meta  { font-size: 11px; color: #888; margin-top: 4px; }
⋮----
/* ── Finding Card ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.finding-num {
.finding-body { flex: 1; }
⋮----
.finding-basis {
⋮----
.finding-amounts {
.fa-item label { font-size: 10px; color: #888; display: block; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; }
.fa-item span  { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #1a2340; }
⋮----
.cat-badge.purple { background: #f3e8ff; color: #6d28d9; }
⋮----
/* ── Extra status badge colors ───────────────────────────────────────────── */
.badge-orange { background: #fff3e0; color: #e65100; border: 1px solid #fddcb5; }
.badge-teal   { background: #e0f7fa; color: #00695c; border: 1px solid #b2ebf2; }
.badge-purple { background: #f3e8ff; color: #6d28d9; border: 1px solid #ddd6fe; }
.badge-indigo { background: #e0e7ff; color: #3730a3; border: 1px solid #c7d2fe; }
.badge-yellow { background: #fffbeb; color: #92400e; border: 1px solid #fde68a; }
.badge-pink   { background: #fce7f3; color: #9d174d; border: 1px solid #fbcfe8; }
.badge-lime   { background: #f7fee7; color: #3f6212; border: 1px solid #d9f99d; }
.badge-muted  { background: #f3f4f6; color: #6b7280; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; }
⋮----
/* ── Demand Banner ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.demand-banner {
.db-left { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; }
.db-badge {
.db-no { font-family: monospace; font-size: 13px; color: #888; }
.db-amount { text-align: center; }
.db-amount label { font-size: 11px; color: #888; text-transform: uppercase; display: block; }
.db-amount-val { font-size: 26px; font-weight: 800; color: #c62828; }
.db-due { font-size: 12px; color: #555; margin-top: 4px; }
⋮----
/* ── Timeline ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.timeline-list { padding: 8px 0; }
⋮----
.timeline-row { display: flex; gap: 16px; }
⋮----
.tl-line-wrap {
.tl-dot {
.tl-line { width: 2px; flex: 1; background: #e0e8f0; margin: 4px 0; }
⋮----
.tl-content { flex: 1; padding-bottom: 20px; }
.tl-header  { display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.tl-time    { font-size: 11px; color: #888; }
.tl-by      { font-size: 12px; color: #555; margin-bottom: 2px; }
.tl-reason  { font-size: 12px; color: #374151; margin-top: 4px; }
⋮----
/* ── Responsive ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.details-grid       { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
.audit-header-card  { padding: 18px; }
.ahc-taxpayer       { font-size: 16px; }
.ahc-right          { flex-direction: row; gap: 16px; }
.ahc-stat           { text-align: left; }
.atab-content       { padding: 14px; }
```

```css
/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   Dashboard Home Component — Upgraded CSS
   Fixes: status badges, spacing rhythm, legend colors, donut,
   zone card gap, sc-value overflow, duplicate keyframes
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
⋮----
/* ── Global & Typography ── */
.dashboard-wrap {
⋮----
/* ── Loading overlay ── */
.dash-loading-overlay {
.dash-spinner {
⋮----
/* ── Single keyframes definition (FIX: was duplicated) ── */
⋮----
/* ── Error banner ── */
.dash-error-banner {
.dash-error-banner i { color: #f59e0b; font-size: 16px; }
⋮----
/* ── Header ── */
.dash-header {
.dash-header-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; }
⋮----
.greeting-avatar {
.greeting-title { font-size: 21px; font-weight: 700; color: #0f172a; margin: 0 0 5px; }
.greeting-sub {
.role-chip {
⋮----
.dash-header-right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; }
.year-select, .btn-refresh {
.year-select:hover, .btn-refresh:hover {
.btn-refresh {
.btn-refresh i { color: #64748b; transition: transform 0.2s; }
.btn-refresh.spinning i { animation: spin 0.8s linear infinite; }
⋮----
/* ── Fiscal Year Info Bar ── */
.fy-info-bar {
⋮----
margin-bottom: 24px; /* FIX: was 20px — aligned to 24px rhythm */
⋮----
.fy-info-bar::before {
.fy-info-bar::after {
⋮----
.fy-info-left {
.fy-info-icon {
.fy-info-text { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
.fy-info-label {
.fy-info-name { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; line-height: 1.2; }
⋮----
.fy-status-badge {

.fy-info-deadlines {

.fy-deadline-chip.vat i  { color: #6ee7b7; }
.fy-deadline-chip.it  i  { color: #93c5fd; }
.fy-deadline-chip.overdue { border-color: #fca5a5; background: rgba(252,165,165,0.1); }
.fy-deadline-chip.overdue i { color: #fca5a5; }
⋮----
.fy-deadline-chip div { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; }
.fdc-label { font-size: 10px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.4px; }
.fdc-val   { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #fff; }
.fdc-overdue-tag {
⋮----

⋮----
/* ── Stat Cards ── */
.stat-cards-grid {
⋮----
margin-bottom: 24px; /* FIX: unified to 24px rhythm */
⋮----
.stat-card {
⋮----
min-width: 0; /* FIX: prevents overflow in grid */
⋮----
.stat-card:hover {
⋮----
.sc-body { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
.sc-icon-wrap {
.sc-teal   .sc-icon-wrap { background: #ccfbf1; color: #0f766e; }
.sc-blue   .sc-icon-wrap { background: #dbeafe; color: #1d4ed8; }
.sc-purple .sc-icon-wrap { background: #f3e8ff; color: #6b21a8; }
.sc-green  .sc-icon-wrap { background: #d1fae5; color: #047857; }
.sc-orange .sc-icon-wrap { background: #fef3c7; color: #b45309; }
.sc-red    .sc-icon-wrap { background: #fee2e2; color: #b91c1c; }
⋮----
.sc-info { min-width: 0; flex: 1; }
.sc-label {
.sc-value {
⋮----
/* FIX: prevents huge number from blowing out card at 2-col layout */
⋮----
.sc-change {
.sc-change.negative { color: #dc2626; background: #fee2e2; }
⋮----
/* Circular Progress */
.sc-circle-wrap { position: relative; width: 60px; height: 60px; flex-shrink: 0; }
.sc-circle { width: 60px; height: 60px; }
.circle-bg  { stroke: #f1f5f9; }
.circle-val { transition: stroke-dashoffset 1s ease; }
.sc-teal   .circle-val { stroke: #0f766e; }
.sc-blue   .circle-val { stroke: #1d4ed8; }
.sc-purple .circle-val { stroke: #6b21a8; }
.sc-green  .circle-val { stroke: #047857; }
.sc-orange .circle-val { stroke: #b45309; }
.sc-red    .circle-val { stroke: #b91c1c; }
.circle-pct {
⋮----
/* ── Quick Actions ── */
.quick-actions-row {
.qa-title {
.qa-title i { color: #eab308; font-size: 16px; }
.qa-btns { display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; flex: 1; }
.qa-btn {
.qa-teal   { background: #f0fdfa; color: #0f766e; border-color: #ccfbf1; }
.qa-teal:hover   { background: #ccfbf1; transform: translateY(-1px); }
.qa-blue   { background: #eff6ff; color: #1d4ed8; border-color: #dbeafe; }
.qa-blue:hover   { background: #dbeafe; transform: translateY(-1px); }
.qa-green  { background: #ecfdf5; color: #047857; border-color: #d1fae5; }
.qa-green:hover  { background: #d1fae5; transform: translateY(-1px); }
.qa-orange { background: #fffbeb; color: #b45309; border-color: #fef3c7; }
.qa-orange:hover { background: #fef3c7; transform: translateY(-1px); }
.qa-purple { background: #faf5ff; color: #6b21a8; border-color: #f3e8ff; }
.qa-purple:hover { background: #f3e8ff; transform: translateY(-1px); }
.qa-navy   { background: #f8fafc; color: #334155; border-color: #e2e8f0; }
.qa-navy:hover   { background: #e2e8f0; transform: translateY(-1px); }
⋮----
/* ── Common Card Styles ── */
.chart-card, .zone-card, .table-card {
⋮----
.chart-card-header, .tc-header {
.cch-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; }
.cch-icon {
.cch-icon.teal   { background: #ccfbf1; color: #0f766e; }
.cch-icon.blue   { background: #dbeafe; color: #1d4ed8; }
.cch-icon.purple { background: #f3e8ff; color: #6b21a8; }
.cch-icon.orange { background: #fef3c7; color: #b45309; }
.cch-icon.navy   { background: #e0f2fe; color: #0369a1; }
.cch-icon.red    { background: #fee2e2; color: #b91c1c; }
⋮----
.cch-title { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; color: #0f172a; }
.cch-sub   { font-size: 12px; color: #64748b; margin-top: 2px; }
⋮----
/* ── Layout Grids ── */
.charts-row { display: grid; gap: 24px; margin-bottom: 24px; align-items: start; }
.charts-row-1 { grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr; }
.charts-row-2 { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
⋮----
/* FIX: zone-card needs explicit bottom margin so tables-row isn't cramped */
.zone-card {
⋮----
.tables-row {
⋮----
/* FIX: removed margin-top — zone-card's margin-bottom now handles the spacing */
⋮----
/* ── Chart Specifics ── */
.chart-canvas {
.gauge-canvas {
/* FIX: donut canvas — remove fixed px so it scales properly on tablet */
.donut-canvas {
canvas { image-rendering: crisp-edges; }
⋮----
/* FIX: chart legend — blue dot was #dbeafe (near-invisible), now proper blue */
.chart-legend {
.leg-dot {
.leg-dot.teal { background: #0f766e; }
.leg-dot.blue { background: #3b82f6; } /* FIX: was #dbeafe — now visible */
⋮----
/* ── Gauge Stats ── */
.gauge-stats {
.gs-item { text-align: center; }
.gs-val { display: block; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 800; }
.gs-val.green { color: #059669; }
.gs-val.red   { color: #dc2626; }
.gs-label { display: block; font-size: 12px; color: #64748b; margin-top: 4px; font-weight: 500; }
.gs-divider { width: 1px; height: 40px; background: #e2e8f0; }
⋮----
/* ── Donut chart wrapper ── */
.donut-wrap { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 20px; margin-top: 12px; }
.donut-legend { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
.dl-item {
.dl-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.dl-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 3px; flex-shrink: 0; }
.dl-label { flex: 1; color: #475569; font-weight: 500; min-width: 0; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
.dl-val   { font-weight: 700; color: #0f172a; }
.dl-pct   {
⋮----
/* ── Zone Card ── */
.zone-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 14px; margin-top: 14px; }
.zone-info { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 7px; }
.zone-name { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #334155; }
.zone-vals { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: #64748b; }
.zone-bar-wrap { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }
.zone-bar-bg { flex: 1; height: 9px; background: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; }
.zone-bar-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 12px; transition: width 1s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); }
.zone-pct { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; min-width: 38px; text-align: right; }
⋮----
/* ── Table Cards ── */
.view-all-link {
.view-all-link:hover { background: #eff6ff; color: #1d4ed8; }
⋮----
.mini-table { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
.mt-row {
.mt-row:not(:last-child) { border-bottom-color: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 0; }
.mt-row:last-child { border-radius: 0 0 10px 10px; }
.mt-row:hover { background: #f8fafc; }
⋮----
.mt-avatar {
.mt-avatar.pay { background: #dbeafe; color: #1d4ed8; font-size: 16px; }
⋮----
.mt-info { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
.mt-name {
.mt-sub { display: block; font-size: 11px; color: #64748b; margin-top: 3px; font-weight: 500; }
⋮----
.mt-right {
.mt-date   { font-size: 11px; color: #94a3b8; font-weight: 500; }
.mt-amount { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: #0f172a; }
⋮----
/* ── Status Badges — FULL SET ── */
/* FIX: Added missing status variants with distinct colors */
.status-badge {
⋮----
/* Green → Active, Approved, Cleared, Completed */
.status-active,
⋮----
/* Yellow → Pending, Submitted, Draft */
.status-pending,
⋮----
/* Grey → Inactive */
.status-inactive {
⋮----
/* Orange → Suspended (distinct from Inactive) */
.status-suspended {
⋮----
/* Red → Failed (distinct from Inactive, visually alarming) */
.status-failed {
⋮----
/* Blue → In Progress, Responded */
.status-in-progress,
⋮----
/* Purple → Flagged */
.status-flagged {
⋮----
/* ── Responsive ── */
⋮----
.stat-cards-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); }
⋮----
.stat-cards-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
.charts-row-1 { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
.sc-value { font-size: 22px; }
⋮----
.charts-row-2, .tables-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
.donut-wrap { flex-direction: column; align-items: center; }
/* FIX: on column layout, donut should not be too wide */
.donut-canvas { width: 160px !important; height: 160px !important; }
.donut-legend { width: 100%; }
⋮----
.dashboard-wrap { padding: 14px; }
.stat-cards-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 14px; }
.stat-card { padding: 16px; }
.sc-value { font-size: 20px; }
.sc-icon-wrap { width: 40px; height: 40px; font-size: 17px; }
.sc-circle-wrap { width: 48px; height: 48px; }
.sc-circle { width: 48px; height: 48px; }
.qa-btns { gap: 8px; }
.qa-btn { padding: 8px 13px; font-size: 12px; }
.fy-info-bar { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px; }
.fy-info-deadlines { flex-direction: column; }
.fy-deadline-chip { min-width: unset; }
.charts-row { gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
.zone-card { margin-bottom: 16px; }
.tables-row { gap: 16px; }
⋮----
.stat-cards-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
.dash-header { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; }
```

## File: src/app/features/dashboard/pages/dashboard-home/dashboard-home.component.html
```html
<div class="dashboard-wrap">

  <!-- Loading overlay -->
  <div *ngIf="isLoading" class="dash-loading-overlay">
    <div class="dash-spinner"></div>
    <p>Loading dashboard…</p>
  </div>

  <!-- Error banner -->
  <div *ngIf="hasError && !isLoading" class="dash-error-banner">
    <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i>
    Could not reach the server — showing cached data. &nbsp;
    <button class="btn-refresh" (click)="onRefresh()">Retry</button>
  </div>

  <div class="dash-header">
    <div class="dash-header-left">
      <div class="greeting-avatar">
        {{ currentUser?.fullName?.charAt(0) || 'A' }}
      </div>
      <div>
        <h4 class="greeting-title">
          {{ getGreeting() }}, {{ currentUser?.fullName || 'Admin' }}!
        </h4>
        <p class="greeting-sub">
          <span class="role-chip">{{ currentUser?.role || 'System Administrator' }}</span>
          Today is {{ currentDate | date:'EEEE, d MMMM yyyy' }}
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="dash-header-right">
      <select class="year-select" [(ngModel)]="selectedYear" (change)="onYearChange()">
        <option *ngFor="let fy of fiscalYears" [value]="fy.yearName">
          FY {{ fy.yearName }}{{ fy.isCurrentYear ? ' ★' : '' }}
        </option>
      </select>
      <button class="btn-refresh" (click)="onRefresh()" [class.spinning]="isRefreshing">
        <i class="bi bi-arrow-clockwise"></i> Refresh
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ── Current Fiscal Year Info Bar ── -->
  <div class="fy-info-bar" *ngIf="currentFiscalYear">
    <div class="fy-info-left">
      <div class="fy-info-icon"><i class="bi bi-calendar2-range-fill"></i></div>
      <div class="fy-info-text">
        <span class="fy-info-label">Current Fiscal Year</span>
        <span class="fy-info-name">{{ currentFiscalYear.yearName }}</span>
      </div>
      <span class="fy-status-badge" [ngClass]="'fy-' + currentFiscalYear.status.toLowerCase()">
        {{ currentFiscalYear.status }}
      </span>
    </div>

    <div class="fy-info-deadlines">
      <div class="fy-deadline-chip">
        <i class="bi bi-calendar-check"></i>
        <div>
          <span class="fdc-label">Period</span>
          <span class="fdc-val">{{ currentFiscalYear.startDate | date:'d MMM yyyy' }} – {{ currentFiscalYear.endDate | date:'d MMM yyyy' }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="fy-deadline-chip vat">
        <i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i>
        <div>
          <span class="fdc-label">VAT Due</span>
          <span class="fdc-val">{{ currentFiscalYear.vatDueDay }}th of each month</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="fy-deadline-chip it" [class.overdue]="isDatePast(currentFiscalYear.incomeTaxDueDate)">
        <i class="bi bi-calendar-event-fill"></i>
        <div>
          <span class="fdc-label">Income Tax Due</span>
          <span class="fdc-val">{{ currentFiscalYear.incomeTaxDueDate | date:'d MMM yyyy' }}</span>
        </div>
        <span class="fdc-overdue-tag" *ngIf="isDatePast(currentFiscalYear.incomeTaxDueDate)">Passed</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <a routerLink="/fiscal-years" class="fy-manage-link">
      Manage <i class="bi bi-arrow-right-short"></i>
    </a>
  </div>

  <div class="stat-cards-grid">
    <div class="stat-card" *ngFor="let s of statCards" [ngClass]="'sc-' + s.color">
      <div class="sc-body">
        <div class="sc-icon-wrap">
          <i [class]="s.icon"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="sc-info">
          <span class="sc-label">{{ s.label }}</span>
          <span class="sc-value">
            {{ s.label === 'Total Revenue' ? '৳' : '' }}{{ formatValue(s.value, s.suffix) }}{{ s.suffix }}
          </span>
          <span class="sc-change" [class.negative]="s.change < 0">
            <i [class]="s.change >= 0 ? 'bi bi-trend-up' : 'bi bi-trend-down'"></i>
            {{ s.change | number:'1.1-1' }}% vs last month
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="sc-circle-wrap">
        <svg class="sc-circle" viewBox="0 0 64 64">
          <circle cx="32" cy="32" r="28" fill="none" stroke-width="5" class="circle-bg" />
          <circle cx="32" cy="32" r="28" fill="none" stroke-width="5" class="circle-val"
            [style.stroke-dasharray]="175.9"
            [style.stroke-dashoffset]="175.9 - (s.progress / 100) * 175.9"
            stroke-linecap="round" transform="rotate(-90 32 32)" />
        </svg>
        <span class="circle-pct">{{ s.progress }}%</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="quick-actions-row">
    <div class="qa-title"><i class="bi bi-lightning-charge-fill"></i> Quick Actions</div>
    <div class="qa-btns">
      <a class="qa-btn" *ngFor="let q of quickActions" [routerLink]="q.route" [ngClass]="'qa-' + q.color">
        <i [class]="q.icon"></i>
        <span>{{ q.label }}</span>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="charts-row charts-row-1">
    <div class="chart-card chart-vat">
      <div class="chart-card-header">
        <div class="cch-left">
          <div class="cch-icon teal"><i class="bi bi-graph-up"></i></div>
          <div>
            <div class="cch-title">VAT Collection Trend</div>
            <div class="cch-sub">Last 6 months (৳ Lakh)</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="chart-legend">
          <span class="leg-dot teal"></span><span>Actual</span>
          <span class="leg-dot blue"></span><span>Target</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <canvas id="vatChart" class="chart-canvas"></canvas>
    </div>

    <div class="chart-card chart-gauge">
      <div class="chart-card-header">
        <div class="cch-left">
          <div class="cch-icon purple"><i class="bi bi-speedometer"></i></div>
          <div>
            <div class="cch-title">Tax Compliance</div>
            <div class="cch-sub">FY {{ selectedYear }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <canvas id="gaugeCanvas" class="gauge-canvas"></canvas>
      <div class="gauge-stats">
        <div class="gs-item">
          <span class="gs-val green">{{ complianceFiled | number }}</span>
          <span class="gs-label">Filed</span>
        </div>
        <div class="gs-divider"></div>
        <div class="gs-item">
          <span class="gs-val red">{{ compliancePending | number }}</span>
          <span class="gs-label">Pending</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="charts-row charts-row-2">
    <div class="chart-card chart-pay">
      <div class="chart-card-header">
        <div class="cch-left">
          <div class="cch-icon blue"><i class="bi bi-bar-chart-line-fill"></i></div>
          <div>
            <div class="cch-title">Payment Collection</div>
            <div class="cch-sub">Last 6 months (৳ Lakh)</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <canvas id="payChart" class="chart-canvas"></canvas>
    </div>

    <div class="chart-card chart-donut">
      <div class="chart-card-header">
        <div class="cch-left">
          <div class="cch-icon orange"><i class="bi bi-pie-chart-fill"></i></div>
          <div>
            <div class="cch-title">Revenue Breakdown</div>
            <div class="cch-sub">By tax type (৳ Crore)</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="donut-wrap">
        <canvas id="donutChart" class="donut-canvas"></canvas>
        <div class="donut-legend">
          <div class="dl-item" *ngFor="let t of taxBreakdown">
            <span class="dl-dot" [style.background]="t.color"></span>
            <span class="dl-label">{{ t.label }}</span>
            <span class="dl-val">৳{{ t.value }}Cr</span>
            <span class="dl-pct">{{ t.percentage }}%</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="zone-card">
    <div class="chart-card-header" style="margin-bottom: 0;">
      <div class="cch-left">
        <div class="cch-icon navy"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill"></i></div>
        <div>
          <div class="cch-title">Zone-wise VAT Collection</div>
          <div class="cch-sub">Progress vs target (৳ Crore)</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="zone-list">
      <div class="zone-item" *ngFor="let z of zones">
        <div class="zone-info">
          <span class="zone-name">{{ z.name }}</span>
          <span class="zone-vals">৳{{ z.collection }}Cr / ৳{{ z.target }}Cr</span>
        </div>
        <div class="zone-bar-wrap">
          <div class="zone-bar-bg">
            <div class="zone-bar-fill" [style.width.%]="getZonePercent(z)" [style.background]="z.color"></div>
          </div>
          <span class="zone-pct" [style.color]="z.color">{{ getZonePercent(z) }}%</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="tables-row">
    <div class="table-card">
      <div class="tc-header">
        <div class="cch-left">
          <div class="cch-icon teal"><i class="bi bi-people-fill"></i></div>
          <div>
            <div class="cch-title">Recent Taxpayers</div>
            <div class="cch-sub">Latest registrations</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <a routerLink="/taxpayers" class="view-all-link">View All <i class="bi bi-arrow-right-short"></i></a>
      </div>
      <div class="mini-table">
        <div class="mt-row" *ngFor="let t of recentTaxpayers">
          <div class="mt-avatar">{{ t.name.charAt(0) }}</div>
          <div class="mt-info">
            <span class="mt-name">{{ t.name }}</span>
            <span class="mt-sub">{{ t.tin }} &bull; {{ t.type }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="mt-right">
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(t.status)">{{ t.status }}</span>
            <span class="mt-date">{{ t.date }}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="table-card">
      <div class="tc-header">
        <div class="cch-left">
          <div class="cch-icon blue"><i class="bi bi-credit-card-2-front-fill"></i></div>
          <div>
            <div class="cch-title">Recent Payments</div>
            <div class="cch-sub">Latest transactions</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <a routerLink="/payments" class="view-all-link">View All <i class="bi bi-arrow-right-short"></i></a>
      </div>
      <div class="mini-table">
        <div class="mt-row" *ngFor="let p of recentPayments">
          <div class="mt-avatar pay">৳</div>
          <div class="mt-info">
            <span class="mt-name">{{ p.taxpayer }}</span>
            <span class="mt-sub">{{ p.ref }} &bull; {{ p.type }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="mt-right">
            <span class="mt-amount">{{ formatCurrency(p.amount) }}</span>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(p.status)">{{ p.status }}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/document-verification/pages/document-edit/document-edit.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Edit Document</h4>
    <p>Update document details and verification status.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to View
  </button>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-success"></div>
  <p>Loading document data...</p>
</div>

<div class="form-card" *ngIf="!isLoading">

  <div class="edit-banner">
    <i class="bi bi-pencil-square"></i>
    Editing: <strong>{{ form.documentNo }}</strong>
  </div>

  <!-- Section 1: Taxpayer -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Taxpayer Information</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">TIN and taxpayer details</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">TIN Number</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.tinNumber" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Taxpayer Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.taxpayerName" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: Document Details -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon teal">
        <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Document Details</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Type, category and document information</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Document Type</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.documentType">
            <option *ngFor="let t of documentTypes" [value]="t">{{ t }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Category</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-folder-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.documentCategory">
            <option *ngFor="let c of documentCategories" [value]="c">{{ c }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label required">Document Title</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-file-earmark input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.documentTitle" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Reference No.</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-hash input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.referenceNo" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.status">
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 3: Validity & Verification -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon orange">
        <i class="bi bi-patch-check-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Validity & Verification</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Dates and verification details</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Issue Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.issueDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Expiry Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-x input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.expiryDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Submission Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.submissionDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Verification Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar2-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.verificationDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Verified By</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.verifiedBy" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 4: Remarks -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon purple">
        <i class="bi bi-chat-text-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Remarks</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Optional notes</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks / Notes</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" [(ngModel)]="form.remarks" rows="3"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Form Actions -->
  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isSaving">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isSaving || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isSaving">
        <i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Update Document
      </span>
      <span *ngIf="isSaving">
        <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>
        Updating...
      </span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```
