## File: src/app/features/import-duty/pages/import-duty-edit/import-duty-edit.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Edit Import Record</h4>
    <p>Update import duty assessment details.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()"><i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to View</button>
</div>

<div class="alert-success" *ngIf="successMsg"><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> {{ successMsg }}</div>
<div class="alert-error" *ngIf="errorMsg"><i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ errorMsg }}</div>
<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-danger"></div>
</div>

<div class="form-card" *ngIf="!isLoading">

  <div class="edit-banner">
    <i class="bi bi-pencil-square"></i>
    Editing: <strong>{{ form.dutyRef }}</strong>
    <span class="banner-sub">{{ form.businessName }}</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Section 1: Goods & Valuation -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon"><i class="bi bi-box-seam-fill"></i></div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Goods & Valuation</h6><span class="section-sub">Product, origin and CIF value</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Taxable Product</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-box-seam input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.productId" (ngModelChange)="onProductChange()">
            <option [value]="0">Select Product</option>
            <option *ngFor="let p of products" [value]="p.id">{{ p.productName }} ({{ p.hsCode }})</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">HS Code <span class="auto-label">Auto</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-upc input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input auto-field" [value]="selectedProduct?.hsCode || form.hsCode || 'Auto from product'" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Goods Description</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-file-text input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.goodsDescription" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Origin Country</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-globe input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.originCountry">
            <option value="">Select Country</option>
            <option *ngFor="let c of countries" [value]="c">{{ c }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">CIF Value (BDT)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.cifValue" (ngModelChange)="onCifValueChange()" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Tax Source <span class="auto-label">Server</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-shield-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input auto-field" value="Backend preview" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Calc Summary -->
    <div class="calc-summary" *ngIf="form.cifValue > 0">
      <div class="cs-row" *ngIf="isPreviewLoading"><span>Tax Preview</span><span>Loading...</span></div>
      <div class="cs-row"><span>CIF Value</span><span>{{ fmt(form.cifValue) }}</span></div>
      <ng-container *ngIf="taxPreview">
        <div class="cs-row">
          <span>Customs Duty (CD<span *ngIf="taxPreview.cdRate !== undefined"> {{ taxPreview.cdRate }}%</span>)</span>
          <span class="duty">{{ fmt(taxPreview.customsDuty) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cs-row">
          <span>Supplementary Duty (SD<span *ngIf="taxPreview.sdRate !== undefined"> {{ taxPreview.sdRate }}%</span>)</span>
          <span class="duty">{{ fmt(taxPreview.supplementaryDuty) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cs-row">
          <span>VAT<span *ngIf="taxPreview.vatRate !== undefined"> {{ taxPreview.vatRate }}%</span></span>
          <span class="vat">{{ fmt(taxPreview.vat) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cs-row">
          <span>Advance Income Tax (AIT<span *ngIf="taxPreview.aitRate !== undefined"> {{ taxPreview.aitRate }}%</span>)</span>
          <span class="vat">{{ fmt(taxPreview.advanceIncomeTax) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cs-row">
          <span>Advance Tax (AT<span *ngIf="taxPreview.atRate !== undefined"> {{ taxPreview.atRate }}%</span>)</span>
          <span class="vat">{{ fmt(taxPreview.advanceTax) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cs-divider"></div>
        <div class="cs-row total-row"><span class="bold">Total Payable</span><span class="total">{{ fmt(taxPreview.totalPayable) }}</span></div>
      </ng-container>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: Port & Status -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon red"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill"></i></div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Port, Shipping & Status</h6><span class="section-sub">Entry port, Bill of Entry, dates and current
          status</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Port of Entry</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.portOfEntry">
            <option value="">Select Port</option>
            <option *ngFor="let p of ports" [value]="p">{{ p }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Bill of Entry Number</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.boeNumber" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Bill of Entry Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.boeDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Bill of Lading / AWB</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.billOfLading" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Import Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.importDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.status">
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Paid Amount (BDT)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-cash-coin input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.paidAmount" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks</label>
        <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" [(ngModel)]="form.remarks" rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isSaving"><i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel</button>
    <button class="btn-submit danger" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isSaving || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isSaving"><i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Update Import Record</span>
      <span *ngIf="isSaving"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Updating...</span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/refund-management/pages/refund-create/refund-create.component.css

```css
/* ================================================================
   refund-create.component.css

   Wizard-specific styles only.
   Base styles (page-header, btn-*, form-input, form-section,
   section-header, section-icon, form-grid, form-actions etc.)
   come from global-styles.css.
   ================================================================ */
⋮----
/* ── Stepper ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.stepper-wrapper {
⋮----
.stepper-item {
⋮----
.stepper-circle {
⋮----
.stepper-item.active .stepper-circle {
⋮----
.stepper-item.completed .stepper-circle {
⋮----
.stepper-label {
.stepper-item.active    .stepper-label { color: var(--primary, #0d6efd); font-weight: 600; }
.stepper-item.completed .stepper-label { color: var(--success, #198754); }
⋮----
.stepper-connector {
.stepper-item.completed .stepper-connector { background: var(--success, #198754); }
⋮----
/* ── Wizard Card ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.wizard-card {
⋮----
.wizard-card-header {
⋮----
.wizard-card-body { padding: 20px; }
⋮----
.wizard-card-footer {
⋮----
/* ── Refund type cards ───────────────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.type-card {
.type-card:hover         { border-color: var(--primary, #0d6efd); background: #f0f5ff; }
.type-card--selected     { border-color: var(--primary, #0d6efd); background: #eef3ff; }
⋮----
.type-card-icon {
/* Icon colour tokens */
.type-blue   { background: #e6f1fb; color: #0c447c; }
.type-teal   { background: #e1f5ee; color: #085041; }
.type-purple { background: #eeedfe; color: #3c3489; }
.type-amber  { background: #faeeda; color: #633806; }
.type-indigo { background: #ede9fe; color: #4c1d95; }
.type-gray   { background: var(--bg-subtle, #f1f5f9); color: var(--text-muted); }
⋮----
.type-card-label { font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-primary); }
.type-card-desc  { font-size: 0.70rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 4px; line-height: 1.4; }
.type-card-check { position: absolute; top: 8px; right: 8px; font-size: 1rem; color: var(--success, #198754); }
⋮----
/* ── Source records table ────────────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.source-table th          { font-size: 0.73rem; }
.source-table td          { font-size: 0.82rem; }
.source-row--selected td  { background: rgba(13,110,253,.05) !important; }
⋮----
/* ── Calculation box ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.calc-box {
.calc-row {
.calc-divider   { border-top: 1px solid #a3c97a; margin: 10px 0; }
.calc-total-row {
⋮----
/* ── Optional MFS section ───────────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.optional-section {
.optional-section-title { font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-secondary); }
⋮----
/* ── Uploaded file item ─────────────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.uploaded-file-item {
⋮----
/* ── Review section ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.review-section {
.review-section-title {
.review-row {
.review-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
⋮----
/* ── Declaration box ────────────────────────────────────────── */
```

## File: src/app/features/refund-management/pages/refund-edit/refund-edit.component.html
```html
<div class="container-fluid py-4 px-4">

  <!-- Header -->
  <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
    <div>
      <button class="btn btn-link btn-sm text-muted ps-0 mb-1" (click)="cancel()">
        <i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i> Back to Details
      </button>
      <h4 class="page-title mb-0">
        <i class="bi bi-pencil-square me-2 text-warning"></i>
        Edit Draft — {{ refund?.refundReferenceNo }}
      </h4>
      <p class="text-muted mb-0 small">Only DRAFT applications can be edited.</p>
    </div>
    <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" (click)="cancel()">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg me-1"></i> Cancel
    </button>
  </div>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div *ngIf="loading" class="text-center py-5">
    <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
    <p class="text-muted mt-2 small">Loading draft…</p>
  </div>

  <!-- Error -->
  <div *ngIf="errorMsg" class="alert alert-danger d-flex gap-2 align-items-center mb-3">
    <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ errorMsg }}
  </div>

  <div *ngIf="!loading">

    <!-- Stepper -->
    <div class="stepper-wrapper mb-4">
      <div
        *ngFor="let label of stepLabels; let i = index"
        class="stepper-item"
        [class.completed]="currentStep > i + 1"
        [class.active]="currentStep === i + 1"
      >
        <div class="stepper-circle" (click)="goToStep(i + 1)">
          <i *ngIf="currentStep > i + 1" class="bi bi-check-lg"></i>
          <span *ngIf="currentStep <= i + 1">{{ i + 1 }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="stepper-label">{{ label }}</div>
        <div class="stepper-connector" *ngIf="i < stepLabels.length - 1"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- STEP 1: TYPE -->
    <div class="wizard-card" *ngIf="currentStep === 1">
      <div class="wizard-card-header"><i class="bi bi-list-check me-2"></i>Step 1 — Refund Type</div>
      <div class="wizard-card-body">
        <div class="row g-3">
          <div class="col-md-4 col-sm-6" *ngFor="let t of refundTypeOptions">
            <div
              class="type-card"
              [class.type-card--selected]="selectedRefundType === t.value"
              (click)="selectedRefundType = t.value"
              role="button" tabindex="0"
              (keydown.enter)="selectedRefundType = t.value"
            >
              <div class="type-card-icon" [ngClass]="t.color">
                <i [class]="t.icon" aria-hidden="true"></i>
              </div>
              <div class="type-card-label">{{ t.label }}</div>
              <div class="type-card-check" *ngIf="selectedRefundType === t.value">
                <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill text-success"></i>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-footer">
        <div></div>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2">
          <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" (click)="saveAndUpdate()" [disabled]="saving">
            <span *ngIf="saving" class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-1"></span>Save Draft
          </button>
          <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" (click)="nextStep()" [disabled]="!selectedRefundType">
            Next <i class="bi bi-arrow-right ms-1"></i>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- STEP 2: SOURCES -->
    <div class="wizard-card" *ngIf="currentStep === 2">
      <div class="wizard-card-header"><i class="bi bi-database me-2"></i>Step 2 — Source Records</div>
      <div class="wizard-card-body">
        <div *ngIf="loadingSources" class="text-center py-4">
          <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
          <span class="ms-2 small">Loading…</span>
        </div>
        <div class="table-responsive" *ngIf="!loadingSources">
          <table class="table table-hover align-middle small source-table">
            <thead class="table-light">
              <tr>
                <th style="width:40px"></th>
                <th>Reference</th><th>Period</th>
                <th class="text-end">Tax Paid</th>
                <th class="text-end">Liability</th>
                <th class="text-end text-success">Excess</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              <tr *ngFor="let s of eligibleSources"
                [class.source-row--selected]="isSourceSelected(s.id)"
                (click)="toggleSource(s.id)" style="cursor:pointer">
                <td>
                  <input type="checkbox" class="form-check-input"
                    [checked]="isSourceSelected(s.id)" (change)="toggleSource(s.id)">
                </td>
                <td class="fw-semibold">{{ s.reference }}</td>
                <td class="text-muted">{{ s.periodLabel }}</td>
                <td class="text-end">{{ formatCurrency(s.taxPaid) }}</td>
                <td class="text-end">{{ formatCurrency(s.taxLiability) }}</td>
                <td class="text-end fw-semibold text-success">{{ formatCurrency(s.excessAmount) }}</td>
              </tr>
              <tr *ngIf="eligibleSources.length === 0 && !loadingSources">
                <td colspan="6" class="text-center text-muted py-3 small">No eligible source records found.</td>
              </tr>
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-footer">
        <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" (click)="prevStep()"><i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i>Back</button>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2">
          <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" (click)="saveAndUpdate()">Save Draft</button>
          <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" (click)="nextStep()" [disabled]="selectedSourceIds.size === 0">
            Next <i class="bi bi-arrow-right ms-1"></i>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- STEP 3: CALCULATION -->
    <div class="wizard-card" *ngIf="currentStep === 3">
      <div class="wizard-card-header"><i class="bi bi-calculator me-2"></i>Step 3 — Calculation</div>
      <div class="wizard-card-body">
        <div *ngIf="!calculation" class="text-center py-4">
          <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
        </div>
        <div *ngIf="calculation">
          <div class="calc-box mb-3">
            <div class="calc-row"><span>Total Tax Paid</span><span>{{ formatCurrency(calculation.totalTaxPaid) }}</span></div>
            <div class="calc-row"><span>Total Tax Liability</span><span>{{ formatCurrency(calculation.totalTaxLiability) }}</span></div>
            <div class="calc-row"><span>Previously Claimed</span><span>{{ formatCurrency(calculation.previouslyClaimed) }}</span></div>
            <div class="calc-divider"></div>
            <div class="calc-total-row">
              <span class="fw-semibold">Max Eligible Refund</span>
              <span class="text-success fw-bold fs-5">{{ formatCurrency(calculation.eligibleRefundAmount) }}</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="row">
            <div class="col-md-5">
              <label class="form-label small fw-semibold">Requested Amount <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
              <div class="input-group input-group-sm">
                <span class="input-group-text">৳</span>
                <input type="number" class="form-control" [(ngModel)]="requestedAmount"
                  [max]="calculation.eligibleRefundAmount" min="1"
                  [class.is-invalid]="amountExceedsEligible">
              </div>
              <div *ngIf="amountExceedsEligible" class="text-danger small mt-1">
                Cannot exceed {{ formatCurrency(calculation.eligibleRefundAmount) }}.
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-footer">
        <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" (click)="prevStep()"><i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i>Back</button>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2">
          <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" (click)="saveAndUpdate()">Save Draft</button>
          <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" (click)="nextStep()" [disabled]="!canProceed()">
            Next <i class="bi bi-arrow-right ms-1"></i>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- STEP 4: BANK -->
    <div class="wizard-card" *ngIf="currentStep === 4">
      <div class="wizard-card-header"><i class="bi bi-bank2 me-2"></i>Step 4 — Bank Information</div>
      <div class="wizard-card-body">
        <form [formGroup]="bankForm" novalidate>
          <div class="row g-3">
            <div class="col-md-6">
              <label class="form-label small fw-semibold">Bank Name <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
              <input formControlName="bankName" class="form-control form-control-sm"
                [class.is-invalid]="isFieldInvalid('bankName')">
              <div class="invalid-feedback">Required.</div>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-6">
              <label class="form-label small fw-semibold">Branch Name <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
              <input formControlName="bankBranch" class="form-control form-control-sm"
                [class.is-invalid]="isFieldInvalid('bankBranch')">
              <div class="invalid-feedback">Required.</div>
            </div>
            <div class="col-12">
              <label class="form-label small fw-semibold">Account Holder Name <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
              <input formControlName="accountHolderName" class="form-control form-control-sm"
                [class.is-invalid]="isFieldInvalid('accountHolderName')">
              <div class="invalid-feedback">Required.</div>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-6">
              <label class="form-label small fw-semibold">Account Number <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
              <input formControlName="accountNumber" type="password" class="form-control form-control-sm"
                [class.is-invalid]="isFieldInvalid('accountNumber')" placeholder="13 digits" maxlength="13">
              <div class="invalid-feedback">Valid 13-digit account number required.</div>
            </div>
            <div class="col-md-6">
              <label class="form-label small fw-semibold">Routing Number <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
              <input formControlName="routingNumber" class="form-control form-control-sm"
                [class.is-invalid]="isFieldInvalid('routingNumber')" placeholder="9 digits" maxlength="9">
              <div class="invalid-feedback">Valid 9-digit routing number required.</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="mt-3">
            <button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm"
              (click)="validateBank()" [disabled]="bankForm.invalid || bankValidating">
              <span *ngIf="bankValidating" class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-1"></span>
              <i *ngIf="!bankValidating" class="bi bi-shield-check me-1"></i>
              {{ bankValidating ? 'Validating…' : 'Validate Account' }}
            </button>
            <span *ngIf="bankValidated" class="ms-2 text-success small fw-semibold">
              <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill me-1"></i>Validated
            </span>
            <span *ngIf="bankError" class="ms-2 text-danger small">{{ bankError }}</span>
          </div>
        </form>
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-footer">
        <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" (click)="prevStep()"><i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i>Back</button>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2">
          <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" (click)="saveAndUpdate()">Save Draft</button>
          <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" (click)="nextStep()" [disabled]="bankForm.invalid || !bankValidated">
            Next <i class="bi bi-arrow-right ms-1"></i>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- STEP 5: DOCUMENTS -->
    <div class="wizard-card" *ngIf="currentStep === 5">
      <div class="wizard-card-header"><i class="bi bi-paperclip me-2"></i>Step 5 — Documents</div>
      <div class="wizard-card-body">

        <!-- Existing docs -->
        <div *ngIf="existingDocuments.length > 0" class="mb-3">
          <div class="small fw-semibold text-muted mb-2">Previously Uploaded</div>
          <div class="uploaded-file-item" *ngFor="let d of existingDocuments">
            <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf text-danger fs-5"></i>
            <div class="flex-grow-1">
              <div class="small fw-semibold">{{ d.name }}</div>
              <div class="text-muted" style="font-size:.72rem">{{ getDocTypeLabel(d.type) }}</div>
            </div>
            <button class="btn btn-outline-danger btn-sm py-0 px-2" (click)="removeExistingDoc(d.id)">
              <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- New upload -->
        <div class="row g-2 align-items-end mb-2">
          <div class="col-md-5">
            <label class="form-label small fw-semibold">Document Type</label>
            <select class="form-select form-select-sm" [(ngModel)]="selectedDocType">
              <option *ngFor="let d of documentTypes" [value]="d.value">
                {{ d.label }}{{ d.required ? ' *' : '' }}
              </option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-5">
            <label class="form-label small fw-semibold">Choose File</label>
            <input type="file" class="form-control form-control-sm"
              (change)="onFileSelect($event)" accept=".pdf,.jpg,.jpeg,.png">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div *ngIf="uploadError" class="alert alert-danger py-2 small">{{ uploadError }}</div>

        <div *ngFor="let f of uploadedFiles; let i = index" class="uploaded-file-item">
          <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf text-danger fs-5"></i>
          <div class="flex-grow-1">
            <div class="small fw-semibold">{{ f.name }}</div>
            <div class="text-muted" style="font-size:.72rem">{{ getDocTypeLabel(f.type) }} · {{ f.size }}</div>
          </div>
          <button class="btn btn-outline-danger btn-sm py-0 px-2" (click)="removeNewFile(i)">
            <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
          </button>
        </div>

        <div *ngIf="!hasRequiredDocuments()" class="alert alert-warning py-2 small mt-2">
          <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle me-1"></i>Bank Statement is required.
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-footer">
        <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" (click)="prevStep()"><i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i>Back</button>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2">
          <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" (click)="saveAndUpdate()">Save Draft</button>
          <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" (click)="nextStep()" [disabled]="!hasRequiredDocuments()">
            Next <i class="bi bi-arrow-right ms-1"></i>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- STEP 6: REVIEW -->
    <div class="wizard-card" *ngIf="currentStep === 6">
      <div class="wizard-card-header"><i class="bi bi-clipboard2-check me-2"></i>Step 6 — Review &amp; Submit</div>
      <div class="wizard-card-body">
        <div class="row g-3 mb-3">
          <div class="col-md-6">
            <div class="review-section">
              <div class="review-section-title">Application</div>
              <div class="review-row"><span>Refund Type</span><span class="fw-semibold">{{ selectedRefundType }}</span></div>
              <div class="review-row"><span>Sources Selected</span><span>{{ selectedSourceIds.size }}</span></div>
              <div class="review-row"><span>Requested</span><span class="fw-bold text-success">{{ formatCurrency(requestedAmount) }}</span></div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-6">
            <div class="review-section">
              <div class="review-section-title">Bank</div>
              <div class="review-row"><span>Bank</span><span>{{ bankForm.value.bankName }}</span></div>
              <div class="review-row"><span>Account</span><span>████ {{ bankForm.value.accountNumber?.slice(-4) }}</span></div>
              <div class="review-row"><span>Validated</span><span class="text-success"><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill me-1"></i>Yes</span></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="declaration-box">
          <div class="form-check">
            <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" id="decl" [(ngModel)]="declarationAgreed">
            <label class="form-check-label small" for="decl">
              I declare that all information provided is true, accurate, and complete. I understand that false
              information may result in penalties under applicable tax laws.
            </label>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-footer">
        <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" (click)="prevStep()"><i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i>Back</button>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2">
          <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" (click)="saveAndUpdate()">Save Draft</button>
          <button class="btn btn-success btn-sm" (click)="submitRefund()"
            [disabled]="!declarationAgreed || submitting">
            <span *ngIf="submitting" class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-1"></span>
            <i *ngIf="!submitting" class="bi bi-send me-1"></i>
            {{ submitting ? 'Submitting…' : 'Submit Application' }}
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div><!-- /!loading -->
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/refund-management/pages/refund-view/refund-view.component.css
```css
.page-title { font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 600; }
⋮----
/* ─── Status Banner ─────────────────────────────── */
.status-banner {
.status-banner--info    { background: #fff8e1; border-color: #ffe082; }
.status-banner--success { background: #f0f9f0; border-color: #a3c97a; }
.status-banner--danger  { background: #fff5f5; border-color: #f09595; }
⋮----
/* ─── Detail Card ───────────────────────────────── */
.detail-card {
⋮----
.detail-card-header {
⋮----
.detail-card-body { padding: 16px; }
⋮----
/* ─── Detail Grid ───────────────────────────────── */
.detail-grid {
⋮----
.detail-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
⋮----
.detail-item { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; }
.detail-label { font-size: 0.70rem; color: #6c757d; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .4px; }
.detail-value { font-size: 0.85rem; color: #1a1a1a; }
⋮----
/* ─── Document item ─────────────────────────────── */
.doc-item {
.doc-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
⋮----
/* ─── Table tweaks ──────────────────────────────── */
.table th { font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 600; color: #6c757d;
.table td { font-size: 0.82rem; }
```

## File: src/app/features/refund-management/services/refund.service.ts

```typescript
import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
import { HttpClient, HttpParams } from '@angular/common/http';
import { Observable } from 'rxjs';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '../../../core/constants/api.constants';
import { RefundFilterRequest, PagedResponse, RefundSummary, RefundDetail, CreateRefundRequest, RespondRequest, RefundStatusHistory, EligibleSourceRecord, RefundCalculation, BankDetails, RefundDocument } from 'src/app/models/refund.model';
⋮----
export class RefundService
⋮----
constructor(private http: HttpClient)
⋮----
// ── Taxpayer/Officer my refunds ────────────────────────────────
⋮----
getMyRefunds(
    filter: RefundFilterRequest,
): Observable<PagedResponse<RefundSummary>>
⋮----
getById(id: number): Observable<RefundDetail>
⋮----
create(request: CreateRefundRequest): Observable<RefundDetail>
⋮----
update(id: number, request: CreateRefundRequest): Observable<RefundDetail>
⋮----
submit(id: number): Observable<RefundDetail>
⋮----
cancel(id: number): Observable<void>
⋮----
respond(id: number, req: RespondRequest): Observable<RefundDetail>
⋮----
updateStatus(id: number, req: any): Observable<RefundDetail>
⋮----
getStatusHistory(id: number): Observable<RefundStatusHistory[]>
⋮----
// ── Source eligibility
// taxpayerId is optional:
//   - Taxpayer role: omit → backend resolves from JWT
//   - Officer role:  pass selected taxpayer's id as query param
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
⋮----
getEligibleItrSources(
    taxpayerId?: number,
): Observable<EligibleSourceRecord[]>
⋮----
getEligibleAitSources(
    taxpayerId?: number,
): Observable<EligibleSourceRecord[]>
⋮----
getEligibleVatSources(
    taxpayerId?: number,
): Observable<EligibleSourceRecord[]>
⋮----
getEligiblePaymentSources(
    taxpayerId?: number,
): Observable<EligibleSourceRecord[]>
⋮----
calculateRefund(
    sourceType: string,
    sourceRecordIds: number[],
    taxpayerId?: number,
): Observable<RefundCalculation>
⋮----
validateBankAccount(
    d: BankDetails,
): Observable<
⋮----
// ── Documents ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
⋮----
uploadDocument(
    id: number,
    file: File,
    documentType: string,
): Observable<RefundDocument>
⋮----
getDocumentDownloadUrl(
    refundId: number,
    docId: number,
): Observable<
⋮----
deleteDocument(refundId: number, docId: number): Observable<void>
⋮----
// ── Queues ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
⋮----
getOfficerQueue(): Observable<RefundSummary[]>
getSupervisorQueue(): Observable<RefundSummary[]>
getFinanceQueue(): Observable<RefundSummary[]>
⋮----
getFiscalYears(): Observable<
    { id: number; name: string; isCurrent: boolean }[]
  > {
    return this.http.get<{ id: number; name: string; isCurrent: boolean }[]>(
      API_ENDPOINTS.FISCAL_YEARS.ACTIVE,
    );
```

## File: src/app/features/taxable-products/pages/taxable-product-create/taxable-product-create.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Add Taxable Product</h4>
    <p>Register a new product with HS code and tax structure.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to List
  </button>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isMasterDataLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
  <p>Loading product master data...</p>
</div>

<div class="form-card" *ngIf="!isMasterDataLoading" [formGroup]="productForm">

  <!-- Section 1: Product Identity -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-box-seam-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Product Identity</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Basic product information and HS code</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Product Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="e.g. Premium Rice"
            formControlName="productName" />
        </div>
        <span class="field-error"
          *ngIf="f['productName'].touched && f['productName'].hasError('required')">
          Product name is required.
        </span>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">HS Code</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="e.g. 1006.30"
            formControlName="hsCode" />
        </div>
        <span class="field-error"
          *ngIf="f['hsCode'].touched && f['hsCode'].hasError('required')">
          HS code is required.
        </span>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Category</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-grid-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="category">
            <option value="">Select category</option>
            <option *ngFor="let cat of categories" [value]="cat">{{ cat }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <span class="field-error"
          *ngIf="f['category'].touched && f['category'].hasError('required')">
          Category is required.
        </span>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Unit</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-rulers input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="unit">
            <option value="">Select unit</option>
            <option *ngFor="let u of units" [value]="u">{{ u }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <span class="field-error"
          *ngIf="f['unit'].touched && f['unit'].hasError('required')">
          Unit is required.
        </span>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: Tax Configuration -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon teal">
        <i class="bi bi-percent"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Tax Configuration</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Link a tax structure — rate is auto-determined</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Tax Structure</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-diagram-3-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select"
            formControlName="taxStructureId"
            (change)="onTaxStructureChange()">
            <option [ngValue]="null">Select tax structure</option>
            <option *ngFor="let ts of taxStructures" [value]="ts.id">
              {{ ts.taxName }}
            </option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <span class="field-error"
          *ngIf="f['taxStructureId'].touched && f['taxStructureId'].hasError('required')">
          Tax structure is required.
        </span>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Tax Rate (Preview)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calculator input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            [value]="selectedTaxStructure
              ? (selectedTaxRate + '% — ' + selectedTaxType)
              : 'Select a tax structure to preview'"
            readonly />
        </div>
        <span class="field-hint">Automatically determined by the selected tax structure.</span>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 3: Additional Info -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon orange">
        <i class="bi bi-chat-text-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Additional Info</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Optional description and product status</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Description</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea"
            placeholder="Optional product description..."
            formControlName="description"
            rows="3"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="status">
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Form Actions -->
  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" type="button" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-reset" type="button" (click)="onReset()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise"></i> Reset
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" type="button"
      (click)="onSubmit()"
      [disabled]="isLoading || productForm.invalid">
      <span *ngIf="!isLoading">
        <i class="bi bi-box-seam-fill"></i> Save Product
      </span>
      <span *ngIf="isLoading">
        <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span> Saving...
      </span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

```css
.form-section { padding: 18px 16px; }
.section-divider { margin: 0 16px; }
.form-actions { padding: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.btn-submit { width: 100%; justify-content: center; }
```

## File: src/app/features/taxable-products/pages/taxable-product-edit/taxable-product-edit.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Edit Taxable Product</h4>
    <p>Update product information and tax configuration.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to List
  </button>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="initialising">
  <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
  <p>Loading product data…</p>
</div>

<div class="form-card" *ngIf="!initialising" [formGroup]="productForm">

  <!-- Section 1: Product Identity -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-box-seam-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Product Identity</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Basic product information and HS code</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Product Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="e.g. Premium Rice"
            formControlName="productName" />
        </div>
        <span class="field-error"
          *ngIf="f['productName'].touched && f['productName'].hasError('required')">
          Product name is required.
        </span>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">HS Code</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="e.g. 1006.30"
            formControlName="hsCode" />
        </div>
        <span class="field-error"
          *ngIf="f['hsCode'].touched && f['hsCode'].hasError('required')">
          HS code is required.
        </span>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Category</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-grid-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="category">
            <option value="">Select category</option>
            <option *ngFor="let cat of categories" [value]="cat">{{ cat }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <span class="field-error"
          *ngIf="f['category'].touched && f['category'].hasError('required')">
          Category is required.
        </span>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Unit</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-rulers input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="unit">
            <option value="">Select unit</option>
            <option *ngFor="let u of units" [value]="u">{{ u }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <span class="field-error"
          *ngIf="f['unit'].touched && f['unit'].hasError('required')">
          Unit is required.
        </span>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: Tax Configuration -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon teal">
        <i class="bi bi-percent"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Tax Configuration</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Link a tax structure — rate is auto-determined</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Tax Structure</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-diagram-3-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select"
            formControlName="taxStructureId"
            (change)="onTaxStructureChange($any($event.target).value)">
            <option [ngValue]="null">Select tax structure</option>
            <option *ngFor="let ts of taxStructures" [value]="ts.id">
              {{ ts.taxName }}
            </option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <span class="field-error"
          *ngIf="f['taxStructureId'].touched && f['taxStructureId'].hasError('required')">
          Tax structure is required.
        </span>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Tax Rate (Preview)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calculator input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            [value]="taxRatePreview !== null
              ? (taxRatePreview + '% — ' + taxTypePreview)
              : 'Select a tax structure to preview'"
            readonly />
        </div>
        <span class="field-hint">Automatically determined by the selected tax structure.</span>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 3: Additional Info -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon orange">
        <i class="bi bi-chat-text-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Additional Info</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Optional description and product status</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Description</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea"
            placeholder="Optional product description..."
            formControlName="description"
            rows="3"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="status">
            <option value="Active">Active</option>
            <option value="Inactive">Inactive</option>
            <option value="Restricted">Restricted</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Form Actions -->
  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" type="button" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="loading">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" type="button"
      (click)="onSubmit()"
      [disabled]="loading || productForm.invalid">
      <span *ngIf="!loading">
        <i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Update Product
      </span>
      <span *ngIf="loading">
        <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span> Updating…
      </span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/taxable-products/pages/taxable-product-list/taxable-product-list.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Taxable Products</h4>
    <p>Manage all taxable products with HS codes and tax rates.</p>
  </div>
  <a *canDo="'create'" routerLink="/taxable-products/create"
     class="btn-add-primary desktop-add-btn">
    <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i> Add Product
  </a>
</div>

<!-- Stats Row -->
<div class="stats-row" *ngIf="!isLoading">
  <div class="stat-card">
    <div class="sc-icon blue"><i class="bi bi-box-seam-fill"></i></div>
    <div>
      <div class="sc-label">Total Products</div>
      <div class="sc-value">{{ products.length }}</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-card highlight">
    <div class="sc-icon green"><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i></div>
    <div>
      <div class="sc-label">Active</div>
      <div class="sc-value">{{ activeCount }}</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-card">
    <div class="sc-icon gray"><i class="bi bi-slash-circle-fill"></i></div>
    <div>
      <div class="sc-label">Inactive</div>
      <div class="sc-value">{{ inactiveCount }}</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat-card">
    <div class="sc-icon amber"><i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i></div>
    <div>
      <div class="sc-label">Restricted</div>
      <div class="sc-value">{{ restrictedCount }}</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input type="text" placeholder="Search by name, HS code, category, tax type..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm" />
      </div>
      <button *canDo="'export'" class="btn-export" (click)="exportProducts()">
        <i class="bi bi-download"></i><span>Export</span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading products...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Desktop Table -->
  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>Code</th>
          <th>Product</th>
          <th>HS Code</th>
          <th>Category</th>
          <th>Tax Type</th>
          <th>Tax Rate</th>
          <th>Unit</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Actions</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let p of filtered; let i = index">
          <td>{{ i + 1 }}</td>
          <td><span class="prod-code">{{ p.productCode }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar">
                <i [class]="getCategoryIcon(p.category)"></i>
              </div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ p.productName }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ (p.description || '') | slice:0:35 }}{{ (p.description?.length ?? 0) > 35 ? '...' : '' }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>
          <td><span class="hs-code">{{ p.hsCode }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <span class="cat-pill">
              <i [class]="getCategoryIcon(p.category)"></i>
              {{ p.category }}
            </span>
          </td>
          <td><span class="tax-type-badge">{{ p.taxType }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <span class="rate-chip" [class.zero-rate]="p.taxRate === 0">
              {{ p.taxRate === 0 ? 'Zero' : p.taxRate + '%' }}
            </span>
          </td>
          <td><span class="unit-badge">{{ p.unit }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(p.status)">{{ p.status }}</span>
          </td>
          <td>
            <div class="action-btns">
              <button class="btn-view" (click)="view(p.id)"><i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View</button>
              <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit" (click)="edit(p.id)"><i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit</button>
              <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_COMMISSIONER']" class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(p.id)"><i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i></button>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
        <tr *ngIf="filtered.length === 0">
          <td colspan="10">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-box-seam"></i>
              <p>No products found.</p>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Cards -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" style="padding:12px;" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let p of filtered">
      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar"><i [class]="getCategoryIcon(p.category)"></i></div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ p.productName }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ p.hsCode }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(p.status)">{{ p.status }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Category</label><span>{{ p.category }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Tax Type</label><span>{{ p.taxType }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Tax Rate</label>
          <span class="rate-chip" [class.zero-rate]="p.taxRate === 0">
            {{ p.taxRate === 0 ? 'Zero Rated' : p.taxRate + '%' }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Unit</label><span>{{ p.unit }}</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-actions">
        <button class="btn-view" (click)="view(p.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
        </button>
        <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit" (click)="edit(p.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
        </button>
        <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_COMMISSIONER']"
          class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(p.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filtered.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-box-seam"></i><p>No products found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<button *canDo="'create'" class="fab-btn" routerLink="/taxable-products/create">
  <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i>
</button>

<!-- Delete Confirmation Modal -->
<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showDeleteModal">
  <div class="modal-card">
    <div class="modal-accent error"></div>
    <div class="modal-icon-wrap error">
      <i class="bi bi-trash-fill" style="color:#A32D2D; font-size:22px;"></i>
    </div>
    <p class="modal-title">Delete Taxable Product?</p>
    <p class="modal-msg">
      This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this taxable product?
    </p>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn-modal-cancel" (click)="cancelDelete()">Cancel</button>
      <button class="btn-modal-confirm error" (click)="confirmDeleteExecute()">
        <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/tin-management/pages/tin-edit/tin-edit.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Edit TIN</h4>
    <p>Update TIN record details.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to View
  </button>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
</div>

<div class="form-card" *ngIf="!isLoading">

  <div class="edit-banner">
    <i class="bi bi-pencil-square"></i>
    Editing: <strong>{{ form.taxpayerName }}</strong>
    <span class="banner-tin">{{ form.tinNumber }}</span>
  </div>

  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Taxpayer Information</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Name, category and identification</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label required">Taxpayer Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.taxpayerName" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">TIN Category</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.tinCategory">
            <option *ngFor="let c of tinCategories" [value]="c">{{ c }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Issue Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.issuedDate" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <ng-container *ngIf="isIndividual">
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">National ID</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-card-text input-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.nid" />
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Passport No.</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-passport input-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.passportNo" />
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Date of Birth</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
            <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.dateOfBirth" />
          </div>
        </div>
      </ng-container>

      <div class="form-group" *ngIf="isCompany">
        <label class="form-label">Incorporation Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.incorporationDate" />
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon orange">
        <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Location & Tax Authority</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Select division → district → tax zone → tax circle</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Division</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-map-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="selectedDivisionId" (ngModelChange)="onDivisionChange()">
            <option [ngValue]="null">Select Division</option>
            <option *ngFor="let d of divisions" [ngValue]="d.id">{{ d.name }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">District</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-fill input-icon"></i>
          <span *ngIf="loadingDistricts" class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm dropdown-spinner"></span>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.district" (ngModelChange)="onDistrictChange()"
            [disabled]="!selectedDivisionId || loadingDistricts">
            <option value="">Select District</option>
            <option *ngFor="let d of districts" [value]="d.name">{{ d.name }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Tax Zone</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-grid-fill input-icon"></i>
          <span *ngIf="loadingZones" class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm dropdown-spinner"></span>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.taxZone" (ngModelChange)="onZoneChange()"
            [disabled]="!form.district || loadingZones">
            <option value="">Select Tax Zone</option>
            <option *ngFor="let z of taxZones" [value]="z.name">{{ z.name }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Tax Circle</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-circle-fill input-icon"></i>
          <span *ngIf="loadingCircles" class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm dropdown-spinner"></span>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.taxCircle"
            [disabled]="!form.taxZone || loadingCircles">
            <option value="">Select Tax Circle</option>
            <option *ngFor="let c of taxCircles" [value]="c.name">{{ c.name }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Email</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="email" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.email" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Phone</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-telephone-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.phone" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Address</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" [(ngModel)]="form.address" rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon purple">
        <i class="bi bi-shield-lock-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Status & Remarks</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Account status and optional notes</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">TIN Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.status">
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" placeholder="Optional remarks..." [(ngModel)]="form.remarks"
            rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isSaving">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isSaving || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isSaving"><i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Update TIN</span>
      <span *ngIf="isSaving"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Updating...</span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```
