## File: src/app/features/business-registration/pages/business-create/business-create.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Register Business</h4>
    <p>Register a new business entity.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to List
  </button>
</div>

<div class="form-card">

  <!-- Section 0: Taxpayer Search (TIN-style) -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon search-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Find Taxpayer</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Search by TIN number or name — details will auto-fill</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="search-row">
      <div class="input-wrap search-input-wrap">
        <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill input-icon"></i>
        <input type="text" class="form-input"
          placeholder="Enter TIN number or taxpayer name..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchQuery"
          (keyup.enter)="searchTaxpayer()"
          [disabled]="isAutoFilled" />
        <button *ngIf="isAutoFilled" class="clear-btn" (click)="clearTaxpayer()">
          <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
        </button>
      </div>
      <button class="btn-search" (click)="searchTaxpayer()" [disabled]="isSearching || isAutoFilled">
        <span *ngIf="!isSearching"><i class="bi bi-search"></i> Search</span>
        <span *ngIf="isSearching"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span> Searching...</span>
      </button>
    </div>

    <!-- Search Results List -->
    <div class="search-results" *ngIf="showResults && searchResults.length > 0">
      <div class="result-item" *ngFor="let taxpayer of searchResults" (click)="selectTaxpayer(taxpayer)">
        <div class="result-avatar"><i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i></div>
        <div class="result-info">
          <span class="result-name">{{ taxpayer.fullName }}</span>
          <span class="result-meta">TIN: {{ taxpayer.tinNumber }}</span>
        </div>
        <span class="result-badge">Select</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- No results -->
    <div class="no-result-note" *ngIf="hasSearched && searchResults.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-info-circle"></i> No taxpayer found. Please check the TIN or name.
    </div>

    <!-- Selected Taxpayer Card -->
    <div class="selected-card" *ngIf="isAutoFilled && selectedTaxpayer">
      <div class="selected-card-left">
        <div class="selected-avatar"><i class="bi bi-person-check-fill"></i></div>
        <div>
          <p class="selected-name">{{ selectedTaxpayer.fullName }}</p>
          <p class="selected-meta">TIN: {{ selectedTaxpayer.tinNumber }}</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="autofill-tag"><i class="bi bi-lightning-charge-fill"></i> Auto-filled</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 1: Business Identity -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-building-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Business Identity</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Basic business identification details</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label required">Business Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-building input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="Enter business name"
            [(ngModel)]="form.businessName" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- TIN — auto fills from taxpayer -->
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">TIN Number <span class="auto-label">Auto</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap" [class.locked]="isAutoFilled">
          <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input auto-field"
            placeholder="Auto from taxpayer"
            [(ngModel)]="form.tinNumber" readonly />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon" *ngIf="isAutoFilled"></i>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Owner — auto fills from taxpayer -->
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Owner Name <span class="auto-label">Auto</span></label>
        <div class="input-wrap" [class.locked]="isAutoFilled">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input auto-field"
            placeholder="Auto from taxpayer"
            [(ngModel)]="form.ownerName" readonly />
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill lock-icon" *ngIf="isAutoFilled"></i>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Business Type</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-diagram-3-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.businessTypeId">
            <option [ngValue]="0">Select Type</option>
            <option *ngFor="let item of businessTypes" [ngValue]="item.id">
              {{ item.typeName }}
            </option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Business Category</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.businessCategoryId">
            <option [ngValue]="0">Select Category</option>
            <option *ngFor="let item of businessCategories" [ngValue]="item.id">
              {{ item.categoryName }}
            </option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.status">
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: License & Registration -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon purple">
        <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">License & Registration</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Trade license, BIN and dates</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Trade License No.</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-journal-text input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="e.g. TL-44821"
            [(ngModel)]="form.tradeLicenseNo" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Incorporation Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.incorporationDate" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Registration Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.registrationDate" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Trade License Expiry Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-x input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.expiryDate" />
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 3: Contact & Location -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon teal">
        <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Contact & Location</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Contact details and business address</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Email</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="email" class="form-input"
            placeholder="business@example.com"
            [(ngModel)]="form.email" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Phone</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-telephone-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input"
            placeholder="01xxx-xxxxxx"
            [(ngModel)]="form.phone" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Division</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-map-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select"
            [(ngModel)]="form.divisionId"
            (ngModelChange)="onDivisionChange()">
            <option [ngValue]="0">Select Division</option>
            <option *ngFor="let d of divisions" [ngValue]="d.id">{{ d.name }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">District</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select"
            [(ngModel)]="form.districtId"
            [disabled]="!form.divisionId || districts.length === 0">
            <option [ngValue]="0">
              {{ !form.divisionId ? 'Select division first' : districts.length === 0 ? 'Loading...' : 'Select District' }}
            </option>
            <option *ngFor="let d of districts" [ngValue]="d.id">{{ d.name }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Full Address</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea"
            placeholder="Enter full business address..."
            [(ngModel)]="form.address" rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 4: Financial & Workforce -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon orange">
        <i class="bi bi-cash-stack"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Financial & Workforce</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Turnover and employee information</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Annual Turnover (৳)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input"
            placeholder="0"
            [(ngModel)]="form.annualTurnover" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Number of Employees</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-people-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input"
            placeholder="0"
            [(ngModel)]="form.numberOfEmployees" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea"
            placeholder="Optional remarks..."
            [(ngModel)]="form.remarks" rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Actions -->
  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-reset" (click)="onReset()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise"></i> Reset
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()"
      [disabled]="isLoading || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isLoading">
        <i class="bi bi-building-fill"></i> Register Business
      </span>
      <span *ngIf="isLoading">
        <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Registering...
      </span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/income-tax-returns/pages/income-tax-return-list/income-tax-return-list.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Income Tax Returns</h4>
    <p>Manage and process all income tax return filings.</p>
  </div>
  <a *canDo="'create'" routerLink="/income-tax-returns/create"
     class="btn-add-primary desktop-add-btn">
    <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i> File Return
  </a>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <!-- Status Filter Tabs -->
  <div class="status-tabs">
    <button class="stab"
      [class.active]="filterStatus === ''"
      (click)="filterStatus = ''">
      All <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('') }}</span>
    </button>
    <button class="stab submitted"
      [class.active]="filterStatus === 'Submitted'"
      (click)="filterStatus = 'Submitted'">
      Submitted <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('Submitted') }}</span>
    </button>
    <button class="stab review"
      [class.active]="filterStatus === 'Under Review'"
      (click)="filterStatus = 'Under Review'">
      Under Review <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('Under Review') }}</span>
    </button>
    <button class="stab accepted"
      [class.active]="filterStatus === 'Accepted'"
      (click)="filterStatus = 'Accepted'">
      Accepted <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('Accepted') }}</span>
    </button>
    <button class="stab rejected"
      [class.active]="filterStatus === 'Rejected'"
      (click)="filterStatus = 'Rejected'">
      Rejected <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('Rejected') }}</span>
    </button>
    <button class="stab draft"
      [class.active]="filterStatus === 'Draft'"
      (click)="filterStatus = 'Draft'">
      Draft <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('Draft') }}</span>
    </button>
    <button class="stab overdue"
      [class.active]="filterStatus === 'Overdue'"
      (click)="filterStatus = 'Overdue'">
      Overdue <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('Overdue') }}</span>
    </button>
  </div>

  <!-- Search Bar -->
  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input type="text"
          placeholder="Search by return no, TIN, taxpayer, category, year..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm" />
      </div>
      <button class="btn btn-export" (click)="onExport()" [disabled]="isExporting">
        <i class="bi" [ngClass]="isExporting ? 'bi-hourglass-split spin' : 'bi-file-earmark-excel'"></i> 
        {{ isExporting ? 'Exporting...' : 'Export to CSV' }}
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm" style="color:#7c3aed"></div>
    <span>Loading income tax returns...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Desktop Table -->
  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>Return No</th>
          <th>Taxpayer</th>
          <th>Category</th>
          <th>Assmnt Year</th>
          <th>Taxable Income</th>
          <th>Gross Tax</th>
          <th>Net Payable</th>
          <th>Tax Paid</th>
          <th>Refundable</th>
          <th>Due Date</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Actions</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let r of filtered; let i = index">
          <td>{{ i + 1 }}</td>

          <td><span class="return-code">{{ r.returnNo }}</span></td>

          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar itr-avatar">
                <i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i>
              </div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ r.taxpayerName }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ r.tinNumber }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>

          <td>
            <span class="cat-badge" [ngClass]="getCategoryClass(r.itrCategory)">
              {{ r.itrCategory }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>
            <div class="year-cell">
              <span class="year-badge">{{ r.assessmentYear }}</span>
              <span class="income-year">{{ r.incomeYear }}</span>
            </div>
          </td>

          <td class="amt-cell">{{ formatCurrency(taxableIncomeOf(r)) }}</td>
          <td class="amt-cell gross">{{ formatCurrency(r.grossTax) }}</td>
          <td class="amt-cell net">{{ formatCurrency(netPayableOf(r)) }}</td>
          <td class="amt-cell paid">{{ formatCurrency(r.taxPaid) }}</td>

          <td>
            <span *ngIf="refundableOf(r) > 0" class="refund-badge">
              {{ formatCurrency(refundableOf(r)) }}
            </span>
            <span *ngIf="refundableOf(r) === 0" class="text-muted">-</span>
          </td>

          <td>{{ r.dueDate }}</td>

          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">
              {{ r.status }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>
            <div class="action-btns">
              <button class="btn-view" (click)="view(r.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
              </button>
              <button *canDo="'edit'"
                class="btn-edit"
                [disabled]="r.status === 'Accepted' || r.status === 'Under Review'"
                (click)="edit(r.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
              </button>
              <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_COMMISSIONER']"
                class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(r.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i>
              </button>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>

        <tr *ngIf="filtered.length === 0">
          <td colspan="13">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i>
              <p>No income tax returns found.</p>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Cards -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" style="padding:12px;" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let r of filtered">
      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar itr-avatar">
            <i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ r.taxpayerName }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ r.returnNo }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">{{ r.status }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>TIN</label><span>{{ r.tinNumber }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Category</label>
          <span class="cat-badge" [ngClass]="getCategoryClass(r.itrCategory)">{{ r.itrCategory }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Assessment Year</label><span>{{ r.assessmentYear }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Taxable Income</label><span>{{ formatCurrency(taxableIncomeOf(r)) }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Net Payable</label><span class="net">{{ formatCurrency(netPayableOf(r)) }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Tax Paid</label><span class="paid">{{ formatCurrency(r.taxPaid) }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field" *ngIf="refundableOf(r) > 0">
          <label>Refundable</label>
          <span class="refund-badge">{{ formatCurrency(refundableOf(r)) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Due Date</label><span>{{ r.dueDate }}</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-actions">
        <button class="btn-view" (click)="view(r.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
        </button>
        <ng-container *ngIf="r.status === 'Draft' || r.status === 'Send Back'">
          <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit" (click)="edit(r.id)">
            <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
          </button>
        </ng-container>

        <ng-container *ngIf="r.status === 'Rejected'">
          <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-amend" (click)="edit(r.id)">
            <i class="bi bi-arrow-repeat"></i> Amend
          </button>
        </ng-container>
        <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_COMMISSIONER']"
          class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(r.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filtered.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i><p>No income tax returns found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<button *canDo="'create'" class="fab-btn" routerLink="/income-tax-returns/create">
  <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i>
</button>

<!-- Delete Confirmation Modal -->
<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showDeleteModal">
  <div class="modal-card">
    <div class="modal-accent error"></div>
    <div class="modal-icon-wrap error">
      <i class="bi bi-trash-fill" style="color:#A32D2D; font-size:22px;"></i>
    </div>
    <p class="modal-title">Delete Income Tax Return?</p>
      <p class="modal-msg">
        This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this return record?
      </p>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn-modal-cancel" (click)="cancelDelete()">Cancel</button>
      <button class="btn-modal-confirm error" (click)="confirmDeleteExecute()">
        <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/payments/pages/payment-edit/payment-edit.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Edit Payment</h4>
    <p>Update payment transaction details.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to View
  </button>
</div>

<!-- Loading -->
<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
  <p>Loading payment data...</p>
</div>

<div class="form-card" *ngIf="!isLoading && payment">

  <!-- TXN ID Banner -->
  <div class="edit-banner">
    <i class="bi bi-pencil-square"></i>
    Editing Transaction: <strong>{{ payment.transactionId }}</strong>
  </div>

  <!-- Section 1: Taxpayer Info -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Taxpayer Information</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">TIN and taxpayer identification</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">TIN Number</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="payment.tinNumber" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Taxpayer Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="payment.taxpayerName" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Payment Type</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="payment.paymentType" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ✅ Editable -->
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.status">
            <option *ngFor="let s of availableStatuses" [value]="s">
              {{ s }}
            </option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Return / Ref No.</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="payment.returnNo" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: Payment Details -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon teal">
        <i class="bi bi-credit-card-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Payment Details</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Amount, method and transaction info</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Amount (৳)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" [value]="payment.amount" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Payment Method</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-wallet2 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="payment.paymentMethod" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Reference No.</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-hash input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="payment.referenceNo" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Cheque No.</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-journal-text input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="payment.chequeNo" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Payment Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [value]="payment.paymentDate | date:'yyyy-MM-dd'" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Value Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [value]="payment.valueDate | date:'yyyy-MM-dd'" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 3: Bank Details -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon orange">
        <i class="bi bi-bank2"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Bank Details</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Bank, branch and account information</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Bank Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-bank input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="payment.bankName" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Branch</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="payment.bankBranch" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Account No.</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-credit-card input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [value]="payment.accountNo" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 4: Remarks -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon purple">
        <i class="bi bi-chat-text-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Remarks</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Optional notes</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks / Notes</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <!-- ✅ Editable -->
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" [(ngModel)]="form.remarks" rows="3"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Form Actions -->
  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isSaving">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>

    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isSaving || !isFormValid()">

      <span *ngIf="!isSaving">
        <i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Update Payment
      </span>

      <span *ngIf="isSaving">
        <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>
        Updating...
      </span>

    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/payments/pages/payment-view/payment-view.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Payment Details</h4>
    <p>Full transaction information.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="header-actions">
    <button class="btn-back" (click)="onBack()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back
    </button>
    <ng-container *ngIf="canEdit()">
      <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit-top" (click)="onEdit()">
        <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
      </button>
    </ng-container>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Loading -->
<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
</div>

<ng-container *ngIf="!isLoading && payment">

  <!-- Transaction Header Card -->
  <div class="view-header-card">
    <div class="txn-header-left">
      <div class="txn-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-credit-card-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="txn-id">{{ payment.transactionId }}</div>
        <div class="txn-meta">
          <span class="type-badge" [ngClass]="getTypeClass(payment.paymentType)">
            {{ payment.paymentType }}
          </span>
          <span class="txn-date">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> {{ payment.paymentDate }}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="txn-header-right">
      <div class="txn-amount">{{ formatCurrency(payment.amount) }}</div>
      <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(payment.status)">
        {{ payment.status }}
      </span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Details Grid -->
  <div class="details-grid">

    <!-- Taxpayer Info -->
    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
        <span>Taxpayer Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">TIN Number</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ payment.tinNumber }}</span></span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Taxpayer Name</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ payment.taxpayerName }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="payment.returnNo">
          <span class="detail-label">Return / Ref No.</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ payment.returnNo }}</span></span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Payment Info -->
    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-credit-card-fill"></i>
        <span>Payment Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Payment Type</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="type-badge" [ngClass]="getTypeClass(payment.paymentType)">
              {{ payment.paymentType }}
            </span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Payment Method</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ payment.paymentMethod }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Amount</span>
          <span class="detail-value amount-large">{{ formatCurrency(payment.amount) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Payment Date</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ payment.paymentDate }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Value Date</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ payment.valueDate }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Reference No.</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ payment.referenceNo }}</span></span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="payment.chequeNo">
          <span class="detail-label">Cheque No.</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ payment.chequeNo }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Bank Info -->
    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-bank2"></i>
        <span>Bank Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Bank Name</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ payment.bankName }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="payment.bankBranch">
          <span class="detail-label">Branch</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ payment.bankBranch }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="payment.accountNo">
          <span class="detail-label">Account No.</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ payment.accountNo }}</span></span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Processing Info -->
    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-person-gear"></i>
        <span>Processing Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Status</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(payment.status)">
              {{ payment.status }}
            </span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Processed By</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ payment.processedBy }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Created At</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ payment.createdAt }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="payment.remarks">
          <span class="detail-label">Remarks</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ payment.remarks }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

</ng-container>
```

## File: src/app/features/penalty-fines/pages/penalty-create/penalty-create.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Issue Penalty</h4>
    <p>Issue a new penalty or fine to a taxpayer.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to List
  </button>
</div>

<div class="alert-success" *ngIf="successMsg">
  <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> {{ successMsg }}
</div>
<div class="alert-error" *ngIf="errorMsg">
  <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ errorMsg }}
</div>

<div class="form-card">

  <!-- Taxpayer Search (replaces raw tinNumber/taxpayerName inputs) -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon"><i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i></div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Taxpayer</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Search and select the taxpayer</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label required">Find Taxpayer</label>
        <div class="search-row">
          <div class="input-wrap search-input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-search input-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="Enter NID, name or TIN..." [(ngModel)]="searchQuery"
              [disabled]="selectedTaxpayer !== null" (keyup.enter)="searchTaxpayer()" />
            <button *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer" class="clear-btn" (click)="clearTaxpayer()">
              <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
            </button>
          </div>
          <button class="btn-search" (click)="searchTaxpayer()" [disabled]="isSearching || selectedTaxpayer !== null">
            <span *ngIf="!isSearching"><i class="bi bi-search"></i> Search</span>
            <span *ngIf="isSearching"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span></span>
          </button>
        </div>
        <!-- Results -->
        <div class="search-results" *ngIf="showResults && searchResults.length > 0">
          <div class="result-item" *ngFor="let t of searchResults" (click)="selectTaxpayer(t)">
            <div class="result-avatar"><i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i></div>
            <div class="result-info">
              <span class="result-name">{{ getDisplayName(t) }}</span>
              <span class="result-meta">
                <span *ngIf="t.nid">NID: {{ t.nid }}</span>
                <span *ngIf="t.phone"> · {{ t.phone }}</span>
              </span>
            </div>
            <span class="result-badge">Select</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <!-- Selected -->
        <div class="selected-card" *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer">
          <div class="selected-card-left">
            <div class="selected-avatar"><i class="bi bi-person-check-fill"></i></div>
            <div>
              <p class="selected-name">{{ getDisplayName(selectedTaxpayer) }}</p>
              <p class="selected-meta">
                <span *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer.nid">NID: {{ selectedTaxpayer.nid }}</span>
                <span *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer.tinNumber"> · TIN: {{ selectedTaxpayer.tinNumber }}</span>
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="autofill-tag"><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Selected</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: Penalty Details -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon red"><i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i></div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Penalty Details</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Type, severity and amount</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Return / Reference No.</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="e.g. VAT-2024-00001" [(ngModel)]="form.returnNo" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Assessment Year</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.assessmentYear">
            <option *ngIf="assessmentYears.length === 0" value="">No fiscal years available</option>
            <option *ngFor="let y of assessmentYears" [value]="y.yearName">{{ y.yearName }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: Penalty Details -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon red">
        <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Penalty Details</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Type, severity and amount (interest auto-calculated at 15%)</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Penalty Type</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.penaltyType">
            <option value="">Select Type</option>
            <option *ngFor="let t of penaltyTypes" [value]="t">{{ t }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Severity</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-speedometer2 input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.severity">
            <option *ngFor="let s of severities" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Penalty Amount (৳)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" placeholder="0" [(ngModel)]="form.penaltyAmount"
            (ngModelChange)="onPenaltyChange()" />
        </div>
        <span class="field-hint" *ngIf="form.penaltyAmount > 0">
          ≈ {{ fmt(form.penaltyAmount) }}
        </span>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Interest Amount (15%)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-percent input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input calc-field" [value]="interestAmount" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Penalty Summary -->
    <div class="penalty-summary">
      <div class="ps-row">
        <span class="ps-label">Penalty Amount</span>
        <span class="ps-value penalty">{{ fmt(form.penaltyAmount) }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="ps-row">
        <span class="ps-label">Interest (15%)</span>
        <span class="ps-value interest">+ {{ fmt(interestAmount) }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="ps-divider"></div>
      <div class="ps-row total-row">
        <span class="ps-label total">Total Amount Due</span>
        <span class="ps-value total">{{ fmt(totalAmount) }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 3: Issuance -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon orange">
        <i class="bi bi-calendar-event-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Issuance Details</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Issue date, due date and issuing officer</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Issue Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.issueDate" (ngModelChange)="setDefaultDueDate()" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Due Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-x input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.dueDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label required">Issued By</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-badge input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.issuedBy">
            <option value="">Select Officer</option>
            <option *ngFor="let o of officers" [value]="o">{{ o }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 4: Description & Remarks -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon purple">
        <i class="bi bi-chat-text-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Description & Remarks</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Penalty reason and additional notes</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Description</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-file-text input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" placeholder="Describe the reason for this penalty..."
            [(ngModel)]="form.description" rows="3"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks / Notes</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" placeholder="Additional remarks..." [(ngModel)]="form.remarks"
            rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Form Actions -->
  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-reset" (click)="onReset()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise"></i> Reset
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit danger" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isLoading || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isLoading">
        <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> Issue Penalty
      </span>
      <span *ngIf="isLoading">
        <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>
        Issuing...
      </span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/public-registration/steps/step4-review/reg-step-review/reg-step-review.component.html
```html
<div class="step-body">

  <div class="step-intro">
    <h3 class="step-heading">Review your details</h3>
    <p class="step-sub">Please confirm everything below before submitting. Go back to correct any mistakes.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="review-grid">

    <!-- Account Type -->
    <div class="review-card">
      <div class="review-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
        <span>Account Type</span>
      </div>
      <div class="review-row">
        <span class="review-label">Type</span>
        <span class="review-value type-pill" [class.individual]="isIndividual" [class.company]="!isIndividual">
          <i [class]="isIndividual ? 'bi bi-person-fill' : 'bi bi-building-fill'"></i>
          {{ state.accountCategory }}
        </span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Credentials -->
    <div class="review-card">
      <div class="review-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-lock-fill"></i>
        <span>Account Credentials</span>
      </div>
      <div class="review-row"><span class="review-label">Full Name</span><span class="review-value fw-bold">{{ state.fullName }}</span></div>
      <div class="review-row"><span class="review-label">Email</span><span class="review-value">{{ state.email }}</span></div>
      <div class="review-row"><span class="review-label">Phone</span><span class="review-value">{{ state.phone }}</span></div>
      <div class="review-row"><span class="review-label">Password</span><span class="review-value pass-mask">{{ maskedPassword }}</span></div>
    </div>

    <!-- Identity — Individual -->
    <div class="review-card" *ngIf="isIndividual">
      <div class="review-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-credit-card-2-front-fill"></i>
        <span>Identity (Individual)</span>
      </div>
      <div class="review-row"><span class="review-label">NID Number</span><span class="review-value code-badge">{{ state.nid }}</span></div>
      <div class="review-row"><span class="review-label">Date of Birth</span><span class="review-value">{{ state.dateOfBirth }}</span></div>
      <div class="review-row"><span class="review-label">Gender</span><span class="review-value">{{ state.gender }}</span></div>
      <div class="review-row" *ngIf="state.profession">
        <span class="review-label">Profession</span>
        <span class="review-value">{{ state.profession }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Identity — Company -->
    <div class="review-card" *ngIf="!isIndividual">
      <div class="review-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-building-fill"></i>
        <span>Identity (Company)</span>
      </div>
      <div class="review-row"><span class="review-label">Company Name</span><span class="review-value fw-bold">{{ state.companyName }}</span></div>
      <div class="review-row"><span class="review-label">RJSC No.</span><span class="review-value code-badge">{{ state.rjscNo }}</span></div>
      <div class="review-row"><span class="review-label">Incorporation Date</span><span class="review-value">{{ state.incorporationDate }}</span></div>
      <div class="review-row" *ngIf="state.natureOfBusiness">
        <span class="review-label">Nature of Business</span>
        <span class="review-value">{{ state.natureOfBusiness }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="review-row"><span class="review-label">Authorized Person</span><span class="review-value">{{ state.authorizedPersonName }}</span></div>
      <div class="review-row"><span class="review-label">Authorized NID</span><span class="review-value code-badge">{{ state.authorizedPersonNid }}</span></div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- What happens next -->
  <div class="submit-info-box">
    <div class="sib-icon"><i class="bi bi-lightning-charge-fill"></i></div>
    <div>
      <p class="sib-title">What happens when you submit?</p>
      <ul class="sib-list">
        <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Your portal account is created with TAXPAYER access</li>
        <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> A verification code will be sent to your email</li>
        <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> After verification, an officer will review your application</li>
        <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> You will receive an approval or rejection email within 3-5 business days</li>
        <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> TIN will be issued upon approval</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="step-actions">
    <button type="button" class="btn-back" (click)="back.emit()" [disabled]="isSubmitting">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back
    </button>
    <button type="button" class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isSubmitting">
      <span *ngIf="!isSubmitting">
        <i class="bi bi-send-fill"></i> Submit Registration
      </span>
      <span *ngIf="isSubmitting">
        <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span> Registering...
      </span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```
