## File: src/app/features/refund-management/pages/refund-create/refund-create.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4><i class="bi bi-plus-circle"></i> New Refund Application</h4>
    <p>Complete all steps to submit your refund request</p>
  </div>
  <div class="header-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="cancel()">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg me-1"></i> Cancel
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <!-- ─── STEP 0: TAXPAYER SELECTION (Officer only) ──────── -->
  <div *ngIf="currentStep === 0" class="wizard-card">
    <div class="wizard-card-header">
      <i class="bi bi-person-search"></i> Select Taxpayer
      <span class="ms-2 td-sub">Search and select the taxpayer for whom you are creating this refund</span>
    </div>
    <div class="wizard-card-body">

      <!-- Reuse existing taxpayer-search component from VAT module -->
      <app-taxpayer-search
        [selectedTaxpayer]="selectedTaxpayer"
        (taxpayerSelected)="onTaxpayerSelected($event)"
        (taxpayerCleared)="onTaxpayerCleared()">
      </app-taxpayer-search>

      <!-- Selected taxpayer confirmation card -->
      <div *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer" class="taxpayer-confirm-card mt-3">
        <div class="taxpayer-confirm-header">
          <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill text-success me-2"></i>
          Taxpayer Selected
        </div>
        <div class="taxpayer-confirm-body">
          <div class="form-grid">
            <div class="form-field">
              <span class="form-label">Name</span>
              <span class="fw-semibold">
                {{ selectedTaxpayer.fullName || selectedTaxpayer.companyName || '—' }}
              </span>
            </div>
            <div class="form-field">
              <span class="form-label">TIN</span>
              <span class="code-badge">{{ selectedTaxpayer.tinNumber || '—' }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="form-field">
              <span class="form-label">Email</span>
              <span class="td-sub">{{ selectedTaxpayer.email || '—' }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="form-field">
              <span class="form-label">Type</span>
              <span class="cat-badge cat-standard">
                {{ selectedTaxpayer.taxpayerType?.typeName || '—' }}
              </span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
    <div class="wizard-card-footer">
      <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="cancel()">
        <i class="bi bi-x-lg me-1"></i> Cancel
      </button>
      <button class="btn-submit"
              (click)="confirmTaxpayerAndProceed()"
              [disabled]="!selectedTaxpayerId">
        Next: Select Refund Type <i class="bi bi-arrow-right ms-1"></i>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ─── STEPS 1–6 ────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <ng-container *ngIf="currentStep >= 1">

    <!-- Officer taxpayer banner -->
    <div *ngIf="isOfficerRole && selectedTaxpayer" class="officer-taxpayer-banner mb-3">
      <i class="bi bi-person-fill me-2"></i>
      Creating refund on behalf of:
      <strong class="ms-1">
        {{ selectedTaxpayer.fullName || selectedTaxpayer.companyName }}
      </strong>
      <span class="code-badge ms-2">{{ selectedTaxpayer.tinNumber }}</span>
      <button class="btn-cancel ms-auto" style="font-size:0.75rem;padding:3px 10px;"
              (click)="currentStep = 0">
        <i class="bi bi-pencil me-1"></i> Change
      </button>
    </div>

    <!-- Stepper -->
    <div class="stepper-wrapper mb-4" role="list" aria-label="Wizard steps">
      <div *ngFor="let label of stepLabels; let i = index"
           class="stepper-item"
           [class.active]="currentStep === i + 1"
           [class.completed]="currentStep > i + 1"
           role="listitem">
        <div class="stepper-circle" (click)="goToStep(i + 1)">
          <i *ngIf="currentStep > i + 1" class="bi bi-check-lg"></i>
          <span *ngIf="currentStep <= i + 1">{{ i + 1 }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="stepper-connector" *ngIf="i < stepLabels.length - 1"></div>
        <div class="stepper-label">{{ label }}</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Error -->
    <div *ngIf="errorMsg" class="alert alert-danger d-flex gap-2 align-items-center mb-3">
      <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ errorMsg }}
    </div>

    <!-- ── STEP 1: Refund Type ─────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="wizard-card" *ngIf="currentStep === 1">
      <div class="wizard-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-list-check"></i> Step 1 — Select Refund Type
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-body">
        <p class="text-muted small mb-3">
          Choose the category that best describes the reason for the refund.
        </p>
        <div class="row g-3">
          <div class="col-md-4 col-sm-6" *ngFor="let t of refundTypeOptions">
            <div class="type-card"
                 [class.type-card--selected]="selectedRefundType === t.value"
                 (click)="selectedRefundType = t.value"
                 role="radio" [attr.aria-checked]="selectedRefundType === t.value"
                 tabindex="0"
                 (keydown.enter)="selectedRefundType = t.value"
                 (keydown.space)="selectedRefundType = t.value">
              <div class="type-card-icon" [ngClass]="t.color">
                <i [class]="t.icon" aria-hidden="true"></i>
              </div>
              <div class="type-card-label">{{ t.label }}</div>
              <div class="type-card-desc">{{ t.description }}</div>
              <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill type-card-check"
                 *ngIf="selectedRefundType === t.value"></i>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-footer">
        <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="prevStep()">
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i> Back
        </button>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2">
          <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="saveDraft()" [disabled]="saving">Save Draft</button>
          <button class="btn-submit" (click)="nextStep()" [disabled]="!selectedRefundType">
            Next: Source Records <i class="bi bi-arrow-right ms-1"></i>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── STEP 2: Source Records ──────────────────────── -->
    <div class="wizard-card" *ngIf="currentStep === 2">
      <div class="wizard-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-database"></i> Step 2 — Select Source Records
        <span class="ms-2 cat-badge cat-standard">{{ getRefundTypeLabel(selectedRefundType) }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-body">
        <p class="text-muted small mb-3">
          Only eligible records with positive excess balances are shown.
        </p>

        <div *ngIf="loadingSources" class="text-center py-4">
          <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
          <span class="ms-2 small text-muted">Loading eligible records…</span>
        </div>

        <div *ngIf="!loadingSources && sourcesError" class="sources-error-box mb-3">
          <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i>
          {{ sourcesError }}
          <button class="btn-cancel ms-auto" style="font-size:0.75rem;padding:3px 10px;"
                  (click)="loadSources()">
            <i class="bi bi-arrow-clockwise me-1"></i> Retry
          </button>
        </div>

        <div *ngIf="!loadingSources && !sourcesError && eligibleSources.length === 0"
             class="alert alert-info d-flex gap-2">
          <i class="bi bi-info-circle-fill"></i>
          No eligible source records found for this refund type and fiscal year.
        </div>

        <div class="table-responsive" *ngIf="!loadingSources && eligibleSources.length > 0">
          <table class="data-table source-table">
            <thead>
              <tr>
                <th style="width:40px"></th>
                <th>Reference</th>
                <th>Period</th>
                <th class="text-end">Tax Paid</th>
                <th class="text-end">Tax Liability</th>
                <th class="text-end" style="color:var(--success)">Excess</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              <tr *ngFor="let s of eligibleSources"
                  [class.source-row--selected]="isSourceSelected(s.id)"
                  (click)="toggleSource(s.id)" style="cursor:pointer">
                <td>
                  <input type="checkbox" class="form-check-input"
                         [checked]="isSourceSelected(s.id)"
                         (click)="$event.stopPropagation(); toggleSource(s.id)">
                </td>
                <td><span class="code-badge">{{ s.reference }}</span></td>
                <td class="td-sub">{{ s.periodLabel }}</td>
                <td class="text-end td-sub">৳ {{ s.taxPaid | number }}</td>
                <td class="text-end td-sub">৳ {{ s.taxLiability | number }}</td>
                <td class="text-end fw-semibold" style="color:var(--success)">
                  ৳ {{ s.excessAmount | number }}
                </td>
              </tr>
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>

        <div *ngIf="selectedSourceIds.size > 0" class="alert alert-success py-2 small mt-2">
          <i class="bi bi-check2 me-1"></i>
          {{ selectedSourceIds.size }} record(s) selected —
          Total: <strong>৳ {{ selectedSourcesTotalExcess | number }}</strong>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-footer">
        <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="prevStep()">
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i> Back
        </button>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2">
          <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="saveDraft()">Save Draft</button>
          <button class="btn-submit" (click)="nextStep()" [disabled]="selectedSourceIds.size === 0">
            Next: Calculation <i class="bi bi-arrow-right ms-1"></i>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── STEP 3: Calculation ─────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="wizard-card" *ngIf="currentStep === 3">
      <div class="wizard-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-calculator"></i> Step 3 — Refund Calculation
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-body">
        <div *ngIf="calculationError" class="alert alert-danger small mb-3">
          <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle me-1"></i>{{ calculationError }}
        </div>
        <div *ngIf="!calculation && !calculationError" class="text-center py-4">
          <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
          <span class="ms-2 small text-muted">Calculating…</span>
        </div>
        <div *ngIf="calculation">
          <div class="calc-box mb-3">
            <div class="calc-row">
              <span class="text-muted">Total Tax Paid</span>
              <span>৳ {{ calculation.totalTaxPaid | number }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="calc-row">
              <span class="text-muted">Total Tax Liability</span>
              <span>৳ {{ calculation.totalTaxLiability | number }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="calc-row">
              <span class="text-muted">Previously Claimed</span>
              <span>৳ {{ calculation.previouslyClaimed | number }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="calc-divider"></div>
            <div class="calc-total-row">
              <span class="fw-semibold">Maximum Eligible Refund</span>
              <span class="fw-bold fs-5" style="color:var(--success)">
                ৳ {{ calculation.eligibleRefundAmount | number }}
              </span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="alert alert-info d-flex gap-2 align-items-start small py-2">
            <i class="bi bi-lock flex-shrink-0 mt-1"></i>
            <span>System-calculated. You may request a <strong>partial refund</strong> by entering a lower amount.</span>
          </div>
          <div class="row mt-3">
            <div class="col-md-5">
              <label class="form-label fw-semibold small">
                Requested Amount <span class="text-danger">*</span>
              </label>
              <div class="input-group">
                <span class="input-group-text">৳</span>
                <input type="number" class="form-input"
                       [(ngModel)]="requestedAmount"
                       [max]="calculation.eligibleRefundAmount" min="1"
                       [class.is-invalid]="amountExceedsEligible">
              </div>
              <div *ngIf="amountExceedsEligible" class="text-danger small mt-1">
                Cannot exceed ৳ {{ calculation.eligibleRefundAmount | number }}.
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-footer">
        <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="prevStep()">
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i> Back
        </button>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2">
          <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="saveDraft()">Save Draft</button>
          <button class="btn-submit" (click)="nextStep()" [disabled]="!canProceed()">
            Next: Bank Info <i class="bi bi-arrow-right ms-1"></i>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── STEP 4: Bank Info ───────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="wizard-card" *ngIf="currentStep === 4">
      <div class="wizard-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-bank2"></i> Step 4 — Bank Account Information
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-body">
        <form [formGroup]="bankForm" novalidate>
          <div class="form-grid">
            <div class="form-field">
              <label class="form-label">Bank Name <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
              <input formControlName="bankName" list="bank-list" class="form-input"
                     [class.is-invalid]="isFieldInvalid('bankName')" placeholder="e.g. Dutch-Bangla Bank Ltd">
              <datalist id="bank-list">
                <option value="Dutch-Bangla Bank Ltd">
                <option value="BRAC Bank Ltd">
                <option value="Islami Bank Bangladesh Ltd">
                <option value="City Bank Ltd">
                <option value="Sonali Bank Ltd">
                <option value="Agrani Bank Ltd">
              </datalist>
              <div class="invalid-feedback">Required.</div>
            </div>
            <div class="form-field">
              <label class="form-label">Branch <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
              <input formControlName="bankBranch" class="form-input"
                     [class.is-invalid]="isFieldInvalid('bankBranch')">
              <div class="invalid-feedback">Required.</div>
            </div>
            <div class="form-field form-field--full">
              <label class="form-label">Account Holder Name <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
              <input formControlName="accountHolderName" class="form-input"
                     [class.is-invalid]="isFieldInvalid('accountHolderName')">
              <div class="invalid-feedback">Required.</div>
            </div>
            <div class="form-field">
              <label class="form-label">Account Number <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
              <input formControlName="accountNumber" type="password" class="form-input"
                     [class.is-invalid]="isFieldInvalid('accountNumber')"
                     placeholder="13 digits" maxlength="13">
              <div class="invalid-feedback">Valid 13-digit number required.</div>
            </div>
            <div class="form-field">
              <label class="form-label">Routing Number <span class="text-danger">*</span></label>
              <input formControlName="routingNumber" class="form-input"
                     [class.is-invalid]="isFieldInvalid('routingNumber')"
                     placeholder="9 digits" maxlength="9">
              <div class="invalid-feedback">Valid 9-digit number required.</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="mt-3 d-flex align-items-center gap-3">
            <button type="button" class="btn-submit"
                    style="background:var(--bg-card);color:var(--primary);border:1px solid var(--primary);"
                    (click)="validateBank()" [disabled]="bankForm.invalid || bankValidating">
              <span *ngIf="bankValidating" class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-1"></span>
              <i *ngIf="!bankValidating" class="bi bi-shield-check me-1"></i>
              {{ bankValidating ? 'Validating…' : 'Validate Account' }}
            </button>
            <span *ngIf="bankValidated" class="text-success small fw-semibold">
              <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill me-1"></i> Validated
            </span>
            <span *ngIf="bankError" class="text-danger small">{{ bankError }}</span>
          </div>
        </form>
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-footer">
        <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="prevStep()">
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i> Back
        </button>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2">
          <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="saveDraft()">Save Draft</button>
          <button class="btn-submit" (click)="nextStep()" [disabled]="bankForm.invalid || !bankValidated">
            Next: Documents <i class="bi bi-arrow-right ms-1"></i>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── STEP 5: Documents ───────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="wizard-card" *ngIf="currentStep === 5">
      <div class="wizard-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-paperclip"></i> Step 5 — Supporting Documents
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-body">
        <p class="text-muted small mb-3">Bank Statement is mandatory. Max 20 MB. PDF, JPG, PNG only.</p>
        <div class="row g-2 align-items-end mb-3">
          <div class="col-md-4">
            <label class="form-label small fw-semibold">Document Type</label>
            <select class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="selectedDocType">
              <option *ngFor="let d of documentTypes" [value]="d.value">
                {{ d.label }}{{ d.required ? ' *' : '' }}
              </option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-5">
            <label class="form-label small fw-semibold">Choose File</label>
            <input type="file" class="form-input" (change)="onFileSelect($event)"
                   accept=".pdf,.jpg,.jpeg,.png">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div *ngIf="uploadError" class="alert alert-danger py-2 small">
          <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle me-1"></i> {{ uploadError }}
        </div>
        <div *ngFor="let f of uploadedFiles; let i = index" class="uploaded-file-item">
          <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf text-danger fs-5 flex-shrink-0"></i>
          <div class="flex-grow-1">
            <div class="small fw-semibold">{{ f.name }}</div>
            <div class="td-sub">{{ getDocTypeLabel(f.type) }} · {{ f.size }}</div>
          </div>
          <button class="btn-delete" (click)="removeFile(i)"><i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i></button>
        </div>
        <div *ngIf="!hasRequiredDocuments()" class="alert alert-warning py-2 small mt-2">
          <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle me-1"></i>
          <strong>Bank Statement</strong> is required.
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-footer">
        <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="prevStep()">
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i> Back
        </button>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2">
          <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="saveDraft()">Save Draft</button>
          <button class="btn-submit" (click)="nextStep()" [disabled]="!hasRequiredDocuments()">
            Next: Review <i class="bi bi-arrow-right ms-1"></i>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── STEP 6: Review & Submit ────────────────────── -->
    <div class="wizard-card" *ngIf="currentStep === 6">
      <div class="wizard-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-clipboard2-check"></i> Step 6 — Review &amp; Submit
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-body">
        <div class="row g-3 mb-3">
          <div class="col-md-6">
            <div class="review-section">
              <div class="review-section-title"><i class="bi bi-info-circle me-1"></i> Application</div>
              <div class="review-row"><span class="text-muted">Refund Type</span><span class="fw-semibold">{{ getRefundTypeLabel(selectedRefundType) }}</span></div>
              <div class="review-row"><span class="text-muted">Sources</span><span>{{ selectedSourceIds.size }} record(s)</span></div>
              <div class="review-row"><span class="text-muted">Requested</span><span class="fw-bold" style="color:var(--success)">৳ {{ requestedAmount | number }}</span></div>
              <div *ngIf="isOfficerRole && selectedTaxpayer" class="review-row">
                <span class="text-muted">Taxpayer</span>
                <span>{{ selectedTaxpayer.fullName || selectedTaxpayer.companyName }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="col-md-6">
            <div class="review-section">
              <div class="review-section-title"><i class="bi bi-bank me-1"></i> Bank</div>
              <div class="review-row"><span class="text-muted">Bank</span><span>{{ bankForm.value.bankName }}</span></div>
              <div class="review-row"><span class="text-muted">Account</span><span class="font-monospace">████ {{ bankForm.value.accountNumber?.slice(-4) }}</span></div>
              <div class="review-row"><span class="text-muted">Validated</span><span class="text-success fw-semibold"><i class="bi bi-shield-check me-1"></i>Yes</span></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="declaration-box">
          <div class="form-check">
            <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" id="declaration" [(ngModel)]="declarationAgreed">
            <label class="form-check-label small" for="declaration">
              I hereby declare that all information provided is true, accurate, and complete.
              Providing false information is an offense under the Income Tax Ordinance 1984.
            </label>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="wizard-card-footer">
        <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="prevStep()">
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i> Back
        </button>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2">
          <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="saveDraft()">Save Draft</button>
          <button class="btn-submit" style="background:var(--success);border-color:var(--success);"
                  (click)="submitRefund()" [disabled]="!declarationAgreed || submitting">
            <span *ngIf="submitting" class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-1"></span>
            <i *ngIf="!submitting" class="bi bi-send me-1"></i>
            {{ submitting ? 'Submitting…' : 'Submit Application' }}
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </ng-container>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/refund-management/pages/refund-view/refund-view.component.html
```html
<div class="container-fluid py-4 px-4">

  <!-- Back + Header -->
  <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4">
    <div>
      <button class="btn btn-link btn-sm text-muted ps-0 mb-1" (click)="back()">
        <i class="bi bi-arrow-left me-1"></i> Back to My Refunds
      </button>
      <h4 class="page-title mb-0" *ngIf="refund">
        <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text me-2 text-primary"></i>
        {{ refund.refundReferenceNo }}
      </h4>
    </div>
    <div class="d-flex gap-2" *ngIf="refund">
      <button *ngIf="canRespond" class="btn btn-warning btn-sm" (click)="respond()">
        <i class="bi bi-reply me-1"></i> Respond to Request
      </button>
      <button *ngIf="canEdit" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" (click)="edit()">
        <i class="bi bi-pencil me-1"></i> Edit Draft
      </button>
      <button *ngIf="canCancel" class="btn btn-outline-danger btn-sm" (click)="cancel()">
        <i class="bi bi-x-lg me-1"></i> Cancel
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div *ngIf="loading" class="text-center py-5">
    <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
    <p class="text-muted mt-2 small">Loading refund details…</p>
  </div>

  <!-- Error -->
  <div *ngIf="!loading && errorMessage" class="alert alert-danger">
    <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill me-2"></i>{{ errorMessage }}
  </div>

  <div *ngIf="!loading && refund" class="row g-4">

    <!-- LEFT COLUMN -->
    <div class="col-lg-8">

      <!-- Status Banner -->
      <div class="status-banner mb-3"
        [class.status-banner--info]="refund.status === 'INFO_REQUESTED'"
        [class.status-banner--success]="isPaid"
        [class.status-banner--danger]="refund.status === 'REJECTED' || refund.status === 'FAILED'"
      >
        <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3">
          <app-refund-status-badge [status]="refund.status" size="lg"></app-refund-status-badge>
          <div *ngIf="refund.status === 'INFO_REQUESTED'" class="small text-warning-emphasis">
            <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill me-1"></i>
            Action Required: Please respond to the officer's information request.
          </div>
          <div *ngIf="isPaid" class="small text-success">
            <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill me-1"></i>
            Refund of <strong>{{ formatCurrency(refund.approvedRefundAmount) }}</strong> has been disbursed.
          </div>
          <div *ngIf="refund.status === 'REJECTED'" class="small text-danger">
            <i class="bi bi-x-circle-fill me-1"></i>
            Rejected: {{ refund.rejectionReasonText }}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Application Details -->
      <div class="detail-card mb-3">
        <div class="detail-card-header">
          <i class="bi bi-info-circle me-2"></i> Application Details
        </div>
        <div class="detail-card-body">
          <div class="detail-grid">
            <div class="detail-item">
              <span class="detail-label">Reference No.</span>
              <span class="detail-value fw-semibold">{{ refund.refundReferenceNo }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-item">
              <span class="detail-label">Refund Type</span>
              <span class="detail-value">{{ refundTypeLabels[refund.refundType] }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-item">
              <span class="detail-label">Fiscal Year</span>
              <span class="detail-value">{{ refund.fiscalYearName }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-item">
              <span class="detail-label">Submitted</span>
              <span class="detail-value">{{ refund.submittedAt ? (refund.submittedAt | date:'dd MMM yyyy') : '—' }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-item">
              <span class="detail-label">Total Tax Paid</span>
              <span class="detail-value">{{ formatCurrency(refund.totalTaxPaid) }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-item">
              <span class="detail-label">Total Tax Liability</span>
              <span class="detail-value">{{ formatCurrency(refund.totalTaxLiability) }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-item">
              <span class="detail-label">Claimed Amount</span>
              <span class="detail-value fw-semibold text-primary">{{ formatCurrency(refund.claimedRefundAmount) }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-item">
              <span class="detail-label">Approved Amount</span>
              <span class="detail-value fw-bold text-success">{{ formatCurrency(refund.approvedRefundAmount) }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-item" *ngIf="refund.appealReferenceNo">
              <span class="detail-label">Appeal Reference</span>
              <span class="detail-value">{{ refund.appealReferenceNo }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-item" *ngIf="refund.courtOrderNo">
              <span class="detail-label">Court Order No.</span>
              <span class="detail-value">{{ refund.courtOrderNo }}</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Source Records -->
      <div class="detail-card mb-3" *ngIf="refund.sources.length">
        <div class="detail-card-header">
          <i class="bi bi-database me-2"></i> Source Records
        </div>
        <div class="table-responsive">
          <table class="table table-sm align-middle mb-0 small">
            <thead class="table-light">
              <tr>
                <th>Source Type</th>
                <th>Reference</th>
                <th>Period</th>
                <th class="text-end">Amount</th>
                <th class="text-center">Verified</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              <tr *ngFor="let src of refund.sources">
                <td><span class="badge bg-light text-secondary border">{{ src.sourceType }}</span></td>
                <td class="fw-semibold">{{ src.sourceReference }}</td>
                <td class="text-muted">{{ src.periodStart | date:'MMM yyyy' }} – {{ src.periodEnd | date:'MMM yyyy' }}</td>
                <td class="text-end">{{ formatCurrency(src.sourceAmount) }}</td>
                <td class="text-center">
                  <i *ngIf="src.isVerified" class="bi bi-check-circle-fill text-success"></i>
                  <i *ngIf="!src.isVerified" class="bi bi-circle text-muted"></i>
                </td>
              </tr>
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Bank Details -->
      <div class="detail-card mb-3">
        <div class="detail-card-header d-flex justify-content-between">
          <span><i class="bi bi-bank me-2"></i> Bank Account</span>
          <span *ngIf="refund.bankValidated" class="small text-success">
            <i class="bi bi-shield-check me-1"></i>Validated
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-card-body">
          <div class="detail-grid">
            <div class="detail-item">
              <span class="detail-label">Bank</span>
              <span class="detail-value">{{ refund.bankDetails.bankName }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-item">
              <span class="detail-label">Branch</span>
              <span class="detail-value">{{ refund.bankDetails.bankBranch }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-item">
              <span class="detail-label">Account Holder</span>
              <span class="detail-value">{{ refund.bankDetails.accountHolderName }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-item">
              <span class="detail-label">Account No.</span>
              <span class="detail-value font-monospace">{{ refund.bankDetails.accountNumber }}</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Documents -->
      <div class="detail-card mb-3">
        <div class="detail-card-header">
          <i class="bi bi-paperclip me-2"></i> Documents ({{ refund.documents.length }} uploaded)
        </div>
        <div class="detail-card-body">
          <div *ngIf="!refund.documents.length" class="text-muted small">No documents uploaded.</div>
          <div
            *ngFor="let doc of refund.documents"
            class="doc-item"
          >
            <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf text-danger fs-5 flex-shrink-0" aria-hidden="true"></i>
            <div class="flex-grow-1">
              <div class="small fw-semibold">{{ doc.documentName }}</div>
              <div class="text-muted" style="font-size:.72rem">
                {{ doc.documentType | titlecase }} ·
                Uploaded {{ doc.uploadedAt | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}
              </div>
            </div>
            <span
              class="badge"
              [class.bg-success]="doc.verificationStatus === 'VERIFIED'"
              [class.bg-danger]="doc.verificationStatus === 'REJECTED'"
              [class.bg-secondary]="doc.verificationStatus === 'PENDING'"
            >{{ doc.verificationStatus | titlecase }}</span>
            <button class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm py-0 px-2 ms-2"
              (click)="downloadDocument(doc.id)" title="Download">
              <i class="bi bi-download"></i>
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div><!-- /LEFT -->

    <!-- RIGHT COLUMN: Status Timeline -->
    <div class="col-lg-4">
      <div class="detail-card sticky-top" style="top:80px">
        <div class="detail-card-header">
          <i class="bi bi-clock-history me-2"></i> Status Timeline
        </div>
        <div class="detail-card-body">
          <app-refund-status-timeline [history]="refund.statusHistory">
          </app-refund-status-timeline>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div><!-- /row -->
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/taxable-products/pages/taxable-product-view/taxable-product-view.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Product Details</h4>
    <p>Full taxable product information.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="header-actions">
    <button class="btn-back" (click)="onBack()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back
    </button>
    <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit-top" (click)="onEdit()">
      <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
</div>

<ng-container *ngIf="!isLoading && product">

  <!-- Product Header Card -->
  <div class="prod-header-card">
    <div class="prod-header-left">
      <div class="prod-icon">
        <i [class]="getCategoryIcon(product.category)"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="prod-code">{{ product.productCode }}</div>
        <div class="prod-name">{{ product.productName }}</div>
        <div class="prod-meta">
          <span class="hs-pill">HS: {{ product.hsCode }}</span>
          <span class="cat-pill">{{ product.category }}</span>
          <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(product.status)">
            {{ product.status }}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="prod-header-right">
      <div class="prod-rate">
        {{ product.taxRate === 0 ? 'Zero' : product.taxRate + '%' }}
      </div>
      <div class="prod-rate-label">{{ product.taxType }}</div>
      <div class="prod-unit">Per {{ product.unit }}</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Details Grid -->
  <div class="details-grid">

    <!-- Product Information -->
    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-box-seam-fill"></i>
        <span>Product Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Product Code</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="code-badge">{{ product.productCode }}</span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Product Name</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ product.productName }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">HS Code</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="code-badge code-sm">{{ product.hsCode }}</span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Category</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ product.category }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Unit</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ product.unit }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Status</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(product.status)">
              {{ product.status }}
            </span>
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Tax Information -->
    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-percent"></i>
        <span>Tax Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Tax Type</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ product.taxType }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Tax Rate</span>
          <span class="detail-value rate-value">
            {{ product.taxRate === 0 ? 'Zero Rated (0%)' : product.taxRate + '%' }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Created At</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ product.createdAt | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Description (full width, only if present) -->
    <div class="detail-card full-card" *ngIf="product.description">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-chat-text-fill"></i>
        <span>Description</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <p class="description-text">{{ product.description }}</p>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

</ng-container>
```

## File: src/app/features/vat-returns/pages/vat-return-edit/vat-return-edit.component.html
```html
<form [formGroup]="form" (ngSubmit)="onSubmit()" novalidate>
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Edit VAT Return</h4>
    <p>Update VAT return details.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to View
  </button>
</div>


<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
  <p>Loading VAT return data...</p>
</div>

<div class="form-card" *ngIf="!isLoading">

  <div class="edit-banner">
  <i class="bi bi-building-fill"></i>
  <div>
    <span class="fw-bold">{{ businessName }}</span>
    <span class="banner-sub">BIN: {{ binNo }} · TIN: {{ tinNumber }}</span>
  </div>
</div>

  <!-- Section 1: Business -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-building-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Business Information</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">BIN, TIN and business details</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">BIN No.</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-hash input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" formControlName="binNo" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">TIN Number</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" formControlName="tinNumber" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label required">Business Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-building input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" formControlName="businessName" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: Period -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon teal">
        <i class="bi bi-calendar-range-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Period & Status</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Filing period and current status</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Return Period</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="returnPeriod">
            <option *ngFor="let p of returnPeriods" [value]="p">{{ p }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Period</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-month input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="periodMonth">
            <option *ngFor="let m of periodOptions" [value]="m">{{ m }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Year</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="periodYear">
            <option *ngFor="let y of years" [value]="y">{{ y }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Assessment Year</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="assessmentYear">
            <option *ngFor="let y of assessmentYears" [value]="y">{{ y }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="status">
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Submission Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" formControlName="submissionDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Due Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-x input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" formControlName="dueDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 3: Tax -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon purple">
        <i class="bi bi-table"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Tax Figures</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Supplies and VAT amounts</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Taxable Supplies (৳)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" formControlName="taxableSupplies" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Exempt Supplies (৳)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" formControlName="exemptSupplies" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Zero Rated Supplies (৳)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" formControlName="zeroRatedSupplies" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Output Tax (৳)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-up-circle input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" formControlName="outputTax" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Input Tax Credit (৳)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-down-circle input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" formControlName="inputTax" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Tax Paid (৳)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-cash-coin input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" formControlName="taxPaid" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Net Tax Display -->
    <div class="tax-summary">
      <div class="ts-row">
        <span class="ts-label">Total Supplies</span>
        <span class="ts-value">৳{{ totalSupplies.toLocaleString() }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="ts-row">
        <span class="ts-label">Output Tax</span>
        <span class="ts-value output">৳{{ (form.value.outputTax || 0).toLocaleString() }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="ts-row">
        <span class="ts-label">Input Tax Credit</span>
        <span class="ts-value input">- ৳{{ (form.value.inputTax || 0).toLocaleString() }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="ts-divider"></div>
      <div class="ts-row total-row">
        <span class="ts-label total">Net Tax Payable</span>
        <span class="ts-value total">৳{{ netTaxPayable.toLocaleString() }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 4: Remarks -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon orange">
        <i class="bi bi-chat-text-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Submission & Remarks</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Submitted by and notes</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Submitted By</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="submittedBy">
            <option *ngFor="let s of submitters" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea"
            formControlName="remarks" rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Actions -->
  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isSaving">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" type="submit"
      [disabled]="isSaving || form.invalid">
      <span *ngIf="!isSaving"><i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Update Return</span>
      <span *ngIf="isSaving"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Updating...</span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
</form>
```

## File: src/app/features/vat-returns/pages/vat-return-view/vat-return-view.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>VAT Return Details</h4>
    <p>Full VAT return submission with workflow actions.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="header-actions">
    <button class="btn-back" (click)="onBack()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back
    </button>
    <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit-top" [disabled]="vr?.status === 'Accepted' || vr?.status === 'Under Review'"
      (click)="onEdit()">
      <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Action Success Message -->

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
  <p>Loading VAT return details...</p>
</div>

<ng-container *ngIf="!isLoading && vr">

  <!-- Header Card -->
  <div class="view-header-card">
    <div class="vr-header-left">
      <div class="vr-icon"><i class="bi bi-arrow-repeat"></i></div>
      <div>
        <div class="vr-no">{{ vr.returnNo }}</div>
        <div class="vr-name">{{ vr.businessName }}</div>
        <div class="vr-meta">
          <span class="period-pill">{{ vr.returnPeriod }}</span>
          <span class="period-text">{{ vr.periodMonth }} {{ vr.periodYear }}</span>
          <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(vr.status)">{{ vr.status }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="vr-header-right">
      <div class="vr-stat">
        <span class="vrs-label">Net Tax Payable</span>
        <span class="vrs-value">{{ fmt(vr.netTaxPayable) }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="vr-stat">
        <span class="vrs-label">Due Date</span>
        <span class="vrs-value sm">{{ vr.dueDate || '—' }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ── WORKFLOW ACTION BAR ── -->
  <div class="workflow-bar" *ngIf="canSubmit() || canStartReview() || canAccept() || canReject() || canSendBack()">
    <div class="wb-title">
      <i class="bi bi-diagram-3-fill"></i>
      Workflow Actions
    </div>
    <div class="wb-actions">

      <!-- TAXPAYER: Submit -->
      <button class="wf-btn submit" *ngIf="canSubmit()" (click)="openAction('Submit')">
        <i class="bi bi-send-fill"></i>
        Submit Return
      </button>

      <!-- TAX_OFFICER: Start Review -->
      <button class="wf-btn review" *ngIf="canStartReview()" (click)="openAction('Start Review')">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        Start Review
      </button>

      <!-- TAX_OFFICER: Send Back -->
      <button class="wf-btn sendback" *ngIf="canSendBack()" (click)="openAction('Send Back')">
        <i class="bi bi-arrow-return-left"></i>
        Send Back
      </button>

      <!-- TAX_COMMISSIONER: Accept -->
      <button class="wf-btn accept" *ngIf="canAccept()" (click)="openAction('Accept')">
        <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i>
        Accept Return
      </button>

      <!-- TAX_COMMISSIONER: Reject -->
      <button class="wf-btn reject" *ngIf="canReject()" (click)="openAction('Reject')">
        <i class="bi bi-x-circle-fill"></i>
        Reject Return
      </button>

    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Tax Summary Cards -->
  <div class="tax-summary-row">
    <div class="ts-card">
      <div class="tsc-icon supplies"><i class="bi bi-graph-up"></i></div>
      <div class="tsc-body">
        <span class="tsc-label">Total Supplies</span>
        <span class="tsc-value">{{ fmt(vr.totalSupplies) }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ts-card">
      <div class="tsc-icon output"><i class="bi bi-arrow-up-circle-fill"></i></div>
      <div class="tsc-body">
        <span class="tsc-label">Output Tax</span>
        <span class="tsc-value output">{{ fmt(vr.outputTax) }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ts-card">
      <div class="tsc-icon input"><i class="bi bi-arrow-down-circle-fill"></i></div>
      <div class="tsc-body">
        <span class="tsc-label">Input Tax Credit</span>
        <span class="tsc-value input">{{ fmt(vr.inputTax) }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ts-card highlight">
      <div class="tsc-icon net"><i class="bi bi-calculator-fill"></i></div>
      <div class="tsc-body">
        <span class="tsc-label">Net Payable</span>
        <span class="tsc-value net">{{ fmt(vr.netTaxPayable) }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ts-card">
      <div class="tsc-icon paid"><i class="bi bi-cash-coin"></i></div>
      <div class="tsc-body">
        <span class="tsc-label">Tax Paid</span>
        <span class="tsc-value paid">{{ vr.taxPaid > 0 ? fmt(vr.taxPaid) : '—' }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="details-grid">
    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text-fill"></i>
        <span>Return Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Return No.</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ vr.returnNo }}</span></span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Return Period</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ vr.returnPeriod }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Period</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ vr.periodMonth }} {{ vr.periodYear }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Assessment Year</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ vr.assessmentYear || '—' }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Status</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(vr.status)">{{ vr.status }}</span>
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-building-fill"></i>
        <span>Business Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Business Name</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ vr.businessName }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">BIN No.</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ vr.binNo }}</span></span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">TIN No.</span>
          <span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ vr.tinNumber }}</span></span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="vr.submittedBy">
          <span class="detail-label">Submitted By</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ vr.submittedBy }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="vr.submissionDate">
          <span class="detail-label">Submitted On</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ vr.submissionDate }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-table"></i>
        <span>Supply Breakdown</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Taxable Supplies</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ fmt(vr.taxableSupplies) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Exempt Supplies</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ fmt(vr.exemptSupplies) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Zero Rated Supplies</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ fmt(vr.zeroRatedSupplies) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row total-row">
          <span class="detail-label detail-label-strong">Total Supplies</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ fmt(vr.totalSupplies) }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-cash-stack"></i>
        <span>Tax Summary & Filing</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Output Tax</span>
          <span class="detail-value tax-output">{{ fmt(vr.outputTax) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Input Tax Credit</span>
          <span class="detail-value tax-input">{{ fmt(vr.inputTax) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Tax Paid</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ vr.taxPaid > 0 ? fmt(vr.taxPaid) : '—' }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Due Date</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ vr.dueDate || '—' }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Net Tax Payable</span>
          <span class="detail-value net-payable">{{ fmt(vr.netTaxPayable) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="vr.remarks">
          <span class="detail-label">Remarks</span>
          <span class="detail-value detail-value-note">{{ vr.remarks }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="timeline-card">
    <div class="tc-header">
      <i class="bi bi-clock-history"></i>
      <span>Action History</span>
      <span class="tc-count">{{ vr.actionHistory?.length || 0 }} actions</span>
    </div>

    <div class="timeline" *ngIf="vr.actionHistory && vr.actionHistory.length > 0">
      <div class="tl-item" *ngFor="let a of vr.actionHistory; let last = last" [class.last]="last">
        <div class="tl-dot" [ngClass]="getActionColor(a.toStatus)">
          <i [class]="getActionIcon(a.action)"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="tl-body">
          <div class="tl-action">{{ a.action }}</div>
          <div class="tl-status">
            <span class="tl-from">{{ a.fromStatus }}</span>
            <i class="bi bi-arrow-right tl-arrow"></i>
            <span class="tl-to" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(a.toStatus)">{{ a.toStatus }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="tl-meta">
            <span class="tl-user"><i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i> {{ a.performedBy }}</span>
            <span class="tl-role">{{ a.role }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="tl-remarks" *ngIf="a.remarks">
            <i class="bi bi-chat-left-text-fill"></i> {{ a.remarks }}
          </div>
          <div class="tl-time">{{ a.timestamp }}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="no-history" *ngIf="!vr.actionHistory || vr.actionHistory.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-clock"></i>
      <p>No action history yet</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</ng-container>

<!-- ── ACTION MODAL ── -->
<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showActionModal" (click)="closeModal()">
  <div class="action-modal" (click)="$event.stopPropagation()">

    <div class="am-header" [ngClass]="'am-' + currentAction.toLowerCase().replace(' ','-')">
      <div class="am-icon">
        <i [class]="
          currentAction === 'Submit'       ? 'bi bi-send-fill'           :
          currentAction === 'Start Review' ? 'bi bi-search'              :
          currentAction === 'Accept'       ? 'bi bi-check-circle-fill'   :
          currentAction === 'Reject'       ? 'bi bi-x-circle-fill'       :
                                             'bi bi-arrow-return-left'
        "></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="am-title">{{ currentAction }} Return</div>
        <div class="am-sub">{{ vr?.returnNo }} — {{ vr?.businessName }}</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="am-body">

      <div class="am-info">
        <div class="am-info-row">
          <span>Current Status</span>
          <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(vr?.status || '')">{{ vr?.status }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="am-info-row">
          <span>New Status</span>
          <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(
            currentAction === 'Submit'       ? 'Submitted'    :
            currentAction === 'Start Review' ? 'Under Review' :
            currentAction === 'Accept'       ? 'Accepted'     :
            currentAction === 'Reject'       ? 'Rejected'     : 'Send Back'
          )">
            {{
            currentAction === 'Submit' ? 'Submitted' :
            currentAction === 'Start Review' ? 'Under Review' :
            currentAction === 'Accept' ? 'Accepted' :
            currentAction === 'Reject' ? 'Rejected' : 'Send Back'
            }}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="am-remarks-wrap">
        <label class="am-label">
          Remarks
          <span class="required-star" *ngIf="currentAction === 'Reject' || currentAction === 'Send Back'">
            * Required
          </span>
        </label>
        <textarea class="am-remarks" [placeholder]="
            currentAction === 'Accept'       ? 'Optional remarks...'                            :
            currentAction === 'Reject'       ? 'Required — reason for rejection...'             :
            currentAction === 'Send Back'    ? 'Required — what needs to be corrected...'       :
            currentAction === 'Start Review' ? 'Optional — any initial observations...'         :
                                               'Optional remarks...'
          " [(ngModel)]="actionRemarks" rows="3">
        </textarea>
        <div class="am-error" *ngIf="actionError">
          <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ actionError }}
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>

    <div class="am-footer">
      <button class="am-btn-cancel" (click)="closeModal()" [disabled]="isActing">
        Cancel
      </button>
      <button class="am-btn-confirm" [ngClass]="'am-confirm-' + currentAction.toLowerCase().replace(' ','-')"
        (click)="confirmAction()" [disabled]="isActing">
        <span *ngIf="!isActing">
          <i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Confirm {{ currentAction }}
        </span>
        <span *ngIf="isActing">
          <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>
          Processing...
        </span>
      </button>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```

export type RefundType =
  | 'INCOME_TAX'
  | 'VAT'
  | 'AIT'
  | 'DUPLICATE_PAYMENT'
  | 'APPEAL_DECISION'
  | 'OTHER';
⋮----
export type RefundStatus =
  | 'DRAFT'
  | 'SUBMITTED'
  | 'UNDER_VERIFICATION'
  | 'INFO_REQUESTED'
  | 'RESPONSE_RECEIVED'
  | 'RECOMMENDED'
  | 'SUPERVISOR_REVIEW'
  | 'APPROVED'
  | 'REJECTED'
  | 'PAYMENT_PENDING'
  | 'PAYMENT_PROCESSING'
  | 'PAID'
  | 'FAILED'
  | 'CANCELLED'
  | 'CLOSED';
⋮----
export interface BankDetails {
  bankName: string;
  bankBranch: string;
  accountHolderName: string;
  accountNumber: string;
  routingNumber: string;
  mfsProvider?: string;
  mfsNumber?: string;
}
⋮----
export interface EligibleSourceRecord {
  id: number;
  reference: string;
  periodLabel: string;
  taxPaid: number;
  taxLiability: number;
  excessAmount: number;
  fiscalYear: string;
}
⋮----
export interface RefundCalculation {
  totalTaxPaid: number;
  totalTaxLiability: number;
  previouslyClaimed: number;
  eligibleRefundAmount: number;
  calculationBasis: string;
}
⋮----
export interface RefundSummary {
  id: number;
  refundReferenceNo: string;
  tin: string;
  taxpayerName: string;
  refundType: RefundType;
  fiscalYearName: string;
  claimedRefundAmount: number;
  verifiedRefundAmount: number | null;
  approvedRefundAmount: number | null;
  status: RefundStatus;
  isFlaggedForAudit: boolean;
  submittedAt: string | null;
  approvedAt: string | null;
  paidAt: string | null;
  updatedAt: string | null;
  documentCount: number;
}
⋮----
export interface RefundDetail extends RefundSummary {
  totalTaxPaid: number;
  totalTaxLiability: number;
  sources: any[];
  bankDetails: BankDetails;
  documents: any[];
  statusHistory: any[];
  rejectionReasonCode: string | null;
  rejectionReasonText: string | null;
  officerNotes: string | null;
  supervisorNotes: string | null;
  appealReferenceNo: string | null;
  courtOrderNo: string | null;
  bankValidated: boolean;
  itrRecordId: number | null;
}
⋮----
export interface RefundFilterRequest {
  status?: string;
  refundType?: string;
  fiscalYearId?: number;
  page?: number;
  size?: number;
  sortBy?: string;
  sortDir?: string;
}
⋮----
export interface PagedResponse<T> {
  content: T[];
  totalElements: number;
  totalPages: number;
  size: number;
  number: number;
}
⋮----
export interface CreateRefundRequest {
  refundType: RefundType;
  fiscalYearId: number;
  taxpayerId?: number; // ← Officer: set this; Taxpayer: omit
  sources: {
    sourceType: string;
    sourceRecordId: number;
    sourceAmount: number;
  }[];
  requestedAmount: number;
  bankDetails: BankDetails;
  appealReferenceNo?: string;
  courtOrderNo?: string;
}
⋮----
taxpayerId?: number; // ← Officer: set this; Taxpayer: omit
⋮----
export interface RespondRequest {
  responseText: string;
}
⋮----
export interface RefundStatusHistory {
  id: number;
  fromStatus: RefundStatus | null;
  toStatus: RefundStatus;
  changedByName: string;
  changedByRole: string;
  changedAt: string;
  changeReason: string | null;
}
⋮----
export interface RefundDocument {
  id: number;
  documentType: string;
  documentName: string;
  originalFilename: string;
  fileSizeBytes: number;
  verificationStatus: 'PENDING' | 'VERIFIED' | 'REJECTED';
  uploadedAt: string;
}

export interface RegistrationState {
  // Step 1
  accountCategory:  AccountCategory | null;
  taxpayerTypeId:   number | null;
  taxpayerTypeName: string;

  // Step 2
  fullName:        string;
  email:           string;
  phone:           string;
  password:        string;
  confirmPassword: string;

  // Step 3 — Individual
  nid:             string;
  dateOfBirth:     string;
  gender:          string;
  profession:      string;

  // Step 3 — existing TIN toggle (Individual & Company)
  hasExistingTin:  boolean;
  existingTin:     string;

  // Step 3 — Business / Organization
  companyName:          string;
  rjscNo:               string;
  incorporationDate:    string;
  natureOfBusiness:     string;
  authorizedPersonName: string;
  authorizedPersonNid:  string;
}

export function emptyState(): RegistrationState

// ── Backend payload ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export interface UserRegistrationRequest {
  taxpayerTypeId:  number;
  accountCategory: AccountCategory;
  fullName:        string;
  email:           string;
  phone:           string;
  password:        string;

  existingTin?:    string;

  // Individual only
  nid?:         string;
  dateOfBirth?: string;
  gender?:      string;
  profession?:  string;

  // Business / Organization only
  companyName?:          string;
  rjscNo?:               string;
  incorporationDate?:    string;
  natureOfBusiness?:     string;
  authorizedPersonName?: string;
  authorizedPersonNid?:  string;
}

  taxpayerId:       number;

export type VatCategory = 'Standard' | 'Zero Rated' | 'Exempt' | 'Special';
export type ReturnPeriod = 'Monthly' | 'Quarterly';

  binNo:            string;
  tinNumber:        string;
  businessName:     string;
  ownerName:        string;
  vatCategory:      VatCategory;
  businessType:     string;
  businessCategory: string;
  tradeLicenseNo:   string;
  registrationDate: string;
  effectiveDate:    string;
  expiryDate:       string;
  annualTurnover:   number;
  email:            string;
  phone:            string;
  address:          string;
  district:         string;
  division:         string;
  vatZone:          string;
  vatCircle:        string;
  zoneId:           number;
  status:           VatStatus;
  remarks:          string;
}

  taxpayerId:  number;
  businessId?: number | null;
  vatZoneId:   number;
  vatCircleId: number;
  districtId?: number | null;
  divisionId?: number | null;

  // VAT classification
  vatCategory:   VatCategory | string;
  returnPeriod?: ReturnPeriod;     // Monthly | Quarterly — backend addition needed

  effectiveDate?:   string;
  expiryDate?:      string;

  // Optional officer notes
  remarks?: string;
}
