## File: src/app/features/ait/pages/ait-create-wizard/ait-create-wizard.component.html
```html
<!-- ait-create.component.html -->
<!-- Pattern: matches income-tax-return-create.component.html structure exactly -->

<!-- ── Topbar ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="itr-topbar">
  <div>
    <div class="topbar-title">
      Advance Income Tax (AIT) — {{ fiscalYearName || '—' }}
    </div>
    <div class="topbar-meta">
      <ng-container *ngIf="step1Form.get('taxpayerName')?.value; else noProfile">
        {{ step1Form.get('taxpayerName')?.value }}
        &nbsp;·&nbsp; TIN: {{ step1Form.get('taxpayerTin')?.value || '—' }}
        &nbsp;·&nbsp; Source: {{ getSourceLabel(step2Form.get('sourceType')?.value) }}
      </ng-container>
      <ng-template #noProfile>Select a taxpayer to begin</ng-template>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="topbar-right">
    <span class="badge b-draft">Draft</span>
    <button class="btn btn-sm" (click)="onCancel()">✕ Cancel</button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ── Step Rail ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="step-rail">
  <ng-container *ngFor="let s of [1, 2, 3]; let i = index">
    <div class="step-item" [ngClass]="'s-' + getStepState(s)" (click)="goToStep(s)">
      <div class="step-circle">
        <span *ngIf="getStepState(s) === 'done'">✓</span>
        <span *ngIf="getStepState(s) !== 'done'">{{ s }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="step-label">
        <ng-container [ngSwitch]="s">
          <ng-container *ngSwitchCase="1">Taxpayer<br />Info</ng-container>
          <ng-container *ngSwitchCase="2">AIT<br />Details</ng-container>
          <ng-container *ngSwitchCase="3">Review &amp;<br />Submit</ng-container>
        </ng-container>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="step-line" *ngIf="i < 2" [class.done]="currentStep > s"></div>
  </ng-container>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     STEP 1 — Taxpayer Info
════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div [hidden]="currentStep !== 1" [formGroup]="step1Form">

  <!-- Officer: taxpayer search -->
  <ng-container *ngIf="!isTaxpayerRole">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-hdr">
        <div class="card-hdr-left">
          <div class="hdr-icon ic-blue">
            <i class="bi bi-search" style="font-size:12px;color:#185FA5"></i>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="card-title">Search taxpayer</div>
            <div class="card-sub">Search by TIN, NID, or name — then select to auto-fill</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="badge b-info" *ngIf="isAutoFilled">
          <i class="bi bi-lightning-charge-fill"></i> Auto-filled
        </span>
      </div>
      <div class="card-p">
        <div class="search-row">
          <div class="search-field-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-upc-scan search-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="search-input" placeholder="Enter TIN, NID or taxpayer name…"
              [formControl]="searchControl" (keyup.enter)="searchTaxpayer()"/>
            <button class="clear-btn" *ngIf="isAutoFilled" (click)="clearSelectedTaxpayer()">
              <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
            </button>
          </div>
          <button class="btn btn-primary" (click)="searchTaxpayer()" [disabled]="isSearching || isAutoFilled">
            <span *ngIf="isSearching" class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span>
            <i *ngIf="!isSearching" class="bi bi-search"></i>
            {{ isSearching ? 'Searching…' : 'Search' }}
          </button>
        </div>

        <!-- Search results -->
        <div class="search-results" *ngIf="searchResults.length > 0 && !isAutoFilled">
          <div class="search-result-item" *ngFor="let t of searchResults" (click)="selectTaxpayer(t)">
            <div class="result-icon"><i class="bi bi-person-circle"></i></div>
            <div>
              <div class="result-name">{{ t.fullName || t.companyName }}</div>
              <div class="result-meta">TIN: {{ t.tinNumber }} · {{ t.taxpayerType.typeName }}</div>
            </div>
            <i class="bi bi-chevron-right ms-auto"></i>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </ng-container>

  <!-- Taxpayer profile card (auto-filled or taxpayer role) -->
  <div class="card" *ngIf="isAutoFilled || isTaxpayerRole">
    <div class="card-hdr">
      <div class="card-hdr-left">
        <div class="hdr-icon ic-green">
          <i class="bi bi-person-check" style="font-size:12px;color:#0e7c60"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="card-title">Taxpayer Profile</div>
          <div class="card-sub">Verified from registry</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card-p">
      <div class="form-grid-2">
        <div class="field-group">
          <label class="field-label">Full Name / Company</label>
          <input class="field-input" formControlName="taxpayerName" readonly />
        </div>
        <div class="field-group">
          <label class="field-label">TIN Number</label>
          <input class="field-input" formControlName="taxpayerTin" readonly />
        </div>
        <div class="field-group">
          <label class="field-label">Taxpayer Type</label>
          <input class="field-input" [value]="step1Form.get('taxpayerType.typeName')?.value" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="step-nav">
    <span></span>
    <button class="btn btn-primary" (click)="nextStep()" [disabled]="!step1Form.get('taxpayerId')?.value">
      Next: AIT Details <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i>
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     STEP 2 — AIT Details
════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div [hidden]="currentStep !== 2" [formGroup]="step2Form">

  <!-- Source Type -->
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-hdr">
      <div class="card-hdr-left">
        <div class="hdr-icon ic-purple">
          <i class="bi bi-diagram-3" style="font-size:12px;color:#5b21b6"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="card-title">AIT Source Type</div>
          <div class="card-sub">Select the source of this advance income tax</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card-p">
      <div class="source-type-grid">
        <button type="button" *ngFor="let src of sourceTypes" class="source-type-btn"
          [class.selected]="step2Form.get('sourceType')?.value === src.value" (click)="selectSourceType(src.value)">
          <i class="bi" [ngClass]="src.icon"></i>
          <span>{{ src.label }}</span>
        </button>
      </div>
      <div class="field-error" *ngIf="step2Form.get('sourceType')?.invalid && step2Form.get('sourceType')?.touched">
        Source type is required.
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Import-specific fields -->
  <div class="card" *ngIf="step2Form.get('sourceType')?.value === 'IMPORT'">
    <div class="card-hdr">
      <div class="card-hdr-left">
        <div class="hdr-icon ic-blue">
          <i class="bi bi-box-seam" style="font-size:12px;color:#185FA5"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="card-title">Import Details</div>
          <div class="card-sub">Link import duty record and HS code</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card-p">
      <div class="form-grid-2">
        <div class="field-group">
          <label class="field-label required">Import Duty Record ID</label>
          <input type="number" class="field-input" formControlName="importDutyRecordId" placeholder="e.g. 1042" />
          <div class="field-error"
            *ngIf="step2Form.get('importDutyRecordId')?.invalid && step2Form.get('importDutyRecordId')?.touched">
            Import duty record ID is required for IMPORT source.
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="field-group">
          <label class="field-label">HS Code</label>
          <input type="text" class="field-input" formControlName="hsCode" placeholder="e.g. 8471.30" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Deductor fields (Supplier / Salary / Contractor / Rent) -->
  <div class="card" *ngIf="['SUPPLIER','SALARY','CONTRACTOR','RENT'].includes(step2Form.get('sourceType')?.value)">
    <div class="card-hdr">
      <div class="card-hdr-left">
        <div class="hdr-icon ic-amber">
          <i class="bi bi-building" style="font-size:12px;color:#b45309"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="card-title">Deductor Information</div>
          <div class="card-sub">Who deducted this tax at source?</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card-p">
      <div class="form-grid-2">
        <div class="field-group">
          <label class="field-label required">Deductor Name</label>
          <input type="text" class="field-input" formControlName="deductorName"
            placeholder="Company or individual name" />
          <div class="field-error"
            *ngIf="step2Form.get('deductorName')?.invalid && step2Form.get('deductorName')?.touched">
            Deductor name is required.
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="field-group">
          <label class="field-label">Deductor TIN</label>
          <input type="text" class="field-input" formControlName="deductorTin" placeholder="Optional" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Financial Details -->
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-hdr">
      <div class="card-hdr-left">
        <div class="hdr-icon ic-green">
          <i class="bi bi-calculator" style="font-size:12px;color:#0e7c60"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="card-title">Financial Details</div>
          <div class="card-sub">AIT is calculated automatically from taxable value and rate</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card-p">
      <div class="form-grid-2">
        <div class="field-group">
          <label class="field-label required">Taxable Value (৳)</label>
          <input type="number" class="field-input" formControlName="taxableValue" placeholder="0.00" min="0.01"
            step="0.01" (input)="recalculate()" />
          <div class="field-error"
            *ngIf="step2Form.get('taxableValue')?.invalid && step2Form.get('taxableValue')?.touched">
            Taxable value must be greater than zero.
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="field-group">
          <label class="field-label required">AIT Rate (%)</label>
          <input type="number" class="field-input" formControlName="aitRate" placeholder="e.g. 5" min="0.01" max="100"
            step="0.01" (input)="recalculate()" />
          <div class="field-error" *ngIf="step2Form.get('aitRate')?.invalid && step2Form.get('aitRate')?.touched">
            AIT rate must be between 0.01 and 100.
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Calculated amount (read-only) -->
      <div class="ait-calc-panel" *ngIf="calculatedAitAmount > 0">
        <div class="calc-row">
          <span class="calc-label">Taxable Value</span>
          <span class="calc-val">{{ formatCurrency(step2Form.get('taxableValue')?.value) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="calc-row">
          <span class="calc-label">AIT Rate</span>
          <span class="calc-val">{{ step2Form.get('aitRate')?.value }}%</span>
        </div>
        <div class="calc-divider"></div>
        <div class="calc-row total">
          <span class="calc-label">AIT Amount</span>
          <span class="calc-total">{{ formatCurrency(calculatedAitAmount) }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="step-nav">
    <button class="btn btn-outline" (click)="prevStep()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back
    </button>
    <button class="btn btn-primary" (click)="nextStep()" [disabled]="step2Form.invalid">
      Next: Review <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i>
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     STEP 3 — Review & Submit
════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div [hidden]="currentStep !== 3">

  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-hdr">
      <div class="card-hdr-left">
        <div class="hdr-icon ic-purple">
          <i class="bi bi-clipboard-check" style="font-size:12px;color:#5b21b6"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="card-title">Review &amp; Submit</div>
          <div class="card-sub">Confirm all details before submission</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card-p">

      <!-- Taxpayer summary -->
      <div class="review-section">
        <div class="review-section-title">
          <i class="bi bi-person-circle"></i> Taxpayer
        </div>
        <div class="review-grid">
          <div class="review-row">
            <span class="rv-label">Name</span>
            <span class="rv-val">{{ step1Form.get('taxpayerName')?.value }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="review-row">
            <span class="rv-label">TIN</span>
            <span class="rv-val rv-mono">{{ step1Form.get('taxpayerTin')?.value }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="review-row">
            <span class="rv-label">Fiscal Year</span>
            <span class="rv-val">{{ fiscalYearName }}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- AIT details summary -->
      <div class="review-section">
        <div class="review-section-title">
          <i class="bi bi-receipt"></i> AIT Details
        </div>
        <div class="review-grid">
          <div class="review-row">
            <span class="rv-label">Source Type</span>
            <span class="rv-val">
              <span class="cat-badge" [ngClass]="getSourceClass(step2Form.get('sourceType')?.value)">
                {{ getSourceLabel(step2Form.get('sourceType')?.value) }}
              </span>
            </span>
          </div>
          <div class="review-row" *ngIf="step2Form.get('importDutyRecordId')?.value">
            <span class="rv-label">Import Duty Record</span>
            <span class="rv-val rv-mono">{{ step2Form.get('importDutyRecordId')?.value }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="review-row" *ngIf="step2Form.get('hsCode')?.value">
            <span class="rv-label">HS Code</span>
            <span class="rv-val rv-mono">{{ step2Form.get('hsCode')?.value }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="review-row" *ngIf="step2Form.get('deductorName')?.value">
            <span class="rv-label">Deductor</span>
            <span class="rv-val">{{ step2Form.get('deductorName')?.value }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="review-row">
            <span class="rv-label">Taxable Value</span>
            <span class="rv-val">{{ formatCurrency(step2Form.get('taxableValue')?.value) }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="review-row">
            <span class="rv-label">AIT Rate</span>
            <span class="rv-val">{{ step2Form.get('aitRate')?.value }}%</span>
          </div>
          <div class="review-row highlight">
            <span class="rv-label">AIT Amount</span>
            <span class="rv-val rv-total">{{ formatCurrency(calculatedAitAmount) }}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Documents upload -->
      <div class="review-section">
        <div class="review-section-title">
          <i class="bi bi-paperclip"></i> Supporting Documents
          <span class="badge b-warning ms-2">Required before submission</span>
        </div>
        <div class="doc-upload-area" (click)="fileInput.click()" [class.has-files]="uploadedFiles.length > 0">
          <input #fileInput type="file" multiple hidden accept=".pdf,.jpg,.jpeg,.png"
            (change)="onFileSelected($event)" />
          <i class="bi bi-cloud-upload" style="font-size:24px;color:#7c3aed"></i>
          <p>Click to upload documents (PDF, JPG, PNG)</p>
          <p class="doc-hint">Challan copy, import documents, or any supporting evidence</p>
        </div>
        <div class="file-list" *ngIf="uploadedFiles.length > 0">
          <div class="file-item" *ngFor="let f of uploadedFiles; let i = index">
            <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-fill"></i>
            <span>{{ f.name }}</span>
            <span class="file-size">({{ (f.size / 1024).toFixed(1) }} KB)</span>
            <button class="remove-file-btn" (click)="removeFile(i)">
              <i class="bi bi-x"></i>
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="step-nav">
    <button class="btn btn-outline" (click)="prevStep()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back
    </button>
    <button class="btn btn-primary" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isSaving || uploadedFiles.length === 0">
      <span *ngIf="isSaving" class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span>
      <i *ngIf="!isSaving" class="bi bi-send-fill"></i>
      {{ isSaving ? 'Saving...' : 'Submit AIT Record' }}
    </button>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/ait/pages/officer-review/officer-review.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>AIT Review</h4>
    <p>Review, verify, and process this advance income tax record.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" routerLink="/ait/officer-dashboard">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to Queue
  </button>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper" *ngIf="ait; else loading">

  <!-- ── Status Progress Tracker ─────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <div class="workflow-tracker">
    <ng-container *ngFor="let step of workflowSteps; let i = index; let last = last">
      <div class="wf-step" [class.done]="isStepDone(step.status)" [class.active]="isStepActive(step.status)"
        [class.rejected]="step.status === 'REJECTED' && ait.status === 'REJECTED'">
        <div class="wf-dot">
          <i class="bi" [ngClass]="isStepDone(step.status) ? 'bi-check-lg' : step.icon"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="wf-label">{{ step.label }}</div>
      </div>
      <div *ngIf="!last" class="wf-line" [class.done]="isStepDone(step.status)"></div>
    </ng-container>
  </div>

  <!-- ── Two-column layout ─────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <div class="review-layout">

    <!-- LEFT: Record details ──────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="review-main">

      <!-- Taxpayer card -->
      <div class="form-card">
        <div class="section-header">
          <div class="section-icon">
            <i class="bi bi-person-circle"></i>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="section-title">Taxpayer Information</div>
            <div class="section-sub">Verified taxpayer profile</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-grid">
          <div class="detail-row">
            <span class="detail-label">Name</span>
            <span class="detail-val">{{ ait.taxpayerName }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="detail-row">
            <span class="detail-label">TIN</span>
            <span class="detail-val detail-mono">{{ ait.taxpayerTin }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="detail-row">
            <span class="detail-label">Fiscal Year</span>
            <span class="detail-val">{{ ait.fiscalYearName }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="detail-row">
            <span class="detail-label">Submitted</span>
            <span class="detail-val">{{ ait.createdAt | date:'dd MMM yyyy, HH:mm' }}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- AIT Details card -->
      <div class="form-card">
        <div class="section-header">
          <div class="section-icon">
            <i class="bi bi-receipt"></i>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="section-title">AIT Record — {{ ait.aitReferenceNo }}</div>
            <div class="section-sub">Source: {{ getSourceLabel(ait!.sourceType) }}</div>
          </div>
          <span class="status-badge ms-auto" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(ait!.status)">
            {{ getStatusLabel(ait!.status) }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-grid">
          <div class="detail-row">
            <span class="detail-label">Source Type</span>
            <span class="detail-val">
              <span class="cat-badge" [ngClass]="getSourceClass(ait!.sourceType)">
                <i class="bi" [ngClass]="getSourceIcon(ait!.sourceType)"></i>
                {{ getSourceLabel(ait!.sourceType) }}
              </span>
            </span>
          </div>
          <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="ait.importDutyRecordId">
            <span class="detail-label">Import Duty Record</span>
            <span class="detail-val detail-mono">{{ ait.importDutyRecordId }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="ait.hsCode">
            <span class="detail-label">HS Code</span>
            <span class="detail-val detail-mono">{{ ait.hsCode }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="ait.deductorName">
            <span class="detail-label">Deductor</span>
            <span class="detail-val">{{ ait.deductorName }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="detail-row">
            <span class="detail-label">Taxable Value</span>
            <span class="detail-val">{{ formatCurrency(ait.taxableValue) }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="detail-row">
            <span class="detail-label">AIT Rate</span>
            <span class="detail-val">{{ ait.aitRate }}%</span>
          </div>
          <div class="detail-row highlight">
            <span class="detail-label">Calculated AIT</span>
            <span class="detail-val detail-amount">{{ formatCurrency(ait.calculatedAitAmount) }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="ait.approvedAitAmount">
            <span class="detail-label">Approved AIT</span>
            <span class="detail-val detail-amount approved">{{ formatCurrency(ait.approvedAitAmount) }}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Challan card -->
      <div class="form-card" *ngIf="ait.challanNumber || ait.status === 'SUBMITTED'">
        <div class="section-header">
          <div class="section-icon">
            <i class="bi bi-bank"></i>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="section-title">Challan Verification</div>
            <div class="section-sub">Treasury payment proof</div>
          </div>
          <span class="challan-verified ms-auto" *ngIf="ait.challanVerified">
            <i class="bi bi-patch-check-fill"></i> Verified
          </span>
        </div>

        <!-- Verify challan form (officer only, SUBMITTED records) -->
        <div class="card-p" *ngIf="!ait.challanVerified && ait.status === 'SUBMITTED' && isOfficerRole">
          <form [formGroup]="challanForm" (ngSubmit)="onVerifyChallan()">
            <div class="form-grid-2">
              <div class="field-group">
                <label class="field-label required">Challan Number</label>
                <input type="text" class="field-input" formControlName="challanNumber"
                  placeholder="e.g. CH-2024-00123" />
              </div>
              <div class="field-group">
                <label class="field-label required">Bank Name</label>
                <input type="text" class="field-input" formControlName="bankName" placeholder="e.g. Sonali Bank" />
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="form-action-row">
              <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary" [disabled]="challanForm.invalid || isActioning">
                <i class="bi bi-check-circle"></i> Verify &amp; Move to Review Queue
              </button>
            </div>
          </form>
        </div>

        <!-- Challan details (already verified) -->
        <div class="detail-grid" *ngIf="ait.challanNumber">
          <div class="detail-row">
            <span class="detail-label">Challan No.</span>
            <span class="detail-val detail-mono">{{ ait.challanNumber }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="detail-row">
            <span class="detail-label">Bank</span>
            <span class="detail-val">{{ ait.bankName }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="ait.challanVerifiedBy">
            <span class="detail-label">Verified By</span>
            <span class="detail-val">{{ ait.challanVerifiedBy }}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Documents -->
      <div class="form-card">
        <div class="section-header">
          <div class="section-icon"><i class="bi bi-paperclip"></i></div>
          <div>
            <div class="section-title">Supporting Documents</div>
            <div class="section-sub">{{ ait.documents.length }} file(s) attached</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="card-p">
          <div class="doc-list">
            <a class="doc-item" *ngFor="let doc of ait.documents" [href]="getDocDownloadUrl(doc.id)" target="_blank">
              <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-fill"></i>
              <span class="doc-name">{{ doc.fileName }}</span>
              <span class="doc-size">{{ (doc.fileSize / 1024).toFixed(1) }} KB</span>
              <i class="bi bi-download ms-auto"></i>
            </a>
          </div>
          <!-- Empty state -->
          <div class="empty-state-sm" *ngIf="!ait.documents.length">
            <i class="bi bi-paperclip"></i>
            <span>No documents attached.</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>

    <!-- RIGHT: Officer actions + audit trail ─────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="review-sidebar">

      <!-- Taxpayer submit action -->
      <div class="form-card" *ngIf="isTaxpayerRole && ait.status === 'DRAFT'">
        <div class="section-header">
          <div class="section-icon"><i class="bi bi-send-fill"></i></div>
          <div>
            <div class="section-title">Submit Record</div>
            <div class="section-sub">Ready to submit to tax authority?</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="card-p">
          <p class="mb-12">
            Make sure all documents are uploaded before submitting. Once submitted, you cannot edit this record.
          </p>
          <button class="btn btn-primary w-full" (click)="onSubmitRecord()"
            [disabled]="isActioning || !ait.documents.length">
            <i class="bi bi-send"></i> Submit AIT Record
          </button>
          <div class="field-hint text-danger mt-10" *ngIf="!ait.documents.length">
            <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i>
            Upload at least one document before submitting.
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Officer submit (officer can submit DRAFT records) -->
      <div class="form-card" *ngIf="isOfficerRole && ait.status === 'DRAFT'">
        <div class="section-header">
          <div class="section-icon"><i class="bi bi-send-fill"></i></div>
          <div>
            <div class="section-title">Submit Record</div>
            <div class="section-sub">Submit to tax authority for review</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="card-p">
          <p class="mb-12">Documents uploaded: {{ ait.documents.length || 0 }} file(s). Once submitted, you cannot
            edit.</p>
          <button class="btn btn-primary w-full" (click)="onSubmitRecord()"
            [disabled]="isActioning || !ait.documents.length">
            <i class="bi bi-send"></i> Submit AIT Record
          </button>
          <div class="field-hint text-danger mt-10" *ngIf="!ait.documents.length">
            <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i>
            ⚠ Upload at least one document first.
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Officer actions -->
      <div class="form-card" *ngIf="isOfficerRole && canAct()">
        <div class="section-header">
          <div class="section-icon"><i class="bi bi-shield-check"></i></div>
          <div>
            <div class="section-title">Officer Actions</div>
            <div class="section-sub">Review and process this record</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="card-p">

          <!-- Assign to myself (PENDING) -->
          <ng-container *ngIf="ait.status === 'PENDING'">
            <button class="btn btn-primary w-full" (click)="onAssign()" [disabled]="isActioning">
              <i class="bi bi-person-check"></i> Take Assignment
            </button>
          </ng-container>

          <!-- Approve / Reject form (UNDER_REVIEW) -->
          <ng-container *ngIf="ait.status === 'UNDER_REVIEW'">
            <form [formGroup]="reviewForm">
              <div class="field-group mb-12">
                <label class="field-label">Approved Amount (৳)</label>
                <input type="number" class="field-input" formControlName="approvedAmount"
                  [placeholder]="'Default: ' + ait.calculatedAitAmount" />
                <small class="field-hint">Leave blank to use calculated amount</small>
              </div>
              <div class="field-group mb-12">
                <label class="field-label">Approval Notes</label>
                <textarea class="field-input" formControlName="approvalNotes" rows="3"
                  placeholder="Optional notes for taxpayer…"></textarea>
              </div>
              <div class="action-btn-group">
                <button type="button" class="btn btn-success" (click)="onApprove()" [disabled]="isActioning">
                  <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Approve
                </button>
                <button type="button" class="btn btn-danger" (click)="showRejectPanel = !showRejectPanel"
                  [disabled]="isActioning">
                  <i class="bi bi-x-circle-fill"></i> Reject
                </button>
              </div>
            </form>

            <!-- Reject panel -->
            <div class="reject-panel" *ngIf="showRejectPanel">
              <form [formGroup]="rejectForm" (ngSubmit)="onReject()">
                <div class="field-group">
                  <label class="field-label required">Rejection Reason</label>
                  <textarea class="field-input" formControlName="rejectionReason" rows="3"
                    placeholder="Explain why this record is rejected…"></textarea>
                  <div class="field-error"
                    *ngIf="rejectForm.get('rejectionReason')?.invalid && rejectForm.get('rejectionReason')?.touched">
                    Rejection reason is required.
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div class="action-btn-group mt-10">
                  <button type="button" class="btn btn-outline" (click)="showRejectPanel = false">Cancel</button>
                  <button type="submit" class="btn btn-danger" [disabled]="rejectForm.invalid || isActioning">
                    <i class="bi bi-x-circle-fill"></i> Confirm Reject
                  </button>
                </div>
              </form>
            </div>
          </ng-container>

          <!-- Credit (APPROVED) -->
          <ng-container *ngIf="ait.status === 'APPROVED'">
            <div class="credit-summary">
              <div class="credit-amount">{{ formatCurrency(ait.approvedAitAmount || ait.calculatedAitAmount) }}</div>
              <div class="credit-label">Ready to be credited to taxpayer ITR</div>
            </div>
            <button class="btn btn-success w-full" (click)="onCredit()" [disabled]="isActioning">
              <i class="bi bi-currency-exchange"></i> Post Credit to ITR Ledger
            </button>
          </ng-container>

          <ng-container *ngIf="ait.status === 'CREDITED'">
            <div class="credit-summary">
              <div class="credit-amount">
                {{ formatCurrency(ait.approvedAitAmount || ait.calculatedAitAmount) }}
              </div>
              <div class="credit-label">AIT credit has been posted to taxpayer ledger</div>
            </div>
            <button class="btn btn-success w-full" (click)="onDownloadCertificate()">
              <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-arrow-down-fill"></i>
              Download AIT Certificate (PDF)
            </button>
          </ng-container>

        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Rejection reason (visible to taxpayer) -->
      <div class="form-card rejection-card" *ngIf="ait.status === 'REJECTED' && ait.rejectionReason">
        <div class="section-header">
          <div class="section-icon rejection-icon"><i class="bi bi-x-circle-fill"></i></div>
          <div>
            <div class="section-title">Rejection Reason</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="card-p">
          <p class="rejection-text">{{ ait.rejectionReason }}</p>
          <button class="btn btn-outline w-full mt-10" *ngIf="isTaxpayerRole" routerLink="/ait/{{ ait.id }}/edit">
            <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Correct &amp; Resubmit
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Status Audit Trail -->
      <div class="form-card">
        <div class="section-header">
          <div class="section-icon"><i class="bi bi-clock-history"></i></div>
          <div>
            <div class="section-title">Audit Trail</div>
            <div class="section-sub">{{ ait.statusHistory.length || 0 }} events</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="card-p">
          <div class="audit-timeline">
            <div class="audit-event" *ngFor="let event of ait.statusHistory"
              [class.event-rejected]="event.toStatus === 'REJECTED'">
              <div class="audit-dot">
                <i class="bi bi-circle-fill"></i>
              </div>
              <div class="audit-body">
                <div class="audit-transition">
                  <span class="audit-from" *ngIf="event.fromStatus">{{ event.fromStatus }}</span>
                  <i class="bi bi-arrow-right" *ngIf="event.fromStatus"></i>
                  <span class="audit-to">{{ event.toStatus }}</span>
                </div>
                <div class="audit-meta">
                  <span>{{ event.changedBy }}</span>
                  <span>·</span>
                  <span>{{ event.changedAt | date:'dd MMM yyyy, HH:mm' }}</span>
                </div>
                <div class="audit-reason" *ngIf="event.changeReason">
                  {{ event.changeReason }}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="!ait.statusHistory.length">
              <i class="bi bi-clock-history"></i>
              <p>No history yet.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<ng-template #loading>
  <div class="loading-row">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm" style="color:#7c3aed"></div>
    <span>Loading AIT record…</span>
  </div>
</ng-template>
```

## File: src/app/features/audit-management/pages/audit-edit/audit-edit.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Edit Audit Case</h4>
    <p>Update audit case details and status.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to View
  </button>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
</div>

<div class="form-card" *ngIf="!isLoading">

  <div class="edit-banner">
    <i class="bi bi-pencil-square"></i>
    Editing: <strong>{{ form.taxpayerName }}</strong>
    <span class="banner-code">{{ form.caseNo }}</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Section 1: Taxpayer -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Taxpayer Information</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">TIN and taxpayer details</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">TIN Number</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.tinNumber" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Taxpayer Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.taxpayerName" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Return Reference</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.returnReference"
            placeholder="e.g. ITR-2024-001234" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Fiscal Year</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.fiscalYear">
            <option value="">— Select —</option>
            <option *ngFor="let y of assessmentYears" [value]="y">{{ y }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: Audit Details -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon cyan">
        <i class="bi bi-shield-fill-check"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Audit Details</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Type, priority, dates and status</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Audit Type</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.auditType">
            <option *ngFor="let t of auditTypes" [value]="t">{{ t }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Priority</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-speedometer2 input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.priority">
            <option *ngFor="let p of priorities" [value]="p">{{ p }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.status">
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Scheduled Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.scheduledDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Tax Period From</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.taxPeriodStart" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Tax Period To</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar2-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.taxPeriodEnd" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 3: Assignment -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon amber">
        <i class="bi bi-person-gear"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Assignment</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Auditor and supervisor details</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Assigned Officer</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.assignedOfficerName">
            <option value="">— Select Officer —</option>
            <option *ngFor="let a of auditors" [value]="a">{{ a }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Supervisor</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-check input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.supervisorName">
            <option value="">— Select Supervisor —</option>
            <option *ngFor="let s of supervisors" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 4: Remarks -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon green">
        <i class="bi bi-chat-text-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Remarks</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Internal notes or additional comments</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" [(ngModel)]="form.remarks" rows="3"
            placeholder="Internal notes, context, or special instructions..."></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Form Actions -->
  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isSaving">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isSaving || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isSaving"><i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Update Audit</span>
      <span *ngIf="isSaving">
        <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span> Updating...
      </span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```
