## File: src/app/features/audit-management/pages/audit-view/audit-view.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Audit Case Details</h4>
    <p>Full audit case information and workflow.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="header-actions">
    <button class="btn-back" (click)="onBack()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back
    </button>
    <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit-top" (click)="onEdit()">
      <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
</div>

<ng-container *ngIf="!isLoading && auditCase">

  <!-- Header Card -->
  <div class="audit-header-card">
    <div class="ahc-left">
      <div class="ahc-icon"><i class="bi bi-search"></i></div>
      <div>
        <div class="ahc-case-no">{{ auditCase.caseNo }}</div>
        <div class="ahc-taxpayer">{{ auditCase.taxpayerName }}</div>
        <div class="ahc-meta">
          <span class="ahc-pill">{{ getTypeLabel(auditCase.auditType) }}</span>
          <span class="ahc-pill dim">{{ getTaxTypeLabel(auditCase.taxType) }}</span>
          <span class="ahc-pill dim" *ngIf="auditCase.fiscalYear">{{ auditCase.fiscalYear }}</span>
          <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(auditCase.status)">
            {{ getStatusLabel(auditCase.status) }}
          </span>
          <span class="priority-pill" [ngClass]="getPriorityClass(auditCase.priority)">
            {{ auditCase.priority }}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="ahc-right">
      <div class="ahc-stat">
        <span class="ahcs-label">Queries</span>
        <span class="ahcs-value">{{ auditCase.openQueryCount }}/{{ auditCase.queryCount }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="ahc-stat">
        <span class="ahcs-label">Findings</span>
        <span class="ahcs-value">{{ auditCase.findingCount }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="ahc-stat">
        <span class="ahcs-label">Assessment</span>
        <span class="ahcs-value">{{ auditCase.hasAssessment ? 'Yes' : 'No' }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="ahc-stat">
        <span class="ahcs-label">Demand</span>
        <span class="ahcs-value">{{ auditCase.hasDemandNotice ? 'Issued' : '—' }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Action Buttons Row -->
  <div class="audit-action-row">
    <button class="audit-action-btn" *ngIf="auditCase.status === 'CASE_CREATED'"
      (click)="issueNotice()">
      <i class="bi bi-bell-fill"></i> Issue Notice
    </button>
    <button class="audit-action-btn" *ngIf="canRequestDocuments()"
      (click)="openDocRequestModal()">
      <i class="bi bi-folder2-open"></i> Request Documents
    </button>
    <button class="audit-action-btn" *ngIf="canRaiseQuery()"
      (click)="openQueryModal()">
      <i class="bi bi-chat-dots-fill"></i> Raise Query
    </button>
    <button class="audit-action-btn" *ngIf="canAddFinding()"
      (click)="openFindingModal()">
      <i class="bi bi-search"></i> Add Finding
    </button>
    <button class="audit-action-btn success" *ngIf="canProposeAssessment()"
      (click)="goToAssessment()">
      <i class="bi bi-calculator-fill"></i> Propose Assessment
    </button>
    <button class="audit-action-btn warning" *ngIf="canApproveAssessment()"
      (click)="openApprovalModal()">
      <i class="bi bi-shield-check"></i> Approve Assessment
    </button>
    <button class="audit-action-btn danger" *ngIf="auditCase.status === 'ASSESSMENT_APPROVED'"
      (click)="issueDemand()">
      <i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i> Issue Demand Notice
    </button>
  </div>

  <!-- Tabs -->
  <div class="audit-tabs-wrapper">
    <div class="audit-tabs">
      <button class="atab" [class.active]="activeTab==='overview'" (click)="setTab('overview')">
        <i class="bi bi-grid-1x2-fill"></i> Overview
      </button>
      <button class="atab" [class.active]="activeTab==='queries'" (click)="setTab('queries'); loadQueries()">
        <i class="bi bi-chat-dots-fill"></i> Queries
        <span class="atab-badge" *ngIf="auditCase.openQueryCount > 0">{{ auditCase.openQueryCount }}</span>
      </button>
      <button class="atab" [class.active]="activeTab==='documents'" (click)="setTab('documents'); loadDocRequests()">
        <i class="bi bi-folder2-open"></i> Documents
      </button>
      <button class="atab" [class.active]="activeTab==='findings'" (click)="setTab('findings'); loadFindings()">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i> Findings
        <span class="atab-badge warn" *ngIf="auditCase.findingCount > 0">{{ auditCase.findingCount }}</span>
      </button>
      <button class="atab" [class.active]="activeTab==='assessment'" (click)="setTab('assessment'); loadAssessment()">
        <i class="bi bi-calculator-fill"></i> Assessment
      </button>
      <button class="atab" *ngIf="auditCase.hasDemandNotice" [class.active]="activeTab==='demand'"
        (click)="setTab('demand'); loadDemand()">
        <i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i> Demand Notice
      </button>
      <button class="atab" [class.active]="activeTab==='timeline'" (click)="setTab('timeline')">
        <i class="bi bi-clock-history"></i> Timeline
      </button>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══ TAB: Overview ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div class="atab-content" *ngIf="activeTab==='overview'">
      <div class="details-grid">

        <div class="detail-card">
          <div class="detail-card-header"><i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i><span>Taxpayer</span></div>
          <div class="detail-body">
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Name</span><span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ auditCase.taxpayerName }}</span></div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">TIN</span><span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ auditCase.tinNumber }}</span></span></div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Tax Type</span><span class="detail-value">{{ getTaxTypeLabel(auditCase.taxType) }}</span></div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="detail-card">
          <div class="detail-card-header"><i class="bi bi-folder-fill"></i><span>Case Details</span></div>
          <div class="detail-body">
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Case No</span><span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ auditCase.caseNo }}</span></span></div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Audit Type</span><span class="detail-value">{{ getTypeLabel(auditCase.auditType) }}</span></div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Fiscal Year</span><span class="detail-value">{{ auditCase.fiscalYear || '—' }}</span></div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Period</span><span class="detail-value">{{ auditCase.taxPeriodStart || '—' }} → {{ auditCase.taxPeriodEnd || '—' }}</span></div>
            <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="auditCase.returnReference"><span class="detail-label">Return Ref</span><span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ auditCase.returnReference }}</span></span></div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="detail-card">
          <div class="detail-card-header"><i class="bi bi-lightning-charge-fill"></i><span>Trigger &amp; Risk</span></div>
          <div class="detail-body">
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Trigger</span><span class="detail-value">{{ getTriggerLabel(auditCase.triggerReason) }}</span></div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Priority</span>
              <span class="detail-value"><span class="priority-pill" [ngClass]="getPriorityClass(auditCase.priority)">{{ auditCase.priority }}</span></span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Risk Score</span>
              <span class="detail-value">
                <span class="risk-num" [ngClass]="getRiskNumClass(auditCase.riskScore)">{{ auditCase.riskScore }}</span>
              </span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="detail-card">
          <div class="detail-card-header"><i class="bi bi-person-check-fill"></i><span>Assignment</span></div>
          <div class="detail-body">
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Officer</span><span class="detail-value">{{ auditCase.assignedOfficerName || '—' }}</span></div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Supervisor</span><span class="detail-value">{{ auditCase.supervisorName || '—' }}</span></div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Scheduled</span><span class="detail-value">{{ auditCase.scheduledDate || '—' }}</span></div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Due Date</span>
              <span class="detail-value" [class.due-overdue]="isDue(auditCase.dueDate)">{{ auditCase.dueDate || '—' }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Created By</span><span class="detail-value">{{ auditCase.createdBy }}</span></div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Created At</span><span class="detail-value">{{ auditCase.createdAt | date:'mediumDate' }}</span></div>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>

      <div class="detail-card mt-3" *ngIf="auditCase.remarks">
        <div class="detail-card-header"><i class="bi bi-chat-text"></i><span>Remarks</span></div>
        <div class="detail-body">
          <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-value" style="text-align:left;">{{ auditCase.remarks }}</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══ TAB: Queries ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div class="atab-content" *ngIf="activeTab==='queries'">
      <div class="tab-action-bar">
        <span class="tab-section-title">Audit Queries</span>
        <button class="btn-search" style="padding:7px 14px;font-size:12px;" *ngIf="canRaiseQuery()" (click)="openQueryModal()">
          <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i> Raise Query
        </button>
      </div>
      <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="queriesLoading">
        <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
      </div>
      <div *ngIf="!queriesLoading">
        <div class="audit-item-card" *ngFor="let q of queries">
          <div class="aic-header">
            <span class="code-badge">{{ q.queryNo }}</span>
            <span class="cat-badge">{{ q.queryType }}</span>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="q.status==='OPEN' ? 'badge-warning' : 'badge-success'">{{ q.status }}</span>
            <span class="due-overdue" *ngIf="q.deadline && isDue(q.deadline)">Overdue</span>
          </div>
          <div class="aic-title">{{ q.subject }}</div>
          <div class="aic-body">{{ q.queryText }}</div>
          <div class="aic-meta">
            <span><i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i> {{ q.raisedBy }}</span>
            <span><i class="bi bi-clock"></i> {{ q.raisedAt | date:'mediumDate' }}</span>
            <span *ngIf="q.deadline"><i class="bi bi-alarm"></i> Due: {{ q.deadline | date:'mediumDate' }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="aic-response" *ngIf="q.responseText">
            <span class="air-label"><i class="bi bi-reply-fill"></i> Response</span>
            <div class="air-text">{{ q.responseText }}</div>
            <div class="air-meta">{{ q.respondedBy }} · {{ q.respondedAt | date:'mediumDate' }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="queries.length === 0">
          <i class="bi bi-chat-dots"></i><p>No queries raised yet.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══ TAB: Documents ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div class="atab-content" *ngIf="activeTab==='documents'">
      <div class="tab-action-bar">
        <span class="tab-section-title">Document Requests</span>
        <button class="btn-search" style="padding:7px 14px;font-size:12px;" *ngIf="canRequestDocuments()" (click)="openDocRequestModal()">
          <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i> Request Documents
        </button>
      </div>
      <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="docsLoading">
        <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
      </div>
      <div *ngIf="!docsLoading">
        <div class="audit-item-card" *ngFor="let dr of docRequests">
          <div class="aic-header">
            <span class="code-badge">{{ dr.requestNo }}</span>
            <span class="cat-badge">{{ dr.requestType }}</span>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getDocStatusClass(dr.status)">{{ dr.status }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="aic-body"><i class="bi bi-files text-primary me-1"></i> {{ dr.requestedDocuments }}</div>
          <div class="aic-body text-muted" *ngIf="dr.requestReason">{{ dr.requestReason }}</div>
          <div class="aic-meta">
            <span><i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i> {{ dr.requestedBy }}</span>
            <span><i class="bi bi-clock"></i> {{ dr.requestedAt | date:'mediumDate' }}</span>
            <span *ngIf="dr.deadline" [class.due-overdue]="isDue(dr.deadline)">Due: {{ dr.deadline | date:'mediumDate' }}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="aic-response" *ngIf="dr.fulfillmentNotes">
            <span class="air-label"><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill text-success"></i> Fulfilled</span>
            <div class="air-text">{{ dr.fulfillmentNotes }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="docRequests.length === 0">
          <i class="bi bi-folder2-open"></i><p>No document requests yet.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══ TAB: Findings ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div class="atab-content" *ngIf="activeTab==='findings'">
      <div class="tab-action-bar">
        <span class="tab-section-title">Audit Findings
          <span *ngIf="findings.length > 0" class="findings-total-tag">
            Total Additional Tax: <strong>{{ findingsTotalTax | number:'1.2-2' }} BDT</strong>
          </span>
        </span>
        <button class="btn-search" style="padding:7px 14px;font-size:12px;" *ngIf="canAddFinding()" (click)="openFindingModal()">
          <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i> Add Finding
        </button>
      </div>
      <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="findingsLoading">
        <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
      </div>
      <div *ngIf="!findingsLoading">
        <div class="audit-item-card finding" *ngFor="let f of findings; let i = index">
          <div class="finding-num">{{ i + 1 }}</div>
          <div class="finding-body">
            <div class="aic-header">
              <span class="code-badge">{{ f.findingNo }}</span>
              <span class="cat-badge purple">{{ f.findingType }}</span>
              <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getFindingStatusClass(f.status)">{{ f.status }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="aic-body">{{ f.description }}</div>
            <div class="finding-basis" *ngIf="f.legalBasis"><i class="bi bi-book-fill"></i> {{ f.legalBasis }}</div>
            <div class="finding-amounts">
              <div class="fa-item"><label>Declared</label><span>{{ f.declaredAmount | number:'1.2-2' }}</span></div>
              <div class="fa-item"><label>Assessed</label><span class="text-primary">{{ f.assessedAmount | number:'1.2-2' }}</span></div>
              <div class="fa-item"><label>Variance</label><span [class.text-danger]="f.varianceAmount > 0">{{ f.varianceAmount | number:'1.2-2' }}</span></div>
              <div class="fa-item"><label>Addl. Tax</label><span class="text-danger fw-bold">{{ f.additionalTax | number:'1.2-2' }}</span></div>
            </div>
            <div class="aic-meta">
              <span><i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i> {{ f.recordedBy }}</span>
              <span><i class="bi bi-clock"></i> {{ f.recordedAt | date:'mediumDate' }}</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="findings.length === 0">
          <i class="bi bi-search"></i><p>No findings recorded yet.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══ TAB: Assessment ═════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div class="atab-content" *ngIf="activeTab==='assessment'">
      <div class="tab-action-bar">
        <span class="tab-section-title">Assessment Order</span>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2">
          <button class="btn-search" style="padding:7px 14px;font-size:12px;background:#1a7a45;" *ngIf="canProposeAssessment()" (click)="goToAssessment()">
            <i class="bi bi-calculator-fill"></i> Propose Assessment
          </button>
          <button class="btn-search" style="padding:7px 14px;font-size:12px;background:#e65100;" *ngIf="canApproveAssessment()" (click)="openApprovalModal()">
            <i class="bi bi-shield-check"></i> Approve
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <ng-container *ngIf="assessment; else noAssessment">
        <div class="detail-card">
          <div class="detail-card-header"><i class="bi bi-calculator-fill"></i><span>Assessment Summary</span></div>
          <div class="detail-body">
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Assessment No</span><span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ assessment.assessmentNo }}</span></span></div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Additional Tax</span><span class="detail-value">{{ assessment.additionalTax | number:'1.2-2' }} BDT</span></div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Penalty</span><span class="detail-value">{{ assessment.penaltyAmount | number:'1.2-2' }} BDT</span></div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Interest</span><span class="detail-value">{{ assessment.interestAmount | number:'1.2-2' }} BDT</span></div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Total Demand</span><span class="detail-value fw-bold text-danger">{{ assessment.totalDemand | number:'1.2-2' }} BDT</span></div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Status</span><span class="detail-value"><span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(assessment.status)">{{ assessment.status }}</span></span></div>
            <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="assessment.paymentDeadline"><span class="detail-label">Pay By</span><span class="detail-value due-overdue">{{ assessment.paymentDeadline | date:'mediumDate' }}</span></div>
            <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="assessment.approvedBy"><span class="detail-label">Approved By</span><span class="detail-value">{{ assessment.approvedBy }}</span></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </ng-container>
      <ng-template #noAssessment>
        <div class="empty-state"><i class="bi bi-calculator"></i><p>No assessment proposed yet.</p></div>
      </ng-template>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══ TAB: Demand Notice ══════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div class="atab-content" *ngIf="activeTab==='demand'">
      <ng-container *ngIf="demandNotice; else noDemand">
        <div class="demand-banner">
          <div class="db-left">
            <div class="db-badge">DEMAND NOTICE</div>
            <div class="db-no">{{ demandNotice.demandNo }}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="db-amount">
            <label>Total Amount Due</label>
            <div class="db-amount-val">{{ demandNotice.amountDue | number:'1.2-2' }} BDT</div>
            <div class="db-due" [class.due-overdue]="isDue(demandNotice.dueDate)">
              Pay by: {{ demandNotice.dueDate | date:'mediumDate' }}
            </div>
          </div>
          <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(demandNotice.status)">{{ demandNotice.status }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-card mt-3">
          <div class="detail-card-header"><i class="bi bi-bank"></i><span>Payment Instructions</span></div>
          <div class="detail-body">
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-value" style="text-align:left;">{{ demandNotice.paymentInstructions }}</span></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </ng-container>
      <ng-template #noDemand>
        <div class="empty-state"><i class="bi bi-receipt"></i><p>Demand notice not issued yet.</p></div>
      </ng-template>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══ TAB: Timeline ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div class="atab-content" *ngIf="activeTab==='timeline'">
      <div class="timeline-list">
        <div class="timeline-row" *ngFor="let h of auditCase.statusHistory; let last = last">
          <div class="tl-line-wrap">
            <div class="tl-dot"></div>
            <div class="tl-line" *ngIf="!last"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="tl-content">
            <div class="tl-header">
              <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(h.toStatus)">{{ getStatusLabel(h.toStatus) }}</span>
              <span class="tl-time">{{ h.changedAt | date:'medium' }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="tl-by"><i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i> {{ h.changedBy }}
              <span class="text-muted ms-1" *ngIf="h.changedByRole">({{ h.changedByRole }})</span>
            </div>
            <div class="tl-reason" *ngIf="h.changeReason">{{ h.changeReason }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="!auditCase.statusHistory.length">
          <i class="bi bi-clock-history"></i><p>No status history yet.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

</ng-container>

<!-- ══ MODAL: Raise Query ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showQueryModal">
  <div class="modal-card wide">
    <div class="modal-accent info"></div>
    <div class="modal-header-row">
      <h5><i class="bi bi-chat-dots-fill text-info me-2"></i>Raise Query</h5>
      <button class="modal-close" (click)="showQueryModal = false"><i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i></button>
    </div>
    <form [formGroup]="queryForm" (ngSubmit)="submitQuery()">
      <div class="form-group mb-3">
        <label class="form-label">Query Type</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="queryType">
            <option value="GENERAL">General</option>
            <option value="INCOME">Income</option>
            <option value="VAT">VAT</option>
            <option value="DOCUMENT">Document</option>
            <option value="EXPLANATION">Explanation</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group mb-3">
        <label class="form-label required">Subject</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" formControlName="subject" placeholder="Query subject..." />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group mb-3">
        <label class="form-label required">Query Details</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-chat-text input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" rows="4" formControlName="queryText" placeholder="Describe the query..."></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group mb-3">
        <label class="form-label">Response Deadline</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" formControlName="deadline" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="modal-actions">
        <button type="button" class="btn-cancel" (click)="showQueryModal = false">Cancel</button>
        <button type="submit" class="btn-submit" [disabled]="queryForm.invalid || querySubmitting">
          <span *ngIf="querySubmitting" class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-1"></span>
          <i class="bi bi-send-fill" *ngIf="!querySubmitting"></i> Raise Query
        </button>
      </div>
    </form>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══ MODAL: Request Documents ══════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showDocModal">
  <div class="modal-card wide">
    <div class="modal-accent warning"></div>
    <div class="modal-header-row">
      <h5><i class="bi bi-folder2-open text-warning me-2"></i>Request Documents</h5>
      <button class="modal-close" (click)="showDocModal = false"><i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i></button>
    </div>
    <form [formGroup]="docForm" (ngSubmit)="submitDocRequest()">
      <div class="form-group mb-3">
        <label class="form-label required">Documents Required</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-files input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" rows="3" formControlName="requestedDocuments"
            placeholder="e.g. Bank statements, Purchase invoices, Import documents..."></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group mb-3">
        <label class="form-label">Reason / Scope</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-info-circle input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" rows="2" formControlName="requestReason"
            placeholder="Explain why these documents are needed..."></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-grid">
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Request Type</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
            <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="requestType">
              <option value="INITIAL">Initial Request</option>
              <option value="FOLLOW_UP">Follow-up</option>
              <option value="CLARIFICATION">Clarification</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Submission Deadline</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
            <input type="date" class="form-input" formControlName="deadline" />
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="modal-actions mt-3">
        <button type="button" class="btn-cancel" (click)="showDocModal = false">Cancel</button>
        <button type="submit" class="btn-submit" [disabled]="docForm.invalid || docSubmitting">
          <span *ngIf="docSubmitting" class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-1"></span>
          <i class="bi bi-folder2-open" *ngIf="!docSubmitting"></i> Request Documents
        </button>
      </div>
    </form>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══ MODAL: Add Finding ════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showFindingModal">
  <div class="modal-card wide">
    <div class="modal-accent"></div>
    <div class="modal-header-row">
      <h5><i class="bi bi-search me-2"></i>Record Finding</h5>
      <button class="modal-close" (click)="showFindingModal = false"><i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i></button>
    </div>
    <form [formGroup]="findingForm" (ngSubmit)="submitFinding()">
      <div class="form-grid">
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">Finding Type</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
            <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="findingType">
              <option value="INCOME_OMISSION">Income Omission</option>
              <option value="DEDUCTION_EXCESS">Excess Deduction</option>
              <option value="VAT_MISMATCH">VAT Mismatch</option>
              <option value="AIT_CREDIT">AIT Credit Issue</option>
              <option value="UNDERPAYMENT">Underpayment</option>
              <option value="OTHER">Other</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Status</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
            <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="status">
              <option value="DRAFT">Draft</option>
              <option value="CONFIRMED">Confirmed</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group full-width">
          <label class="form-label required">Description</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-file-text input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
            <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" rows="3" formControlName="description"
              placeholder="Detailed description of the finding..."></textarea>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group full-width">
          <label class="form-label">Legal Basis <span class="optional">(Section / Rule)</span></label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-book-fill input-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="form-input" formControlName="legalBasis"
              placeholder="e.g. Section 16(2) ITO 1984" />
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Declared Amount (BDT)</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-cash-stack input-icon"></i>
            <input type="number" class="form-input" formControlName="declaredAmount" min="0" />
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Assessed Amount (BDT)</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-cash-stack input-icon"></i>
            <input type="number" class="form-input" formControlName="assessedAmount" min="0"
              (input)="calculateTaxFromFinding()" />
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Additional Tax (BDT)</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-percent input-icon"></i>
            <input type="number" class="form-input" formControlName="additionalTax" min="0" />
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="modal-actions mt-3">
        <button type="button" class="btn-cancel" (click)="showFindingModal = false">Cancel</button>
        <button type="submit" class="btn-submit" [disabled]="findingForm.invalid || findingSubmitting">
          <span *ngIf="findingSubmitting" class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-1"></span>
          <i class="bi bi-check-lg" *ngIf="!findingSubmitting"></i> Record Finding
        </button>
      </div>
    </form>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══ MODAL: Approve Assessment ════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showApprovalModal">
  <div class="modal-card">
    <div class="modal-accent success"></div>
    <div class="modal-icon-wrap success">
      <i class="bi bi-shield-check" style="color:#1a7a45;font-size:22px;"></i>
    </div>
    <p class="modal-title">Approve Assessment?</p>
    <p class="modal-msg">
      Total Demand: <strong>{{ assessment?.totalDemand | number:'1.2-2' }} BDT</strong><br>
      Once approved, this assessment becomes a legally binding order.
    </p>
    <div class="form-group mb-3">
      <label class="form-label">Approval Notes</label>
      <div class="input-wrap">
        <i class="bi bi-chat-text input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
        <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" rows="2" [(ngModel)]="approvalNotes"
          placeholder="Optional approval remarks..."></textarea>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="showApprovalModal = false">Cancel</button>
      <button class="btn-submit" (click)="submitApproval()" [disabled]="approvalSubmitting">
        <span *ngIf="approvalSubmitting" class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-1"></span>
        <i class="bi bi-shield-check" *ngIf="!approvalSubmitting"></i> Approve
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/business-registration/pages/business-edit/business-edit.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Edit Business</h4>
    <p>Update business registration details.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to View
  </button>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
  <p>Loading business data...</p>
</div>

<div class="form-card" *ngIf="!isLoading">

  <div class="edit-banner">
    <i class="bi bi-pencil-square"></i>
    Editing: <strong>{{ form.businessName }}</strong>
    <span class="banner-reg">{{ form.businessRegNo }}</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Section 1: Business Identity -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-building-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Business Identity</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Basic business identification</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label required">Business Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-building input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.businessName" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required readonly">TIN Number</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.tinNumber" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required readonly">Owner Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.ownerName" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Business Type</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-diagram-3-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.businessType">
            <option value="">Select Type</option>
            <option *ngFor="let t of businessTypes" [ngValue]="t.id.toString()">{{ t.typeName }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Business Category</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.businessCategory">
            <option value="">Select Category</option>
            <option *ngFor="let c of businessCategories" [ngValue]="c.id.toString()">{{ c.categoryName }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.status">
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 2: License -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon purple">
        <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">License & Registration</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Trade license, BIN and dates</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Trade License No.</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-journal-text input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.tradeLicenseNo" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Incorporation Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.incorporationDate" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Registration Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.registrationDate" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Expiry Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-x input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.expiryDate" />
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 3: Contact & Location -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon teal">
        <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Contact & Location</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Contact details and business address</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Email</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="email" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.email" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Phone</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-telephone-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.phone" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Division</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-map-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select"
            [(ngModel)]="form.divisionId"
            (ngModelChange)="onDivisionChange()">
            <option [ngValue]="undefined">Select Division</option>
            <option *ngFor="let d of divisions" [ngValue]="d.id">{{ d.name }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">District</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select"
            [(ngModel)]="form.districtId"
            [disabled]="!form.divisionId || districts.length === 0">
            <option [ngValue]="undefined">
              {{ !form.divisionId ? 'Select division first' : districts.length === 0 ? 'Loading...' : 'Select District' }}
            </option>
            <option *ngFor="let d of districts" [ngValue]="d.id">{{ d.name }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Full Address</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea"
            [(ngModel)]="form.address" rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <!-- Section 4: Financial -->
  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon orange">
        <i class="bi bi-cash-stack"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Financial & Workforce</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Turnover and employee count</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Annual Turnover (৳)</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-currency-dollar input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.annualTurnover" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Number of Employees</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-people-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.numberOfEmployees" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea"
            [(ngModel)]="form.remarks" rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Actions -->
  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isSaving">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()"
      [disabled]="isSaving || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isSaving"><i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Update Business</span>
      <span *ngIf="isSaving">
        <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Updating...
      </span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/business-registration/pages/business-view/business-view.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Business Details</h4>
    <p>Full business registration information.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="header-actions">
    <button class="btn-back" (click)="onBack()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back
    </button>
    <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit-top" (click)="onEdit()">
      <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
</div>

<ng-container *ngIf="!isLoading && business">

  <!-- Business Header Card -->
  <div class="biz-header-card">
    <div class="biz-header-left">
      <div class="biz-icon">
        <i [class]="getCategoryIcon(business.businessCategory)"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="biz-reg-no">{{ business.businessRegNo }}</div>
        <div class="biz-name">{{ business.businessName }}</div>
        <div class="biz-meta">
          <span class="biz-type-pill">{{ getTypeName(business.businessType) }}</span>
          <span class="biz-cat-pill">{{ getCategoryName(business.businessCategory) }}</span>
          <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(business.status)">
            {{ business.status }}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="biz-header-right">
      <div class="biz-stat">
        <span class="bs-label">Annual Turnover</span>
        <span class="bs-value">{{ formatCurrency(business.annualTurnover) }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="biz-stat">
        <span class="bs-label">Employees</span>
        <span class="bs-value">{{ business.numberOfEmployees ?? 0 }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Details Grid -->
  <div class="details-grid">

    <!-- Business Information -->
    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-building-fill"></i>
        <span>Business Information</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Business Name</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ business.businessName }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Owner Name</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ business.ownerName || '—' }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">TIN Number</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="code-badge">{{ business.tinNumber }}</span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Business Type</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ getTypeName(business.businessType) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Category</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ getCategoryName(business.businessCategory) }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- License & Registration -->
    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text-fill"></i>
        <span>License & Registration</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Reg No.</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="code-badge purple">{{ business.businessRegNo }}</span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="business.tradeLicenseNo">
          <span class="detail-label">Trade License</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="code-badge">{{ business.tradeLicenseNo }}</span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="business.binNo">
          <span class="detail-label">BIN No.</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="code-badge">{{ business.binNo }}</span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Incorporation</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ business.incorporationDate || '—' }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Registration</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ business.registrationDate || '—' }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Expiry</span>
          <span class="detail-value" [class]="isExpired(business.expiryDate!) ? 'expiry-red' : ''">
            {{ business.expiryDate || '—' }}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Contact & Location -->
    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill"></i>
        <span>Contact & Location</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="business.email">
          <span class="detail-label">Email</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ business.email }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Phone</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ business.phone || '—' }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Division</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ getDivisionName() }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">District</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ getDistrictName() }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="business.address">
          <span class="detail-label">Address</span>
          <span class="detail-value address-val">{{ business.address }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Financial & Workforce -->
    <div class="detail-card">
      <div class="detail-card-header">
        <i class="bi bi-cash-stack"></i>
        <span>Financial & Workforce</span>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Annual Turnover</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold turnover">
            {{ formatCurrency(business.annualTurnover) }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Employees</span>
          <span class="detail-value fw-bold">{{ business.numberOfEmployees ?? 0 }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row">
          <span class="detail-label">Status</span>
          <span class="detail-value">
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(business.status)">
              {{ business.status }}
            </span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="business.remarks">
          <span class="detail-label">Remarks</span>
          <span class="detail-value">{{ business.remarks }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

</ng-container>
```

## File: src/app/features/penalty-fines/pages/penalty-list/penalty-list.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Penalty & Fines</h4>
    <p>Manage all tax penalties and fines issued by NBR.</p>
  </div>
  <a *canDo="'create'" routerLink="/penalties/create" class="btn-add-primary desktop-add-btn">
    <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i> Issue Penalty
  </a>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <!-- Search -->
  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input type="text" placeholder="Search by penalty no, TIN, taxpayer, type..." [(ngModel)]="searchTerm" />
      </div>
      <button *canDo="'export'" class="btn-export">
        <i class="bi bi-download"></i>
        <span>Export</span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="status-filter-row">
    <button *ngFor="let f of statusFilters" class="filter-pill" [class.active]="activeStatus === f.value"
      (click)="filterByStatus(f.value)">
      {{ f.label }}
    </button>
  </div>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading penalties...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Desktop Table -->
  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>Penalty No</th>
          <th>Taxpayer</th>
          <th>Type</th>
          <th>Severity</th>
          <th>Penalty</th>
          <th>Interest</th>
          <th>Total</th>
          <th>Issue Date</th>
          <th>Due Date</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Actions</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let p of filteredPenalties; let i = index">
          <td>{{ i + 1 }}</td>

          <td><span class="penalty-code">{{ p.penaltyNo }}</span></td>

          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar">{{ p.taxpayerName.charAt(0) }}</div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ p.taxpayerName }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ p.tinNumber }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>

          <td>
            <span class="type-badge" [ngClass]="getTypeClass(p.penaltyType)">
              {{ p.penaltyType }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>
            <span class="sev-badge" [ngClass]="getSeverityClass(p.severity)">
              <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i>
              {{ p.severity }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td class="amount-cell penalty-amount">
            {{ formatCurrency(p.penaltyAmount) }}
          </td>

          <td class="amount-cell interest-amount">
            {{ formatCurrency(p.interestAmount) }}
          </td>

          <td class="amount-cell total-amount">
            {{ formatCurrency(p.totalAmount) }}
          </td>

          <td>{{ p.issueDate }}</td>

          <td>
            <span [class]="p.status === 'Overdue' ? 'due-overdue' : 'due-normal'">
              {{ p.dueDate }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(p.status)">
              {{ p.status }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>
            <div class="action-btns">
              <button class="btn-view" (click)="viewPenalty(p.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
              </button>
              <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit" (click)="editPenalty(p.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
              </button>
              <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN', 'TAX_COMMISSIONER']" class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(p.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i>
              </button>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>

        <tr *ngIf="filteredPenalties.length === 0">
          <td colspan="12">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle"></i>
              <p>No penalties found.</p>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Cards -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" style="padding: 12px;" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let p of filteredPenalties">

      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar">{{ p.taxpayerName.charAt(0) }}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ p.taxpayerName }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ p.penaltyNo }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(p.status)">
          {{ p.status }}
        </span>
      </div>

      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>TIN</label>
          <span>{{ p.tinNumber }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Type</label>
          <span class="type-badge" [ngClass]="getTypeClass(p.penaltyType)">
            {{ p.penaltyType }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Severity</label>
          <span class="sev-badge" [ngClass]="getSeverityClass(p.severity)">
            {{ p.severity }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Penalty</label>
          <span class="penalty-amount">{{ formatCurrency(p.penaltyAmount) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Interest</label>
          <span class="interest-amount">{{ formatCurrency(p.interestAmount) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Total</label>
          <span class="total-amount">{{ formatCurrency(p.totalAmount) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Issue Date</label>
          <span>{{ p.issueDate | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Due Date</label>
          <span [class]="p.status === 'Overdue' ? 'due-overdue' : 'due-normal'">
            {{ p.dueDate | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field" *ngIf="p.description">
          <label>Description</label>
          <span>{{ p.description }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="mobile-card-actions">
        <button class="btn-view" (click)="viewPenalty(p.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
        </button>
        <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit" (click)="editPenalty(p.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
        </button>
        <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN', 'TAX_COMMISSIONER']" class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(p.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
        </button>
      </div>

    </div>

    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filteredPenalties.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle"></i>
      <p>No penalties found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<!-- FAB -->
<button *canDo="'create'" class="fab-btn" routerLink="/penalties/create" title="Issue Penalty">
  <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i>
</button>

<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showDeleteModal">
  <div class="modal-card">
    <div class="modal-accent error"></div>
    <div class="modal-icon-wrap error">
      <i class="bi bi-trash-fill" style="color:#A32D2D; font-size:22px;"></i>
    </div>
    <p class="modal-title">Delete Penalty?</p>
    <p class="modal-msg">
      This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this penalty record?
    </p>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn-modal-cancel" (click)="cancelDelete()">Cancel</button>
      <button class="btn-modal-confirm error" (click)="confirmDeleteExecute()">
        <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/models/penalty.model.ts
```typescript
export type PenaltyStatus =
  | 'DRAFT' | 'PENDING_APPROVAL' | 'APPROVED' | 'ISSUED'
  | 'PARTIALLY_PAID' | 'PAID' | 'APPEALED' | 'CANCELLED' | 'CLOSED'
  | 'Issued' | 'Pending' | 'Paid' | 'Waived' | 'Overdue';
⋮----
export type PenaltyType =
  | 'Late Filing' | 'Late Payment' | 'Non-Compliance'
  | 'Fraud' | 'Underpayment' | 'Other';
⋮----
export type PenaltySeverity = 'Low' | 'Medium' | 'High' | 'Critical';
⋮----
export interface PenaltyAuditLog {
  id: number;
  action: string;
  fromStatus: string | null;
  toStatus: string | null;
  performedBy: string;
  performedByRole: string;
  remarks: string | null;
  createdAt: string;
}
⋮----
export interface Penalty {
  id: number;
  penaltyNo: string;
  taxpayerId: number;
  taxpayerName: string;
  tinNumber: string;
  penaltyType: PenaltyType;
  severity: PenaltySeverity;
  penaltyAmount: number;
  interestAmount: number;
  interestRate: number;
  totalAmount: number;
  paidAmount: number;
  returnNo: string;
  assessmentYear: string;
  issueDate: string;
  dueDate: string;
  paymentDate: string | null;
  status: PenaltyStatus;
  issuedBy: string;
  approvedBy: string;
  description: string;
  remarks: string;
  createdAt: string;
  submittedAt: string | null;
  approvedAt: string | null;
  issuedAt: string | null;
  auditLogs?: PenaltyAuditLog[];
}
⋮----
export interface PenaltyCreateRequest {
  taxpayerId: number | null;
  penaltyType: string;
  severity: string;
  penaltyAmount: number;
  returnNo: string;
  assessmentYear: string;
  issueDate: string;
  dueDate: string;
  issuedBy: string;
  description: string;
  remarks: string;
}
⋮----
export interface PenaltyStatusRequest {
  remarks: string;
}
```

## File: src/app/core/constants/roles.constants.ts
```typescript
export enum Role {
  SUPER_ADMIN = 'SUPER_ADMIN',
  TAX_COMMISSIONER = 'TAX_COMMISSIONER',
  TAX_OFFICER = 'TAX_OFFICER',
  SUPERVISOR = 'SUPERVISOR',
  AUDITOR = 'AUDITOR',
  TAXPAYER = 'TAXPAYER',
  DATA_ENTRY_OPERATOR = 'DATA_ENTRY_OPERATOR',
  GUEST = 'GUEST',
}
⋮----
// ── Permission map per role ──
⋮----
[Role.SUPER_ADMIN]: ['*'], // full access
⋮----
// ── Button-level permissions ──
⋮----
```

## File: src/app/features/ait/pages/ait-dashboard/ait-dashboard.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Advance Income Tax (AIT)</h4>
    <p>Manage and track all AIT submissions and credits.</p>
  </div>
  <a *canDo="'create'" (click)="navigateToCreate()" class="btn-add-primary desktop-add-btn">
    <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i> New AIT Record
  </a>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">

  <!-- Status Filter Tabs -->
  <div class="status-tabs">
    <button class="stab" [class.active]="filterStatus === ''" (click)="setFilter('')">
      All <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('') }}</span>
    </button>
    <button class="stab draft" [class.active]="filterStatus === 'DRAFT'" (click)="setFilter('DRAFT')">
      Draft <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('DRAFT') }}</span>
    </button>
    <button class="stab submitted" [class.active]="filterStatus === 'SUBMITTED'" (click)="setFilter('SUBMITTED')">
      Submitted <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('SUBMITTED') }}</span>
    </button>
    <button class="stab pending" [class.active]="filterStatus === 'PENDING'" (click)="setFilter('PENDING')">
      Pending <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('PENDING') }}</span>
    </button>
    <button class="stab review" [class.active]="filterStatus === 'UNDER_REVIEW'" (click)="setFilter('UNDER_REVIEW')">
      Under Review <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('UNDER_REVIEW') }}</span>
    </button>
    <button class="stab approved" [class.active]="filterStatus === 'APPROVED'" (click)="setFilter('APPROVED')">
      Approved <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('APPROVED') }}</span>
    </button>
    <button class="stab rejected" [class.active]="filterStatus === 'REJECTED'" (click)="setFilter('REJECTED')">
      Rejected <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('REJECTED') }}</span>
    </button>
    <button class="stab credited" [class.active]="filterStatus === 'CREDITED'" (click)="setFilter('CREDITED')">
      Credited <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('CREDITED') }}</span>
    </button>
  </div>

  <!-- Search Bar -->
  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">
      <div class="search-field">
        <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        <input type="text" placeholder="Search by reference no, TIN, taxpayer, source type..."
          [formControl]="searchControl" />
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Loading -->
  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm" style="color:#7c3aed"></div>
    <span>Loading AIT records...</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Desktop Table -->
  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>Reference No</th>
          <th>Taxpayer</th>
          <th>Source Type</th>
          <th>Fiscal Year</th>
          <th>Taxable Value</th>
          <th>AIT Rate</th>
          <th>AIT Amount</th>
          <th>Challan</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Date</th>
          <th>Actions</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let r of filtered; let i = index">
          <td>{{ i + 1 }}</td>

          <td>
            <span class="return-code">{{ r.aitReferenceNo }}</span>
          </td>

          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar ait-avatar">
                <i class="bi bi-receipt"></i>
              </div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ r.taxpayerName }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ r.taxpayerTin }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>

          <td>
            <span class="cat-badge" [ngClass]="getSourceClass(r.sourceType)">
              <i class="bi" [ngClass]="getSourceIcon(r.sourceType)"></i>
              {{ getSourceLabel(r.sourceType) }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>
            <span class="year-badge">{{ r.fiscalYearName || '—' }}</span>
          </td>

          <td class="amt-cell">{{ formatCurrency(r.taxableValue) }}</td>
          <td class="amt-cell">{{ r.aitRate }}%</td>
          <td class="amt-cell net">{{ formatCurrency(r.calculatedAitAmount) }}</td>

          <td>
            <span *ngIf="r.challanVerified" class="challan-verified">
              <i class="bi bi-patch-check-fill"></i> Verified
            </span>
            <span *ngIf="!r.challanVerified && r.challanNumber" class="challan-pending">
              <i class="bi bi-clock"></i> Pending
            </span>
            <span *ngIf="!r.challanNumber" class="text-muted">—</span>
          </td>

          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">
              {{ getStatusLabel(r.status) }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>{{ r.createdAt | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}</td>

          <td>
            <div class="action-btns">
              <button class="btn-view" (click)="view(r.id!)">
                <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
              </button>
              <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit" [disabled]="r.status !== 'DRAFT'" (click)="edit(r.id!)">
                <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
              </button>
              <!-- Taxpayer: resubmit after rejection -->
              <button *ngIf="r.status === 'REJECTED' && isTaxpayerRole" class="btn-amend" (click)="onResubmit(r.id!)">
                <i class="bi bi-arrow-repeat"></i> Correct
              </button>
              <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN', 'TAX_COMMISSIONER']" class="btn-delete"
                [disabled]="r.status !== 'DRAFT' && r.status !== 'REJECTED'" (click)="confirmDelete(r.id!)">
                <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i>
              </button>
              <button *ngIf="r.status === 'CREDITED'" class="btn-cert" (click)="downloadCertificate(r.id!)"
                title="Download AIT Certificate">
                <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-arrow-down-fill"></i> Cert
              </button>

            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>

        <tr *ngIf="filtered.length === 0">
          <td colspan="12">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-receipt"></i>
              <p>No AIT records found.</p>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile Cards -->
  <div class="mobile-cards" style="padding:12px;" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let r of filtered">
      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar ait-avatar">
            <i class="bi bi-receipt"></i>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ r.taxpayerName }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ r.aitReferenceNo }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">
          {{ getStatusLabel(r.status) }}
        </span>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>TIN</label>
          <span>{{ r.taxpayerTin }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Source</label>
          <span class="cat-badge" [ngClass]="getSourceClass(r.sourceType)">
            {{ getSourceLabel(r.sourceType) }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Fiscal Year</label>
          <span>{{ r.fiscalYearName || '—' }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Taxable Value</label>
          <span>{{ formatCurrency(r.taxableValue) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>AIT Amount</label>
          <span class="net">{{ formatCurrency(r.calculatedAitAmount) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field" *ngIf="r.challanNumber">
          <label>Challan</label>
          <span *ngIf="r.challanVerified" class="challan-verified">
            <i class="bi bi-patch-check-fill"></i> {{ r.challanNumber }}
          </span>
          <span *ngIf="!r.challanVerified" class="challan-pending">{{ r.challanNumber }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Date</label>
          <span>{{ r.createdAt | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-actions">
        <button class="btn-view" (click)="view(r.id!)">
          <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
        </button>
        <button *ngIf="r.status === 'DRAFT'" class="btn-edit" (click)="edit(r.id!)">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> <span *canDo="'edit'">Edit</span>
        </button>
        <button *ngIf="r.status === 'REJECTED' && isTaxpayerRole" class="btn-amend" (click)="onResubmit(r.id!)">
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-repeat"></i> Correct
        </button>
        <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN', 'TAX_COMMISSIONER']" class="btn-delete"
          [disabled]="r.status !== 'DRAFT' && r.status !== 'REJECTED'" (click)="confirmDelete(r.id!)">
          <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filtered.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-receipt"></i>
      <p>No AIT records found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<!-- FAB -->
<button class="fab-btn" (click)="navigateToCreate()" *canDo="'create'">
  <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i>
</button>

<!-- Delete Confirmation Modal -->
<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showDeleteModal">
  <div class="modal-card">
    <div class="modal-accent error"></div>
    <div class="modal-icon-wrap error">
      <i class="bi bi-trash-fill" style="color:#A32D2D; font-size:22px;"></i>
    </div>
    <p class="modal-title">Delete AIT Record?</p>
    <p class="modal-msg">
      This action cannot be undone. The record will be permanently removed.
    </p>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn-modal-cancel" (click)="cancelDelete()">Cancel</button>
      <button class="btn-modal-confirm error" (click)="executeDelete()">
        <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/income-tax-returns/pages/income-tax-return-create/income-tax-return-create.component.css
```css
/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   ITR FILING WIZARD — Modernized Component CSS
   Design language: Premium SaaS, soft shadows, rounded corners
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
⋮----
/* ── Design tokens ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
:host {
⋮----
--cp:  #FFFFFF;           /* background primary   */
--cs:  #F9FAFB;           /* background secondary - slightly cooler */
--ct:  #F3F4F6;           /* background tertiary  */
--tp:  #111827;           /* text primary - deeper black */
--ts:  #4B5563;           /* text secondary */
--tt:  #9CA3AF;           /* text tertiary  */
--bs:  #E5E7EB;           /* border secondary */
--bt:  #F3F4F6;           /* border tertiary  */
⋮----
/* Modernized Radii */
⋮----
/* Modern Shadows */
⋮----
/* Colors */
⋮----
/* ── Topbar ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.itr-topbar {
.topbar-title {
.topbar-meta {
.topbar-right {
⋮----
/* ── Badges ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.badge {
.b-draft  { background: #F3F4F6; color: #4B5563; }
.b-ok     { background: var(--green-bg);  color: var(--green-text); }
.b-warn   { background: var(--amber-bg);  color: var(--amber-text); }
.b-info   { background: var(--blue-bg);   color: var(--blue-dark);  }
.b-red    { background: var(--red-bg);    color: var(--red-text);   }
⋮----
/* ── Step Rail ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.step-rail {
.step-item {
.step-item:hover {
.step-circle {
.s-done .step-circle {
.s-active .step-circle {
.s-todo .step-circle {
.step-label {
.s-active .step-label { color: var(--blue-dark); font-weight: 600; }
.s-done   .step-label { color: var(--green-text); font-weight: 600; }
.step-line {
.step-line.done { background: var(--green-text); }
⋮----
/* ── Card ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.card {
.card:hover {
.card-hdr {
.card-hdr-left {
.hdr-icon {
.ic-blue   { background: var(--blue-bg); color: var(--blue-text); }
.ic-green  { background: var(--green-bg); color: var(--green-text); }
.ic-amber  { background: var(--amber-bg); color: var(--amber-text); }
.ic-purple { background: var(--purple-bg); color: var(--purple-text); }
.ic-red    { background: var(--red-bg); color: var(--red-text); }
⋮----
.card-title { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--tp); }
.card-sub   { font-size: 12px; color: var(--ts); margin-top: 2px; }
.card-p     { padding: 20px; }
⋮----
/* ── Grid layouts ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.grid2 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; }
.grid3 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; }
⋮----
/* ── Field ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.field {
.field label {
.field label .req { color: var(--red-text); margin-left: 2px; }
⋮----
.field input,
.field input:hover,
.field input:focus,
.field input[readonly] {
.field .hint     { font-size: 12px; color: var(--tt); line-height: 1.5; margin-top: 2px; }
.field .autofill { font-size: 12px; color: var(--green-text); font-weight: 500; margin-top: 2px; }
.field .computed { font-size: 12px; color: var(--blue-text); font-weight: 600; margin-top: 2px; }
⋮----
/* ── Alert ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.alert {
.alert-info { background: var(--blue-bg); color: var(--blue-dark); border-color: #DBEAFE; }
.alert-warn { background: var(--amber-bg); color: #92400E; border-color: #FEF3C7; }
.alert-ok   { background: var(--green-bg); color: var(--green-text); border-color: #D1FAE5; }
⋮----
/* ── Buttons ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.btn {
.btn:hover:not(:disabled) {
.btn:active:not(:disabled) {
.btn-primary {
.btn-primary:hover:not(:disabled) {
.btn-ghost  {
.btn-ghost:hover:not(:disabled) {
.btn-sm     { padding: 6px 12px; font-size: 13px; }
.btn:disabled { opacity: 0.6; cursor: not-allowed; box-shadow: none; }
⋮----
/* ── Card footer ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.footer {
⋮----
/* ── Taxpayer search ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.search-row {
.search-field-wrap {
.search-icon {
.search-input {
.search-input:focus {
.search-input:disabled { background: var(--cs); color: var(--ts); }
.clear-btn {
.clear-btn:hover { background: #D1D5DB; color: var(--tp); }
⋮----
.search-results {
.result-item {
.result-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.result-item:hover { background: var(--cs); }
.result-avatar {
.result-info { flex: 1; }
.result-name { font-size: 14px; color: var(--tp); font-weight: 600; }
.result-meta { font-size: 12px; color: var(--ts); margin-top: 3px; }
⋮----
/* ── Income table ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.income-table {
.income-table th {
.income-table td {
.income-table tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; }
.income-table td.computed { color: var(--blue-text); font-weight: 600; }
.income-table td.muted    { color: var(--tt); }
.income-table tr.section-row td {
.income-table tr.sub-total td {
.income-table tr.grand-total td {
.income-table tr.grand-total td.big {
.table-input {
.table-input:hover {
.table-input:focus {
.table-input::-webkit-outer-spin-button,
⋮----
/* ── Deduction rows ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.deduction-row {
.deduction-row:last-of-type { border-bottom: none; }
.ded-left   { flex: 1; }
.ded-name   { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--tp); }
.ded-hint   { font-size: 12px; color: var(--ts); margin-top: 4px; }
.ded-input  {
.ded-input:focus {
.ded-input::-webkit-outer-spin-button,
⋮----
.ded-summary {
.ded-sum-label { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--ts); }
.ded-sum-value { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 4px; }
.ded-sum-value.blue  { color: var(--blue-text); }
.ded-sum-value.green { color: var(--green-text); }
⋮----
/* ── Summary box (step 4) ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.summary-box {
.sum-row {
.sum-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.sum-key  { color: var(--ts); font-weight: 500; }
.sum-val  { font-weight: 600; color: var(--tp); }
.sum-total {
.sum-total .sum-key { color: var(--tp); font-weight: 700; }
.sum-total.sum-refund .sum-val { color: var(--green-text) !important; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; }
.sum-total.sum-due   .sum-val  { color: var(--red-text) !important; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; }
⋮----
.result-msg {
.result-ok   { background: var(--green-bg); color: #14532D; border-color: #D1FAE5; }
.result-warn { background: var(--red-bg);   color: #7F1D1D; border-color: #FEE2E2; }
⋮----
/* ── Tax bracket table ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.tax-bracket {
.bracket-hdr {
.bracket-row {
.bracket-row:last-child  { border-bottom: none; }
.bracket-row.active      { background: var(--blue-bg); color: var(--blue-dark); font-weight: 600; }
.bracket-row .amount     { color: var(--tp); font-weight: 500; }
.bracket-row.active .amount { color: var(--blue-dark); font-weight: 600; }
⋮----

.assets-total-bar {
.assets-total-value {
⋮----
/* ── Review detail ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.review-detail {
.review-row {
.review-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.rew-k      { color: var(--ts); font-weight: 500; }
.rew-v      { font-weight: 600; color: var(--tp); }
.font-bold  { font-weight: 800 !important; }
⋮----
/* ── Stat boxes (review step) ────────────────────────────────────────────── */

.stat-value { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--tp); margin-top: 6px; }
.stat-green { background: var(--green-bg); border-color: #BBF7D0; }
.stat-green .stat-label { color: var(--green-text); }
.stat-green .stat-value { color: var(--green-text); }
.stat-red   { background: var(--red-bg); border-color: #FECACA; }
.stat-red   .stat-label { color: var(--red-text); }
.stat-red   .stat-value { color: var(--red-text); }

.decl-body   {
.decl-check  {

.ait-ref  { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: #111827; font-family: monospace; }
.ait-meta { font-size: 11px; color: #6b7280; margin-top: 2px; }
⋮----

.ait-available-label { font-size: 11px; color: #6b7280; }

.credit-deduction { color: #16a34a; font-weight: 700; }
```
