## File: src/app/features/income-tax-returns/pages/income-tax-return-create/income-tax-return-create.component.html
```html
<!-- ── Topbar ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="itr-topbar">
  <div>
    <div class="topbar-title">Income Tax Return (ITR) — FY {{ filingYear || '—' }}</div>
    <div class="topbar-meta">
      <ng-container *ngIf="step1Form.getRawValue().taxpayerName; else noProfile">
        {{ step1Form.getRawValue().taxpayerName }}
        &nbsp;·&nbsp; TIN: {{ step1Form.getRawValue().tinNumber || '—' }}
        &nbsp;·&nbsp; Assessment year: {{ step1Form.getRawValue().assessmentYear || '—' }}
        &nbsp;·&nbsp; Deadline: {{ dueDate || '—' }}
      </ng-container>
      <ng-template #noProfile>Fill taxpayer profile to begin</ng-template>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="topbar-right">
    <span class="badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass()">{{ getStatusLabel() }}</span>
    <button class="btn btn-sm" (click)="onCancel()">✕ Cancel</button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ── Step Rail ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="step-rail" *ngIf="currentStep < 7">
  <ng-container *ngFor="let s of [1,2,3,4,5,6]; let i = index">
    <div class="step-item" [ngClass]="'s-' + getStepState(s)" (click)="goToStep(s)">
      <div class="step-circle">
        <span *ngIf="getStepState(s) === 'done'">✓</span>
        <span *ngIf="getStepState(s) !== 'done'">{{ s }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="step-label">
        <ng-container [ngSwitch]="s">
          <ng-container *ngSwitchCase="1">Taxpayer<br />profile</ng-container>
          <ng-container *ngSwitchCase="2">Income<br />sources</ng-container>
          <ng-container *ngSwitchCase="3">Deductions<br />&amp; exemptions</ng-container>
          <ng-container *ngSwitchCase="4">Tax<br />liability</ng-container>
          <ng-container *ngSwitchCase="5">Assets &amp;<br />liabilities</ng-container>
          <ng-container *ngSwitchCase="6">Review &amp;<br />submit</ng-container>
        </ng-container>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="step-line" *ngIf="i < 5" [class.done]="currentStep > s"></div>
  </ng-container>
</div>


<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     PANE 1 — Taxpayer Profile
════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div [hidden]="currentStep !== 1" [formGroup]="step1Form">

  <!-- Officer: taxpayer search -->
  <ng-container *ngIf="!isTaxpayerRole">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-hdr">
        <div class="card-hdr-left">
          <div class="hdr-icon ic-blue">
            <i class="bi bi-search" style="font-size:12px;color:#185FA5"></i>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="card-title">Search taxpayer</div>
            <div class="card-sub">Search by TIN, NID, or name — then select to auto-fill</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="badge b-info" *ngIf="isAutoFilled">
          <i class="bi bi-lightning-charge-fill"></i> Auto-filled
        </span>
      </div>
      <div class="card-p">
        <div class="search-row">
          <div class="search-field-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-upc-scan search-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="search-input" placeholder="Enter TIN, NID or taxpayer name…"
              [(ngModel)]="searchQuery" [ngModelOptions]="{standalone:true}" (ngModelChange)="onSearchInput()"
              (keyup.enter)="searchTaxpayer()" [disabled]="isAutoFilled" />
            <button class="clear-btn" *ngIf="isAutoFilled" (click)="clearSelectedTaxpayer()">
              <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
            </button>
          </div>
          <button class="btn btn-primary" (click)="searchTaxpayer()" [disabled]="isSearching || isAutoFilled">
            <span *ngIf="!isSearching"><i class="bi bi-search"></i> Search</span>
            <span *ngIf="isSearching">
              <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-1"></span> Searching…
            </span>
          </button>
        </div>

        <!-- Search results -->
        <div class="search-results" *ngIf="showResults && searchResults.length > 0">
          <div class="result-item" *ngFor="let t of searchResults" (click)="selectTaxpayer(t)">
            <div class="result-avatar"><i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i></div>
            <div class="result-info">
              <span class="result-name">{{ getDisplayName(t) }}</span>
              <span class="result-meta">
                <span *ngIf="t.tinNumber" class="me-2">TIN: {{ t.tinNumber }}</span>
                <span *ngIf="!t.tinNumber" class="text-danger me-2">No TIN</span>
                <span *ngIf="t.nid">NID: {{ t.nid }}</span>
              </span>
            </div>
            <span class="badge b-info">Select</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- No result note -->
        <div class="alert alert-info" style="margin-top:8px" *ngIf="hasSearched && searchResults.length === 0">
          <span>ℹ</span>
          <div>No taxpayer found. Fill in TIN and name manually below.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </ng-container>

  <!-- Profile fields card -->
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-hdr">
      <div class="card-hdr-left">
        <div class="hdr-icon ic-green">
          <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill" style="font-size:12px;color:#3B6D11"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="card-title">Taxpayer profile</div>
          <div class="card-sub" *ngIf="isTaxpayerRole">Filing as yourself — name is pre-filled from your session.</div>
          <div class="card-sub" *ngIf="!isTaxpayerRole">Verify and complete the filing period below.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <span class="badge b-ok" *ngIf="isAutoFilled || isTaxpayerRole">✓ Verified</span>
    </div>
    <div class="card-p">
      <div class="grid2">
        <div class="field">
          <label>TIN number <span class="req">*</span></label>
          <input formControlName="tinNumber" type="text" placeholder="e.g. TIN-20250504-A3F19C82" />
          <span class="autofill" *ngIf="isAutoFilled">✓ From taxpayer record</span>
          <span class="hint" style="color:#A32D2D"
            *ngIf="step1Form.get('tinNumber')?.invalid && step1Form.get('tinNumber')?.touched">TIN is required.</span>
        </div>

        <div class="field">
          <label>Taxpayer name <span class="req">*</span></label>
          <input formControlName="taxpayerName" type="text" placeholder="Full name or company" />
          <span class="autofill" *ngIf="isTaxpayerRole">✓ From login session</span>
        </div>

        <div class="field">
          <label>Category <span class="req">*</span></label>
          <select formControlName="itrCategory">
            <option *ngFor="let c of itrCategories" [value]="c">{{ c }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>

        <div class="field" *ngIf="isCompanyCategory">
          <label>Company sub-type</label>
          <select formControlName="companySubType">
            <option value="">— Select —</option>
            <option *ngFor="let t of companySubTypes" [value]="t">{{ t }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>

        <div class="field">
          <label>Assessment year <span class="req">*</span></label>
          <select formControlName="assessmentYear">
            <option *ngFor="let y of assessmentYears" [value]="y">{{ y }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>

        <div class="field">
          <label>Income year</label>
          <select formControlName="incomeYear">
            <option *ngFor="let y of incomeYears" [value]="y">{{ y }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>

        <div class="field">
          <label>Return period</label>
          <select formControlName="returnPeriod">
            <option *ngFor="let p of returnPeriods" [value]="p">{{ p }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>

        <div class="field">
          <label>Submission date</label>
          <input formControlName="submissionDate" type="date" />
        </div>

        <div class="field">
          <label>Due date</label>
          <input formControlName="dueDate" type="date" readonly />
          <span class="hint">Set from the active fiscal year.</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="footer">
      <button class="btn btn-ghost" (click)="onCancel()">✕ Cancel</button>
      <button class="btn btn-primary" (click)="nextStep()">Continue →</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>


<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     PANE 2 — Income Sources
════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div [hidden]="currentStep !== 2" [formGroup]="step2Form">

  <div class="alert alert-info">
    <div>ℹ</div>
    <div>Enter income from all sources before any deduction. TDS and AIT deducted at source are recorded separately —
      they reduce your final tax balance.</div>
  </div>

  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-hdr">
      <div class="card-hdr-left">
        <div class="hdr-icon ic-blue">
          <i class="bi bi-table" style="font-size:12px;color:#185FA5"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="card-title">Income from all sources</div>
          <div class="card-sub">Enter gross amounts — deductions are handled in the next step</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card-p" style="padding:0;overflow-x:auto">
      <table class="income-table">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th style="width:42%">Income head</th>
            <th>Gross amount (৳)</th>
            <th>TDS / AIT (৳)</th>
            <th>Net amount (৳)</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>

          <!-- A: Salary -->
          <tr class="section-row">
            <td colspan="4">A — Salary income</td>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <td>Basic salary</td>
            <td><input type="number" class="table-input" formControlName="salBasic" min="0" placeholder="0" /></td>
            <td><input type="number" class="table-input" formControlName="salTds" min="0" placeholder="0" /></td>
            <td class="computed">{{ fmtN(salBasicNet) }}</td>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <td>House rent allowance (HRA)</td>
            <td><input type="number" class="table-input" formControlName="hra" min="0" placeholder="0" /></td>
            <td class="muted">—</td>
            <td class="computed">{{ fmtN(step2Form.value.hra || 0) }}</td>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <td>Festival bonus / other allowances</td>
            <td><input type="number" class="table-input" formControlName="bonus" min="0" placeholder="0" /></td>
            <td class="muted">—</td>
            <td class="computed">{{ fmtN(step2Form.value.bonus || 0) }}</td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="sub-total">
            <td>Total salary income</td>
            <td class="computed">{{ fmtN(salGross) }}</td>
            <td class="computed">{{ fmtN(step2Form.value.salTds || 0) }}</td>
            <td class="computed">{{ fmtN(salNet) }}</td>
          </tr>

          <!-- B: Business -->
          <tr class="section-row">
            <td colspan="4">B — Business / profession income</td>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <td>Net business profit</td>
            <td><input type="number" class="table-input" formControlName="bizIncome" min="0" placeholder="0" /></td>
            <td class="muted">—</td>
            <td class="computed">{{ fmtN(step2Form.value.bizIncome || 0) }}</td>
          </tr>

          <!-- C: Other sources -->
          <tr class="section-row">
            <td colspan="4">C — Income from other sources</td>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <td>Bank interest</td>
            <td><input type="number" class="table-input" formControlName="bankInterest" min="0" placeholder="0" /></td>
            <td><input type="number" class="table-input" formControlName="bankAit" min="0" placeholder="0" /></td>
            <td class="computed">{{ fmtN(bankNet) }}</td>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <td>Rental income</td>
            <td><input type="number" class="table-input" formControlName="rentIncome" min="0" placeholder="0" /></td>
            <td class="muted">—</td>
            <td class="computed">{{ fmtN(step2Form.value.rentIncome || 0) }}</td>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <td>Capital gains</td>
            <td><input type="number" class="table-input" formControlName="capitalGain" min="0" placeholder="0" /></td>
            <td class="muted">—</td>
            <td class="computed">{{ fmtN(step2Form.value.capitalGain || 0) }}</td>
          </tr>

          <!-- Grand total -->
          <tr class="grand-total">
            <td>Total gross income</td>
            <td class="big">{{ fmt(totalGrossIncome) }}</td>
            <td class="computed">{{ fmt(totalTds) }}</td>
            <td class="big">{{ fmt(grandNet) }}</td>
          </tr>

        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="footer">
    <button class="btn btn-ghost" (click)="prevStep()">← Back</button>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px">
      <button class="btn btn-primary" (click)="nextStep()">Continue →</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>


<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     PANE 3 — Deductions & Exemptions
════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div [hidden]="currentStep !== 3" [formGroup]="step3Form">

  <div class="alert alert-info">
    <div>ℹ</div>
    <div>Deductions reduce your taxable income. Enter only amounts you can prove with receipts. Each has a legal maximum
      limit set by NBR.</div>
  </div>

  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-hdr">
      <div class="card-hdr-left">
        <div class="hdr-icon ic-amber">
          <i class="bi bi-piggy-bank-fill" style="font-size:12px;color:#BA7517"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="card-title">Allowable deductions &amp; investments</div>
          <div class="card-sub">Section 44 — Investment tax credit &amp; exemptions</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card-p">

      <div class="deduction-row">
        <div class="ded-left">
          <div class="ded-name">Life insurance premium</div>
          <div class="ded-hint">Max 10% of sum insured or ৳ 1,50,000 — whichever is lower</div>
        </div>
        <input class="ded-input" type="number" formControlName="lifeInsurance" min="0" placeholder="0" />
      </div>

      <div class="deduction-row">
        <div class="ded-left">
          <div class="ded-name">Provident fund / gratuity contribution</div>
          <div class="ded-hint">Employee contribution only — employer share is not deductible</div>
        </div>
        <input class="ded-input" type="number" formControlName="providentFund" min="0" placeholder="0" />
      </div>

      <div class="deduction-row">
        <div class="ded-left">
          <div class="ded-name">DPS / savings deposit</div>
          <div class="ded-hint">Max ৳ 60,000 per year
            <span *ngIf="(step3Form.value.dps || 0) > 60000" class="badge b-warn" style="margin-left:6px">Capped at ৳
              60,000</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <input class="ded-input" type="number" formControlName="dps" min="0" placeholder="0" />
      </div>

      <div class="deduction-row">
        <div class="ded-left">
          <div class="ded-name">Investment in govt. securities / savings bonds</div>
          <div class="ded-hint">Sanchay Patra, Treasury bonds</div>
        </div>
        <input class="ded-input" type="number" formControlName="govtBonds" min="0" placeholder="0" />
      </div>

      <div class="deduction-row">
        <div class="ded-left">
          <div class="ded-name">Donation to approved charity / Zakat</div>
          <div class="ded-hint">Must be NBR-approved institution</div>
        </div>
        <input class="ded-input" type="number" formControlName="donation" min="0" placeholder="0" />
      </div>

      <div class="deduction-row">
        <div class="ded-left">
          <div class="ded-name">Investment in listed company shares</div>
          <div class="ded-hint">Max ৳ 50,000 — must be stock exchange listed
            <span *ngIf="(step3Form.value.shares || 0) > 50000" class="badge b-warn" style="margin-left:6px">Capped at ৳
              50,000</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        <input class="ded-input" type="number" formControlName="shares" min="0" placeholder="0" />
      </div>

      <!-- Summary box -->
      <div class="ded-summary">
        <div>
          <div class="ded-sum-label">Total investments / deductions</div>
          <div class="ded-sum-value blue">{{ fmt(totalDeductions) }}</div>
        </div>
        <div style="text-align:right">
          <div class="ded-sum-label">Tax rebate (15% of investments)</div>
          <div class="ded-sum-value green">{{ fmt(taxRebate) }}</div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="footer">
    <button class="btn btn-ghost" (click)="prevStep()">← Back</button>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px">
      <button class="btn btn-primary" (click)="nextStep()">Continue →</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>


<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     PANE 4 — Tax Liability
════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div [hidden]="currentStep !== 4">

  <!-- Tax bracket table -->
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-hdr">
      <div class="card-hdr-left">
        <div class="hdr-icon ic-blue">
          <i class="bi bi-bar-chart-steps" style="font-size:12px;color:#185FA5"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="card-title">Tax slab — Individual (BD)</div>
          <div class="card-sub">Which bracket your taxable income falls into</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card-p">
      <div class="tax-bracket">
        <div class="bracket-hdr">
          <span>Income slab</span>
          <span>Rate</span>
          <span>Your income in slab</span>
          <span>Tax</span>
        </div>
        <div class="bracket-row" *ngFor="let b of computedBrackets" [class.active]="b.active">
          <span>{{ b.label }}</span>
          <span>{{ b.rate === 0 ? '0%' : b.rate + '%' }}</span>
          <span class="amount">{{ fmt(b.incomeInSlab) }}</span>
          <span class="amount">{{ fmt(b.taxInSlab) }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Final calculation -->
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-hdr">
      <div class="card-title">Final tax calculation</div>
    </div>
    <div class="card-p">
      <div class="summary-box">

        <div class="sum-row">
          <span class="sum-key">Total gross income</span>
          <span class="sum-val">{{ fmt(totalGrossIncome) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="sum-row">
          <span class="sum-key">Less: HRA exemption (50%, max ৳ 50,000)</span>
          <span class="sum-val" style="color:#1D9E75">− {{ fmt(hraExemption) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="sum-row">
          <span class="sum-key">Taxable income</span>
          <span class="sum-val">{{ fmt(localTaxableIncome) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="sum-row">
          <span class="sum-key">Gross tax (before rebate)</span>
          <span class="sum-val">{{ fmt(localGrossTax) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="sum-row">
          <span class="sum-key">Less: investment tax rebate (15%)</span>
          <span class="sum-val" style="color:#1D9E75">− {{ fmt(taxRebate) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="sum-row">
          <span class="sum-key">Net tax liability</span>
          <span class="sum-val">{{ fmt(localNetTax) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="sum-row">
          <span class="sum-key">Less: TDS already deducted (salary)</span>
          <span class="sum-val" style="color:#1D9E75">− {{ fmt(step2Form.value.salTds || 0) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="sum-row">
          <span class="sum-key">Less: AIT already deducted (bank)</span>
          <span class="sum-val" style="color:#1D9E75">− {{ fmt(step2Form.value.bankAit || 0) }}</span>
        </div>

        <!-- Result row -->
        <div class="sum-row sum-total" [ngClass]="taxResult <= 0 ? 'sum-refund' : 'sum-due'">
          <span class="sum-key">{{ taxResult <= 0 ? 'Refund receivable' : 'Tax payable' }}</span>
              <span class="sum-val">{{ fmt(taxResult <= 0 ? refundable : balanceDue) }}</span>
        </div>

      </div>

      <!-- Result message -->
      <div class="result-msg" [ngClass]="taxResult <= 0 ? 'result-ok' : 'result-warn'">
        <ng-container *ngIf="taxResult <= 0">
          🎉 <strong>Good news!</strong> You are eligible for a <strong>{{ fmt(refundable) }} refund</strong>
          because your TDS/AIT already paid exceeds your actual tax liability.
        </ng-container>
        <ng-container *ngIf="taxResult > 0">
          ⚠ <strong>Tax due: {{ fmt(balanceDue) }}</strong> — Pay before submitting via treasury challan.
        </ng-container>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="footer">
    <button class="btn btn-ghost" (click)="prevStep()">← Back</button>
    <button class="btn btn-primary" (click)="nextStep()">Continue →</button>
  </div>
</div>


<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     PANE 5 — Assets & Liabilities (IT-10B)
════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div [hidden]="currentStep !== 5" [formGroup]="step5Form">

  <div class="alert alert-warn">
    <div>⚠</div>
    <div>Assets &amp; liabilities statement is mandatory for all taxpayers. Declare all assets honestly — any
      unexplained wealth may trigger an audit.</div>
  </div>

  <!-- Assets card -->
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-hdr">
      <div class="card-hdr-left">
        <div class="hdr-icon ic-purple">
          <i class="bi bi-bank2" style="font-size:12px;color:#534AB7"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="card-title">Statement of assets</div>
          <div class="card-sub">As of end of income year — market value or cost, whichever is lower</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <span class="badge b-info">Total: {{ fmt(totalAssets) }}</span>
    </div>
    <div class="card-p">
      <div class="grid2">
        <div class="field">
          <label>Land / building (market value)</label>
          <input type="number" formControlName="landBuilding" min="0" placeholder="0" />
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>Motor vehicle</label>
          <input type="number" formControlName="motorVehicle" min="0" placeholder="0" />
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>Business capital</label>
          <input type="number" formControlName="businessCapital" min="0" placeholder="0" />
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>Bank balance (all accounts)</label>
          <input type="number" formControlName="bankBalance" min="0" placeholder="0" />
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>Cash in hand</label>
          <input type="number" formControlName="cashInHand" min="0" placeholder="0" />
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>Investment (shares, bonds, DPS)</label>
          <input type="number" formControlName="investment" min="0" placeholder="0" />
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>Gold / jewellery (value)</label>
          <input type="number" formControlName="gold" min="0" placeholder="0" />
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>Other assets</label>
          <input type="number" formControlName="otherAssets" min="0" placeholder="0" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="assets-total-bar">
        <span>Total assets</span>
        <span class="assets-total-value">{{ fmt(totalAssets) }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Liabilities card -->
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-hdr">
      <div class="card-hdr-left">
        <div class="hdr-icon ic-red">
          <i class="bi bi-credit-card-2-back-fill" style="font-size:12px;color:#A32D2D"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="card-title">Statement of liabilities</div>
          <div class="card-sub">Outstanding loans and financial obligations</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card-p">
      <div class="grid2">
        <div class="field">
          <label>Bank loan / mortgage</label>
          <input type="number" formControlName="bankLoan" min="0" placeholder="0" />
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>Business loan</label>
          <input type="number" formControlName="bizLoan" min="0" placeholder="0" />
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>Other liabilities</label>
          <input type="number" formControlName="otherLiabilities" min="0" placeholder="0" />
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>Net worth (assets − liabilities)</label>
          <input type="text" [value]="fmt(netWorth)" readonly [style.color]="netWorth >= 0 ? '#185FA5' : '#A32D2D'"
            style="font-weight:500" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="footer">
    <button class="btn btn-ghost" (click)="prevStep()">← Back</button>
    <button class="btn btn-primary" (click)="nextStep()">Review &amp; submit →</button>
  </div>
</div>


<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     PANE 6 — Review & Submit
════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div [hidden]="currentStep !== 6" [formGroup]="step6Form">

  <div class="alert alert-warn">
    <div>⚠</div>
    <div>Once submitted, this ITR is <strong>permanently locked</strong>.
      If corrections are needed, file an amended return from the return details page
      before the deadline ({{ dueDate || '—' }}).</div>
  </div>

  <!-- ── Final summary ── -->
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-hdr">
      <div class="card-title">Final summary — ITR FY {{ filingYear }}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="card-p">

      <div class="grid3" style="margin-bottom:14px">
        <div class="stat-box">
          <div class="stat-label">Total income</div>
          <div class="stat-value">{{ fmt(totalGrossIncome) }}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-box">
          <div class="stat-label">Tax liability</div>
          <div class="stat-value">{{ fmt(localNetTax) }}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-box" [ngClass]="taxResult <= 0 ? 'stat-green' : 'stat-red'">
          <div class="stat-label">{{ taxResult <= 0 ? 'Refund' : 'Balance due' }}</div>
              <div class="stat-value">{{ fmt(taxResult <= 0 ? refundable : balanceDue) }}</div>
              </div>
          </div>

          <div class="review-detail">
            <div class="review-row"><span class="rew-k">TIN</span><span class="rew-v">{{
                step1Form.getRawValue().tinNumber || '—' }}</span></div>
            <div class="review-row"><span class="rew-k">Taxpayer</span><span class="rew-v">{{
                step1Form.getRawValue().taxpayerName }}</span></div>
            <div class="review-row"><span class="rew-k">Category</span><span class="rew-v">{{
                step1Form.getRawValue().itrCategory }}</span></div>
            <div class="review-row"><span class="rew-k">Assessment year</span><span class="rew-v">{{
                step1Form.getRawValue().assessmentYear }}</span></div>
            <div class="review-row"><span class="rew-k">Gross income</span><span class="rew-v">{{ fmt(totalGrossIncome)
                }}</span></div>
            <div class="review-row"><span class="rew-k">HRA exemption</span><span class="rew-v" style="color:#1D9E75">−
                {{ fmt(hraExemption) }}</span></div>
            <div class="review-row"><span class="rew-k">Taxable income</span><span class="rew-v font-bold">{{
                fmt(localTaxableIncome) }}</span></div>
            <div class="review-row"><span class="rew-k">Gross tax</span><span class="rew-v">{{ fmt(localGrossTax)
                }}</span></div>
            <div class="review-row"><span class="rew-k">Investment rebate (15%)</span><span class="rew-v"
                style="color:#1D9E75">− {{ fmt(taxRebate) }}</span></div>
            <div class="review-row"><span class="rew-k">Net tax liability</span><span class="rew-v font-bold">{{
                fmt(localNetTax) }}</span></div>
            <div class="review-row"><span class="rew-k">TDS &amp; AIT paid</span><span class="rew-v"
                style="color:#1D9E75">− {{ fmt(totalTds) }}</span></div>
            <div class="review-row" *ngIf="totalAssets > 0"><span class="rew-k">Net worth (IT-10B)</span><span
                class="rew-v">{{ fmt(netWorth) }}</span></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      
      <!-- AIT Credit Section — only show if taxpayer has available credits -->
      <div class="form-card" *ngIf="availableCredits.length > 0">
        <div class="card-hdr">
          <div class="card-hdr-left">
            <div class="hdr-icon ic-green">
              <i class="bi bi-cash-coin" style="font-size:12px;color:#0e7c60"></i>
            </div>
            <div>
              <div class="card-title">Advance Income Tax (AIT) Credits</div>
              <div class="card-sub">
                You have {{ fmt(totalAvailableCredit) }} in AIT credits.
                Apply them to reduce your tax liability.
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <span class="badge b-info">
            {{ availableCredits.length }} credit(s) available
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="card-p">

          <!-- Credit selection list -->
          <div class="ait-credit-list">
            <div class="ait-credit-item" *ngFor="let credit of availableCredits"
              [class.selected]="isSelected(credit.ledgerId)">

              <div class="ait-credit-left">
                <label class="ait-credit-checkbox">
                  <input type="checkbox" [checked]="isSelected(credit.ledgerId)" (change)="toggleCredit(credit)" />
                </label>
                <div>
                  <div class="ait-ref">{{ credit.aitReferenceNo }}</div>
                  <div class="ait-meta">
                    {{ getSourceLabel(credit.sourceType) }} ·
                    {{ credit.fiscalYearName }}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="ait-credit-right">
                <div class="ait-available-label">Available</div>
                <div class="ait-available-amt">{{ fmt(credit.remainingAmount) }}</div>
                <!-- Amount input shown when selected -->
                <input *ngIf="isSelected(credit.ledgerId)" type="number" class="ait-apply-input"
                  [max]="credit.remainingAmount" [min]="0.01" [(ngModel)]="selectedAmounts[credit.ledgerId]"
                  (change)="recalcWithAitCredit()" placeholder="Amount to apply" />
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Summary of selected credits -->
          <div class="ait-credit-summary" *ngIf="totalSelectedAitCredit > 0">
            <div class="credit-summary-row">
              <span>AIT Credit to Apply</span>
              <span class="credit-deduction">- {{ fmt(totalSelectedAitCredit) }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="credit-summary-row total">
              <span>Net Tax Payable (after AIT)</span>
              <span>{{ fmt(netPayableAfterAit) }}</span>
            </div>
          </div>

        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
       PAYMENT SECTION — only shown if tax is due
  ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
      <div class="card" *ngIf="showPaymentSection">
        <div class="card-hdr">
          <div class="card-hdr-left">
            <div class="hdr-icon ic-red">
              <i class="bi bi-credit-card-fill" style="font-size:12px;color:#A32D2D"></i>
            </div>
            <div>
              <div class="card-title">Tax payment</div>
              <div class="card-sub">
                Tax due: <strong style="color:#A32D2D">{{ fmt(balanceDue) }}</strong>
                — Select payment method and enter details
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <span class="badge b-red" *ngIf="!isPaymentValid">⚠ Required</span>
          <span class="badge b-ok" *ngIf="isPaymentValid">✓ Done</span>
        </div>
        <div class="card-p">

          <!-- Payment method selection -->
          <div style="margin-bottom:16px">
            <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--ts);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:10px;">
              Select payment method
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap">
              <label *ngFor="let m of paymentMethods" class="payment-method-btn"
                [class.selected]="selectedPaymentMethod === m.value" [class.disabled]="!m.available"
                [title]="!m.available ? 'Coming soon' : ''">
                <input type="radio" formControlName="paymentMethod" [value]="m.value" [disabled]="!m.available"
                  style="display:none" />
                {{ m.label }}
                <span *ngIf="!m.available" style="font-size:10px;opacity:0.6"> — Soon</span>
              </label>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- ── Bank Challan fields ── -->
          <div *ngIf="isChallanMethod" class="payment-fields">
            <div class="alert alert-info" style="margin-bottom:14px">
              <div>ℹ</div>
              <div>Pay at any scheduled bank using a treasury challan form.
                The bank will give you a challan number — enter it below.</div>
            </div>
            <div class="grid2">
              <div class="field">
                <label>Bank name <span class="req">*</span></label>
                <select formControlName="challanBank">
                  <option value="">— Select bank —</option>
                  <option *ngFor="let b of banks" [value]="b">{{ b }}</option>
                </select>
              </div>
              <div class="field">
                <label>Challan number <span class="req">*</span></label>
                <input type="text" formControlName="challanNo" placeholder="e.g. CHAL-2025-001234" />
              </div>
              <div class="field">
                <label>Payment date <span class="req">*</span></label>
                <input type="date" formControlName="challanDate" />
              </div>
              <div class="field">
                <label>Amount paid (৳) <span class="req">*</span></label>
                <input type="number" formControlName="challanAmount" min="0" placeholder="0" />
                <span class="hint" *ngIf="step6Form.value.challanAmount > 0 &&
              step6Form.value.challanAmount < balanceDue" style="color:#e67e22">
                  ⚠ Amount is less than tax due ({{ fmt(balanceDue) }})
                </span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- ── MFS fields (bKash / Nagad / Rocket) ── -->
          <div *ngIf="isMfsMethod" class="payment-fields">
            <div class="alert alert-info" style="margin-bottom:14px">
              <div>ℹ</div>
              <div>
                Send payment to the NBR
                <strong *ngIf="selectedPaymentMethod === 'bkash'">bKash</strong>
                <strong *ngIf="selectedPaymentMethod === 'nagad'">Nagad</strong>
                <strong *ngIf="selectedPaymentMethod === 'rocket'">Rocket</strong>
                merchant number. Enter the transaction ID from your confirmation SMS.
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="grid2">
              <div class="field">
                <label>Transaction ID <span class="req">*</span></label>
                <input type="text" formControlName="mfsNumber" placeholder="e.g. TXN8CH2XXXXXX" />
              </div>
              <div class="field">
                <label>Amount sent (৳) <span class="req">*</span></label>
                <input type="number" formControlName="mfsAmount" min="0" placeholder="0" />
              </div>
              <div class="field">
                <label>Payment date <span class="req">*</span></label>
                <input type="date" formControlName="mfsDate" />
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- ── Card — coming soon placeholder ── -->
          <div *ngIf="isCardMethod" class="payment-fields">
            <div class="alert alert-warn">
              <div>🚧</div>
              <div>Online card payment gateway is under development.
                Please use bank challan or MFS for now.</div>
            </div>
          </div>

        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ── Refund case — no payment needed ── -->
      <div class="card" *ngIf="!showPaymentSection && taxResult <= 0">
        <div class="card-p" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;">
          <div style="font-size:24px">🎉</div>
          <div>
            <div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:#1a7a4a">
              No payment required
            </div>
            <div style="font-size:13px;color:#888;margin-top:2px">
              You have a refund of <strong style="color:#1a7a4a">{{ fmt(refundable) }}</strong>
              — it will be processed after your return is accepted.
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- ── Declaration ── -->
      <div class="card">
        <div class="card-p">
          <div class="declaration-box">
            <div class="decl-title">Verification &amp; declaration</div>
            <div class="decl-body">
              I, <strong>{{ step1Form.getRawValue().taxpayerName || '...' }}</strong>
              (TIN: {{ step1Form.getRawValue().tinNumber || '...' }}), solemnly declare that the
              information furnished in this return of income for the assessment year
              {{ step1Form.getRawValue().assessmentYear }} is correct and complete
              to the best of my knowledge and belief.
            </div>
            <label class="decl-check">
              <input type="checkbox" formControlName="declaration" />
              <span>I confirm the above declaration and consent to submit this ITR.</span>
            </label>
            <div class="field" style="margin-top:10px">
              <label>Remarks (optional)</label>
              <textarea class="remarks-input" formControlName="remarks" rows="2"
                placeholder="Any additional notes for the record…"></textarea>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="footer">
          <button class="btn btn-ghost" (click)="prevStep()" [disabled]="isLoading">← Back</button>
          <button class="btn btn-primary" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isLoading">
            <span *ngIf="!isLoading"><i class="bi bi-send-fill"></i> Submit ITR →</span>
            <span *ngIf="isLoading">
              <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-1"></span> Submitting…
            </span>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>


    <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     PANE 7 — Success
════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div *ngIf="currentStep === 7 && successData">
      <div class="card">
        <div class="success-screen" id="print-area">
          <div class="success-icon">
            <svg width="26" height="26" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#3B6D11" stroke-width="2"
              stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
              <polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12" />
            </svg>
          </div>
          <div class="success-title">ITR filed successfully!</div>
          <div class="success-sub">
            Your return for FY {{ filingYear }} has been submitted.
            <ng-container *ngIf="taxResult <= 0">
              Refund of <strong>{{ fmt(refundable) }}</strong> will be processed
              within 30 working days after acceptance.
            </ng-container>
            <ng-container *ngIf="taxResult > 0">
              Balance due of <strong>{{ fmt(balanceDue) }}</strong> has been recorded.
              Your return will be reviewed by the tax officer.
            </ng-container>
          </div>

          <!-- Acknowledgement box -->
          <div class="ack-box">
            <div class="ack-row">
              <span>Acknowledgement no.</span>
              <span class="ack-val mono">{{ successData.returnNo }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="ack-row">
              <span>Assessment year</span>
              <span class="ack-val">{{ step1Form.getRawValue().assessmentYear }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="ack-row">
              <span>Taxpayer</span>
              <span class="ack-val">{{ step1Form.getRawValue().taxpayerName }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="ack-row">
              <span>TIN</span>
              <span class="ack-val mono">{{ step1Form.getRawValue().tinNumber }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="ack-row">
              <span>Total income declared</span>
              <span class="ack-val">{{ fmt(totalGrossIncome) }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="ack-row">
              <span>Net tax liability</span>
              <span class="ack-val">{{ fmt(localNetTax) }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="ack-row" *ngIf="taxResult <= 0">
              <span>Refund due</span>
              <span class="ack-val" style="color:#1D9E75">{{ fmt(refundable) }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="ack-row" *ngIf="taxResult > 0">
              <span>Balance due</span>
              <span class="ack-val" style="color:#A32D2D">{{ fmt(balanceDue) }}</span>
            </div>

            <!-- Payment info  -->
            <ng-container *ngIf="step6Form.value.challanNo">
              <div class="ack-row">
                <span>Challan no.</span>
                <span class="ack-val mono">{{ step6Form.value.challanNo }}</span>
              </div>
              <div class="ack-row">
                <span>Bank</span>
                <span class="ack-val">{{ step6Form.value.challanBank }}</span>
              </div>
            </ng-container>
            <ng-container *ngIf="step6Form.value.mfsNumber">
              <div class="ack-row">
                <span>MFS transaction ID</span>
                <span class="ack-val mono">{{ step6Form.value.mfsNumber }}</span>
              </div>
            </ng-container>

            <div class="ack-row">
              <span>Filed at</span>
              <span class="ack-val">{{ successData.filedAt }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="ack-row">
              <span>Status</span>
              <span><span class="badge b-ok">Submitted</span></span>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Action buttons -->
          <div class="success-actions">
            <button class="btn btn-sm" (click)="goToList()">← Back to list</button>
            <button class="btn btn-sm" (click)="printAcknowledgement()">
              🖨 Print
            </button>
            <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" (click)="goToView()">
              <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View return
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
```

```typescript
import { FormBuilder, FormGroup, Validators } from '@angular/forms';

import { AuthService } from 'src/app/core/services/auth.service';

}
⋮----
export class RefundCreateComponent implements OnInit
⋮----
// ─── Role check ──────────────────────────────────────────

// ─── Step 0 (Officer only): Taxpayer selection ───────────
selectedTaxpayer: any = null;      // Taxpayer entity from taxpayer-search
⋮----
// ─── Stepper ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Officers start at step 0 (taxpayer selection)
// Taxpayers start at step 1

// ─── Step 1: Refund Type ─────────────────────────────────
⋮----

⋮----

⋮----

⋮----
// ─── Step 6: Review ──────────────────────────────────────
⋮----
constructor(
    private fb: FormBuilder,
    private refundService: RefundService,
    private authService: AuthService,
    private router: Router
)
⋮----
ngOnInit(): void
⋮----
// Officers, supervisors, admins, commissioners need taxpayer selection first
⋮----
// Officers start at step 0 — taxpayer selection
⋮----
// ─── Taxpayer selection (Step 0, officer only) ────────────

onTaxpayerSelected(taxpayer: any): void

goToStep(step: number): void
```

## File: src/app/features/taxpayer-management/pages/taxpayer-create/taxpayer-create.component.html
```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Add Taxpayer</h4>
    <p>Create a new taxpayer registration profile.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onCancel()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to List
  </button>
</div>

<div class="form-card">
  <form [formGroup]="taxpayerForm" (ngSubmit)="onSubmit()">

    <div class="form-section">
      <div class="section-header">
        <div class="section-icon">
          <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h6 class="section-title">Taxpayer Identity</h6>
          <span class="section-sub">Basic taxpayer identification information</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-grid">

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">Taxpayer Type</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
            <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="taxpayerType">
              <option [ngValue]="null" disabled>Select Type</option>
              <option *ngFor="let type of taxpayerTypes" [ngValue]="type">
                {{ type.typeName }}
              </option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">Registration Date</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
            <input type="date" class="form-input" formControlName="registrationDate" />
          </div>
        </div>

        <ng-container *ngIf="isIndividual">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label required">Full Name</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="Enter full name" formControlName="fullName" />
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label required">National ID (NID)</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-card-text input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="Enter NID number" formControlName="nid" />
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label required">Father's Name</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-person-badge input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="Father's name" formControlName="fathersName" />
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label required">Mother's Name</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-person-badge input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="Mother's name" formControlName="mothersName" />
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label required">Date of Birth</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
              <input type="date" class="form-input" formControlName="dateOfBirth" />
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Gender -->
          <div class="form-group" *ngIf="isIndividual">
            <label class="form-label">Gender</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-gender-ambiguous input-icon"></i>
              <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="gender">
                <option value="">Select gender</option>
                <option value="Male">Male</option>
                <option value="Female">Female</option>
                <option value="Other">Other</option>
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label required">Profession</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-briefcase-fill input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="e.g. Teacher, Engineer" formControlName="profession" />
            </div>
          </div>
        </ng-container>

        <!-- Both Business and Organization -->
        <ng-container *ngIf="isCompanyOrOrg">

          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label required">Organization / Company Name</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-building input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="Enter name" formControlName="companyName" />
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label required">Nature of Business / Activity</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-briefcase-fill input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="e.g. IT, Garments, Charity"
                formControlName="natureOfBusiness" />
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Business-only fields -->
          <ng-container *ngIf="isBusiness">
            <div class="form-group">
              <label class="form-label required">Trade License No</label>
              <div class="input-wrap">
                <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text input-icon"></i>
                <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="Trade license" formControlName="tradeLicenseNo" />
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="form-group">
              <label class="form-label required">RJSC No</label>
              <div class="input-wrap">
                <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-medical input-icon"></i>
                <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="RJSC number" formControlName="rjscNo" />
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="form-group">
              <label class="form-label required">Incorporation Date</label>
              <div class="input-wrap">
                <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
                <input type="date" class="form-input" formControlName="incorporationDate" />
              </div>
            </div>
          </ng-container>

          <!-- Auth person — all company/org types -->
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label required">Auth. Person Name</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-person-check-fill input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="Representative name"
                formControlName="authorizedPersonName" />
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label required">Auth. Person NID</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-card-text input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="Representative NID"
                formControlName="authorizedPersonNid" />
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label required">Designation</label>
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-person-vcard input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="e.g. Managing Director"
                formControlName="authorizedPersonDesignation" />
            </div>
          </div>
        </ng-container>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="section-divider"></div>

    <div class="form-section">
      <div class="section-header">
        <div class="section-icon teal">
          <i class="bi bi-telephone-fill"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h6 class="section-title">Contact & Address</h6>
          <span class="section-sub">Email, phone and location details</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-grid">
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">Email Address</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill input-icon"></i>
            <input type="email" class="form-input" placeholder="Enter email address" formControlName="email" />
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label required">Phone Number</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-phone-fill input-icon"></i>
            <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="e.g. 01711-234567" formControlName="phone" />
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="mt-4" formGroupName="presentAddress">
        <p class="form-label fw-bold mb-2">Present / Registered Address</p>
        <div class="form-grid">

          <div class="form-group">
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-map input-icon"></i>
              <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="division">
                <option value="" disabled>Select Division *</option>
                <option *ngFor="let div of divisions" [value]="div.name">{{ div.name }}</option>
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="form-group">
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-geo input-icon"></i>
              <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="district">
                <option value="" disabled>Select District *</option>
                <option *ngFor="let dist of presentDistricts" [value]="dist.name">{{ dist.name }}</option>
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="form-group">
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-geo-alt input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="Thana *" formControlName="thana" />
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="form-group">
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-house input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="Road / Village" formControlName="roadVillage" />
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="mt-3 mb-3">
        <label
          style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; color: #1a3f8f;">
          <input type="checkbox" formControlName="sameAsPermanent" />
          Permanent Address is same as Present Address
        </label>
      </div>

      <div formGroupName="permanentAddress" *ngIf="!taxpayerForm.get('sameAsPermanent')?.value">
        <p class="form-label fw-bold mb-2">Permanent Address</p>
        <div class="form-grid">

          <div class="form-group">
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-map input-icon"></i>
              <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="division">
                <option value="" disabled>Select Division *</option>
                <option *ngFor="let div of divisions" [value]="div.name">{{ div.name }}</option>
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="form-group">
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-geo input-icon"></i>
              <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="district">
                <option value="" disabled>Select District *</option>
                <option *ngFor="let dist of permanentDistricts" [value]="dist.name">{{ dist.name }}</option>
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="form-group">
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-geo-alt input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="Thana *" formControlName="thana" />
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="form-group">
            <div class="input-wrap">
              <i class="bi bi-house input-icon"></i>
              <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="Road / Village" formControlName="roadVillage" />
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>

    <div class="section-divider"></div>

    <!-- Photo Upload Section -->
    <div class="form-section">
      <div class="section-header">
        <div class="section-icon purple">
          <i class="bi bi-camera-fill"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h6 class="section-title">Profile Photo</h6>
          <span class="section-sub">Upload a clear photo (max 5MB, JPG/PNG)</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="photo-upload-area">

        <!-- Current / Preview photo -->
        <div class="photo-display">
          <img *ngIf="photoPreview" [src]="photoPreview" class="photo-img" alt="Preview" />
          <img *ngIf="!photoPreview && currentPhotoUrl" [src]="currentPhotoUrl" class="photo-img" alt="Current photo" />
          <div class="photo-placeholder" *ngIf="!photoPreview && !currentPhotoUrl">
            <i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Upload controls -->
        <div class="photo-controls">
          <div class="photo-status" *ngIf="currentPhotoUrl && !photoPreview">
            <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill text-success"></i>
            Photo uploaded
          </div>
          <div class="photo-status pending" *ngIf="photoPreview">
            <i class="bi bi-clock-fill"></i>
            Photo selected — will be uploaded when you save
          </div>
          <div class="photo-status missing" *ngIf="!currentPhotoUrl && !photoPreview">
            <i class="bi bi-exclamation-circle-fill"></i>
            No photo uploaded
          </div>

          <div class="photo-btn-row">
            <label class="btn-select-photo">
              <i class="bi bi-image"></i>
              {{ photoPreview ? 'Change Photo' : 'Select Photo' }}
              <input type="file" accept="image/jpeg,image/png,image/jpg" (change)="onFileSelected($event)"
                style="display:none" />
            </label>
            
            <button type="button" class="btn-cancel-photo" *ngIf="selectedFile" (click)="removePhoto()">
              <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
              Cancel
            </button>
          </div>

          <div class="photo-hint">
            Accepted formats: JPG, PNG · Max size: 5MB
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-section">
      <div class="section-header">
        <div class="section-icon orange">
          <i class="bi bi-shield-fill-check"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <h6 class="section-title">Account Status</h6>
          <span class="section-sub">Set the taxpayer account status</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-grid">

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Status</label>
          <div class="input-wrap">
            <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
            <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="status">
              <option value="Active">Active</option>
              <option value="Inactive">Inactive</option>
              <option value="Pending">Pending</option>
              <option value="Suspended">Suspended</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Status Preview</label>
          <div class="status-preview">
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="{
              'status-active':    taxpayerForm.get('status')?.value === 'Active',
              'status-inactive':  taxpayerForm.get('status')?.value === 'Inactive',
              'status-pending':   taxpayerForm.get('status')?.value === 'Pending',
              'status-suspended': taxpayerForm.get('status')?.value === 'Suspended'
            }">
              {{ taxpayerForm.get('status')?.value }}
            </span>
            <span class="status-hint">
              <ng-container *ngIf="taxpayerForm.get('status')?.value === 'Active'">
                Taxpayer can file returns and make payments.
              </ng-container>
              <ng-container *ngIf="taxpayerForm.get('status')?.value === 'Inactive'">
                Taxpayer account is currently inactive.
              </ng-container>
              <ng-container *ngIf="taxpayerForm.get('status')?.value === 'Pending'">
                Taxpayer is awaiting verification.
              </ng-container>
              <ng-container *ngIf="taxpayerForm.get('status')?.value === 'Suspended'">
                Taxpayer account has been suspended.
              </ng-container>
            </span>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-actions">
      <button type="button" class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isLoading">
        <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
      </button>
      <button type="button" class="btn-reset" (click)="onReset()" [disabled]="isLoading">
        <i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise"></i> Reset
      </button>
      <button type="submit" class="btn-submit" [disabled]="isLoading || taxpayerForm.invalid">
        <span *ngIf="!isLoading">
          <i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Save Profile
        </span>
        <span *ngIf="isLoading">
          <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>
          Saving...
        </span>
      </button>
    </div>

  </form>
</div>
```

```typescript
import { BusinessCategory, BusinessType, District, Division } from "./master-data.model";
⋮----
export type BusinessStatus =
  | 'Active'
  | 'Inactive'
  | 'Suspended'
  | 'Cancelled'
  | 'Pending';

// ── Main Business model ──
export interface Business {
  id: number;
  businessRegNo: string;
  businessName: string;
  tinNumber: string;
  binNo?: string;
  ownerName: string;
  businessType: BusinessType;       
  businessCategory: BusinessCategory;
  tradeLicenseNo: string;
  email?: string;
  phone: string;
  address?: string;
  status: BusinessStatus;
  annualTurnover?: number;
  numberOfEmployees?: number;

  registrationDate?: string;
  expiryDate?: string;
  remarks?: string;
  createdAt?: string;
  
  taxpayer?: { id: number; fullName?: string; tinNumber?: string };

  district?: District;

  districtId?: number;
}

  expiryDate?: string;

  phone: string;
  status: BusinessStatus;
  address: string;

}
```

## File: src/app/models/taxpayer.model.ts

```typescript
import { TaxpayerType } from './master-data.model';
⋮----
export type TaxpayerStatus = 'Active' | 'Inactive' | 'Pending' | 'Suspended';
⋮----
export interface Address {
  houseNo?: string;
  roadVillage?: string;
  ward?: string;
  thana: string;
  district: string;
  division: string;
  postalCode?: string;
}
⋮----
export interface Taxpayer {
  id?: number;
  tinNumber?: string;
  taxpayerType: TaxpayerType;

  // Individual fields
  fullName?: string;
  gender?: 'Male' | 'Female' | 'Other';
  fathersName?: string;
  mothersName?: string;
  maritalStatus?: 'Single' | 'Married' | 'Divorced' | 'Widowed';
  nid?: string;
  dateOfBirth?: string;
  profession?: string;
  photoPath?: string;

  // Company fields
  companyName?: string;
  incorporationDate?: string;
  tradeLicenseNo?: string;
  rjscNo?: string;
  natureOfBusiness?: string;

  // Authorized Person Info
  authorizedPersonName?: string;
  authorizedPersonNid?: string;
  authorizedPersonDesignation?: string;

  // Contact & Address
  email: string;
  phone: string;
  presentAddress?: Address;
  permanentAddress?: Address;
  sameAsPermanent?: boolean;

  status: TaxpayerStatus;
  registrationDate?: string;

  approvalStatus?: 'PENDING_REVIEW' | 'APPROVED' | 'REJECTED';
  reviewNotes?: string;
  reviewedAt?: string;
}
⋮----
// Individual fields
⋮----
// Company fields
⋮----
// Authorized Person Info
⋮----
// Contact & Address
⋮----
export interface TaxpayerCreateRequest extends Omit<
  Taxpayer,
  'id' | 'tinNumber'
> {}
```

## File: src/app/features/vat-registration/pages/vat-registration-create/vat-registration-create.component.css
```css
/* vat-registration-create.component.css
   Sections:
   1. Wizard Step Indicator
   2. Step Edit Button
   3. Company Notice
   4. Update Link
   5. Draft Recovery Banner
   6. VAT Category Radio Cards
   7. Currency Prefix Input
   8. Field Hint Text
   9. Business Verified Info-Box
  10. Document Upload Section      ← NEW
  11. Review Modal — Tabular Layout
*/
⋮----
/* ── 1. Wizard Step Indicator ────────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.wizard-steps {
⋮----
.wizard-step {
⋮----
.ws-circle {
⋮----
.wizard-step.active  .ws-circle { background: var(--color-accent); color: var(--color-text-inverse); }
.wizard-step.done    .ws-circle { background: var(--color-teal);   color: var(--color-text-inverse); }
.wizard-step.skipped .ws-circle { background: var(--color-accent-light); color: var(--color-accent); font-size: 12px; }
⋮----
.ws-label {
⋮----
.wizard-step.active .ws-label { color: var(--color-accent); }
.wizard-step.done   .ws-label { color: var(--color-teal); }
⋮----
.wizard-connector {
⋮----
.wizard-connector.done { background: var(--color-teal); }
⋮----
/* ── 2. Step Edit Button ─────────────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.btn-edit-step {
⋮----
.btn-edit-step:hover { background: #d0e6f7; color: var(--color-accent-dark); }
⋮----
/* ── 3. Company Notice ───────────────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.company-notice {
⋮----
.company-notice i { font-size: 20px; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 1px; }
⋮----
/* ── 4. Update Link ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.update-link {
⋮----
.update-link:hover { background: #d0e6f7; text-decoration: none; color: var(--color-accent-dark); }
⋮----
/* ── 5. Draft Recovery Banner ────────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.draft-banner {
⋮----
.draft-banner-left {
⋮----
.draft-banner-left i { font-size: 18px; color: var(--color-warning); flex-shrink: 0; }
.draft-banner-left strong { display: block; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--color-text-primary); margin-bottom: 1px; }
.draft-banner-left span   { display: block; font-size: 12px; color: var(--color-text-secondary); }
⋮----
.draft-banner-actions { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; flex-shrink: 0; }
⋮----
.draft-btn-continue {
⋮----
.draft-btn-continue:hover { background: var(--color-orange-dark); }
⋮----
.draft-btn-discard {
⋮----
.draft-btn-discard:hover { background: var(--color-bg-secondary); color: var(--color-danger); border-color: var(--color-danger-border); }
⋮----
/* ── 6. VAT Category Radio Cards ─────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.radio-group {
⋮----
.radio-opt {
⋮----
.radio-opt:hover { border-color: var(--color-accent-mid); background: var(--color-accent-light); }
⋮----
.radio-opt.selected {
⋮----
.radio-input-hidden {
⋮----
.radio-dot {
⋮----
.radio-opt.selected .radio-dot { border-color: var(--color-accent-mid); }
⋮----
.radio-dot-inner {
⋮----
.radio-opt.selected .radio-dot-inner { display: block; }
.radio-opt-label { line-height: 1.3; }
⋮----
/* ── 7. Currency Prefix Input ────────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.input-prefix {
⋮----
.input-prefix:focus-within {
⋮----
.input-prefix.locked { background: var(--color-bg-secondary); }
⋮----
.prefix-symbol {
⋮----
.prefix-input {
⋮----
.prefix-input:focus       { box-shadow: none !important; outline: none; }
.prefix-input[readonly]   { background: var(--color-bg-secondary); color: var(--color-text-secondary); cursor: not-allowed; }
⋮----
/* ── 8. Field Hint Text ──────────────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.field-hint {
⋮----
/* ── 9. Business Verified Info-Box ───────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.verified-notice {
⋮----
.verified-notice i { font-size: 15px; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 1px; color: var(--color-accent-mid); }
⋮----
/* ── 10. Document Upload Section ─────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.doc-upload-list {
⋮----
/* One document row */
.doc-upload-row {
⋮----
.doc-upload-row:last-child  { border-bottom: none; }
.doc-upload-row:hover       { background: var(--color-bg-secondary); }
⋮----
/* Left side: icon + label block */
.doc-upload-left {
⋮----
/* File type icon */
.doc-icon {
⋮----

.doc-hint {

/* Remove button */
.btn-remove-doc {

⋮----
/* Upload button — styled label wrapping hidden file input */
.btn-upload-doc {

.btn-upload-doc:hover {
⋮----
/* Visually hidden file input — triggered by the label above */
.file-input-hidden {
⋮----
/* Upload count badge in section header */
.upload-count-badge {
⋮----
/* ── 11. Review Modal — Tabular Layout ───────────────────────── */
⋮----
.review-modal-card {
⋮----
.review-modal-card .modal-accent {
⋮----
.review-modal-header {
⋮----
.review-scroll-body {
⋮----
.review-scroll-body::-webkit-scrollbar       { width: 4px; }
.review-scroll-body::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; }
.review-scroll-body::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--color-border-primary); border-radius: 4px; }
⋮----
.summary-section {
⋮----
.summary-section:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
⋮----
.summary-section-label {
⋮----
.summary-row {
⋮----
.summary-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
⋮----
.summary-key {
⋮----
.summary-val {
⋮----
/* Uploaded status in review modal */
⋮----
/* Not-uploaded in review modal */
.doc-pending {
⋮----
.review-declaration {
⋮----
.declaration-label {
⋮----
.declaration-label input[type="checkbox"] {
⋮----
.declaration-label span {
⋮----
.review-modal-card .modal-actions {
⋮----
.review-modal-card .btn-modal-confirm:disabled {
⋮----
/* ── Responsive ──────────────────────────────────────────────── */
⋮----
.wizard-steps           { padding: 14px 16px 0; }
.ws-label               { display: none; }
⋮----
.draft-banner           { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 10px; }
.draft-banner-actions   { width: 100%; }
.draft-btn-continue,
⋮----
.radio-group            { flex-direction: column; }
.radio-opt              { min-width: unset; }
⋮----
.doc-upload-row         { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 10px; }
.doc-upload-right       { width: 100%; justify-content: flex-end; }
.doc-filename           { max-width: 100%; }
⋮----
.review-modal-card      { max-width: 100%; }
.review-scroll-body     { max-height: 46vh; }
.summary-key            { min-width: 80px; }
```
